### 135. 高保真夜间海港闪光照片

**作者**: [Danna R.](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2029358244838154467)  **日期**: 2026-03-05  **语言**: en

> 这是一个极其详细的提示，用于生成一张高保真原始照片，模拟 iPhone 17 Pro 在夜间码头使用闪光灯拍摄的效果。它基于提供的自拍照进行严格的身份锁定，并指定了姿势（低蹲）、服装（灰色罗纹针织迷你连衣裙、及膝长靴）、灯光（刺眼的直射闪光）和环境（黑暗的水面、石砖）等精确细节。

![高保真夜间海港闪光照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772778729298_1kemra_HCm6kBOXQAAZ9Ud.jpg)
![高保真夜间海港闪光照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772778729435_xr9dp1_HCm6kBQWkAAIlzL.jpg)

```
(9:16) Raw high-fidelity photo, high-angle medium shot. iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 24mm wide-angle, f/2.8, sharp subject focus, authentic digital grain.

Scene: Subject fills ~65% of frame in crouching/kneeling pose. Upper 40% shows pitch-black night sky and dark marina water; lower 20% textured stone tile floor. Camera ~1.5m above subject angled downward.

Identity Lock: Inherit ALL facial features from the provided selfie (face shape, bone structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hair).

Photogenic Enhancements: Natural skin clarity with preserved texture, even tone, subtle luminosity, refined jawline shadows, gentle nasal highlight, soft cheekbone highlights, enhanced iris catchlights, natural lash separation, groomed brows, pearl-white teeth, salon-finish hair with controlled flyaways. Bio-fidelity with micro-pores, hydrated T-zone, faint vellus hair.

Expression: Pensive neutral look. Gaze ~45° to mid-right off-camera. Slightly parted lips, relaxed brows, head tilted slightly right.

Hair: Inherit color/texture from selfie. Long sleek straight hair with center part falling behind shoulders. Strong flash highlights creating strand separation.

Makeup: Glossy pink lips, clean foundation, winged black eyeliner, defined lashes, soft blush.

Accessories: Thin gold chain necklace with small heart pendant, crystal-studded silver strap across left shoulder, gold bracelets/watch on left wrist.

Outfit: Light grey rib-knit off-shoulder mini dress with long sleeves. White floral-lace tights. Dark slate-grey suede thigh-high boots. Realistic fabric tension and elbow/waist bunching; detailed lace skin interaction. Defined S-curve silhouette with enhanced waist–hip and leg geometry.

Pose: Torso and hips angled ~45° right. Head turned further right, looking off-camera. Low crouch on stone floor, arms relaxed forward with natural finger articulation.

Mood: Moody urban nighttime aesthetic. Palette: slate grey, optic white, onyx black, pale gold.

Lighting: Harsh direct flash (~6500K) from camera, bright skin highlights and deep shadows. High-contrast flash photography look.

Environment: Night marina/waterfront — dark water with vertical dock light reflections, blurred white yacht mid-left, large textured grey stone tiles underfoot. Sharp subject shadows anchor to the ground.
```

### 138. 具有身份保留功能的逼真生活方式/编辑照片拍摄提示

**作者**: [novah](https://x.com/novah_ia/status/2029173975738101904)  **日期**: 2026-03-04  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体、照片级的法语图像生成提示，指示 AI 使用提供的参考照片，在街头咖啡馆场景中创建生活方式/编辑类照片拍摄场景。该提示严格要求 100% 保留拍摄对象的身份（面部、比例、特征、年龄、发型），并指定了装饰、构图（垂直全身照）、光线（强烈直射闪光灯/垃圾邮件风格）、服装（超大白色 T 恤、黑色裤子）和姿势（站立、手触头发、模特姿态）的固定参数。

![具有身份保留功能的逼真生活方式/编辑照片拍摄提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772692219882_aqwf0s_HCkS-XAXoAE-Yv7.jpg)

```
Créez une séance photo lifestyle/éditoriale photoréaliste de type « flash décontracté dans un café de rue », en utilisant la photo d'une personne fournie comme référence. L'apparence de la personne doit être strictement identique à celle du modèle : visage parfaitement reconnaissable (100 %), mêmes proportions et géométrie du visage, même forme des yeux, du nez et des lèvres, même teint, même âge, même coiffure et même implantation des cheveux. Ne modifiez pas le visage, ne l'« améliorez » pas et ne changez pas le genre. Le décor est fixe : un café/espace lounge en soirée (intérieur), murs beiges, grande fenêtre donnant sur la nuit noire, comptoir de bar en bois le long de la fenêtre, mobilier simple : chaises en métal noir, tables en bois. À gauche, une grande fleur d'intérieur en pot. Aucun panneau, logo ou texte lisible sur les murs ou les fenêtres. La composition est fixe : un plan vertical en pied, la caméra à hauteur de poitrine, la personne se tenant légèrement à droite du centre. Au premier plan, à gauche, une chaise en métal noir est posée sur un sac à dos blanc orné d'un imprimé graphique noir (sans texte lisible). L'arrière-plan est légèrement flou, mettant ainsi l'accent sur le personnage. L'éclairage est fixe : un flash puissant (flash direct de l'appareil photo), des ombres marquées sur le mur et le sol, un style photo « spam », comme celui d'un appareil photo compact ou d'un iPhone. La tenue vestimentaire est également fixe : un t-shirt blanc oversize sans logo ni inscription, un pantalon noir large, des baskets blanches à rayures noires (style rétro), une ceinture, une chaîne ou des clés à la taille (sans marque) sont acceptables. La pose est fixe : la personne se tient debout, détendue, à côté de la chaise, le corps légèrement tourné de trois quarts ; la main droite est levée et touche la tête/les cheveux (paume sur la nuque), la main gauche est baissée près de la hanche. Les jambes : une jambe est tendue, l'autre légèrement fléchie, le talon levé, créant une posture de mannequin. La tête est tournée sur le côté (à gauche), le regard n'est pas fixé sur l'objectif, l'expression est calme et assurée, sans sourire. Qualité/Style : ultra-réaliste, netteté du visage, légère profondeur de champ, teint naturel, grain léger, aucune retouche, aspect brillant. Important : anatomie rigoureusement correcte : deux bras, deux jambes, cinq doigts, aucune difformité ni membre surnuméraire.p
```

**Related**: [[综合艺术]]、[[名片与Logo]]、[[室内设计]]

### 139. Nano Banana Pro 主控提示模板 (JSON)

**作者**: [Ryan Hart](https://x.com/thisdudelikesAI/status/2029119835830141293)  **日期**: 2026-03-04  **语言**: en

> Nano Banana Pro 的完整 JSON 模板，旨在结合所有技术和创意控制（场景、相机、灯光、色彩分级、文本、参考、角色），以生成完美的图像。

![Nano Banana Pro 主控提示模板 (JSON)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772692210203_p3fahr_HCjhvLZawAIDbVH.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_mode": "thinking|standard",

  "output_specifications": {
    "resolution": "1K|2K|4K",
    "aspect_ratio": "16:9|1:1|9:16|custom",
    "quality_priority": "speed|balanced|quality"
  },

  "scene_description": {
    "primary_subject": "{argument name="primary subject" default="[main focus of image]"}",
    "environment": "{argument name="environment" default="[setting and background]"}",
    "atmosphere": "[mood and feeling]",
    "style": "[visual aesthetic]",
    "time_of_day": "[if relevant]"
  },

  "camera_controls": {
    "angle": "[camera perspective]",
    "focal_length": "[lens type - wide/standard/telephoto]",
    "depth_of_field": "[shallow/deep, what's in focus]",
    "composition": "[rule of thirds/centered/golden ratio/etc]"
  },

  "lighting_setup": {
    "primary_light": {
      "type": "[natural/studio/dramatic/soft]",
      "direction": "[where light comes from]",
      "intensity": "[bright/moderate/moody]"
    },
    "shadows": "[deep/subtle/minimal]",
    "color_temperature": "[warm/cool/neutral]",
    "special_effects": "[rim light/backlighting/etc if needed]"
  },

  "color_grading": {
    "overall_tone": "[vibrant/muted/monochrome/etc]",
    "color_palette": ["primary color", "secondary color", "accent color"],
    "mood": "[emotional impact of colors]"
  },

  "text_elements": [
    {
      "text_content": "[exact text to render]",
      "position": "[location in image]",
      "font_style": "[typography description]",
      "size": "[relative size]",
      "color": "[text color]",
      "effects": "[glow/shadow/3D/etc]",
      "language": "[if not English]"
    }
  ],

  "reference_images": [
    {
      "image_id": 1,
      "purpose": "style reference|composition reference|color reference|character reference",
      "extract_elements": ["specific elements to copy"],
      "apply_to": "[where to use these elements]",
      "transfer_intensity": "[0-100%]"
    }
  ],

  "characters": [
    {
      "character_id": 1,
      "detailed_description": "[ethnicity, age, gender, facial features, hair, expression]",
      "clothing": "[detailed outfit description]",
      "pose": "[body position and gesture]",
      "position_in_scene": "[spatial placement]",
      "consistency_reference": "[image_id if maintaining across multiple generations]"
    }
  ],

  "grounding": {
    "enabled": true|false,
    "search_queries": ["facts to verify"],
    "data_requirements": ["specific information needed"],
    "accuracy_priority": "high|medium"
  },

  "style_constraints": {
    "artistic_style": "[photorealistic/illustration/3D render/watercolor/etc]",
    "inspiration": "[specific artists or movements if relevant]",
    "must_avoid": ["elements to exclude"]
  },

  "technical_requirements": {
    "intended_use": "[social media/print/web/presentation]",
    "safe_zones": "[areas to keep clear fo"
  }
}
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[水彩]]、[[手绘素描]]

### 141. 将照片转换为黑白填色页

**作者**: [Ai Prompts Lab](https://x.com/Aipromptslap/status/2028939520662458758)  **日期**: 2026-03-03  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，旨在将现有照片转换为适合儿童的简化黑白涂色页，同时保持构图和相似度，并严格遵守线条、阴影和可打印性规则。

![将照片转换为黑白填色页](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772605583943_9wm648_HCg9u4maUAA5dt6.jpg)
![将照片转换为黑白填色页](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772605583941_rwzc16_HCg9u4mawAQIwmd.jpg)

```
Convert the provided photo into a black and white coloring page. Preserve the original composition, proportions, and recognizable facial features from the original photo.
Style: children's illustration with a soft cartoonish look, inspired by Pixar aesthetics, but simplified for coloring.
Lines: clean, smooth, medium-thickness outlines, clear closed shapes, no broken lines, no sketchiness.
Shading: no gray colors, no shadows, no gradients — outlines only.
Details: simplified but accurate, preserving the recognizability of key objects and expressions, removing unnecessary background.
Faces: expressive, friendly, slightly rounded features, kid-friendly, maintaining likeness.
Background: simplified interior or environmental elements, minimalistic yet readable.
Composition: centered, balanced, with comfortable margins for printing.
Technical requirements:
– clean black lines on a white background
– high contrast
– printable A4 / US Letter format
– suitable for coloring with pencils or markers
No color, no textures, no realism, no photo effects, no hatching, no cross-hatching.
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[室内设计]]

"lighting": "Soft, diffused evening ambient light. Frontal soft illumination, possibly from boat lights mixed with twilight sky, creating gentle, flattering highlights on her face, chest, and the white fabric of her dress. Accurate subsurface scattering on the skin. No harsh directional shadows.",
"mood_and_expression": "Playful, alluring, and relaxed. Her expression is seductive with a slight, subtle smile, lips parted as her finger rests on them, maintaining intense and direct eye contact with the viewer.",
"style_and_realism": "Photorealistic, candid lifestyle photography. Unedited, raw aesthetic with high anatomical fidelity. No beauty filters, no airbrushing, preserving natural skin imperfections and natural fabric folds.",
"colors_and_tone": "Cool color palette in the background with dark oceanic blues and muted grey-blue sky. Striking contrast with the crisp bright white of the dress and cushions, the warm, accurate, and natural tones of her skin, and the golden amber hue of the wine in the glass.",
"quality_and_technical_details": "High fidelity, crisp resolution. Intricate details visible such as individual stra"

### 144. Grok Video Generation from Nano Banana 2 Image

### 148. 使用 ControlNet 制作逼真的抓拍生活照

**作者**: [Marco](https://x.com/maarcoofdezz/status/2027798237185286339)  **日期**: 2026-02-28  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的 JSON 提示词，用于 Nano Banana Pro，指定一张年轻女性身穿黄色比基尼，坐在半户外酒吧区藤椅上的写实抓拍生活照。关键在于，它包含了详细的 ControlNet 参数（OpenPose 用于坐姿，MiDaS 用于深度控制）以及一个广泛的负面提示词，以确保高质量和真实感。

![使用 ControlNet 制作逼真的抓拍生活照](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772346669636_hb51ji_HCQvvzLaYAAdQnH.jpg)

```
"subject": "Young woman, long brown hair, wearing a yellow string bikini with blue trim and logos. Tattoos on right arm and fingers. Wearing a delicate necklace.",
"pose": "Sitting in a wicker chair, leaning slightly forward. Hands resting on outer hips, touching bikini bottoms. Direct gaze.",
"environment": "Semi-outdoor bar area. Wicker chair. White counter and slush machine to the right. Man sitting facing away in background left. Blue sky.",
"camera": "Mid-shot, slightly elevated angle. Shallow depth of field with blurred background.",
"lighting": "Bright, natural daylight. Even illumination with soft shadows under chin and chest.",
"mood_and_expression": "Neutral expression, direct eye contact.",
"style_and_realism": "Photorealistic candid lifestyle photograph.",
"colors_and_tone": "Vibrant palette. Dominant yellow and blue, warm skin tones, bright blue sky.",
"quality_and_technical_details": "Sharp focus on subject, natural skin texture, standard digital camera resolution.",
"aspect_ratio_and_output": "3:4",
"controlnet": {
"pose_control": {
"model_type": "OpenPose",
"purpose": "Match sitting posture and hand placement on hips.",
"constraints": "Maintain torso angle and arm positioning exactly.",
"recommended_weight": 0.8
},
"depth_control": {
"model_type": "MiDaS",
"purpose": "Maintain spatial separation between subject, bar counter, and background.",
"constraints": "Preserve 3D volume of body and chair.",
"recommended_weight": 0.75
}
},
"negative_prompt": "stylization, distortion, proportion changes, depth flattening, beautification filters, cartoon, painting, unnatural anatomy, weird hands"
```

> 生成一个概念性建筑等距模型（透视模型）的提示，该模型是一个有机形态的企业办公大楼，从俯视角度观看，强调流畅的空间流动、柔和的粉彩色调、带肋木材和受控的摄影棚灯光。

![概念性等距办公大楼模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772346666853_pe8t48_HCPbtcyXkAAgMJV.jpg)
![概念性等距办公大楼模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772346666829_k3fjgc_HCPbtcpWUAAQ9AV.jpg)
![概念性等距办公大楼模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772346666814_7tjdub_HCPbtcyWwAA2iC0.jpg)
![概念性等距办公大楼模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772346667640_lilznm_HCPbtctW8AAo105.jpg)

```
A conceptual architectural isometric model of an organic-form corporate office tower, presented as an exhibition-scale diorama. The building is shown with a cutaway section, exposing fluid spatial flow, curved meeting rooms, and lounge zoning from a top-down isometric perspective. Volumes are lightly separated by seamlessly curved translucent partitions to suggest circulation and function. Warm micro-LEDs illuminate the individual floors from within. Strong use of negative space and clear compositional hierarchy. Thin structural outlines, soft pastel lavender and mint, ribbed wood and dark terrazzo tones, minimal abstract signage, subtle human-scale markers. Smooth surfaces, pill-shaped rounded edges, dramatic controlled studio lighting, architectural model photography style, clean dark neutral background, high-detail yet minimal.
```

Use the uploaded image as the strict character reference. Preserve the character’s facial structure, expression, skin tone, hairstyle, outfit, proportions, and pose exactly as shown. Also keep background structure. Do not modify, beautify, stylize, or reinterpret the face in any way beyond embroidery translation. Render the character as hyper-detailed hand embroidery artwork, using realistic satin stitches, long-and-short stitches, and dense fill stitches to create natural depth, fabric texture, and thread sheen. Visible embroidery threads, precise stitch direction following facial contours, smooth gradients formed through thread layering, high stitch density, museum-quality textile craftsmanship. Neutral fabric background, soft studio lighting, ultra-sharp macro detail, photorealistic embroidery realism, no illustration or cartoon style.

Central Structure : The Vessel The central focus must be a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of {argument name="person's name" default="[Persons name]"}.
This silhouette acts as the container for the internal visual narrative. It must be centered perfectly on the canvas. The Grid Fill and Mixed Media Textures The interior of the silhouette should be populated by a dense photo mosaic grid made from action shots throughout the person’s career. Critical Texture Direction Do not paste flat photos. Each grid cell should have artistic treatment to create a tactile, collage-like aesthetic. Incorporate a mix of the following textures selectively across different cells: Halftone dots (comic-book style raster patterns) 
Fabric or embroidery textures suggesting jersey material or stitched patches Film grain or heavy noise on high-contrast action shots The result should feel handcrafted and layered rather than digitally assembled. 

Color Strategy Base palette: monochrome black and white. Introduce selective color overlays only on specific grid cells. The accent colors should relate to the relevant team, brand, or national flag. Use color sparingly to create visual rhythm and emphasis. 

Typography and Branding – Strict Micro-Scaling Top Left (The name) Write “{argument name="person's name" default="[person name]"}” using the font Inter Semibold. Kerning: tight negative kerning , Size: small and discreet. The name must occupy a maximum of 20% of the total canvas width. Do not make it large or dominant. 
Top Right (The symbol) Place the primary logo (Team, Brand, or Flag). Size: very small. It must occupy a maximum of 10% of the total canvas width. 

Composition and Background Background Use off-white or light grey. Include a visible high-quality paper or subtle concrete texture. Avoid flat digital white. 
Alignment Center the silhouette precisely. Maintain generous negative space around the figure to preserve elegance and balance.

MASTER MINIATURE DIORAMA PROMPT SHELL — CONSOLIDATED VERSION
SCENE:
A fortified desert caravanserai featuring thick outer walls, a large central courtyard, multiple merchant lodging wings, camel stables, watchtowers, arched gateways, and clustered market storage rooms.

If no scene description is provided, generate a visually interesting culturally recognizable environment or architectural location of your own choosing. Create a cohesive miniature settlement, district, or environment with multiple structures, pathways, and environmental storytelling elements arranged into a contained display composition suitable for a collectible diorama.
When generating or inventing a scene, prioritize architectural and cultural diversity and intentionally vary the environment type, building styles, historical inspiration, regional influence, and settlement purpose so each generated miniature feels visually distinct and not a repetition of common village, temple, garden, or plaza layouts.
Ensure the architecture organizes around a natural central hub so structures cluster with believable spatial gravity, forming a cohesive miniature settlement with denser core structures and supporting elements arranged outward. Arrange the layout as a compact, layered, interconnected district filling the platform naturally without empty gaps. Ensure the entire environment clearly reads as a small handcrafted tabletop collectible model, with miniature-scale architecture and compressed model-world proportions rather than life-sized buildings.
STYLE:
Frame the camera at a stable product-display distance so the entire collectible diorama remains clearly visible with comfortable margins, avoiding close cinematic crops or environmental perspective shots. Render as a premium stylized 3D collectible miniature diorama on a fully visible, centered self-contained display base, shown from a slightly elevated 3/4 tabletop angle against a clean neutral studio gradient background. Maintain collectible figurine scale and clean display presentation.
All elements should appear sculpted from smooth matte ceramic, painted resin, or stylized polymer with rounded edges, simplified geometry, and slightly exaggerated toy-like proportions. Keep surfaces clean and intentionally stylized. Avoid fingerprints, rough handmade textures, workshop scenes, macro photography depth-of-field, or photoreal clay imperfections.
Use soft professional studio product lighting: gentle global illumination, warm key light, soft ambient bounce, controlled shadows, and optional warm interior window glow.
Render any water or translucent materials as poured clear resin with smooth transparency, subtle reflections, soft internal depth, and slightly thick stylized edges.
Include small environmental details but keep everything cohesive, simplified, and sculptural. Prioritize clean stylized modeling over photorealistic texture detail.
Over

The subject is captured in a magnetic, off-the-cuff posture, leaning forward over the curved back of an ornate, dark-wood chair. Attention is atomized on the hand placement: the right hand holds a translucent glass filled with a golden liquid, with the fingers spread elegantly—the thumb and index finger gripping the stem while the others fan out naturally against the bowl. The left arm is extended, with the palm resting firmly on the chair's frame, showcasing a relaxed but stylish body language typical of early 2000s party photography.

### **Photography: Low-Fidelity Digital Realism**
The image utilizes the distinct visual language of a mid-2000s mobile camera. It features a heavy, authentic digital grain and a direct, harsh flash that creates a high-contrast look, bleaching the central subjects while casting deep, sharp shadows behind them. The edges of the frame exhibit a slight motion blur, enhancing the "in-the-moment" feel. In the bottom right corner, a translucent, glowing orange digital date stamp reads "OCT 24 ’03," anchoring the image in a specific nostalgic timeline. The background is a warm, unfocused blur of a golden chandelier and ambient indoor lighting, providing a rich, textured depth.

### **Fashion & Accessories: Microscopic Y2K Detail**
*  **The Garment:** The subject wears a stylish, high-coverage cream-colored athletic bodysuit. The fabric is a fine-ribbed jersey cotton, featuring a delicate scalloped lace trim along the neckline and short sleeves, blending sportswear comfort with chic Y2K detailing.
*  **Hair & Headwear:** The hair is styled into two high, symmetrical space buns. The left bun is wrapped in a voluminous white vintage lace scrunchie, while the right bun is adorned with a crisp white silk ribbon tied into a structural bow. Wispy, face-framing strands are left out to soften the look.
*  **Ink & Ornamentation:** Meticulous fine-line tattoos are visible on the uncovered skin of the arms and upper chest. These include a detailed monarch butterfly on the deltoid, a minimalist heart on the inner bicep, and a centered gothic-style emblem on the upper chest.
*  **Grooming & Makeup:** The aesthetic is defined by "igari-style" blush—a heavy wash of vibrant pink pigment extending across the cheekbones and the bridge of the nose. The lips are finished with a high-viscosity clear gloss, and the eyes are accentuated with soft lavender-grey contact lenses and sharp, w

![日落时分海滩上姿态夸张的丰腴女子](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771914994436_uert7j_HB0GQVPWcAAV6IF.jpg)

```
{
  “subject”: {
    “description”: “A vertical photograph of a strikingly beautiful young woman with an exaggerated curvy build, posing on a sandy beach during sunset.”,
    “body”: {
      “physique”: “She possesses an incredibly exaggerated ‘slim-thick’ hourglass figure. Her waist is extremely tiny and snatched, transitioning dramatically into massively prominent, round, and wide glutes and thick, shapely thighs. The contrast between her very small waist and exaggerated lower body is the defining feature.”,
      “pose”: “Standing on the soft sand near the water’s edge. She is twisted slightly, looking back over her right shoulder directly at the viewer, replicating the exact pose from the previous scenarios. Her stance strongly emphasizes the extreme curve of her lower back and glutes.”,
“features”: “hair pulled up in a casual messy bun with a gold star-shaped hair clip. Her face is strikingly beautiful and gorgeous but with realistic skin texture, natural pores, and genuine features, not looking artificial. Her body is bare save for the bikini and has NO tattoos.”
    }
  },
  “wardrobe”: {
    “outfit”: “She is wearing a modern, minimalist two-piece white bikini. The top is sleek and supportive, and the bottoms are high-cut (cheeky style) to snugly fit and showcase her exaggerated curves.”
  },
  “pose_action”: “Standing at the seaside during golden hour, looking back over her shoulder at the camera.”,
  “scene”: {
    “environment”: “A beautiful, scenic sandy beach at sunset.”,
    “elements”: “She is standing on golden sand with gentle turquoise ocean waves lapping just behind her feet. The background shows the vast ocean horizon with a dramatic sunset sky filled with warm oranges, pinks, and purples. No other people are immediately close.”,
“composition”: “Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio. A medium-full shot capturing the subject from the knees up against the beach backdrop.”
  },
  “lighting”: {
    “setup”: “Beautiful, warm natural golden hour light from the setting sun.”,
    “details": “The low angle of the sun creates a warm glow on her skin, highlights the texture of the white bikini fabric, and casts soft, long shadows on the sand, enhancing muscle definition and curves.”
  },
  “camera”: {
    “technical”: “High-resolution professional photograph. Sharp focus on the main subject. Realistic, candid beach style capture.”,
    “aspect_ratio”: “9:16”,
    “constraints”: [
      “CRITICAL: The subject must have the specific EXAGGERATED hourglass physique with a tiny waist and massive glutes.”,
      “CRITICAL: The face must be incredibly beautiful but REALISTIC.”,
“CRITICAL: There must be NO TATTOOS.”,
      “CRITICAL: Outfit must be a MODERN WHITE BIKINI.”,
      “CRITICAL: Scene must be a SEASIDE BEACH AT SUNSET.”,
      “The final image must be a photorealistic vertical 9:16 photograph.”
    ]
  }
}
```

### 179. ControlNet 约束下的逼真沙滩姿势

**作者**: [Jessia](https://x.com/itsjessiababy/status/2025861807856930862)  **日期**: 2026-02-23  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术性的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的海滩照片：一位年轻女性身穿黑色丁字裤比基尼，站在齐腰深的水中，摆出特定的扭曲姿势。该提示利用详细的 ControlNet 约束（OpenPose 和 MiDaS Depth）来确保解剖学和体积的准确性。

![ControlNet 约束下的逼真沙滩姿势](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771914988265_m5tm6j_HB1OkKbXgAAxjge.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": "Young adult female, tanned skin with water droplets and sand. Wet, wavy blonde hair gathered up. Wearing a black string bikini with thong bottom and thin straps. Gold watch on left wrist, small earring.",
  "pose": "Standing in waist-deep water, body facing away. Torso twisted right, head turned left looking down over shoulder in profile. Left arm raised, hand touching forehead. Right hand behind neck. Hips angled toward camera.",
  "environment": "Shallow turquoise ocean water over sandy bottom with sparse seagrass. Clear bright blue sky. Distinct horizon line. Distant parasail speck on right.",
  "camera": "Medium shot from mid-thigh up. Slightly above water level. Clear focus on subject, slight water refraction at bottom.",
  "lighting": "Bright, direct daylight. Strong specular highlights on wet skin, shoulders, and buttocks. Natural, high-contrast shadows defining physical form.",
  "mood_and_expression": "Relaxed, candid beach setting. Neutral, downward gaze.",
  "style_and_realism": "High-fidelity photograph, raw snapshot realism.",
  "colors_and_tone": "Vibrant natural colors. Deep blue sky, cyan water, bronze skin tone, black swimwear.",
  "quality_and_technical_details": "Sharp focus on subject. Visible texture of sand and water droplets on skin. Natural lighting and shadows.",
  "aspect_ratio_and_output": "3:4",
  "controlnet": {
    "pose_control": {
      "model_type": "openpose_full",
      "purpose": "Strictly lock skeletal alignment, anatomical proportions, torso orientation, and prevent structural or volumetric alteration",
      "constraints": "No limb length adjustment, no torso compression, no chest volume reduction, no posture change, no symmetry correction, no ribcage narrowing",
      "recommended_weight": 1.2
    },
    "depth_control": {
      "model_type": "depth_midas",
      "purpose": "Enforce exact volumetric projection, silhouette area equivalence, curvature depth integrity, and spatial layering",
      "constraints": "No depth flattening, no volumetric shrinkage, no perspective reinterpretation, no shadow softening, no foreground-background collapse",
      "recommended_weight": 1.25
    }
  },
  "negative_prompt": "stylization, aesthetic correction, body normalization, shape refinement, geometric reinterpretation, anatomical distortion, breast reduction, volume compression, torso slimming, ribcage narrowing, symmetry correction, proportion changes, depth flattening, shadow softening, beautification filters, perspective alteration"
}
```

{
  "image_prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "appearance": "A young woman with shoulder-length, loosely waved dark brown hair parted in the middle.",
      "expression": "Calm, confident, and looking directly at the camera with soft, natural makeup.",
      "pose": "Dynamic and athletic high-fashion pose. She is balancing on her straight right leg while her left leg is raised high to the side, extending out of her clothing. Her arms are relaxed downwards.",
      "skin_tone": "Warm, even, slightly tanned."
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "base_layer": "A dark, likely black, two-piece bikini featuring a bralette top with subtle lace trim and high-cut bottoms.",
      "outer_layer": "A long, sheer white lace cover-up or lightweight robe. It has long sleeves, a scalloped hemline that falls above the knee, and an intricate floral lace pattern. It is worn open, draped casually."
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "A spacious, luxurious, modern high-rise penthouse or apartment.",
      "architecture": "Features expansive floor-to-ceiling windows on the left side, allowing abundant natural light. The floor is made of highly polished, reflective light-colored marble or large tiles.",
      "background_details": "Out of focus in the background, there is contemporary, minimalist living room furniture including neutral-toned sofas, a low table, and warm wood accents. Outside the windows, a distant cityscape and a bright blue sky with scattered clouds are visible."
    },
    "lighting_and_composition": {
      "lighting": "Bright, natural daylight entering strongly from the windows on the left. This creates a high-key, airy atmosphere with distinct, elegant shadows cast onto the reflective floor.",
      "color_palette": "High contrast between the bright whites of the room/lace and the deep black of the swimsuit, accented by warm skin tones and the cool blue sky.",
      "camera_details": "Full-body shot taken from a neutral or very slightly low angle to emphasize the height of the room and the subject's pose. The subject is in sharp focus, while the background has a gentle depth-of-field blur."
    },
    "style": "High-fidelity, photorealistic, editorial fashion photography, bright and airy aesthetic."
  }
}

His skin is cracking and glowing with orange molten fissures and embers, as dark ash and smoke billow from the right side of his face, neck, and shoulder. His dark sweater is partially burnt away. ### 185. 坚固矿业聚落的收藏级微缩立体模型

**作者**: [Artingent](https://x.com/artingent/status/2025283202479427777)  **日期**: 2026-02-21  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 生成风格化 3D 收藏品微缩立体模型的高度详细提示。场景是一个崎岖的采矿定居点，建在被丛林覆盖的火山斜坡上，特色是木制平台、钻井塔和微型工人。风格要求平滑的哑光陶瓷/树脂纹理、简化的几何形状和专业的影棚产品照明，明确避免照片级真实感纹理或真实世界的摄影美学。

![坚固矿业聚落的收藏级微缩立体模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771741700290_rwd8vz_HBtATw3bgAADXCz.jpg)

```
SCENE:
A rugged mining settlement built into a jungle-covered volcanic slope with wooden platforms, drilling towers, and rope lifts. Tiny workers guide carts along narrow tracks while monkeys climb vines and dense foliage surrounds the machinery.

When generating or inventing a scene, prioritize architectural and cultural diversity and intentionally vary the environment type, building styles, historical inspiration, regional influence, and settlement purpose so each generated miniature feels visually distinct and not a repetition of common village, temple, garden, or plaza layouts.
Ensure the architecture organizes around a natural central hub so structures cluster with believable spatial gravity, forming a cohesive miniature settlement with denser core structures and supporting elements arranged outward. Arrange the layout as a compact, layered, interconnected district filling the platform naturally without empty gaps. Ensure the entire environment clearly reads as a small handcrafted tabletop collectible model, with miniature-scale architecture and compressed model-world proportions rather than life-sized buildings.
STYLE:
Frame the camera at a stable product-display distance so the entire collectible diorama remains clearly visible with comfortable margins, avoiding close cinematic crops or environmental perspective shots. Render as a premium stylized 3D collectible miniature diorama on a fully visible, centered self-contained display base, shown from a slightly elevated 3/4 tabletop angle against a clean neutral studio gradient background. Maintain collectible figurine scale and clean display presentation.
All elements should appear sculpted from smooth matte ceramic, painted resin, or stylized polymer with rounded edges, simplified geometry, and slightly exaggerated toy-like proportions. Keep surfaces clean and intentionally stylized. Avoid fingerprints, rough handmade textures, workshop scenes, macro photography depth-of-field, or photoreal clay imperfections.
Use soft professional studio product lighting: gentle global illumination, warm key light, soft ambient bounce, controlled shadows, and optional warm interior window glow.
Render any water or translucent materials as poured clear resin with smooth transparency, subtle reflections, soft internal depth, and slightly thick stylized edges.
Include small environmental details but keep everything cohesive, simplified, and sculptural. Prioritize clean stylized modeling over photorealistic texture detail.
Overall intent: premium collectible miniature, stylized 3D marketplace presentation, cozy whimsical mood, smooth sculpt clarity, controlled studio rendering, avoid real-world photography aesthetics.
aspect ratio 4:3
```

**Related**: [[综合产品]]、[[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[3D渲染]]

Render as a premium stylized 3D collectible miniature diorama on a fully visible, centered self-contained display base, shown from a slightly elevated 3/4 tabletop angle against a clean neutral studio gradient background. Maintain collectible figurine scale and clean display presentation.
All elements should appear sculpted from smooth matte ceramic, painted resin, or stylized polymer with rounded edges, simplified geometry, and slightly exaggerated toy-like proportions. Keep surfaces clean and intentionally stylized. Avoid fingerprints, rough handmade textures, workshop scenes, macro photography depth-of-field, or photoreal clay imperfections.
Use soft professional studio product lighting: gentle global illumination, warm key light, soft ambient bounce, controlled shadows, and optional warm interior window glow.
Render any water or translucent materials as poured clear resin with smooth transparency, subtle reflections, soft internal depth, and slightly thick stylized edges.
Include small environmental details but keep everything cohesive, simplified, and sculptural. Prioritize clean stylized modeling over photorealistic texture detail.
Overall intent: premium collectible miniature, stylized 3D marketplace presentation, cozy whimsical mood, smooth sculpt clarity, controlled studio rendering, avoid real-world photography aesthetics.

```
Ultra-realistic high-contrast beverage product photography of a red aluminum soda can lying diagonally on its side across a seamless glossy red surface and matching red background. The can is positioned from upper right to lower left, with the silver pull-tab facing toward the bottom-left corner and clearly visible. The can surface is covered with realistic condensation droplets of varying sizes, with larger water drops scattered on the red surface around it. The branding is bold white script typography wrapping across the can, with smaller text reading "Original Taste" beneath. Strong directional lighting from upper right creates dramatic shadows extending leftward and deep contrast between highlights and shadowed areas. The metallic rim and tab reflect bright highlights, while the red background glows intensely under the light. Composition is tight and close-up, macro-level detail emphasizing texture of aluminum and water droplets. Minimalist monochrome red aesthetic, crisp focus, commercial beverage advertising style, photorealistic, 8K resolution.

### 188. 高度详细的 JSON 提示，结合 ControlNet 生成自然生活照

**作者**: [brindley](https://x.com/brindleyai/status/2025150446575214683)  **日期**: 2026-02-21  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的综合性 JSON 提示，旨在生成一张年轻女性身穿黄色比基尼的写实抓拍生活照，利用 ControlNet（OpenPose 和 MiDaS）进行精确的姿势和深度对齐，并包含一个详细的反向提示。

![高度详细的 JSON 提示，结合 ControlNet 生成自然生活照](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771741705482_kkyoka_HBrHl6NXkAAKrX9.jpg)

```
{
"subject": "Young woman, long brown hair, wearing a yellow string bikini with blue trim and logos. Tattoos on right arm and fingers. Wearing a delicate necklace.",
"pose": "Sitting in a wicker chair, leaning slightly forward. Hands resting on outer hips, touching bikini bottoms. Direct gaze.",
"environment": "Semi-outdoor bar area. Wicker chair. White counter and slush machine to the right. Man sitting facing away in background left. Blue sky.",
"camera": "Mid-shot, slightly elevated angle. Shallow depth of field with blurred background.",
"lighting": "Bright, natural daylight. Even illumination with soft shadows under chin and chest.",
"mood_and_expression": "Neutral expression, direct eye contact.",
"style_and_realism": "Photorealistic candid lifestyle photograph.",
"colors_and_tone": "Vibrant palette. Dominant yellow and blue, warm skin tones, bright blue sky.",
"quality_and_technical_details": "Sharp focus on subject, natural skin texture, standard digital camera resolution.",
"aspect_ratio_and_output": "3:4",
"controlnet": {
"pose_control": {
"model_type": "OpenPose",
"purpose": "Match sitting posture and hand placement on hips.",
"constraints": "Maintain torso angle and arm positioning exactly.",
"recommended_weight": 0.8
},
"depth_control": {
"model_type": "MiDaS",
"purpose": "Maintain spatial separation between subject, bar counter, and background.",
"constraints": "Preserve 3D volume of body and chair.",
"recommended_weight": 0.75
}
},
"negative_prompt": "stylization, distortion, proportion changes, depth flattening, beautification filters, cartoon, painting, unnatural anatomy, weird hands"
}
```

### 189. 赛博朋克城市街区收藏级立体模型

**作者**: [Artingent](https://x.com/artingent/status/2024942976057922004)  **日期**: 2026-02-20  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一个风格化的 3D 微缩立体模型，描绘一个分层的赛博朋克城市街区，结合了历史悠久的地面建筑和霓虹摩天大楼。风格被指定为高级收藏品，由光滑的陶瓷或树脂雕刻而成，具有干净、玩具般的比例和柔和的摄影棚产品照明。

![赛博朋克城市街区收藏级立体模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771655056348_e4b5y9_HBoK5MgbMAA7L0D.jpg)

```
SCENE:
A layered cyberpunk city block combining low historic structures at ground level with towering neon skyscrapers rising above, connected by bridges, cables, and stacked infrastructure.
STYLE:
Render as a premium stylized 3D collectible miniature diorama on a fully visible, centered self-contained display base, shown from a slightly elevated 3/4 tabletop angle against a clean neutral studio gradient background. Maintain collectible figurine scale and clean display presentation.
All elements should appear sculpted from smooth matte ceramic, painted resin, or stylized polymer with rounded edges, simplified geometry, and slightly exaggerated toy-like proportions. Keep surfaces clean and intentionally stylized. Avoid fingerprints, rough handmade textures, workshop scenes, macro photography depth-of-field, or photoreal clay imperfections.
Use soft professional studio product lighting: gentle global illumination, warm key light, soft ambient bounce, controlled shadows, and optional warm interior window glow.
Render any water or translucent materials as poured clear resin with smooth transparency, subtle reflections, soft internal depth, and slightly thick stylized edges.
Include small environmental details but keep everything cohesive, simplified, and sculptural. Prioritize clean stylized modeling over photorealistic texture detail.
Overall intent: premium collectible miniature, stylized 3D marketplace presentation, cozy whimsical mood, smooth sculpt clarity, controlled studio rendering, avoid real-world photography aesthetics
```

![超写实食材分解堆叠图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771655068869_20s9q9_HBnkysyW0AANSyA.jpg)
![超写实食材分解堆叠图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771655068924_ipva68_HBnkm7_W8AAdd_n.jpg)
![超写实食材分解堆叠图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771655070185_ej97jz_HBnk7RFW0AAmBmO.jpg)

Hyperrealistic exploded {argument name="dish" default="lasagna"} stack, each ingredient layer floating in perfect mid-air suspension with equal spacing, shot straight-on at eye level against a {argument name="color" default="dark blue"} background.  Each ingredient layer is clearly separated with soft drop shadows beneath. Ingredients are hyperdetailed — visible texture, sheen, moisture, and depth. Micro steam wisps rise from hot elements. Sauce and cheese frozen mid-drip, ultra sharp.  LAYERS (bottom to top): {argument name="layer 1" default="pasta sheet"} → {argument name="layer 2" default="ricotta cheese"} → {argument name="layer 3" default="meat sauce"} → {argument name="layer 4" default="pasta sheet"} → {argument name="layer 5" default="mozzarella"} → {argument name="layer 6" default="basil leaves"} → {argument name="layer 7" default="parmesan dust"}  Each ingredient has a clean horizontal label line extending to the right with a small dot at the ingredient. Label text in uppercase sans-serif: "[INGREDIENT NAME]" with a small italic descriptor below. Labels alternate left and right for readability.  Large elegant dish name at top: "[DISH NAME]". Subtitle: "[TAGLINE]".  Lighting: soft studio key light from upper left, subtle fill from right. Background: flat matte [COLOR], clean and minimal. Mood: premium editorial food advertising, extraordinary and craveable.  4K resolution, tack sharp, subtle chromatic warmth. Style ref: Apple product launch meets Michelin-star food photography.
```

A 3x2 grid collage showing the same young woman in six different portraits, wearing flowing ankle-length dresses in different colors ({argument name="dress colors" default="green, red, mustard yellow, purple, teal blue, coral pink"}). She has short dark hair, natural makeup, and a confident calm expression.
Each panel shows a different pose and location:

Standing on seaside rocks, wearing a green dress, soft misty horizon
Standing on a rooftop garden with city skyline blur, wearing red dress, arms folded
Standing on rooftop grass with skyline, mustard yellow dress, hands on waist
On coastal rocks with ocean waves, purple dress flowing in wind
On sandy beach at sunset, teal dress, smiling gently, warm golden light
Close beach portrait at sunset, coral pink dress, soft glow on face
Lighting: cinematic golden hour, soft warm tones, gentle haze
Style: ultra-realistic photography, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, soft color grading
Composition: evenly spaced white borders, square collage layout, fashion editorial look
Camera: 50mm lens, full-body framing, sharp focus, professional portrait photography”**
✅ Negative Prompt (important)
“blurry, low resolution, extra limbs, duplicate faces, distorted hands, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, text, watermark, logo, frame misalignment”

**作者**: [Ai Brawl](https://x.com/TheAiBrawl/status/2024255294248038559)  **日期**: 2026-02-18  **语言**: en

> 生成一张超写实、自然的女性图像的详细 JSON 提示，该女性身着精致的黑色蕾丝内衣跪在床上。该提示强调原始闪光摄影风格、极致沙漏身材细节（包括具体的胸部丰满度要求）以及亲密的深夜卧室氛围。

```

### 200. 精致的室内设计摄影提示（餐厅/客厅空间）

**作者**: [Zifah Prompt](https://x.com/ZifahPrompt/status/2024247967461625867)  **日期**: 2026-02-18  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成一张精致的餐饮和起居空间的超逼真建筑摄影作品。它详细说明了材料、照明（温暖的阳光投射出戏剧性的阴影）、调色板以及拱门和花卉布置等构图元素，旨在营造一种奢华杂志的美学效果。

![精致的室内设计摄影提示（餐厅/客厅空间）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771483118307_x1az84_HBeSis8bUAMBAKU.jpg)

```
A stunning, photorealistic interior design photograph of a sophisticated dining and living space. In the foreground, a smooth sage green oval dining table sits on a pedestal base, surrounded by cream upholstered chairs. The table is adorned with a clear glass vase containing fresh pink roses, a small white ceramic vase, and a wooden bowl filled with citrus fruit. Sunlight streams intensely from large windows on the left, casting dramatic, warm shadows across the polished walnut hardwood floors. A classic white architectural archway separates the dining area from the background living room. Through the arch, a beige sofa, a coffee table, and a large potted indoor tree are visible, with French doors revealing a glimpse of a lush green garden outside. A brass chandelier with small shades hangs above the dining table. The lighting is golden and atmospheric, evoking a sense of peaceful luxury and timeless elegance. 8k resolution, architectural photography style.

## Subject & Character
Main Subject: Interior room scene
Subject Type: Architecture / Interior Design
Accessories: Glass vase with pink roses, wooden bowl with citrus fruit, white ceramic vase, brass chandelier
Action: Still life
Scale: Architectural scale

## Lighting Analysis
Light Type: Natural sunlight and warm artificial chandelier light
Direction: Side lighting from left windows
Quality: Soft directional sunlight creating distinct shadows on the floor
Temperature: Warm golden tones (approx 3500K)
Shadows: Long, soft shadows stretching across the wood floor
Highlights: Sheen on the painted table, reflections on hardwood floor, glass vase highlights
Time of Day: Golden hour / Late afternoon
Lighting Setup: Natural fill with practical fixtures

## Color Palette
Dominant Colors: #8A9A85 (Sage Green), #6F4E37 (Walnut Wood), #F5F5DC (Cream), #FFB7C5 (Soft Pink), #FFD700 (Sunlight Gold)
Color Palette: Analogous warm neutrals with soft pastel accents
Color Scheme: Warm neutrals
Temperature: Warm
Contrast: Medium-High due to bright sunlight and interior shadows
Saturation: Natural, slightly warm and vibrant
Color Grading: Warm, cozy, slightly vintage interior magazine look
Accent Colors: Pink roses, orange citrus fruit, fresh green leaves

## Composition & Camera
Camera Angle: Eye-level
Shot Type: Wide interior shot
Focal Length: 24mm to 35mm wide angle
Depth of Field: Deep depth of field, mostly sharp throughout
Perspective: One-point perspective
Rule of Thirds: Table anchors lower left, archway frames the right two-thirds
Leading Lines: Floorboards running lengthwise, the curve of the arch, sunlight streaks
Symmetry: Asymmetrical balance
Negative Space: Balanced
Framing Elements: Large architectural archway separating the rooms
Foreground: Oval dining table with floral arrangement and chairs
Midground: The transition space under the arch, large potted plant
Background: Living room area with sofa, coffee table, and large windows looking out to trees

## Environmen
```

### 202. 远古丛林神庙立体模型收藏品提示

**作者**: [Artingent](https://x.com/artingent/status/2024202355189961063)  **日期**: 2026-02-18  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张古代丛林寺庙群立体模型的图像。它详细说明了场景布局（阶梯式寺庙、庭院、苔藓、藤蔓）和所需的风格：一个高级风格化的 3D 收藏微缩模型，由光滑的哑光陶瓷/树脂雕刻而成，具有受控的摄影棚灯光和舒适、异想天开的氛围。

![远古丛林神庙立体模型收藏品提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771483119036_meekzb_HBdpS-hbUAAB3bO.jpg)

```
SCENE:
A larger ancient jungle temple complex featuring a stepped main temple, several surrounding shrine structures, broken ceremonial courtyards, moss-covered staircases, carved statues, fragmented stone walls, and a shallow reflecting pool, all surrounded by dense tropical foliage and vines. Arrange the ruins so the space feels like a compact, layered miniature district with multiple clustered architectural elements, varied heights, and interconnected pathways, filling the platform naturally without empty gaps and reading clearly as a contained archaeological jungle ruin diorama.
STYLE:
Render as a premium stylized 3D collectible miniature diorama on a fully visible, centered self-contained display base, shown from a slightly elevated 3/4 tabletop angle against a clean neutral studio gradient background. Maintain collectible figurine scale and clean display presentation.
All elements should appear sculpted from smooth matte ceramic, painted resin, or stylized polymer with rounded edges, simplified geometry, and slightly exaggerated toy-like proportions. Keep surfaces clean and intentionally stylized. Avoid fingerprints, rough handmade textures, workshop scenes, macro photography depth-of-field, or photoreal clay imperfections.
Use soft professional studio product lighting: gentle global illumination, warm key light, soft ambient bounce, controlled shadows, and optional warm interior window glow.
Render any water or translucent materials as poured clear resin with smooth transparency, subtle reflections, soft internal depth, and slightly thick stylized edges.
Include small environmental details but keep everything cohesive, simplified, and sculptural. Prioritize clean stylized modeling over photorealistic texture detail.
Overall intent: premium collectible miniature, stylized 3D marketplace presentation, cozy whimsical mood, smooth sculpt clarity, controlled studio rendering, avoid real-world photography aesthetics.
```

### 209. AI 影响者比基尼肖像提示

**作者**: [Ella](https://x.com/ellas_pics/status/2024114594256445554)  **日期**: 2026-02-18  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超现实的 AI 影响者（身材健美、湿润金发的成年女性）的半身照。她身穿红橙色扎染比基尼，置身于温暖的热带度假村露台，手中拿着一杯意式冰淇淋。

![AI 影响者比基尼肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771483136350_e9rrdb_HBcY7ePXcAAvvA3.jpg)

```
{
  “ar”: “4:5”,

> 一个详细的技术提示，用于生成一个圆柱形琥珀色化妆品瓶（ACID POTION）的商业产品照片，瓶身带有冷凝水珠和动态水花飞溅效果，置于极简渐变背景前，并采用高对比度逆光照明。

![带水花飞溅的化妆品产品图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771483152004_a8oi4o_HBZYUz3agAAiSZj.jpg)

```
IMAGE: A cylindrical cosmetic bottle stands centered and vertically upright in the frame, bottom-weighted with the base resting on a dark, rounded platform that curves gently across the lower edge; the camera presents a front-facing view of the bottle at approximately eye level relative to the center of the label, with no tilt, and the subject is oriented straight and symmetrical, though the cap is slightly offset by lighting and perspective; the top of the cap sits close to the upper edge but remains fully visible, while the base is cropped just below the platform edge, suggesting the bottle continues downward beyond the frame; the bottle has a smooth cylindrical form with softly rounded shoulders and a short neck topped by a spherical, matte black cap. woman's hand  touching the top cap to open it; the material appears to be semi-translucent frosted glass in a warm amber tone, with condensation droplets and streaks of water clinging to the surface, creating irregular, organic patterns across the front and sides; a splash of water arcs outward from the right side of the bottle at mid-height, forming thin, curved ribbons and droplets frozen in motion, extending into the negative space on the right; the background is a clean, pale gray to light blue gradient with no visible environmental details, creating a studio-like, minimal depth; the camera distance is moderately close, likely using a normal to short telephoto focal length, producing minimal distortion and a slightly compressed, product-focused perspective; the entire bottle and splash are in sharp focus, indicating a controlled depth of field with crisp edges and fine detail in the water droplets; lighting appears strong and directional from behind and slightly above, creating a bright, glowing highlight through the translucent glass and illuminating the liquid inside, while also producing specular highlights on the water droplets; the light creates sharp reflections and a halo-like glow around the cap and shoulders, with softer fill light from the front to keep the label legible; visible effects include high-contrast backlighting, bright specular highlights, subtle bloom around the brightest reflections, and a clean, commercial-grade color grade emphasizing warm amber tones against the cool neutral background; the palette is dominated by warm amber and golden hues within the bottle, contrasted by cool gray-blue background tones and the deep black of the cap and base; the atmosphere is clear with no haze, but the presence of water droplets and the dynamic splash suggests recent motion, frozen at the moment of impact or pour. TEXT: Logo: “Moon Juice”; Title: “ACID POTION”; Body: “Resurfacing Exfoliator”; Other: “Resurfaçage Exfoliant”.
```

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2023833593462562865)  **日期**: 2026-02-17  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示，用于生成一个 2x1 的并排双联画，描绘水下之吻。左侧面板显示一只手拿着一台数码相机，其 LCD 屏幕上显示着这个吻，右侧面板显示完整的、低保真水下照片，强调身份保留和怀旧的数码相机美学。

![水下之吻双联画与数码相机屏幕](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771396588160_htcjtb_HBYZzhAWoAAq7fM.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "underwater_kiss_diptych_2x1_digicam",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.0_UNDERWATER_KISS_SONY_SCREEN_DIPTYCH"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "very_high",
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "preserve_facial_features": true,
      "preserve_pose": true,
      "preserve_hand_structure": true,
      "notes": "Create a 2x1 side-by-side diptych. LEFT PANEL: a hand holding a silver compact digital camera (Sony-style) showing the underwater kiss on its LCD screen, including camera bezel and screen reflections; RIGHT PANEL: the full underwater kiss photo itself, turquoise water, bubbles, slightly lo-fi digicam look. Keep the same couple pose and intimacy. Preserve identities from references if provided. No extra people."
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "split",
        "direction": "vertical",
        "panels": 2,
        "gutter": "thin"
      },
      "sharpness": "lofi_filmic",
      "grain": "subtle_to_medium"
    },
    "scene": {
      "right_panel_environment": "underwater pool scene, turquoise water, floating bubbles and particles, soft light rays, slight haze",
      "left_panel_environment": "neutral indoor wall background behind the held camera, realistic hand grip, slight glare on LCD"
    },
    "composition": {
      "left_panel": "close shot of the compact camera back with LCD visible; underwater kiss is displayed on the LCD; include slight pixel grid/moire and LCD glow",
      "right_panel": "tight-medium underwater shot of the couple kissing; woman holds man's face with both hands; man holds woman's waist; bubbles around them"
    },
    "style": {
      "aesthetic": "nostalgic digicam / early-2010s compact camera look",
      "color": "cool cyan/teal underwater tones, slightly muted",
      "texture": "light compression artifacts, mild softness, realistic water distortion"
    },
    "negative_prompt": "extra people, face morphing, identity drift, deformed hands, extra fingers, extra limbs, text overlays, captions, watermark, logos, brand marks, timestamps, UI numbers, harsh HDR, cartoon"
  }
}

### 223. 日式便利店武士刀肖像

**作者**: [Danna R.](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2023448170085109983)  **日期**: 2026-02-16  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张模拟 iPhone 17 Pro 拍摄的原始、高保真照片。它侧重于基于参考图像（图像 A）的严格身份锁定（面部拓扑、头发物理）。场景设定在日本便利店（konbini），主体身着校服式服装，坐着并手持武士刀，强调逼真的人体体积和阴影物理效果。

![日式便利店武士刀肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771310091532_wb813g_HBS7YH_bcAAW9WO.jpg)

```
(vertical 9:16). Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 35mm focal length, f/2.8 aperture for realistic structural depth, authentic digital grain.

[Subject & Identity Locking]

Identity Lock: Absolute inheritance of facial topography, almond-shaped eye coordinates, and heart-shaped jawline from Image A.

Hair Physics: inherit from Image A.

Bio-Fidelity: Epidermal physics including visible micro-pores on cheeks, natural skin texture, and satin-finish hydration.

Expression Sync: Expression Lock - replicate the contemplative downward gaze and neutral lip tension from the reference scene.

[Outfit & Physicality]

Technical Description: Professional white cotton-poplin button-down blouse with standard structural darting; navy-and-white striped silk bow tie; high-waisted pleated navy plaid micro-skirt.

Textile Architecture: Natural fabric drape and realistic seam-work; standard material folds at the waist and elbows.

Anatomical Volume: Natural anatomical proportions following standard human geometry and realistic physical rendering.

[Pose & Interaction]

Geometry: Seated profile on a round wooden stool; torso angled toward a wooden counter.

Articulation: Both hands holding a katana across the lap; realistic finger-joint articulation and skin-on-object contact.

[Environment & Lighting]

Atmosphere: Dual-source indoor lighting; cool fluorescent overheads and warm pendant lamps.

Background Integrity: High-fidelity Japanese convenience store (konbini) environment; shelves with colorful snack packaging and detailed Japanese signage.

Shadow Physics: Natural ray-traced shadows cast by the subject onto the stool and counter; realistic ambient occlusion in fabric folds.
```

{
  "type": "ultra_photorealistic_studio_glamour_floor_pose_full_body_lock",

  "scene": {

      "type": "smooth matte studio floor",
      "color": "neutral gray",

      "shadow_interaction": "soft contact shadows beneath legs and heels"
    },

      },
      "fill_light": {
        "position": "front-right low intensity",

      },

      "rotation": "rotated approximately 20° relative to camera plane",

    },

        "placement": "forearm resting lightly on bent knee",

### 230. 夜间摄影提示：用梅赛德斯 G 63 AMG 清雪

**作者**: [Dr. Samia](https://x.com/oye_samia/status/2022894993082585299)  **日期**: 2026-02-15  **语言**: en

> 一个超现实的夜间摄影提示，用于拍摄一位女士在车道上铲雪的抓拍生活照。它详细描述了她的着装（复古抓绒衣、棒球帽）、动态运动模糊、一辆带有发光红色尾灯的亮黑色梅赛德斯-奔驰 G 63 AMG，以及场景（现代简约房屋、高对比度照明）。

![夜间摄影提示：用梅赛德斯 G 63 AMG 清雪](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771223966618_xeif53_HBLEQctakAEBiCU.jpg)

```
Hyper-realistic night photography, candid lifestyle-style shot. A young woman is clearing snow from the driveway of a luxurious modern minimalist house. He is positioned in the foreground left, leaning forward and pushing a large black scoop snow shovel filled with snow. She is wearing a vintage fleece jacket (grey body with beige/yellowish patches on the shoulders and sleeves), dark loose-fitting trousers, a baseball cap, and light-colored sneakers. Black, wet, curly hair up to the chin. Strictly maintain from the attached first photo, without distortions. The person is slightly blurred because she is in dynamic motion.
In the center of the background, parked on the snowy driveway, is a glossy black Mercedes-Benz G 63 AMG seen from the rear. The car's distinctive red LED tail light strip is glowing brightly, casting a red reflection onto the white snow behind it.
In the background is a modern white house with a flat roof and black trim. Built-in warm LED lighting under the roof eaves illuminates the walls and driveway. On the left is a black garage door; on the right is a large rectangular window reflecting the night. The ground is covered in snow with visible shovel marks, tire treads, and texture. High-contrast lighting, cold winter atmosphere, sharp focus, 4K resolution.
```

### 232. 超逼真情人节专题，带身份锁定功能

**作者**: [Alice Glassier](https://x.com/aliceglassierai/status/2022797819145248778)  **日期**: 2026-02-14  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张超现实的时尚照片，描绘一位成年女性斜倚在白色沙发上，周围环绕着红色玫瑰和花瓣，并严格指示将人物身份和外貌锁定为参考图像，背景墙上包含涂鸦风格的“Valentine's Day”文字。

![超逼真情人节专题，带身份锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771137181703_eudhzz_HBJr13pXwAAbYGE.jpg)
![超逼真情人节专题，带身份锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771137181771_ggg5vm_HBJr13xXgAAwzUy.jpg)

```
Ultra-realistic fashion photo, vertical 9:16 format; IDENTITY LOCK (CRITICAL): use the face from the attached photo as the only identity reference; preserve 100% the exact same appearance without any changes — face shape, eyes, lips, nose, cheekbones, jawline, hairline, hair color and texture, skin tone, natural asymmetry, and micro-texture; DO NOT alter appearance, no rejuvenation, no beautification, no face swap.

Location: bright minimalist room/interior, white wall background, large red “paint” lettering with drips on the wall reading “Valentine’s Day” (graffiti/dripping style), text placed strictly in the upper part of the frame.

In the frame: a large white soft sofa with voluminous cushions; red rose petals scattered on the sofa and around the model. On the right side of the model, on the sofa, lies a very large bouquet of red roses (dense, multi-headed, with green leaves), occupying the right third of the frame.

Model: adult woman, looking directly into the camera, confident and sensual expression, bold red lipstick, light natural makeup, real skin texture (visible pores, micro-contrast, no retouching, no plastic look).

Hair: long, slightly tousled, one strand falling onto the face, soft side part.

Pose: woman lying/reclining diagonally on the white sofa — body extended along the sofa, torso slightly lifted on one elbow, one hand raised to the hair near the temple, the other hand relaxed on the pillow in front of her, shoulders open.

Clothing: fitted red slip dress with thin straps (red satin slip dress / red bodycon slip dress), smooth fabric with soft folds along the waist and hips.

Composition: model positioned left/center, bouquet on the right, “Valentine’s Day” text large at the top of the wall, rose petals on the sofa and near her legs, medium shot (waist/upper thigh and above), slight perspective, camera at eye level or slightly higher.

Lighting: natural soft daylight from a side window (soft window light) + subtle fill, warm soft shadows, atmospheric editorial look.

Optics/quality: photorealistic, editorial, ultra-sharp, high detail, 35mm look, f/2.8–f/4, ISO 100–200, 1/125, HDR, natural skin texture, subtle film grain.

NEGATIVE: different face/appearance, glossy “plastic” skin, heavy retouching/airbrush, CGI/3D, illustration, extra objects, other text, spelling errors, blurred face, extra fingers/deformations.
```

 "generation_request": {
 "meta_data": {
 "task_type": "photo_to_soft_anime_couple_illustration",

 "priority": "highest",

 },
 "output": {
 "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
 "resolution": "ultra_high",
 "num_images": 2,
 "sharpness": "clean_illustration",
 "grain": "none"
 },
 "style": {
 "render_type": "soft_anime_illustration",
 "linework": "clean_thin_lines",
 "shading": "smooth_pastel_shading",
 "texture": "slight_paper_smooth",
 "palette": "warm_neutrals + vivid_red_accents"
 },
 "scene": {
 "background": "simple two-tone or muted solid color background (sage/gray-beige), minimal and modern",
 "composition": "3/4 body couple portrait, close pose, gentle smiles",
 "pose": "woman slightly in front, man beside/behind, woman holds bouquet centered"
 },
 "wardrobe": {
 "woman": "{argument name="woman's dress" default="red satin dress"}, illustrated satin sheen with soft highlights",
 "man": "white button-up shirt, minimal folds"
 },
 "props": {
 "bouquet": "{argument name="bouquet type" default="red roses bouquet"}, stylized petals but clearly roses"
 },
 "quality_rules": {
 "must": [
 "anime/illustration look (not photoreal)",
 "couple identity recognizable from reference photo",
 "red satin dress + red roses clearly visible",
 "clean hands and faces, no extra fingers",
 "no text/watermark"
 ]
 },
 "negative_prompt": [
 "photorealistic",
 "hyper-detailed pores",
 "3d render",
 "heavy comic ink",
 "messy sketch",
 "blurry",
 "extra fingers",
 "deformed hands",
 "text, watermark, logo"
 ]
 }
}

### 244. Z 世代情人节卧室场景提示

**作者**: [Oogie](https://x.com/oggii_0/status/2022330346747154568)  **日期**: 2026-02-13  **语言**: en

> 一个超现实的提示，用于生成一个时尚、舒适的 Z 世代情人节场景：一对时尚情侣在黄金时段凌乱的床上，捕捉到女人拍摄“和我一起准备”视频时的真实电影瞬间。

![Z 世代情人节卧室场景提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050460281_nyrkuf_HBDCugabAAA7JjC.jpg)

```
Create a hyper-realistic, trendy Gen Z Valentine’s Day scene inside a cozy, aesthetic bedroom during late afternoon golden hour.
The room has soft pastel walls, fairy lights, heart-shaped wall décor, polaroid photos, plush pillows, and scattered fashion magazines. Natural sunlight streams through sheer curtains, casting warm golden light across the space.
A stylish young couple sits casually on a messy bed covered with white and blush blankets.
The man wears relaxed streetwear — oversized hoodie, loose jeans, layered chains, soft curls slightly messy.
The woman wears an oversized pink sweater with knee-high socks, natural dewy makeup, glossy lips, and soft waves in her hair.
She holds a phone up as if filming a “Get Ready With Me – Valentine Edition” video while he leans in from behind, smiling playfully at the camera. They look relaxed, flirty, and authentic — candid but cinematic.
Heart-shaped balloons rest on the floor, and a glowing pink LED sign reading “Be Mine” is mounted on the wall.
Lighting: warm natural golden hour light + soft fairy light glow.
Lens: 35mm lifestyle lens, shallow depth of field, creamy background blur.
Style: ultra-detailed, soft skin texture, cozy influencer aesthetic, TikTok vibe, romantic but modern, candid editorial photography.
```

### 249. Sadia Sink 红心皇后时尚肖像

**作者**: [Shreya♡](https://x.com/Shreyayadav/status/2022140362622746631)  **日期**: 2026-02-13  **语言**: en

> 一个高保真提示，要求严格复制主体（Sadie Sink）的面部特征，同时应用高概念时尚影棚肖像风格。主题为“红心皇后”，主体身着深红色无肩带礼服，身后是大量透明红色雪纺纱，被塑造成完美的爱心形状。

![Sadia Sink 红心皇后时尚肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050469337_j27vrb_HBAV8S-b0AASQ1m.jpg)

```
High-fidelity, true-to-source facial replication. Maintain 100% of the original person's facial likeness and identity from the provided user image. The user's original photo is for identity reference ONLY. You MUST NOT alter, enhance, or stylize the subject's facial structure in any way. This includes, but is not limited to: do not change the shape of the cheeks, nose, eyes, or jawline. Avoid any 'doll-like' or idealized features. The replication of the face must be perfect. You MUST replace the original pose, clothing, and background with the new style described below. Apply the following style:

Apply a slender, elegant body build to the subject. The image is a high-concept fashion studio portrait with a "Queen of Hearts" playing card theme, presented in a portrait orientation with a 4:5 aspect ratio. The subject has long, wavy brunette hair that cascades loosely down their back. The subject is captured in a medium shot, standing with their body angled away from the camera, twisting their torso to look back over their left shoulder directly at the lens. The pose is contained and elegant, with arms crossed over the chest, hugging the bodice. The subject is wearing a stunning, deep crimson red strapless gown. The most critical stylistic element is the manipulation of the dress's fabric: massive layers of sheer, semi-translucent red chiffon or organza float and billow outwards behind the subject, sculpted to form a perfect, voluminous heart shape that dominates the frame. The fabric catches the light, showing texture, folds, and varying degrees of opacity, ranging from deep ruby in the shadows to bright cherry red where the light hits the sheer layers. The subject also wears matching matte red opera-length gloves that extend past the elbows, blending seamlessly with the red gown. The lighting is soft, diffused, high-key studio lighting that illuminates the subject evenly and creates soft shadows, emphasizing the three-dimensionality of the heart-shaped fabric. The background is a clean, solid white seamless backdrop that provides strong contrast to the red subject. A specific graphic element is present: in the top left corner, a large red serif capital letter "Q" is positioned directly above a red heart suit symbol, mimicking the index of a playing card. The overall aesthetic is romantic, polished, and editorial.
```

}

### 260. 鱼眼产品照片与强制透视

**作者**: [Edizkan ⭕🦇](https://x.com/edizkan_/status/2021833100209098863)  **日期**: 2026-02-12  **语言**: en

> 一个旨在创作具有强烈视觉冲击力的卡通风格兼具真实感的商品照片的提示词，利用鱼眼镜头效果，强调扭曲的强制透视，使角色的头部在前景中显得巨大，而四肢则逐渐模糊。

![鱼眼产品照片与强制透视](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770964551753_kfnoyd_HA79LnFbsAEnZIn.jpg)

```
A high impact fisheye product photo of the character, shown full-body in warped forced perspective. The head is immense in the foreground, limbs taper into blur, cartoonish yet grounded in realistic detail. Pose: The character leans slightly forward, stepping into the viewer’s space. The oversized head pushes closest to the lens, eyes sharp and engaging, while the arms hang loosely at its sides. Shoes recede into deep blur, vanishing into the background. Camera: Fisheye macro, 15–20mm lens, tilted slightly upward to exaggerate the forward lean. Lighting: Strong frontal light reveals fine surface textures, with soft fill shadow along the torso and a faint rim halo separating the figure from the backdrop. Eyes: Eyes are emphasized with dimensional lighting subtle gradients across the surface, crisp specular highlights, and surrounding contrast shadows to add depth and expression without altering their shape. Background: Neutral infinite fade in soft grey/white, with no visible floor or horizon. Material Focus: Extreme emphasis on surface qualities textures, finishes, and subtle reflections are captured with high fidelity, whether matte, soft, or powdery. Gloves appear simple and soft, shoes trail into blur with faint sheen. Emotion: Direct and intimate the figure feels like it’s leaning out of the photo toward you, demanding presence. Negative prompt: No props, no clutter, no flat neutral standing pose
```

### 272. 辛烷渲染的漂浮生态岛

**作者**: [Artingent](https://x.com/artingent/status/2021308789593604539)  **日期**: 2026-02-10  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细的提示，用于生成一个巨大的、照片级的漂浮岛屿，该岛屿作为一个活生生的生态系统运行。它指定了 Octane 级别的渲染真实感、物理上合理的环 境，以及由有机和矿物材料生长而成的建筑，从广角空中视角观看。

![辛烷渲染的漂浮生态岛](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770792186541_wwtln3_HA0hnpMaMAAfeTe.jpg)

```
[SUBJECT]
A massive floating island captured as a photoreal, physically plausible environment, rendered with Octane-level realism. The island is a living ecological system integrated with inhabitable architecture grown from stone, crystal, and bio-organic materials. The scene feels like a real, observable place suspended in the sky, not a stylized illustration.

[RENDERING STYLE]
Ultra-photoreal rendering with Octane Render characteristics: physically accurate global illumination, realistic light falloff, high dynamic range sky lighting, true-to-scale materials, micro-surface detail, subtle imperfections, and natural color response. No painterly effects, no stylization, no exaggerated fantasy lighting.

[COMPOSITION]
Wide-angle aerial shot, slightly offset perspective, as if photographed from a hovering drone or aircraft. The full vertical mass of the island is visible, with architectural elements clearly readable. Horizon visible in the distance with atmospheric haze for scale. Camera height slightly below the island’s midline, emphasizing weight and realism.

[UPPER ATMOSPHERIC ZONE]
Thin, stratified clouds interact with the island’s upper vegetation. Tall, vine-like atmospheric plants extend upward, realistically textured and wind-reactive. Small, semi-translucent floating organisms drift naturally, with believable motion blur and subsurface scattering. Sunlight diffuses through cloud layers, producing soft volumetric shafts.

[SURFACE ECOSYSTEM]
The surface terrain features realistic soil, rock strata, and dense vegetation with botanical variation. Graviroot trees anchor into the terrain with visible root tension and load-bearing structure. Meadows ripple subtly in the wind. Rivers flow toward cliff edges and disperse into mist through evaporation, captured with physically accurate fluid behavior.

[ARCHITECTURE – DWELLINGS & PUBLIC SPACES]
Architecture is seamlessly integrated into the landscape, appearing grown, carved, or accreted rather than constructed:
- Cliffside dwellings embedded into rock faces, with arched openings, layered terraces, and organically curved facades.
- Residential structures grown from mineralized coral-like stone, reinforced with crystal ribs.
- Public plazas formed as open stone platforms surrounded by vegetation, root-canopies, and light-filtering crystal growths.
- Sky-bridges and root-walkways connecting buildings, appearing load-bearing and structurally plausible.
- Transparent or semi-translucent roofing formed from bio-crystal membranes, allowing natural light into interiors.

No sharp industrial lines; all architecture follows structural logic and biological growth patterns.

[SUBSURFACE & STRUCTURAL CORE]
Through cracks and translucent mineral layers, a crystal–mycelium structural network is visible, acting as both load distribution and energy circulation. Subsurface glow is subtle, uneven, and realistic, suggesting biophysical p
```

  "prompt": "Thrilling roller coaster action photo, young woman with platinum blonde hair blowing wildly in wind, screaming with excitement mouth wide open, sitting in roller coaster car going down steep drop, wearing leopard print tank top dress, gold chain choker necklace, small gold hoop earrings, hands gripping safety bar tightly, other riders visible in seats behind, red and orange roller coaster track structure visible, amusement park fairground setting with rides and attractions in background, bright sunny day, candid action moment capturing pure joy and thrill, hair flying dramatically, adrenaline rush expression, theme park lifestyle content, 3:4",

        "Reflections of raindrops on her skin",
        "Cold street lighting from outside hitting the hair"
      ]

      "camera_look": "Smartphone rear camera, high ISO, raw processing",
      "imperfections": "Motion blur on the background, digital noise in the shadows, reflection of the phone lenses in the glass window",

### 284. 原始纪录片风格汽车内饰肖像

**作者**: [Lex](https://x.com/lexx_aura/status/2020848492751503807)  **日期**: 2026-02-09  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张原始、超清晰、广角、全身的女性照片，她以“大爷式坐姿”坐在老式汽车的副驾驶座上。它指定了服装（Van Halen T 恤、颈链）、相机角度（车门外、与视线齐平），并要求深景深（f/11）和高对比度、未经编辑的胶片美学，皮肤毛孔清晰可见。

![原始纪录片风格汽车内饰肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770706162166_78gcq5_HAt--zUW4AAbVgr.jpg)
![原始纪录片风格汽车内饰肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770706162517_ts5k9n_HAt--zIXMAAY4s4.jpg)

```
{
  "image_analysis": {
    "subject_pose_correction": {
      "body_position": "Sitting with legs spread wide apart (manspreading pose) in a casual, unladylike posture.",
      "legs": "Knees bent and angled outward, thighs fully visible, creating a triangular composition.",
      "arms": "Left elbow firmly planted on the center console box, left hand propping up the cheek/chin. Right arm resting loosely and extended over the right knee.",
      "head_tilt": "Head tilted slightly to the left, resting heavy in the hand.",
      "interaction": "The subject is sunk deep into the seat, looking bored or effortlessly cool."
    },
    "framing_and_composition": {
      "camera_angle": "Eye-level or slightly low angle, shot from outside the car through the open passenger door.",
      "field_of_view": "Wide angle (24mm or 35mm) to capture the full body, legs, and the car's interior context.",
      "foreground_elements": "The red metal door frame of the car is visible on the edge, fully sharp and textured (no foreground blur).",
      "focus": "Deep depth of field, edge-to-edge sharpness, hyper-focal distance."
    }
  },
  "revised_prompt": {
    "format": "JSON",
    "style": "Raw, Documentary, Sharp Focus, High Fidelity"
  },
  "final_prompt": {
    "text_to_image_prompt": "A raw, ultra-sharp wide-angle full-body shot of a tanned young woman sitting in the passenger seat of a vintage car with a red door frame. She is sitting in a relaxed, 'manspreading' pose with her knees wide apart. Her left elbow rests firmly on the center console, propping up her chin with her hand, while her right arm rests loosely on her right knee. She is wearing a vintage black {argument name="shirt type" default="Van Halen t-shirt"}, a black choker, and white sneakers. The camera captures her through the open car door. Golden hour sunlight hits her messy brown hair from behind. Shot on 35mm film stock, f/11 aperture for deep depth of field, ensuring the foreground red door frame, the woman, and the wooden dashboard are all in crisp focus. Visible skin pores, sensory details, film grain, slight noise, chromatic aberration, high contrast, unedited aesthetic, crystal clear textures.",
    "negative_prompt": "bokeh, blurred background, depth of field, blurry foreground, soft focus, tilt-shift, close up, portrait crop, legs crossed, ladylike sitting, knees together, zoomed in, headshot, studio lighting, airbrushed, smooth skin, plastic, 3d render, cartoon, vignette."
  }
}
```

### 286. 蓝莓和酸奶的微距美食摄影
