the subject stands upright with a straight posture, shoulders squared, head level, and gaze directed forward toward the camera, wearing large, dark, wraparound-style sunglasses that obscure the eyes, with a neutral facial expression indicated by relaxed brows and closed lips; the hair is light brown and slicked back smoothly, creating a clean, reflective surface with no visible flyaways; the subject wears a {argument name="blazer color" default="pale pink"} blazer with structured shoulders and sharp lapels over a black, high-neck or turtleneck garment, the blazer fabric appearing smooth and matte with subtle folds along the shoulder and chest, while the black inner layer is flat and non-reflective, providing strong tonal contrast; surrounding the central figure are multiple human silhouettes positioned in the foreground and background, forming a loose semicircle around the subject; these silhouettes are rendered as nearly solid black shapes with minimal visible detail, appearing as upright, suit-wearing forms; two silhouettes stand behind the central figure at shoulder height, slightly left and right, while additional silhouettes occupy the lower foreground, their heads and shoulders partially blocking the lower part of the frame; these surrounding figures are front-facing but remain indistinct, with no facial features visible, creating a layered depth effect with foreground silhouettes, the central subject in the midground, and additional silhouettes in the background; the background itself is a smooth, light gray or off-white plane with no visible texture or environmental context, suggesting a studio-like setting; the camera perspective feels normal to slightly telephoto, compressing the distance between the central figure and the surrounding silhouettes; focus is sharp on the central subject’s face, sunglasses, and clothing, while the silhouettes remain uniformly dark and detail-less, emphasizing contrast rather than depth of field blur; lighting is directional from above and slightly to the front, illuminating the central subject’s face and blazer while leaving the surrounding figures in deep shadow; shadows are soft on the central subject but extremely dense on the silhouettes, creating a high-contrast, graphic effect; subtle specular highlights appear along the hair and the glossy surfaces of the sunglasses; there is no visible grain or motion blur, and the image appears clean and digitally polished, with smooth tonal transitions and controlled contrast; the color palette is minimal, dominated by black, pale pink, and neutral gray, with the central subject’s cloth

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2020562847638385089)  **日期**: 2026-02-08  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成一张超逼真、抓拍式的电影剧照，内容是一对年轻夫妇抵达爱琴海的一个小港口。该提示强调自然光、真实纹理、细微的胶片颗粒感和纪录片般的质感，并特别使用负面提示来避免人工的“AI 光泽”或影棚效果。

![爱琴海港口：旅行浪漫电影剧照](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770619674986_1cyg3o_HAp7ImFboAAMjfu.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_travel_romance",
      "version": "v1.0_AEGEAN_HARBOR_ARRIVAL_SALT_SUN_EN",
      "priority": "highest"
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_film_still",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "true_to_life_coastal_daylight",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },
    "global_rules": {
      "camera_language": "35mm lens equivalent, eye-level, handheld, candid documentary feel, focus on eyes",
      "lighting_language": "motivated natural light only (late morning sun + sky fill), no flash",
      "authenticity_markers": "no studio look, no HDR, no AI glow, real harbor textures, slight background motion blur only"
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "They arrive at a small Aegean harbor. Sun hits their faces for the first time. A candid photo mid-step—simple travel joy, no posing.",
      "subjects": {
        "count": 2,
        "description": "young man and woman early 20s, ordinary, real; faces visible and sharp",
        "expression": "tiny relieved smiles, calm excitement",
        "skin_and_face": "natural pores, slight shine from sun, no retouch"
      },
      "wardrobe_and_props": {
        "female": "light cotton shirt or simple summer dress, wind moving hair, minimal makeup",
        "male": "plain t-shirt, casual pants/jeans, slightly wrinkled",
        "props": "backpacks, a cheap paper ferry ticket shape (no readable text), small tote"
      },
      "micro_action": "they step onto the dock; one looks at the other like 'we’re here'; a half-smile lingers",
      "environment_details": {
        "location": "small Aegean harbor / pier",
        "background": "fishing boats, sun-faded paint, rope coils, sea glare, a few locals blurred in distance",
        "signage_rule": "no readable text/logos"
      },
      "lighting": "bright natural sun with soft sky fill; controlled highlights; deep but detailed shadows",
      "composition": "eye-level medium shot, slightly off-center, imperfect framing; faces sharp; background recedes naturally",
      "mood": "fresh, real, warm — love inside ordinary travel"
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "studio lighting",
      "flash",
      "beauty retouch",
      "plastic skin",
      "model faces",
      "HDR",
      "AI glow",
      "luxury marina",
      "yacht party",
      "designer logos",
      "text",
      "logo",
      "watermark",
      "posed poster look"
    ]
  }
}
```

{
  "image_analysis": {
    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "hair": "wet, shoulder-length, ginger/reddish-brown, messy texture",
      "skin": "fair, prominent freckles on face and arms, sand grains clinging to skin",
      "clothing": {
        "item": "string bikini",
        "colors": ["green", "yellow", "blue"],
        "pattern": "Brazilian flag motif",
        "style": "triangle top, side-tie bottom"
      },
      "pose": "sitting on sand, body angled away from camera, looking back over left shoulder, weight supported by left arm, legs extended and bent"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "beach coastline",
      "weather": "overcast, cloudy, grey sky",
      "elements": [
        "beige sand",
        "large dark granite rocks",
        "ocean waves",
        "distant green hills/vegetation"
      ]
    },
    "technical": {
      "lighting": "soft, diffuse, natural overcast light, no harsh shadows",
      "angle": "eye-level, medium shot",
      "style": "candid photography, realistic, high definition"
    }
  },
  "prompt_strings": {
    "stable_diffusion_format": "photograph of a young woman with wet ginger hair and freckled skin sitting on a sandy beach, wearing a green and yellow Brazilian flag bikini, looking back at viewer over shoulder, sand on skin, overcast sky, large rocks in background, ocean waves, wet hair strands, soft natural lighting, cloudy day, high resolution, 8k, realistic skin texture, candid beach photography",
    "midjourney_format": "/imagine prompt: A realistic photo of a young woman with wet red hair and freckles sitting on a beach, wearing a green and yellow Brazil bikini. She is looking back at the camera. Sand is stuck to her skin. Background of large rocks, ocean waves, and a cloudy grey sky. Soft diffuse lighting, shot on 35mm lens, photorealistic, highly detailed --ar 3:4 --v 6.0",
    "descriptive_long": "A high-resolution, photorealistic shot of a young woman with fair skin and freckles sitting on a sandy shore. She has wet, messy red hair that falls to her shoulders. She is wearing a green and yellow string bikini with a Brazilian flag design. Her pose is relaxed, sitting on the sand and leaning back on one hand while looking directly at the camera over her shoulder. Grains of sand are clinging to her legs and thighs. The background features a moody, overcast sky, churning ocean waves, and large coastal rock formations. The lighting is flat and natural, typical of a cloudy day at the beach."
  }
}
```

### 307. 偷拍旅行浪漫日光浴场景

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2020218549160313112)  **日期**: 2026-02-07  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张超逼真、自然的旅行照片，内容为一对年轻夫妇在土耳其阿恰卡-戈科瓦湾的一个僻静海湾晒太阳。该提示词强调自然的身体形态、真实的皮肤纹理、正午光线和非奢华的纪实美学，模拟 35 毫米手持拍摄效果。

![偷拍旅行浪漫日光浴场景](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532813601_uqcxgd_HAlCAPaW8AAhvpi.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_travel_romance_sunbathing",
      "version": "v1.0_AKYAKA_GOKOVA_COVE_SUNBATHING_MIDDAY_EN",
      "priority": "highest",
      "language": "en"
    },

    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_film_still",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "midday_turquoise_true_to_life",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },

    "global_rules": {
      "camera_language": "35mm lens equivalent, eye-level, handheld, imperfect framing, candid documentary feel, focus on faces when visible",
      "lighting_language": "motivated natural light only (bright midday sun + sky fill), no flash",
      "authenticity_markers": "no studio look, no HDR, no AI glow, real sand texture, real fabric wrinkles, real coastal haze"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Muğla, Akyaka–Gökova Bay. A young couple sunbathes on a small quiet cove. The man lies on a towel in the foreground, the woman sits mid-ground on her towel, both relaxed and happy. Pine-covered rocky cliffs rise behind them and the sea is clear turquoise. Candid, unposed, like a friend took the photo.",

      "subjects": {
        "count": 2,
        "description": "a young man and woman in their early 20s, ordinary and real, not model-like; natural bodies and proportions",
        "expression": "relaxed, happy, soft smiles; casual eye contact",
        "skin_and_face": "natural skin texture, realistic pores, no beauty retouch, no plastic skin"
      },

      "wardrobe_and_style": {
        "female": "simple triangle bikini in a warm {argument name="bikini color" default="coral/orange"} tone, sunglasses, minimal/no jewelry, hair naturally messy from sea breeze",
        "male": "simple dark swim shorts, no logos, relaxed posture",
        "rules": "PG-13 beachwear only, natural and non-explicit"
      },

      "micro_action": "they are sunbathing; the man turns slightly toward her; she sits leaning back on her hands and smiles; a calm, warm, human moment",

      "environment_details": {
        "location": "{argument name="location" default="Akyaka–Gökova rocky cove, Muğla"}",
        "background": "large pale rocks and cliffs, scattered pine trees and shrubs on the slope, clear turquoise water near shore, small gentle waves",
        "beach_details": "soft sand with footprints, two slightly wrinkled towels, a simple cloth bag and a light cover-up shirt nearby, no branding",
        "no_luxury_rule": "no beach club furniture, no umbrellas, no luxury boats, no resort vibes",
        "signage_rule": "no readable text or logos anywhere"
      },

      "lighting": "bright midday sun with sky fill, controlled highlights on skin and rocks, deep but detailed shadows "
    }
  }
}
```

    ],

  },

the camera presents a three-quarter front view of the bottle, with the front label and a slight portion of its right side visible, viewed from slightly above eye level and angled downward, as if the camera is hovering just above the subject; the bottle appears suspended mid-air, gripped near its neck by a black mechanical clamp that enters from the upper right corner, partially cropped by the frame edge so that the top and rightmost portions of the clamp extend beyond the border; the bottle’s cylindrical body has rounded edges and a smooth, matte label surface, while the cap is also cylindrical with a flat top, and the entire form is oriented diagonally, pointing toward the lower left corner; thick, glossy {argument name="liquid color" default="green"} liquid coats the upper portion of the bottle and cap, forming viscous drips that curve downward under gravity, with rounded edges and reflective highlights indicating a semi-transparent, gel-like texture; the clamp consists of angular, geometric components—rectangular arms and jointed segments with sharp edges—forming a rigid, industrial silhouette around the bottle’s neck, its matte black surface absorbing most of the light and appearing nearly featureless; the environment is a seamless, uniform light-grey background with no visible horizon or texture, creating a clean, studio-like setting with no foreground or background objects besides the clamp and bottle; the camera perspective feels close to medium-close distance with minimal perspective distortion, suggesting a normal to slightly telephoto focal length; focus is sharp across both the clamp and the bottle, with no noticeable depth-of-field blur, giving the image a crisp, product-catalog clarity; lighting is hard and directional from the upper left, producing bright specular highlights along the bottle’s curved surface and the glossy green liquid, while casting deep, dense shadows across the clamp, which reads as a near-black silhouette; the light creates subtle reflections on the bottle’s smooth surfaces and accentuates the thickness of the dripping liquid; effects include high contrast between the white label, black clamp, and grey background, with clean edges, minimal visible grain, and a slightly stylized color grade that emphasizes the green liquid as the only saturated accent; the color palette is restrained—neutral grey background, black clamp, white label, and a vivid green liquid—creating a cool, clinical, high-contrast atmosphere; there is no visible haze, dust, or motion blur, and the scene appears entirely static and controlled. **作者**: [Nexora](https://x.com/frametheory058/status/2019485036001820766)  **日期**: 2026-02-05  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的自然语言提示，用于 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro，请求创建一个超现实的场景：一个微型小人坐在一座漂浮在雅致茶杯中的长满苔藓的岛屿上，强调比例错觉、电影般的日光和高细节。

![茶杯中的微缩世界自然语言提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770359947472_o5m6bh_HAam1smacAAI45H.jpg)

```
"Shrink the main subject into a tiny, hyper-realistic miniature person sitting on a small moss-covered island floating inside a teacup filled with tea. The island should look natural with grass, small rocks, and uneven terrain. Add a tiny wooden bridge placed across the tea surface where 2–3 miniature photographers stand, actively taking photos of the subject. Include a tiny wooden rowboat gently floating near the island, creating subtle ripples in the tea.
The teacup should be large, elegant, and floral-designed, placed on a wooden table in a cozy room. Add real-world objects around it like a sugar cube, spoon, and soft window light to emphasize the scale difference. Use cinematic soft daylight coming from a window, creating realistic reflections on the tea surface and shadows from the tiny elements.
The subject’s pose should look natural and thoughtful, interacting with the tiny environment. Add ultra-realistic textures to the tea liquid, porcelain cup, wood table, and moss. Slight depth-of-field blur in the background to focus attention on the miniature world inside the cup.
Make the scene whimsical, surreal, and extremely realistic, designed to make viewers pause and stare to understand the scale illusion. Viral, eye-catching, and highly detailed composition."
```

### 337. 淋浴中未修饰的自拍，高对比度光线

**作者**: [Jessia](https://x.com/itsjessiababy/status/2018976070179950841)  **日期**: 2026-02-04  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张原始、未经修饰、高角度的自拍图像，内容是一名年轻女性蹲在瓷砖淋浴间里，强调湿润、闪亮的皮肤、可见的晒痕、胸部自然的重力下垂，以及刺眼、高对比度的头顶人造照明。

She wears an oversized black graphic {argument name="clothing type" default="band T-shirt"} and loose black pants, styled casually with no visible effort. Her hair is loosely tied back, makeup minimal or absent, with natural skin texture and slight under-eye softness visible. She faces the camera directly with a calm, tired, introspective expression. The water is clear turquoise with swimmers and long-tail boats in the background. Tall limestone cliffs covered in lush green vegetation rise behind her. Bright natural sunlight, vibrant colors, relaxed vacation mood, candid lifestyle photography, shallow depth of field, high detail, ultra-realistic.",

### 347. 爆炸图产品可视化提示

**作者**: [𝐌](https://x.com/Strength04_X/status/2018659365503590706)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的图像生成提示，要求生成上传产品的爆炸图，其中所有内部和外部组件都分离并悬浮在空中，按正确的组装顺序排列。它强调保留原始构图、光照和透视，以实现高端、技术性且超逼真的商业可视化效果。

```
IMAGE PROMPT - Create an exploded view of the uploaded product where all components are separated and floating in mid-air. Disassemble every visible part including internal structures, outer shell, mechanical elements, and small details, arranging them in correct assembly order with realistic spacing and proportions. Preserve the exact hand position (if present), grip, camera angle, framing, perspective, lighting, background, and overall composition from the original image. Only the product should separate into parts nothing else should change. Ensure parts are aligned along their natural axes, appearing as if frozen mid-assembly. Use photorealistic materials, sharp details, natural shadows, and accurate reflections so the result looks like a high-end commercial product visualization. Final image should feel modern, technical, ultra-realistic, and premium.
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[综合产品]]、[[数据可视化]]

### 352. 基于参考图像的逼真自画像绘制

**作者**: [D. Humann](https://x.com/dhumann/status/2018549984862290035)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示模板，用于生成一张超逼真的编辑类生活方式照片，内容是拍摄对象在 iPad 上绘制自画像。至关重要的是，此提示需要两张参考图像：一张用于确保拍摄对象身份的准确性，另一张用于 iPad 屏幕上显示的图像。

![基于参考图像的逼真自画像绘制](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187126243_0k7eg3_HANNo-KXwAA1Kyd.jpg)

```
Ultra-photorealistic editorial lifestyle photograph shot on a full-frame DSLR with an 85mm f/1.8 lens. Natural indoor daylight from the left. THE_SUBJECT (from attached reference) must be replicated with 100% identity fidelity, exact facial structure, skin tone, proportions, and natural texture.

THE_SUBJECT is seated on a couch, angled slightly toward camera, holding a large 12.9-inch iPad Pro vertically and showing the screen directly to the viewer. In the other hand, THE_SUBJECT holds an Apple Pencil naturally, as if paused mid-drawing.

Insert THE_SCREEN (attached reference image) exactly onto the iPad display with correct proportions and perspective. The screen should appear realistically illuminated with subtle glass reflections and edge glare. Both face and iPad screen in sharp focus. No stylization, no illustration effect; it must look like a real professional photograph.
```

### 353. 爆炸披萨信息图动态提示

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2018545826990272776)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个运动生成提示，详细描述了将美食鸡肉披萨从标准产品照片转换为超逼真爆炸式垂直信息图的过程。它指定了精确、受控的图层分离（饼皮、奶酪、配料、酱汁、底料），并要求使用简洁、极简的文本标签，旨在打造高端、专业的食物信息图风格。

```
Motion Prompt: The pizza begins a slow, smooth rotation while its layers gently separate one by one, maintaining perfect alignment, spacing, and scale. Each ingredient floats apart with precise, controlled motion. The movement is clean and fluid, with no extra effects or distractions.

Start Frame: A high-quality, professional product photograph of a gourmet chicken pizza with a golden-brown crust, melted mozzarella cheese, and evenly distributed seasoned chicken pieces with tomato, onion and olives topping. The pizza looks hot, fresh, and appetizing with visible cheese stretch and baked texture. Minimalist style, shot against a pure solid white background with soft, natural shadows. Ultra-sharp focus, 8K resolution, clean and modern fast-food aesthetic.

End Frame: Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of a chicken pizza.
At the top, a golden oven-baked pizza crust edge with light blistering and baked texture.
Below it, stretchy melted mozzarella cheese floating smoothly with natural cheese pull.
Under the cheese, juicy grilled or crispy chicken chunks with visible seasoning and moisture.
Next, fresh toppings such as sliced bell peppers, olives, and onions suspended mid-air.
Beneath the toppings, a rich tomato sauce layer with glossy depth.
At the bottom, a soft yet crisp pizza base, perfectly centered and aligned.
Pure solid white background, soft studio lighting, and subtle realistic shadows beneath each floating layer.
Ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro photography look.
Clean, minimalist infographic text labels with thin pointer lines for each layer. Premium, professional, photorealistic food infographic style.
```

### 355. 具有身份和表情锁定的高保真自拍

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2018360819504054278)  **日期**: 2026-02-02  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术性的提示，模拟原始、高保真度的 iPhone 17 Pro 自拍。它使用“身份锁定”（Identity Lock）和“表情同步”（Expression Sync）来确保面部几何结构、特定解剖特征（如痣）以及参考图像中的表情的绝对复制，同时详细描述表皮物理和纺织品结构，以实现超现实的效果。

![具有身份和表情锁定的高保真自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100819695_ayuzxu_HAKodgAXMAApVIr.jpg)
![具有身份和表情锁定的高保真自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100819453_9ciq0v_HAKodf9XMAUTACS.jpg)
![具有身份和表情锁定的高保真自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100819517_7ud3zh_HAKodgEXMAA03rS.jpg)

```
(9;16). Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 24mm wide focal length, f/2.4 aperture for deep focus with natural fall-off, authentic digital grain, high-angle POV selfie perspective.

Identity Lock: Absolute inheritance of facial geometry coordinates from Image A. Almond-shaped eyes with dense volumetric lash definition, specific lip symmetry with soft satin hydration, and the distinct pigmented mole located at the right nasolabial coordinate. Hair is {argument name="hair color" default="raven-black"}, straight, shoulder-length with a sharp center part and natural volume framing the face.
Bio-Fidelity: Epidermal physics featuring visible micro-pores on the nose, fine vellus hair along the jawline, and realistic skin texture across the shoulders and décolletage.
Expression Sync: Expression Lock—replicate the intense upward-tilted gaze, slight chin-down posture, and relaxed neutral pout from Image B.

Outfit & Physicality:

Technical Description: Structured strapless technical corset top in deep {argument name="top color" default="espresso brown"} with centered vertical ruching and a sweetheart neckline.
Textile Architecture: High-tensile fabric-to-skin compression physics; visible elasticized horizontal banding and micro-pleats in the ruched center section.
Anatomical Volume: Hyper-defined silhouette with maximum anatomical emphasis on the décolletage, clavicle definition, and bust geometry; apply the 20% over-description for natural anatomical ratio definition.
Pose & Interaction:

Geometry: High-angle selfie geometry; torso angled 15 degrees with the right shoulder pulled slightly back to emphasize the neckline.
Articulation: Realistic skeletal structure of the collarbones (clavicles) and neck tendons under the skin; natural skin-fold physics at the armpit-to-garment junction.
Environment & Lighting:

Atmosphere: Domestic indoor apartment setting; soft-diffused overhead ambient lighting with a slight 4500K neutral-warm bloom from a ceiling source.
Background Integrity: Pixel-perfect inventory of a high-pile cream-colored shag rug, a white paneled interior door on the left, a black ergonomic desk chair in the background, and a bed with a grey and white patterned duvet.
Shadow Ray-Tracing: Soft ambient occlusion shadows in the garment folds and under the jawline; realistic depth-mapping of the subject against the complex background textures.
```

### 356. 高保真闪光自拍肖像提示

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2018355288386961551)  **日期**: 2026-02-02  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细、技术性的提示，旨在生成一张模拟 iPhone 17 Pro 闪光灯摄影的原始、高保真肖像。它使用“身份锁定”（Identity Lock）和“表情同步”（Expression Sync）来精确复制外部参考（隐含的 A 和 B）的面部特征和表情，重点关注表皮物理、照明（硬闪光）和解剖体积。

![高保真闪光自拍肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100797300_yey1qs_HAKjbqHXIAA67GZ.jpg)

```
(9:16). Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 35mm portrait focal length, f/1.8 aperture for shallow depth of field, authentic digital grain and high-contrast front-facing flash photography aesthetics.

Identity Lock: Absolute inheritance of facial geometry coordinates from Image A. Almond-shaped eyes with extreme volumetric lash density, specific lip symmetry with high-gloss hydration, and the distinct pigmented mole located at the right nasolabial coordinate. Hair is raven-black, straight, shoulder-length with a sharp center part and natural movement.
Bio-Fidelity: Epidermal physics featuring visible micro-pores, fine vellus hair along the jawline, and high-intensity specular highlights on the forehead and cheeks from the flash source.
Expression Sync: Expression Lock—replicate the direct-to-lens gaze, 15-degree head tilt, and relaxed neutral pout with emphasized philtrum geometry from Image B.

Outfit & Physicality:

Technical Description: Strapless technical compression-fit tube top in matte obsidian black, featuring a scalloped floral lace-trim overlay at the upper hem.
Textile Architecture: High-tensile fabric-to-skin tension; visible lace weave patterns and elasticized structural seaming.
Anatomical Volume: Hyper-defined silhouette with maximum anatomical emphasis on the décolletage and bust geometry; apply the 20% over-description for natural anatomical ratio definition.
Accessories: 1mm silver micro-link chain with a centered teardrop-shaped crystal pendant.
Pose & Interaction:

Geometry: Medium-close portrait perspective; torso angled slightly away while the head turns toward the lens; prominent collarbone (clavicle) and shoulder-joint definition.
Articulation: Natural shoulder elevation to frame the face; realistic skin-texture transitions at the underarm and neck.
Environment & Lighting:

Atmosphere: Dimly lit domestic bedroom environment; dominated by a powerful, hard-light front-facing flash creating sharp contrast.
Background Integrity: Pixel-perfect inventory of a white-on-white textured duvet with organic fabric folds, a dark-stained wood-grain headboard, and neutral-toned wall surfaces.
Shadow Ray-Tracing: Hard-edged drop shadow cast directly behind the subject onto the background; deep ambient occlusion in the folds of the black garment.
```

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2017907723510182113)  **日期**: 2026-02-01  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于拍摄一张专业的生活方式魅力照片，营造舒适的冬季室内氛围。它描述了一位年轻女性，具有特定的身体特征和着装，包括超大耳罩和深 V 连体衣，背景是透过大窗户可见的雪景。

![舒适冬日魅力肖像，深 V 领设计](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014623322_mo0apz_HAEMXgeXgAAc26s.jpg)
![舒适冬日魅力肖像，深 V 领设计](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014623281_luy17j_HAEMXc3WoAAbyus.jpg)
![舒适冬日魅力肖像，深 V 领设计](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014623347_i0govi_HAEMXfYWEAAywUS.jpg)
![舒适冬日魅力肖像，深 V 领设计](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014624645_6my8on_HAEMXjJXIAAzAxl.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_type": "detailed_image_generation",
  "main_subject": {
    "description": "A beautiful young woman with fair skin, long black blonde hair parted in the middle and falling naturally over shoulders, subtle makeup with defined brows and soft pink lips, gentle playful smile with direct gaze at camera",
    "body_type": "curvy hourglass figure with prominent bust emphasized by deep plunging neckline, toned legs",
    "accessories": "large red fluffy earmuffs, black lace choker necklace, thin gold necklace with small key-shaped pendant, thin gold bracelet on right wrist, long natural manicured nails"
  },
  "pose_and_composition": {
    "pose": "seated casually on a wooden windowsill or floor ledge, body angled slightly toward camera, knees bent with legs together and one foot tucked under, right hand resting lightly on sill for support, left arm relaxed, relaxed confident and cozy stance leaning toward window",
    "framing": "medium full-body shot from mid-thigh up including boots, vertical portrait orientation, subject centered with window view framing the right side"
  },
  "clothing_and_details": {
    "top": "{argument name="top color" default="green lime"} long-sleeve fitted bodysuit or top with extremely deep plunging V-neckline open almost to waist, smooth stretch fabric clinging to curves",
    "legwear": "yellow thigh-high socks with three white horizontal stripes near the top, pulled up over knees",
    "footwear": "tan suede winter boots with thick white fur lining around ankles, red laces, and rugged soles",
    "headwear": "oversized yellow plush earmuffs with fluffy fur texture",
    "overall_style": "cozy winter indoor look with bold revealing neckline, mixing sensual and warm elements"
  },
  "setting_and_background": {
    "background": "large floor-to-ceiling window revealing snowy winter lapland landscape with bare birch trees, snow-covered ground, artic fox, and distant hills under partly cloudy sky",
    "props": "light wooden floor and windowsill that subject is sitting on, plain light gray walls",
    "environment": "bright modern indoor room with natural window light, cozy winter cabin or lodge atmosphere"
  },
  "lighting_and_style": {
    "lighting": "soft natural daylight streaming through large window from the side, gentle warm highlights on skin and hair, subtle cool blue tones from snowy view, clean and fresh winter glow",
    "photography_style": "professional lifestyle glamour photography, high resolution, sharp focus on fabric textures and skin details, intimate and inviting mood, realistic with subtle cozy warmth",
    "color_palette": "dominant green lime from outfit contrasting pale skin and warm wood tones, cool whites and blues from snow outside"
  },
  "technical_parameters": {
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3 vertical portrait",
    "quality_tags": "highly detailed, photoreali"
  }
}
```

### 374. 热带海滩探险：SUV 车门上的女士（橙色比基尼）

### 377. 高保真肖像，具有极致身份映射和技术罗纹针织纹理

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2017317822142325239)  **日期**: 2026-01-30  **语言**: en

> 这是一个极其技术化且细节丰富的提示，用于模拟 iPhone 17 Pro 传感器生成高保真肖像。核心要求是从参考图像（图像 A）中绝对继承物理身份。它详细说明了姿势（极端的 S 形扭曲，回眸过肩）、服装（高冲击力的技术罗纹针织紧身套装，采用大地色系）和光线（室内环境光，带柔和的前置补光闪光），以实现超逼真的皮肤物理效果和织物张力，重点关注结构深度和解剖学准确性。

![高保真肖像，具有极致身份映射和技术罗纹针织纹理](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769841109278_6fe7ka_G_7z2zMWoAAWDOn.jpg)

```
[Header] (9:16)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, indoor ambient lighting with soft front-fill flash, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the foreground subject to the background tiled wall, f/5.6 aperture for structural depth, authentic digital grain.

[Subject & Identity Inheritance]
Identity Mapping: Absolute physical inheritance from Reference Image A. The generated subject must inherit the exact facial geometry, specific eye shape, lip volume, chin structure, and all original hair characteristics (texture, length, volume, and part) directly from Image A without manual descriptor intervention.
Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics including micro-pores, satin-finish hydration, and visible fine vellus hair along the jawline. High-definition rendering of the shoulders and neck architecture.
Expression: Magnetic presence; inheriting the self-assured gaze and facial resting-state directly from Image A, looking back over the shoulder.
[Outfit & Physicality]
Technical Description: High-impact technical rib-knit body-conscious set in muted {argument name="outfit color" default="earth-tone"} horizontal stripes (terracotta, tan, and beige).
Textile Geometry: Off-the-shoulder neckline architecture with full-length compression-fit sleeves featuring technical distressed/frayed cuff detailing.
Surface Physics: High-tensile material-to-skin surface compression. The textile must exhibit realistic physical tension lines as it contours the anatomical gluteal proportions, pelvic symmetry, and an emphasized waist-to-hip ratio.
Physicality: Athletic-to-lean build; extreme torso torsion and symmetrical proximal limb geometry.
[Pose & Composition]
Geometry: Extreme S-curve torsion pose. The subject is standing in a rear-profile perspective, rotating her upper torso 180 degrees to face the camera directly.
Interaction: Left hand is subtly raised, fingers interacting with a hair strand near the shoulder, showing realistic finger-joint articulation and skin texture.
Framing: Medium shot, vertical focus. The subject is positioned on the left side of the frame, angled to lead the viewer’s eye toward the background hallway.
[Environment & Lighting]
Atmosphere: Modern domestic or hotel interior hallway.
Interior Details: Foreground features a high-detail tiled wall with horizontal tan/beige rectangular porcelain tiles and precise grout lines. Background includes a dark-wood door with a white technical signage card. Neutral grey stone-tile flooring with realistic specular reflections.
Lighting: Diffused 3000K warm indoor light supplemented by a soft front-fill flash. This creates brilliant illumination on the subject’s skin and the rib-knit texture, while casting clean, defined shadows on the tiled background.
[Failure Prevention Rule]
Command: "Identity Mapping: Inherit all facial and hair traits from Reference Image A onto the subject." Use "Technical rib-knit body-conscious set" and "Anatomical gluteal proportions" to ensure high-fidelity
```

Black baggy-fit pants. Background includes motion blurred blurred urban road, nearby tall buildings, street lights and building ambience mixed with phone flash. > 一个高度技术化的提示，旨在模拟使用 iPhone 17 Pro 传感器拍摄的“原始高保真照片”，要求严格锁定参考图像的身份，零散景，所有景深都清晰对焦，并详细说明皮肤物理、服装几何和高对比度琥珀色照明。

[Header] (9:16)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, low-light indoor ambient photography, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the foreground manicured nails to the background hair texture, f/2.8 aperture for high-contrast clarity, authentic digital grain.
[Subject & Identity Locking]

Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics including micro-pores, satin-finish hydration, and visible fine vellus hair. A technical beauty mark (mole) is positioned just above the right corner of the mouth (philtrum area).
Lash Architecture: High-density technical volume lashes with individual strand separation and a defined feline-wing lift.
Expression: High-impact visual allure; a neutral but magnetic gaze directed toward the camera lens.
[Outfit & Physicality]

Accessories: Silver-tone technical cross-shaped drop earrings featuring white pearl studs at the lobe; a minimalist ultra-thin silver-link chain necklace.
Manicure: Technical application of long, almond-shaped performance nails in a neutral nude-satin finish.
Surface Physics: High-tensile material-to-skin surface compression highlighting anatomical bust volume symmetry and the elegant S-curve of the neck.
[Pose & Composition]

Geometry: Medium close-up portrait framing. The subject is angled slightly toward the camera.
Interaction: Technical hand-to-face contact; the left hand is positioned against the cheek with the index finger resting near the corner of the mouth, showing realistic finger-joint articulation and skin texture.
Anatomy: Realistic shoulder-joint displacement and upper-body symmetry, reflecting the athletic-to-lean transition characteristic of Image A.
[Environment & Lighting]

Atmosphere: Moody, intimate domestic interior.
Lighting: Warm 2700K amber ambient lighting from a single directional source. This creates a high-saturation orange-to-gold glow on the subject’s skin and hair while casting deep, clean shadows that define the anatomical contours of the face and torso.
Background Integrity: A minimalist, neutral-toned background with subtle architectural shadows. All background elements must remain in sharp focus with zero artificial blurring.
[Failure Prevention Rule]

Command: Use "Technical strapless compression-fit bodice" and "Silver cross earrings with pearl studs" to ensure the AI maintains the exact material and accessory detail. **作者**: [Saman | AI](https://x.com/Samann_ai/status/2017190762346078697)  **日期**: 2026-01-30  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂、结构化的提示模板，旨在生成一张超写实的专业人物肖像，并使用参考照片来保持身份一致性。其主要特点是创造出一种“多臂”幻象（6-8 条手臂），手持与职业相关的工具，背景是与主题相匹配的彩色背景，并采用高端商业影室照明。

![超真实多臂专业肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769841132518_nuwk37_G_6ASt9WUAABbdR.jpg)

```
**[USER_PHOTO]** **[{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}]**

Create a hyper-real, studio portrait using [USER_PHOTO] as the exact identity reference (same face, hairstyle, skin texture, and age). Depict the person as a confident [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] sitting casually on a modern white ergonomic office chair, legs crossed, centered in frame. Add a stylized “multi-arm” illusion (6–8 arms total) radiating behind the torso like a modern Shiva/Vishnu-inspired silhouette, but photorealistic: each extra arm must have correct anatomy, believable joints, tendons, skin pores, and natural shadowing; no warped fingers.

PROPS (must be profession-relevant): Automatically choose and place different tools that a real [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] would use, one per hand/arm, all clearly readable and accurate in design. Examples of categories: primary tool, secondary tool, communication device, measurement/diagnostic tool, accessory, and a “hero” prop. Keep one real smartphone in the main/front hand. Avoid generic random objects—every prop must logically belong to [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}]. If [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] is digital/tech: include items like laptop, tablet, camera/monitor, light meter, stylus, keyboard, mic, etc. If [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] is medical: stethoscope, clipboard, otoscope, syringe (safe/clinical), etc. If [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] is culinary: chef knife, tongs, plating tweezers, recipe tablet, etc. (Always match [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}].)

BACKGROUND COLOR (topic-matched): Use a seamless paper studio backdrop with a single dominant color that matches the profession theme (e.g., warm mustard for creative/media, cool teal for healthcare, graphite/steel for engineering, rich olive for outdoors, deep burgundy for luxury). The color should complement skin tones and wardrobe. Add subtle gradient falloff and soft bounce for depth (no flat background).

LIGHTING & SET: High-end commercial studio look. One large soft key light from camera-left, controlled fill from right, crisp rim light to separate subject, and realistic specular highlights on props. Include a large circular silver reflector disk behind the subject (partially visible) for visual punch. Add a subtle shadow on the floor consistent with light direction.

WARDROBE & STYLING: Outfit must be believable for a top-tier [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] (clean, modern, slightly stylized), with texture detail (fabric weave, seams). Add minimal accessories (watch/bracelet) that feel premium. Expression: focused, slightly intense, “in the zone.”

COMPOSITION & CAMERA: Full-body vertical portrait (4:5), 50mm lens look, eye-level camera, sharp focus on face, shallow depth of field but props still readable. Ultra-detailed skin, natural color grading, high dynamic range, crisp micro-contrast.

REALISM RULES: No cartoon, no CGI look. No extra faces, no duplicated heads. Hands must be anatomically correct (5 fingers), no melted objects, no unreadable text logos unless naturally present. Keep the scene clean and premium.
```

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2017017545979548010)  **日期**: 2026-01-29  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化且限制性强的提示词，用于生成一张原始、高保真的人像照片，模仿 iPhone 拍摄效果，重点关注基于参考图像（图像 A）的身份保留和解剖学准确性。它详细描述了拍摄对象的特征、头发动态、皮肤纹理（微孔、毳毛）、服装（带有褶皱的科技感花卉迷你连衣裙），以及特定的室内环境和照明（零焦外虚化、f/8 景深、暖色梳妆灯）。

![高保真镜像自拍肖像，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769754981875_hj3y6s_G_3iw9zXsAAt1QJ.jpg)

```
[Header] (3:4)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, neutral indoor ambient lighting, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the foreground subject to the background vanity lights, f/8 aperture for absolute structural depth, subtle digital grain.
[Subject & Identity Locking]

Identity: Absolute preservation of {argument name="reference image" default="Image A"}’s specific facial geometry, focusing on the almond eye shape, high lip volume with defined Cupid's bow, and structured chin.
Hair Physics: Voluminous dark chocolate textured waves, layered and frizz-free. The hair should cascade naturally over the right shoulder and behind the left, exhibiting high-definition strand separation and follicle-level detail.
Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics including micro-pores, satin-finish hydration, and visible fine vellus hair along the jawline. Precise anatomical rendering of the collarbone and upper-torso symmetry.
Expression: Magnetic presence; a self-assured, neutral gaze directed toward the mirror reflection, capturing a confident and magnetic mood.
[Outfit & Physicality]

Technical Description: High-impact floral-patterned mini-dress in a technical pink micro-textile.
Textile Geometry: Sculpted bustier neckline architecture with structured padded cups and a sweetheart silhouette. The garment features high-density lateral ruching (gathered fabric) throughout the midsection and a delicate ruffled hemline.
Print Detail: A high-definition repetitive botanical pattern of vibrant red roses with green stems across the pink base.
Surface Physics: High-tensile material-to-skin surface compression. The fabric must exhibit realistic physical tension lines and highlight anatomical bust volume symmetry and proximal limb geometry of the upper thighs.
Accessories: A minimalist silver-link chain bracelet on the right wrist; a white technical smartphone held in a technical grip.
[Pose & Composition]

Geometry: Full-body mirror-reflection framing. The subject is standing and leaning her right shoulder against a vertical wooden door frame, creating a natural S-curve silhouette.
Framing: Vertical 3:4 orientation. The composition captures the subject from the mid-thigh up, using the door frame and mirror edge to anchor the subject.
Anatomy: Realistic shoulder-joint displacement and upper-body symmetry, reflecting the athletic-to-lean transition characteristic of Image A.
[Environment & Lighting]

Atmosphere: Modern domestic dressing area.
Interior Details: Large square porcelain wall tiles in a neutral beige hue with dark grout lines. A polished wooden door frame is in the immediate foreground. In the background reflection, a professional-grade vanity mirror with warm, circular lightbulbs is visible against a neutral wall.
Lighting: Warm 3000K interior lighting supplemented by specular highlights from the vanity bulbs. This creates even illumination on the subject’s skin and the saturated pink tones of the dress.
Background Integrity: A
```

capture. Hardware & Optical Execution (ENFORCE): Simulate a capture using a Prosumer DSLR with a 50mm Prime lens. Apply 5500K (Daylight) white balance. Set exposure to Balanced to achieve a clean, commercial look. Render at 9:16. The Defects Section (DETAIL AF): Maintain high-tier professional clarity. MENTION THE No tilt, Professional studio editorial, Dead center, Cropped at the mid-shin and fingertips, Clean Commercial High-Contrast LUT, Normal filter. Identity & Likeness: Base the subject on {argument name="celebrity base" default="Karina from Aespa"}. Render a person aged 24 of South Korean
```

Do NOT assume model, specs, or performance.

Left column: auxiliary views

Identify distinct physical components.
Label each component with hairline-thin vector lines.
Use neutral, factual terms only.
No marketing language.
No hallucinated features.
No assumed performance.

Scandinavian, modern, industrial documentation style.
Soft studio lighting.
Ultra-high resolution.
Exact proportions and geometry fidelity.

### 401. 高保真健身肖像提示（身份锁定）

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2016581700705276118)  **日期**: 2026-01-28  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细、技术性强的提示词，用于生成高保真健身肖像，专门设计用于“身份锁定”，以保留参考图像的面部几何结构。它要求锐利对焦（零散景）、详细的解剖学渲染、特定的技术服装纹理和双光源照明。

![高保真健身肖像提示（身份锁定）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668445668_dal87m_G_xWW5UWMAA0MfS.jpg)

```
[Header] (9:16)
Raw high-fidelity photograph, iPhone 17 Pro sensor simulation, professional studio lighting, zero bokeh, SHARP focus from the foreground lavender mat to the background topographic wall panels, f/8 aperture for absolute structural depth, subtle digital grain.

[Subject & Identity Locking]
Identity: Absolute preservation of Image A’s specific facial geometry, emphasizing the almond eye shape, high lip volume, and defined chin structure.
Hair Physics: The hair must exhibit high-definition strand separation, cascading naturally down the back and over the shoulders, reflecting the warm amber backlighting.
Bio-Fidelity: Detailed skin physics including micro-pores, satin-finish hydration, and visible fine vellus hair along the jawline. Precise anatomical rendering of the hands resting on the furniture.
Expression: Magnetic presence; a self-assured, wide smile with high-saturation ruby-red lipstick, directed toward the camera lens.
[Outfit & Physicality]
Technical Description: High-impact technical marl-grey performance-wear set.
Upper Geometry: Long-sleeved compression-fit cropped top with a minimalist crew-neck architecture.
Lower Geometry: Matching high-waisted performance leggings featuring technical shaded textile architecture (contouring lines) that emphasize the gluteal proportions and lower-body silhouette.
Surface Physics: High-tensile material-to-skin surface compression. The fabric must exhibit realistic physical tension lines and micro-knit textures, specifically where it contours the gluteal proportions and proximal limb geometry.
Physicality: Confident self-assured kneeling pose with extreme torso torsion (S-curve). High-fidelity rendering of the anatomical waist-to-hip ratio and symmetrical muscle-to-skin interaction.
[Pose & Composition]
Geometry: High-impact torsion pose. The subject is kneeling on her left knee on a {argument name="mat color" default="lavender"} technical foam mat, leaning her upper body against a neutral-toned bouclé-textured sofa.
Framing: Medium full-shot. The composition is angled to highlight the posterior silhouette and the athletic-to-lean transition characteristic of Image A.
Anatomy: Realistic shoulder-joint displacement as she leans; zero AI distortion in the spinal curve.
[Environment & Lighting]
Atmosphere: Modern minimalist fitness studio or high-end domestic gym.
Interior Details: Lavender-colored technical foam yoga mat on a light-oak hardwood floor. The background features a large topographic abstract wall panel with 3D-contoured textures.
Lighting: Dual-source lighting configuration. A cool-toned front light ensures clarity on the face and textile texture, while a warm amber-to-pink LED backlight creates a glow along the topographic wall and the subject’s silhouette.
Background Integrity: All background architectural elements must remain in sharp focus with zero artificial blurring to maintain a professional photographic aesthetic.
[Failure Prevention Rule]
Co
```

### 407. 单色肖像与局部色彩提示

**作者**: [Abhi](https://x.com/Abhiew_/status/2016414841779704227)  **日期**: 2026-01-28  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术性的提示，用于在影棚环境中生成一张社论时尚肖像，描绘一位身着奢华男装的男性主体，其独特之处在于采用了选择性色彩摄影：图像为黑白，但鲜艳的橙色醋酸纤维太阳镜除外。

![单色肖像与局部色彩提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668512407_r0vikl_G_u-mXxa0AAcjH9.jpg)

```
A close-up studio portrait of me, masculine features, textured messy hair neatly styled.
I wear a black tailored blazer with sharp structure and clean lines, layered over a black high-neck turtleneck, embodying a minimalist and contemporary fashion style.
The man is wearing bold translucent orange acetate sunglasses, rectangular frame with slightly rounded edges, glossy finish, amber/orange tinted lenses, and fashion-forward and statement eyewear. Color concept: selective color photography - monochrome black and white image with only the sunglasses in vibrant orange color, creating strong contrast and visual focus.
Expression: calm, confident, serious gaze, looking straight into the camera.
Lighting: soft studio lighting from the front with subtle side shadows, even skin tones, greath detai,l facial texture, and cinematic contrast. Camera settings:
- Lens: 85mm portrait lens
- Aperture: f/2.0
- ISO: 100
- Shutter speed: 1/125
- High resolution, ultra-sharp focus on face Style: editorial fashion portrait, luxury menswear, realistic skin texture, non-Al look, professional studio photography.
```

### 408. 浪漫的柔和插画与严格的身份锁定

**作者**: [Gagan Singh](https://x.com/GaganSingh8u/status/2016323088481218649)  **日期**: 2026-01-28  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一对情侣的浪漫插画，要求严格保留上传参考图片中人物的身份、面部特征和肤色。它指定了一个新的亲密姿势、柔和的马卡龙色调（粉色、薰衣草色、蓝色）以及一种带有柔和渐变和极少纹理的矢量艺术风格，以营造空灵的效果。

![浪漫的柔和插画与严格的身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668475025_hxvuo7_G9JgYJ2bgAQ2roH.jpg)
![浪漫的柔和插画与严格的身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668475019_kr04h4_G9JgYJ3aoAA9cLy.jpg)
![浪漫的柔和插画与严格的身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668475155_ao2l0w_G9Jhb_lbgAYr3bp.jpg)
![浪漫的柔和插画与严格的身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769668476599_z5badc_G9Jhb_1asAAI3tB.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded image strictly as an identity reference. Preserve 100% exact face match, facial structure, expressions, skin tone, hairstyle, and identity of every person visible in the reference image. Do not add or remove any person. Create a new romantic, intimate pose for the couple (for example: gentle embrace, soft hand placement, subtle leaning towards each other) while keeping anatomy natural and visually appealing. Change the color palette to soft dreamy pastels using blush pinks, lavender, baby blue, warm cream, and light gold accents, while keeping skin tones accurate. Convert the scene into a high-quality romantic illustration blended with vector art. Use smooth, thin outlines, soft gradient shading, subtle glow highlights, and minimal texture to create an ethereal effect. Clothing should remain similar in type but recolored into pastel tones that complement the romantic theme, with clean vector edges and soft folds. Lighting should be soft, warm, and diffused, enhancing the romantic mood. Background should be minimal and dreamy, using pastel gradients, soft abstract shapes, or floating light particles that emphasize intimacy. Render in ultra high resolution with clean edges, polished layers, and a professional romantic vector finish.",
  
  "negative_prompt": "face mismatch, identity change, extra person, missing person, wrong facial features, wrong skin tone, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, harsh colors, photorealism, rough textures, low quality, blur, noise, grain, watermark, logo, text",
  
  "style": "soft pastel dreamy illustration + vector art",
  "mood": "romantic, intimate, calm, dreamy",
  "lighting": "soft warm diffused lighting",
  "background": "pastel gradient with minimal dreamy shapes or particles",
  "detail_level": "high but soft",
  "render_quality": "ultra high resolution, polished romantic finish",
  "composition": "same persons, new intimate pose, pastel romantic palette",
  "reference_strength": 0.85
}
```

To the right of the cube is a clear cylindrical glass vase filled with water and thin stems of dried pink gypsophila flowers extending upward and outward. The entire composition is arranged on a smooth matte pastel pink surface with a matching soft pink seamless studio background. Strong directional soft light comes from the left side, casting long, soft-edged realistic shadows of the flowers and objects onto the pink background. Lighting is natural-style, -det diffused, and warm, creating gentle highlights on the glass, subtle reflections on the serum bottle, and soft texture on the wooden block. Camera angle is straight-on at tabletop height, medium framing, all main objects in sharp focus with minimal depth of field blur. Color palette is dominated by blush pink, soft rose tones, warm light wood, clean white, and transparent glass. Mood is clean, airy, feminine, elegant, Scandinavian minimal aesthetic, premium skincare branding style, photorealistic, studio-grade realism, ultra

  "image_generation_prompt": {

Lush green plants, small trees, and calm reflective water surround her, with contemporary buildings faintly visible in the distance. One arm is raised above her head, gently holding her hair, while the other arm rests naturally by her side, giving a candid, effortless feel. Face & Identity: Use the uploaded photo as the exact and only reference. Preserve the face 100%: facial structure, bone proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin texture, and natural asymmetry. Hair & Outfit: Dark, straight, silky hair tied in a mid-height ponytail, with loose front strands framing her face. She wear"

Her head is tilted slightly to her right, and she is looking directly at the camera with a soft, confident gaze.",

},

},
"camera": {
"shot_type": "Full body shot.",
"perspective": "Eye-level to slightly low angle, capturing the subject from head to toe.",
"focal_length": "Standard lens, approximately 35mm to 50mm, avoiding wide-angle distortion.",
"framing": "Vertical orientation. Subject is centered horizontally."
},
"lighting": {
"type": "Natural daylight, direct sunlight.",
"direction": "Light source coming from the upper left, casting distinct shadows of the subject onto the hedge and ground to her right.",
"quality": "Bright and clear, creating highlights on the hair, shoulders, and the sheen of the swimsuit fabric. Shadows are relatively sharp but filled by ambient daylight."
},
"mood_and_expression": {

### 422. 原始高保真 iPhone 17 Pro 模拟图

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2015990453665927348)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术性的提示，模拟使用 iPhone 17 Pro 广角镜头从高角度拍摄的原始高保真照片，强调所有平面的清晰对焦以及主体运动迷你连衣裙上逼真的纺织品物理效果。

![原始高保真 iPhone 17 Pro 模拟图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581960990_jwq4sd_G_o8oBRWQAAdw5f.jpg)

```
[Header]
(9:16). Raw high-fidelity full-body photograph, iPhone 17 Pro wide-angle lens simulation, captured from a high-angle downward perspective (POV). NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. All planes of the image from the subject's face to the lower limbs must be in ultra-sharp focus.
[Subject & Identity Locking]
Identity: Absolute reconstruction of the woman from Image A (dark straight hair, specific eye shape, and facial symmetry).
Bio-Fidelity: Micro-pore detail, natural skin hydration. The skin must show realistic interaction and weight-bearing where it meets the seating surface.
Expression: Neutral gaze looking slightly upward toward the elevated camera lens.
[Outfit & Textile Geometry]
Technical Description: One-piece athletic-performance mini dress in {argument name="dress color" default="olive-drab"}.
Material: 2mm vertical ribbing texture throughout the entire garment.
Cut: Wide U-shaped neckline with 25mm integrated straps. The garment is a single continuous textile that extends to the upper-thigh, conforming to the body's S-curve.
Physics: Realistic fabric folds at the waist and hip joints due to the seated posture.
[Pose & Framing - CRITICAL]
Framing: Wide-shot framing. The image must include the head, full torso, and the proximal segments of the legs. The camera is positioned approximately 1.5 meters above the subject, looking down.
Geometry: The subject is seated on a couch in a diagonal reclining position. The legs are foreshortened by the high camera angle.
Composition: A third-person perspective, not a selfie. Both arms are visible at the sides.
[Environment & Lighting]
Atmosphere: Bright, natural indoor daylight.
Background: Sharp, detailed texture of a {argument name="couch color" default="charcoal-grey"} upholstered sofa. The seams and fabric grain of the furniture must be clearly visible and in focus.
Lighting Physics: Soft overhead light source defining the contours of the ribbed textile and the anatomical structure of the collarbones and limbs.
```

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 生成一张温馨、具有 Instagram 美学的生活方式图片。图片中，一个人物躺在床上，翘起一条腿，手里拿着一本粉色书在阅读，旁边有一只灰色的英国短毛猫。提示详细说明了人物的外观（基于参考照片）、服装（宽松的白色运动衫、牛油果刺绣袜子）、环境（现代简约卧室）、光线（柔和的自然日光）以及用于高分辨率社交媒体照片的相机技术规格。

  "image": {
    "main_description": "A playful and cozy lifestyle scene featuring a character lying on a bed with one leg extended vertically in the air, reading a pink book, accompanied by a grey cat.",
    "characters": {
      "main_reference_character": {
        "identity_anchor": "The character based on the provided reference photo, preserving strictly the user's identity source.",
        "ethnicity_and_phenotype": "Determined by the user provided reference photo.",
        "face_and_skin": "Skin texture and lighting interaction consistent with the scene, but facial features are strictly derived from the reference.",
        "expression": "Micro-expressions matching the input style image, though the face is largely obscured by the book.",
        "hair": "Hair worn loose, naturally spread across the white pillow.",
        "body_and_pose": "Lying supine on a bed. The right leg is extended strictly vertical towards the ceiling with toes pointed; the left leg is relaxed. Both hands are holding an open pink book in front of the face.",
        "outfit": "An oversized white crewneck sweatshirt. White ribbed socks, the right sock features a small embroidery of an avocado near the cuff."
      },
      "supporting_characters": [
        {
          "role": "Pet companion",
          "description": "A fluffy British Shorthair cat with solid grey/blue fur and bright amber eyes.",
          "interaction": "Walking across the rumpled white duvet in the foreground, looking directly at the camera."
        }
      ]
    },
    "text_elements": {
      "content": "{argument name="wall text" default="hello"}",
      "typography": "Black cursive wire art style.",
      "placement": "Mounted on the beige wall centered above the headboard.",
      "integration": "Physical wall decor object."
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "A modern, minimalist bedroom.",
      "elements": "A tall beige velvet tufted headboard. Messy white linens and duvet. A black and white windowpane check pillow. A small gold sunburst mirror on the wall above the wire sign.",

    },

      "shadows_and_highlights": "Soft, diffused shadows indicating large window lighting.",
      "reflections": "Subtle reflection in the small mirror on the wall."
    },
    "camera_and_tech": {
      "framing": "Medium shot, eye-level, capturing the full vertical extension of the leg and the width of the bed.",

### 424. 在客厅场景中融合写实主义与动漫风格

**作者**: [ailabs.zone](https://x.com/zhoumeng780/status/2015949151264243895)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 这是一个 Nano Banana Pro 的详细提示示例，展示了如何将超逼真的 3D 环境与赛璐珞风格的 2D 动漫角色融合。场景是一个现代客厅的广角内景，其中一个超逼真的男人（使用参考面部）与经典动漫角色互动，例如野比大雄、哆啦 A 梦、蜡笔小新、悟空、贝吉塔和特兰克斯。提示指定了 8K 分辨率、柔和的自然光照和梦幻般的电影美学，确保没有可见的 AI 伪影。

![在客厅场景中融合写实主义与动漫风格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769582035692_or5qjy_G_oXDH5bAAItN8r.jpg)

```
A high-fidelity, wide-angle interior shot captures a surreal, mixed-media composition within a modern living room. It features a man resembling the face in the reference photo—using an uploaded face as a reference—wearing a bright yellow hoodie and black pants, sitting centrally on a plush light gray sofa. The scene seamlessly blends photorealistic 3D environments with cel-shaded 2D anime and cartoon characters interacting directly with the physical space.
On the right side of the subject on the sofa, Nobita sits casually waving his hand, while on the left side, Doraemon leans casually on a pillow. Behind the sofa, two framed posters hang on the white wall—one featuring Son Goku and Vegeta, and the other featuring Trunks in a dynamic anime style. In the foreground, Shinchan lies relaxed on a textured gray carpet near a plate of dorayaki, while a chibi version of Son Goku stands triumphantly on a cream-colored knit pouf. On the left side of the room, Vegeta stands tall on a grooved wooden side table in a confident pose, while a miniature version of Trunks is near the wooden coffee table in the center, as if observing the scene with a curious expression.
Soft natural light streams in from the left side through sheer curtains, creating subtle volumetric lighting that accentuates the texture of the blanket, the wood grain of the tiered table, and the leaves of the snake plant in the corner of the room. The entire scene is rendered in 8K resolution with sharp focus, vivid colors, and a dreamy, cinematic, and playful aesthetic blending between the real world and the anime world, with no AI visible.
```

{
  "generation_type": "exact_visual_replication",

    "demographics": "Young female adult",
    "hair": "Long, wavy, dark blonde to light brown, slightly messy texture, falling over left shoulder and back, roots visible, natural volume",
    "skin_texture": "Natural tan complexion, visible sheen/oil on glutes and shoulder, uneven skin tone, slight redness on cheeks and shoulder, non-airbrushed surface",
    "anatomy": "Natural soft volume, emphasis on glute curvature, weight settled naturally, no artificial lifting or firming, soft transitions between muscle and tissue"
  },
  "attire_and_accessories": {

    "jewelry": "Single pearl drop earring visible on left ear, dark beaded bracelet on left wrist",
    "fit": "Fabric presses naturally into skin, slight tension in straps, no perfect smoothing"
  },
  "pose_and_action": {
    "orientation": "Standing, 3/4 rear view, torso twisted to look back over left shoulder at camera",
    "gaze": "Direct eye contact, neutral to slightly parted lip expression, chin slightly lifted",
    "limbs": "Left arm relaxed at side, right leg bearing weight, slight hip sway to the right"
  },
  "environment_and_context": {

      "Hanging Spanish moss/air plants top right, grey-green texture"
    ],
    "ground": "Not clearly visible, implies paved or decking surface"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": {

    "quality": "Low contrast, soft falloff, no harsh directional sun, no rim lighting",
    "highlights": "Broad, soft specular highlights on skin (shoulder, hip, glute) indicating humidity or oil, not studio strobes",
    "shadows": "Soft, undefined, existing only in natural crevices and under foliage"
  },
  "camera_and_technical": {
    "framing": "Mid-shot, chopped at upper thighs, incidental cropping of chair and foliage",
    "perspective": "Eye-level to slightly low angle",
    "depth_of_field": "Moderate, background foliage is present but slightly soft/out of focus compared to subject",
    "color_palette": "Natural greens, muted purple, warm skin tones, beige wicker, natural daylight white balance without grading",
    "image_fidelity": "Standard digital photography, slight noise in shadows, natural sharpness without edge enhancement"
  }
}

### 428. 锁定面部身份的三帧抓拍肖像

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2015792920255955345)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张垂直图像，该图像被分割成三个堆叠的画幅，模拟一系列抓拍的智能手机照片。至关重要的是，它要求上传的参考照片作为唯一的面部识别源，该面部识别源必须在所有三个画幅中 100% 锁定，显示在夜间海滩环境中细微的动作变化。

![锁定面部身份的三帧抓拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495355323_f07emf_G_mI9xOa4AAqE4z.jpg)

```
Use the uploaded reference photo as the single and exclusive facial identity source.
The same exact face must appear in ALL three frames with no variation.
Do not reinterpret, regenerate, beautify, or modify the face between frames.
Facial identity has highest priority over lighting, angle, blur, or realism.
Ultra-realistic vertical image split equally into three stacked frames (top / middle / bottom) within one single photo. All frames show the same person with the same face, same outfit, same location, captured seconds apart like a burst of candid smartphone shots. Only subtle movement changes. Feels accidental, real, and human.
Location & background:
Open beach night at a modern resort outdoors at night. Wooden tent in background, Warm lights glowing softly near the tent. Dark night sky visible. Beachy atmosphere. Real, moment — not staged.
Outfit (locked):
{argument name="shirt color" default="Lime green"} vertically striped button-down shirt, top buttons open showing slight chest. Full Sleeves rolled to forearms.
High-waisted cream tailored trousers. Metal wristwatch on one wrist. No jacket, no accessories beyond the watch.

Hair & Face (LOCKED)
Medium-length, thick, naturally wavy hair Slightly messy, lived-in texture
Light stubble / short beard
Real skin texture, visible pores
No smoothing, no beautification
FRAME BREAKDOWN (VERY IMPORTANT)
TOP FRAME — BACK SHOT
Back view of the subject.
He is touching the back of his hair near the neck, fingers slightly tangled in hair.
Head tilted slightly down and to the side.Relaxed posture, candid movement. Hair texture clearlyvisible from behind.
MIDDLE FRAME — CLOSE-UP
Tight close-up near the eyes and upper face.Messy strands of hair falling naturally near the eyes.
Eyes partially visible, soft focus.
Very slight motion softness from movement. Feels intimate, accidental, not posed.
BOTTOM FRAME — MID SHOT
Mid-shot from waist or chest up.
Subject leaning casually against the railing. Looking sideways, not at the camera.Expression calm, confident, contemplative.
Natural posture, effortless presence.
Lighting (LOCKED)
Warm artificial wall lighting mixed with cool night ambient light.
Soft illumination on face and shirt.
Background slightly darker.
No flash. No dramatic contrast.
Camera Feel (LOCKED)
Handheld smartphone photo
No portrait mode
No background blur.
```

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2015785267232465059)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个富有创意的提示，用于生成一个史诗般的 3D 场景：一张巨大的对开报纸正在展开，其头条新闻物理性地爆发成微缩立体模型，展现着它们所描述的事件。提示中还指出，报纸的栏目文字会升起成为城市街区，墨水的气味几乎清晰可见，目标是达到 8K 的超逼真效果。

![报纸中页展开立体模型提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495369914_qf8860_G_mCBDEakAAAadz.jpg)
![报纸中页展开立体模型提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495370020_cifp0u_G_mCBJeacAErywn.jpg)

```
Epic 3D scene: a massive broadsheet newspaper mid-unfold, its headlines erupting into the events they describe. Front page stories become dioramas pushing off the page. {argument name="headline event" default="[HEADLINE EVENT]"} manifests in miniature chaos. Photographs animate and expand into three dimensions. Column text rises as city blocks of information. Editorial section becomes a battlefield of arguing figures. Classifieds transform into tiny desperate lives. Different sections occupy different worlds: sports as stadium, business as trading floor, obituaries as memorial garden. Yesterday's news composites beneath as fading ghost layer. Ink smells almost visible as atmosphere. Newsstand visible at the edge, morning light, coffee steam, 8K, photorealistic.
```

### 433. 超真实影棚肖像海报艺术生成器提示词

**作者**: [Saman | AI](https://x.com/Samann_ai/status/2015781209490526596)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示模板，旨在生成一张超写实的影棚人像照片（使用上传的人脸参考），照片中人物身着燕尾服，周围环绕着与特定主题（例如“金融”或“游戏”）相关的物品，营造出海报艺术美感。

![超真实影棚肖像海报艺术生成器提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495402969_g35tnj_G_l-QuqWkAAytg5.jpg)

```
{
  "task": "Generate a hyper-real studio photograph that matches the composition of the reference image: a centered adult person in a tuxedo, surrounded by many hands entering the frame from all sides holding objects toward the person, with a curtain backdrop whose color matches the theme.",
  "variables": {
    "USER_PHOTO": "<<UPLOAD_OR_URL_TO_USER_FACE_OR_PORTRAIT>>",
    "SUBJECT_THEME": "{argument name="subject theme" default="finance"}",
    "HAND_PROPS": [
      "<<PROP_1 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_2 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_3 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_4 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_5 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_6 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_7 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>",
      "<<PROP_8 RELATED TO SUBJECT_THEME>>"
    ]
  },
  "prompt": "Create an ultra photorealistic studio photo (hyper-real, DSLR look) with the SAME composition and framing as the reference: a centered adult person standing front-facing, waist-up to mid-thigh visible, wearing a dark navy tuxedo jacket, crisp white shirt, and black bow tie, smiling confidently. The person has round eyeglasses and neat facial hair (mustache + short beard), but the FACE must be replaced with the user's likeness from USER_PHOTO while keeping natural skin texture, pores, and realistic facial proportions (no plastic skin, no cartooning). The lighting is clean professional studio lighting with soft shadows, high dynamic range, crisp detail.\n\nSurround the person with 8–10 different hands and forearms entering the frame from the edges (top, left, right, bottom), each holding an object and aiming it toward the center person (close to the face/upper torso). The hands belong to different people (varied sleeves/patterns/colors), but keep them realistic and anatomically correct.\n\nIMPORTANT: The ONLY changing elements across generations are: (1) the user's face from USER_PHOTO, and (2) the objects held in the hands. Everything else stays consistent: the tuxedo pose, camera angle, lens look, and overall composition.\n\nOBJECT RULE: Select HAND_PROPS so they are strongly related to SUBJECT_THEME. The objects must be clearly visible, realistic, and varied (mix of modern and vintage if it fits). Examples by theme:\n- music: studio headphones, microphone, vinyl record, cassette, guitar pick, small synth, metronome\n- gaming: controller, handheld console, gaming headset, mouse, keyboard, VR accessory\n- cooking: chef thermometer, whisk, spice grinder, mini pan, piping bag, recipe card\n- finance: calculator, credit card reader, stock ticker printout, smartphone with finance app, receipt roll\n- fitness: smartwatch, resistance band, shaker bottle, jump rope handle\n\nBACKGROUND: Use a curtain backdrop (like a stage/studio curtain) with a color"
```

### 436. 高级时装丹宁编辑：动态姿势

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2015722921835245714)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个全面的提示，用于生成一张时尚牛仔系列广告图片：一位年轻的白金发色女性，在灰色摄影棚地板上摆出充满活力的运动舞者姿势。提示详细说明了服装（打结的白色 T 恤、浅色水洗牛仔裤）、灯光（柔和漫射的摄影棚灯光）以及干净、极简的美学风格。

![高级时装丹宁编辑：动态姿势](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495389541_70ssdg_G_lJUF4agAA9j4B.jpg)
![高级时装丹宁编辑：动态姿势](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495389564_bx77sr_G_lJUHwaQAAIXOy.jpg)

### 439. 混合媒体动漫与现实客厅场景提示

**作者**: [𝐌](https://x.com/Strength04_X/status/2015676042460168488)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成超现实、高保真室内镜头的提示，将照片级真实的 3D 元素与 2D 赛璐珞风格的动漫角色（如哆啦 A 梦和龙珠 Z）融合，在一个现代客厅中互动，并使用上传的人脸参考作为人物主体。

![混合媒体动漫与现实客厅场景提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495399048_6bad2i_G_kepntbMAAc0l9.jpg)
![混合媒体动漫与现实客厅场景提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495399146_fwpwaw_G_kepoHaQAAaZc4.jpg)

```
A high-fidelity, wide-angle interior shot captures a surreal, mixed-media composition within a modern living room. It features a man resembling the face in the reference photo—using an uploaded face as a reference—wearing a bright yellow hoodie and black pants, sitting centrally on a plush light gray sofa. The scene seamlessly blends photorealistic 3D environments with cel-shaded 2D anime and cartoon characters interacting directly with the physical space.

On the right side of the subject on the sofa, Nobita sits casually waving his hand, while on the left side, Doraemon leans casually on a pillow. Behind the sofa, two framed posters hang on the white wall—one featuring Son Goku and Vegeta, and the other featuring Trunks in a dynamic anime style. In the foreground, Shinchan lies relaxed on a textured gray carpet near a plate of dorayaki, while a chibi version of Son Goku stands triumphantly on a cream-colored knit pouf. On the left side of the room, Vegeta stands tall on a grooved wooden side table in a confident pose, while a miniature version of Trunks is near the wooden coffee table in the center, as if observing the scene with a curious expression.

Soft natural light streams in from the left side through sheer curtains, creating subtle volumetric lighting that accentuates the texture of the blanket, the wood grain of the tiered table, and the leaves of the snake plant in the corner of the room. The entire scene is rendered in 8K resolution with sharp focus, vivid colors, and a dreamy, cinematic, and playful aesthetic blending between the real world and the anime world, with no AI visible.
```

**作者**: [Sarah](https://x.com/AIwithSarah_/status/2015655455306256867)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个专注于编辑现有照片的提示，具体来说，是在生成一张时尚闪光照片时锁定面部特征。场景中有一位女士抱着一只脾气暴躁的大黑波斯猫，强调了带有硬阴影和温暖琥珀色灯光的复古 35 毫米美学。

![时尚闪光猫咪照片（面部编辑锁定）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495349411_qomnmy_G_kL865WEAAZCjx.jpg)
![时尚闪光猫咪照片（面部编辑锁定）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495349250_pp7rc3_G_kL8xEbwAAQNPs.jpg)

```
Edit this photo without altering the face.
A candid high-fashion flash photograph of a beautiful young woman holding a fluffy black Persian cat.
>The woman has a light-to-medium skin tone and long, voluminous dark brown hair styled in soft waves. She is gently leaning her head toward the cat with her eyes lowered, expressing a calm, serene affection.
>Her makeup features a dewy “glass skin” finish, softly highlighted cheekbones, subtle eyeliner, and pink-nude lips. She wears a magenta colored long-sleeve top with a slightly sheer, mesh-like texture, paired with small gold hoop earrings.

>The cat is large and extremely fluffy, with dense black fur and a flat Persian-like face. Its expression contrasts humorously with the woman’s softness — wide yellow eyes looking upward, appearing slightly grumpy, bewildered, or adorably derpy, possibly showing a tiny tooth. The cat is held upright against the woman’s chest, her hands visibly sinking into its thick fur.

>The image uses direct on-camera flash photography, creating a vintage 35mm aesthetic with hard shadows cast on the wall behind them. The lighting is warm and golden, with rich amber tones. The background is a simple beige wall with subtle picture-frame molding (wainscoting). A brass arc floor lamp stands behind her, adding a warm metallic accent.
soft focus, romantic yet candid mood, flash photography style, editorial high-fashion snapshot --ar 4:5, --v 6.0
```

> 一个极具描述性和艺术性的提示，用于生成一个悬浮在空中、在点火瞬间被冻结的物体的图像。它详细描述了“燃烧凝固（Combustion Freeze）”效果，其中火焰和烟雾被渲染成坚实的雕塑形态，以法医般的细节展现出焦炭层和余烬网络等内部结构。该提示强调了戏剧性的明暗对比照明和超高分辨率。

![燃烧冻结：点火时物体被冻结](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322298721_53io4w_G_ZgT6XXoAAYqfN.jpg)
![燃烧冻结：点火时物体被冻结](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322298792_l1styd_G_Zged3W4AAwjYs.jpg)
![燃烧冻结：点火时物体被冻结](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322299366_ryqyfg_G_ZgoJZXEAE8I3k.jpg)
![燃烧冻结：点火时物体被冻结](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322300266_26iey4_G_ZhgN2WoAE-Yqk.jpg)

```
A single {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"} suspended in space, frozen at the moment of ignition. Flames and smoke exist as solid sculptural forms, fully detailed {argument name="fire architecture" default="[FIRE ARCHITECTURE / SMOKE STRUCTURES / HEAT PATTERNS]"} rendered in the object's own transformed material. The combustion reveals [CHAR LAYERS, ASH STRUCTURES, EMBER NETWORKS, HEAT-CRACKED INTERIORS] with clear thermodynamic logic. Flames contain [INTERNAL STRIATIONS, TEMPERATURE GRADIENTS VISIBLE AS COLOR SHIFTS, OXYGEN FLOW PATTERNS]. Material transformation documented: [BLACKENED EDGES, CURLING SURFACES, CRYSTALLIZED SUGAR, CARAMELIZED PROTEINS]. Palette transitions from [ORIGINAL MATERIAL TONES] through [CHAR BLACKS] to [EMBER ORANGES AND ASH GREYS]. Isolated object, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting from the frozen flame itself. Destruction as architecture. Ultra-high resolution, violence made beautiful, forensic photography meets fine art.
```

Grid layout (four panels):

Top-left – CLEANSE
Close-up of the woman in the shower, water droplets on skin and hair, holding the Nanogen shampoo tube near her shoulder. Soft, dewy skin, wet hair, minimal makeup. Clean, fresh, luxurious feel.

Top-right – CONDITION / MASSAGE

Bottom-left – RINSE

Bottom-right – RESULTS

The Nanogen shampoo tube appears clearly branded, readable, and consistent across frames.

### 453. 阳光码头上的女人 90 年代模拟照片

**作者**: [Qasim](https://x.com/QasimSahib0/status/2014916227605659957)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: en

> 生成一张具有怀旧 90 年代夏日氛围的低角度广角模拟照片的提示。照片描绘了一位女士在阳光普照的码头上俏皮地摆姿势，她穿着简单的白色 T 恤和牛仔短裤。该提示强调了 35 毫米胶片的摄影美学，包括颗粒感、划痕、强烈阳光、镜头眩光以及使用闪光灯营造出原始、未经修饰的效果。

![阳光码头上的女人 90 年代模拟照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322304446_mq7utk_G_ZroEQaIAADyLB.jpg)

```
A low-angle, wide-angle analogue photograph of a woman posing playfully on a sunlit pier, against a clear blue sky. The photo is taken at an angle. The sun is behind the model creating a glow. She has dark brown hair let loose, she looks cool and baeutful. She's wearing a simple, white t shirt, denim cut-off shorts cut roughly with a few threads, and trainers and socks. The image has a raw, unpolished look — shot on 35mm film with a grungy, analogue aesthetic, with flash. No digital retouching, with natural lighting and imperfections intact, there are a few flecks of grain and scratches on the pic in a natural way. The photo feels spontaneous, carefree, and candid, capturing a nostalgic 90s summer vibe. Harsh sunlight creates subtle lens flare and dramatic shadows. The model wears minimal accessories, emphasising a natural, real-life look. Background includes a white wooden fence and distant hills by the ocean.
```
