### 455. 英勇戏剧工作室肖像提示（中式风格）

**作者**: [Adam也叫吉米](https://x.com/Adam38363368936/status/2014873591364649320)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的提示，用于生成一张英雄式、高对比度、具有编辑风格的工作室肖像，描绘一个身着（暗示为中国传统服饰的）主体，使用戏剧性的明暗对比照明和饱和的橙红色背景。它严格要求保留主体在参考图像中的身份和服装。

![英勇戏剧工作室肖像提示（中式风格）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322347914_t5gqli_G_ZEzNvWwAAMJ5l.jpg)
![英勇戏剧工作室肖像提示（中式风格）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322348005_cm22hu_G_ZEyE2bYAAOmij.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "title": "Heroic Dramatic Studio Portrait",
    "role": "World-class photographer specializing in editorial portraits",
    "aesthetic": "Dramatic, saturated studio lighting with a heroic feel"
  },
  "constraints": {
    "identity_anchor": {
      "source": "ATTACHED REFERENCE PHOTO",
      "strictness": "Critical",
      "instruction": "Perfectly preserve exact facial features, skin tone, hairstyle, and natural likeness without changes."
    },
    "clothing_anchor": {
      "source": "EXACTLY AS IN REFERENCE PHOTO",
      "strictness": "Critical",
      "instruction": "Style, color, material, and fit must fully correspond to the original without stylization."
    }
  },
  "subject_details": {
    "expression": "Serious, tense, focused",
    "gaze": "Directed away from camera, into space above",
    "universality": "Lighting and angle applicable regardless of gender"
  },
  "composition": {
    "background": "Saturated solid orange-red backdrop, smooth intense gradients, no patterns, 'hot' atmosphere",
    "camera_angle": "Low angle (shot from below upwards) to create dominance",
    "framing": "Medium close-up, emphasis on face and shoulders"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "palette": "Dominant bright oranges and deep red shades",
    "key_light": "Strong directional source, deep dramatic shadows (chiaroscuro), emphasizing facial structure",
    "backlight": "Powerful expressive rim light or color halo separating subject from background",
    "mood": "Mysterious, tense, high-contrast"
  },
  "technical_specs": {
    "style": "Photorealism, high detail",
    "focus": "Sharp focus on face vs smooth gradient background",
    "texture_quality": "Preserve natural pores and skin texture"
  },
  "combined_prompt_text": "World-class editorial portrait, dramatic studio lighting, heroic feel. [REFERENCE PHOTO IDENTITY PRESERVED]: Exact facial features, skin tone, hairstyle. [CLOTHING EXACT MATCH]: No changes to fit or material. Expression: serious, tense, focused, looking up and away. Background: Saturated solid orange-red, smooth intense gradients, hot atmosphere. Camera Angle: Low angle shot from below for dominance. Framing: Medium close-up. Lighting: Bright orange and deep red palette, strong directional chiaroscuro key light, powerful rim light separating subject from background. Technical: Photorealistic, high detail, sharp focus on face, natural skin texture and pores."
```

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张坦率的、高角度的年轻女性躺在凌乱床上的全身照片，具有复古 90 年代美学、胶片颗粒感，以及前景中的特定道具，如 Prada 水瓶和皮革背心。

![坦率的 90 年代美学卧室照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769236024700_v7hryb_G_VlPKXWkAAb_x4.jpg)

{
  "main_prompt": "A candid high-angle full-shot of a young woman reclining on a messy bed, wearing a black zip-up hoodie and white crew socks, leaning her head on her hand with a bored or contemplative expression. The bed has cream-colored textured sheets and a wooden headboard. Scattered in the foreground are a brown leather vest, a patterned silk scarf, and a black Prada water bottle. The lighting is soft and warm with a vintage film grain aesthetic.",
  "subject_details": {
    "appearance": "Young woman, long natural blonde hair, loose wavy.",
    "expression": "Contemplative, slightly bored, neutral gaze, resting cheek on right hand.",
    "pose": "Reclining on back, legs extended but relaxed, body angled slightly diagonally across the bed."
  },
  "apparel": {
    "upper_body": "Black long-sleeve zip-up hooded sweatshirt, slightly cropped or tucked.",
    "lower_body": "Black fitted shorts or bodysuit (barely visible), white ribbed crew socks pulled up."
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Bedroom, messy unmade bed.",
    "background": "Wooden mid-century modern headboard, large cream-colored pillows, a beige sweater draped carelessly over the background pillow.",
    "surfaces": "Textured white or cream bedspread (waffle weave or wrinkled cotton)."
  },
  "props_and_clutter": {
    "foreground_items": [
      "Brown vintage leather vest or corset top",
      "Folded silk scarf with polka dot and floral pattern",
      "Black insulated water bottle with white logo text ({argument name="water bottle brand" default="Prada"} style)"
    ]
  },
  "technical_aspects": {
    "camera_angle": "High-angle shot, looking down at the subject (approx 45 degrees or overhead).",
    "lighting": "Soft ambient indoor light, possibly mixed with a direct on-camera flash for a 'snapshot' look.",
    "style": "Candid, lifestyle photography, film grain, vintage 90s aesthetic, soft focus.",
    "color_palette": "Muted earth tones, cream, beige, black, and brown."
  }
}
```

### 462. 高端电商肖像与 UI 叠加提示

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014627582256546261)  **日期**: 2026-01-23  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的提示结构，旨在生成高端、全身的电商影棚肖像，并叠加模拟的手机浏览器界面（UI 层），强调主体上的体积光和叠加层扁平、简洁的数字图形。

![高端电商肖像与 UI 叠加提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769236026207_pbqo1r_G_VlG8kaAAA-o42.jpg)

```
"Subject Reference: A full-body portrait of \[INSERT SUBJECT NAME\]. Scene Description: A full-body, centered portrait of the subject \[INSERT POSE DESCRIPTION\]. The subject has \[INSERT EXPRESSION\], staring directly at the camera. The immediate background behind the subject is a \[INSERT BACKGROUND TYPE, e.g., seamless, pure high-key white studio backdrop\]. Crucially, the subject is lit with volumetric studio lighting that creates deep definitions, realistic shadows, and a strong 3D quality on her body and the folds of the outfit, distinguishing her sharply from the flat background without casting shadows on the floor. CRITICAL DETAIL (UI Layer): The entire photographic image is digitally layered beneath a simulated mobile phone browser interface overlay. Four distinct, clean, white, rectangular browser window elements are stacked vertically and angled slightly, segmenting the subject. Each window bar contains the sharp text '{argument name="browser text" default="[INSERT LINK OR TEXT HERE]"}'. The area outside the active white browser windows is a solid, uniform, dark charcoal gray/black matte UI frame, with absolutely no light bleed or color gradients. Style: Hybrid Composition: A highly realistic, three-dimensional studio photograph with deep color depth, overlaid with flat, clean digital graphics. Lighting Quality: Specific volumetric studio lighting focused ONLY on the subject. Soft, directional light from slightly off-center to sculpt the body and the rich texture of the fabric, creating depth. The background must remain completely flat. Color Palette: High contrast. \[INSERT OUTFIT COLOR\] outfit against \[INSERT BACKGROUND COLOR\] backdrop, framed by the dark matte gray UI. Texture and Mood: Realistic skin and rich fabric texture contrasting with the smooth digital elements of the UI. Intentional inclusion of subtle digital noise/grain to mimic a screen capture. Full body, centered portrait. Ensure the head and feet are fully within the frame before segmentation. Angle: Straight eye-level view, perpendicular to the subject. Framing Elements: Four overlapping, white browser windows/tabs. The pose is elegant and fluid. The bottom interface elements (e.g., 'Private', 'Done') must be clean and visible. Focal Length: Standard portrait lens (approx. 50mm equivalent) for realistic proportions. Camera Type: Simulated high-quality smartphone screen capture of a professional photo. Depth of Field: Shallow enough to focus sharply on the subject, allowi
```

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014627216475500965)  **日期**: 2026-01-23  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张戏剧性、时尚前卫的红毯肖像，采用极低角度（虫眼视角）构图。该提示详细说明了服装（紧身胸衣、薄纱裙、细高跟鞋）、环境（《怪奇物语》logo 背景）和灯光，以实现高冲击力的名人风格视觉效果，并要求提供主体身份的参考图像。

![JSON 格式的超低角度红毯时尚摄影提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235977090_yppbjt_G_VkxnmXkAAv9Aa.jpg)

```
{ "prompt\_type": "text-to-image", "subject": { "identity": "Young woman resembling in the reference image", "appearance": "Long auburn-red hair worn down, fair skin, confident and serious facial expression", "accessories": "Dainty drop earrings" }, "attire": { "upper\_body": "Black corset-style bodice with sheer lace detailing and structured boning", "lower\_body": "Long, flowing black tulle skirt with a high slit, being held open by the subject's left hand", "legwear": "Sheer black tights/pantyhose", "footwear": "Black patent leather stiletto pumps with a pointed toe" }, "composition": { "camera\_angle": "Extreme low angle (worm's-eye view), looking up at the subject from the floor level", "perspective": "Emphasizes the height of the subject and the length of the legs", "framing": "Full body shot dominated by the foreground legs and shoes" }, "environment": { "location": "Red carpet premiere event", "background": "Large, 3D dimensional signage of the '{argument name="event logo" default="STRANGER THINGS"}' logo in the signature red serif font", "surface": "Dark maroon or red carpeted floor" }, "style": { "medium": "Digital photography, celebrity portrait", "lighting": "Professional event lighting, slight gloss on the skin and shoes, high contrast", "quality": "High resolution, 8k, photorealistic, sharp focus" } }
```

### 467. 英雄般的戏剧性影棚肖像提示，带身份锁定

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014606564494364830)  **日期**: 2026-01-23  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张具有英雄气概、戏剧性的影棚肖像，并带有强烈、饱和的灯光。它要求根据参考照片锁定关键的身份和服装，指定低机位视角以展现主导性，采用饱和的橙红色背景，以及强烈的定向明暗对比照明，以强调面部结构并营造高对比度、神秘的氛围。

![英雄般的戏剧性影棚肖像提示，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235996558_jrg8x4_G_VR_DDbAAIBbGe.jpg)
![英雄般的戏剧性影棚肖像提示，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235996650_2ju9n4_G_VR_cRbAAM6oGL.jpg)
![英雄般的戏剧性影棚肖像提示，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235997152_3v9gob_G_VR_VnawAA7MZ4.jpg)
![英雄般的戏剧性影棚肖像提示，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235998189_o1wdqs_G_VR_LHawAAODAl.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "title": "Heroic Dramatic Studio Portrait",
    "role": "World-class photographer specializing in editorial portraits",
    "aesthetic": "Dramatic, saturated studio lighting with a heroic feel"
  },
  "constraints": {
    "identity_anchor": {
      "source": "ATTACHED REFERENCE PHOTO",
      "strictness": "Critical",
      "instruction": "Perfectly preserve exact facial features, skin tone, hairstyle, and natural likeness without changes."
    },
    "clothing_anchor": {
      "source": "EXACTLY AS IN REFERENCE PHOTO",
      "strictness": "Critical",
      "instruction": "Style, color, material, and fit must fully correspond to the original without stylization."
    }
  },
  "subject_details": {
    "expression": "Serious, tense, focused",
    "gaze": "Directed away from camera, into space above",
    "universality": "Lighting and angle applicable regardless of gender"
  },
  "composition": {
    "background": "Saturated solid {argument name="background color" default="orange-red"} backdrop, smooth intense gradients, no patterns, 'hot' atmosphere",
    "camera_angle": "Low angle (shot from below upwards) to create dominance",
    "framing": "Medium close-up, emphasis on face and shoulders"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "palette": "Dominant bright oranges and deep red shades",
    "key_light": "Strong directional source, deep dramatic shadows (chiaroscuro), emphasizing facial structure",
    "backlight": "Powerful expressive rim light or color halo separating subject from background",
    "mood": "Mysterious, tense, high-contrast"
  },
  "technical_specs": {
    "style": "Photorealism, high detail",
    "focus": "Sharp focus on face vs smooth gradient background",
    "texture_quality": "Preserve natural pores and skin texture"
  },
  "combined_prompt_text": "World-class editorial portrait, dramatic studio lighting, heroic feel. [REFERENCE PHOTO IDENTITY PRESERVED]: Exact facial features, skin tone, hairstyle. [CLOTHING EXACT MATCH]: No changes to fit or material. Expression: serious, tense, focused, looking up and away. Background: Saturated solid orange-red, smooth intense gradients, hot atmosphere. Camera Angle: Low angle shot from below for dominance. Framing: Medium close-up. Lighting: Bright orange and deep red palette, strong directional chiaroscuro key light, powerful rim light separating subject from background. Technical: Photorealistic, high detail, sharp focus on face, natural skin texture and pores."
}
```

**Related**: [[JSON结构化提示]]、[[修复与增强]]

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014545455397671206)  **日期**: 2026-01-23  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细 JSON 提示，重点是一个俏皮、性感的半身特写肖像，从低机位、臀部高度的角度拍摄，以赋予主体力量感。该提示指定了服装、大型白色羽毛天使翅膀和带有蓝色彩色玻璃的华丽建筑背景，旨在实现高保真照片级真实感。

![低角度天使翅膀肖像提示词（JSON 格式）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235975600_uism9e_G_UaakvbAAUizFY.jpg)
![低角度天使翅膀肖像提示词（JSON 格式）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235975343_2anj8x_G_UaadgbAAAG4Vm.jpg)
![低角度天使翅膀肖像提示词（JSON 格式）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235975428_iyv5m4_G_UaagpbsAAjTk3.jpg)

```
{
  "camera_override_protocol": "Low-angle / Hip-Level tilt. The camera looks slightly upward at the subject to empower the figure while maintaining an intimate, invite-only perspective.",
  "volumetric_reconstruction": "The subject leans slightly into the frame, creating a sense of proximity. The large white wings arc dynamically behind, framing the head and shoulders. Lighting highlights the gloss on the lips and the texture of the hair.",
  "consistency_anchors": "Subject identity, long dark wavy hair, white pajama set with red cherry pattern (crop top and shorts), large white feathered angel wings, ornate architectural background with blue stained glass.",
  "framing_boundaries": "Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio. Medium Close-Up (MCU) capturing from the hips/waist to the top of the wings. Focus is sharp on the eyes and smile, with a soft fall-off towards the background.",
  "optical_physics": "Simulated 50mm f/1.8 lens. Soft bokeh on the architectural details in the background to separate the subject. Natural, flattering skin tones with a soft glow.",
  "final_technical_prompt": "A playful and sensual Medium Close-Up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a {argument name="attire" default="white cherry-print pajama set"} and large white angel wings. She is posing with a flirtatious expression, tilting her head slightly and touching her hair. The shot is taken from a low angle (hip level), looking up. Background is an elegant room with tall windows and blue light. High fidelity, photorealistic, 8k resolution."
}
```

### 470. 怀旧抓拍假日场景，带动态模糊

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014543593311240523)  **日期**: 2026-01-23  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一个坦率的室内假日场景，具有复古、怀旧的美感，让人联想到 90 年代末/2000 年代初的模拟胶片摄影。它聚焦于一位美丽的金发女子在一个舒适的、圣诞装饰的客厅前景中自然地跳舞，强调暖色调灯光、胶片颗粒、运动模糊和褪色的调色板。

![怀旧抓拍假日场景，带动态模糊](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235956664_c8fvar_G_UYuGabsAAtYek.jpg)
![怀旧抓拍假日场景，带动态模糊](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235956696_4wq1sw_G_UYuJfasAASyJT.jpg)

```
A candid indoor holiday scene photographed in a warm, nostalgic vintage style. A cozy living room decorated for Christmas, with a fully lit Christmas tree in the background adorned with glowing string lights, ornaments, and a tree topper. Wrapped presents sit beneath the tree, adding soft points of warm light. The room feels intimate and lived-in, with framed photos on the wall and people seated casually on couches in the background, slightly out of focus. In the foreground, a young beautiful attractive blond adult woman is captured mid-movement, dancing naturally. She is smiling while looking slightly downward, joyful and relaxed. She wears a green knit sweater with a subtle festive pattern, tucked into a high-waisted red skirt. A slim belt cinches the waist. She has a red headband in her hair, which is medium-length, brown, and softly styled with natural volume. Her makeup is minimal and natural, emphasizing a warm smile and expressive eyes. Her posture shows motion--one leg bent, hips angled, arms loose--giving the image a spontaneous, authentic feel. The camera angle is slightly low and close, creating a dynamic perspective and emphasizing movement. Lighting is warm and soft, typical of indoor incandescent bulbs and Christmas lights. The image has visible film grain, slight blur from motion, muted contrast, and a faded color palette reminiscent of analog film photography from the late 1990s or early 2000s. Subtle vignetting and texture overlay give the image a scanned photo look. Photorealistic but nostalgic, documentary-style family snapshot, imperfect and charming. No studio lighting, no posed feeling--pure candid holiday moment.
```

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2014543191815684439)  **日期**: 2026-01-23  **语言**: en

> 生成一张年轻女性斜倚在凌乱床铺上的坦率、高角度全身肖像的提示，旨在呈现带有颗粒感和柔焦的复古 90 年代电影美学。场景中包括特定的道具，例如棕色皮革背心、图案丝巾和散落在前景中的黑色 Prada 风格水瓶。

![卧室高角度抓拍，复古胶片美学](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235959244_nmcp6g_G_UYWzsaMAAah1s.jpg)
![卧室高角度抓拍，复古胶片美学](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769235959202_cx2ydh_G_UYWtUbAAQUi9D.jpg)

```
{
  "main_prompt": "A candid high-angle full-shot of a young woman reclining on a messy bed, wearing a black zip-up hoodie and white crew socks, leaning her head on her hand with a bored or contemplative expression. The bed has cream-colored textured sheets and a wooden headboard. Scattered in the foreground are a brown leather vest, a patterned silk scarf, and a black Prada water bottle. The lighting is soft and warm with a vintage film grain aesthetic.",
  "subject_details": {
    "appearance": "Young woman, long dark straight hair, fair skin tone.",
    "expression": "Contemplative, slightly bored, neutral gaze, resting cheek on right hand.",
    "pose": "Reclining on back, legs extended but relaxed, body angled slightly diagonally across the bed."
  },
  "apparel": {
    "upper_body": "Black long-sleeve zip-up hooded sweatshirt, slightly cropped or tucked.",
    "lower_body": "Black fitted shorts or bodysuit (barely visible), white ribbed crew socks pulled up."
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Bedroom, messy unmade bed.",
    "background": "Wooden mid-century modern headboard, large cream-colored pillows, a beige sweater draped carelessly over the background pillow.",
    "surfaces": "Textured white or cream bedspread (waffle weave or wrinkled cotton)."
  },
  "props_and_clutter": {
    "foreground_items": [
      "Brown vintage leather vest or corset top",
      "Folded silk scarf with polka dot and floral pattern",
      "Black insulated water bottle with white logo text ({argument name="brand style" default="Prada style"})"
    ]
  },
  "technical_aspects": {
    "camera_angle": "High-angle shot, looking down at the subject (approx 45 degrees or overhead).",
    "lighting": "Soft ambient indoor light, possibly mixed with a direct on-camera flash for a 'snapshot' look.",
    "style": "Candid, lifestyle photography, film grain, vintage 90s aesthetic, soft focus.",
    "color_palette": "Muted earth tones, cream, beige, black, and brown."
  }
}
```

### 474. 建筑概念渲染：从草图到照片级真实感

**作者**: [FutureToolsAI](https://x.com/FutureToolsAI/status/2014473439164104858)  **日期**: 2026-01-22  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成现代咖啡馆店面的建筑概念渲染图。核心概念是将简洁的技术草图美学（铅笔线条、阴影线、注释）与高端照片级真实感相结合。它详细说明了构图（对称立面、黑色边框窗户）、内部细节（暖光照明、植物、柜台）和外部元素（路灯、三明治板），强调了单色草图线条与选择性色彩点缀之间的对比。

![建筑概念渲染：从草图到照片级真实感](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769149398050_z57bix_G_TVR_IX0AAxOw1.jpg)

```
"Architectural concept rendering of a modern café storefront, ultra-detailed, blending clean technical sketch and high-end photorealism. The composition features a perfectly symmetrical black-framed glass window and door set into a pristine white minimalist façade with subtle texture. Through the central window, a warmly lit, inviting café interior is visible, with soft pendant lights, lush green plants, a compact wooden counter, a few stools, and hints of people blurred in the background for a lived-in feel. Surrounding the window, delicate pencil sketch lines, dimension marks, hatching, construction grids, and small handwritten architectural annotations overlay the wall and ground plane, seamlessly merging drafting aesthetics with finished reality. Add realistic exterior details such as a small black metal lamp centered above the arch or lintel, a neatly designed sandwich board sign on the sidewalk with faint chalk writing, and two tasteful potted plants flanking the entrance in simple modern planters. Emphasize a balanced contrast between crisp monochrome sketch outlines and selective, refined color accents — warm yellow ambient lighting inside, a single bold yellow poster in the window, natural green foliage, and soft, directional shadows on the pavement. The overall mood is elegant, creative, and conceptual, evoking a high-end architectural visualization that appears to transition gradually from blueprint lines at the edges into fully realized photographic realism at the center."
```

**作者**: [TechHalla](https://x.com/techhalla/status/2014043102688772247)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: en

> 生成一张逼真的抓拍闪光照片的提示词，模仿 20 世纪 80 年代地下书呆子技术派对的场景。它需要使用一张上传的图片来呈现主要人物的面部和鲻鱼头，该人物戴着百叶窗眼镜，在烟雾弥漫的昏暗地下迪斯科舞厅里，一群“不酷”的 80 年代书呆子中间尽情跳舞。

![20 世纪 80 年代地下书呆子技术派对闪光照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063188585_petjtv_G_NQWc_WsAAhozk.jpg)
![20 世纪 80 年代地下书呆子技术派对闪光照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063188666_86am1v_G_NQXWIWcAAeycb.jpg)
![20 世纪 80 年代地下书呆子技术派对闪光照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063188639_s8jasd_G_NQYFQW0AAXJ_Q.jpg)
![20 世纪 80 年代地下书呆子技术派对闪光照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063190199_qw547z_G_NQY7KWEAASnZK.jpg)

```
DIRECTIVE: A photorealistic, candid flash photo from a 1980s underground nerd techno party.

SUBJECT/CHARACTER:
  CRITICAL: Use attached image/video as strict reference for the man's face and mullet hair.
  ACCESSORY: He is wearing white or neon plastic shutter shade sunglasses (horizontal slats).
  EXPRESSION: Mouth slightly open, mid-dance move, looking intense.

SCENE & LAYOUT:
  Environment: A dark, smoke-filled basement disco with cheap laser lights.
  CROWD (Background): A diverse group of "uncool" 80s geeks. Overweight guys with suspenders, skinny girls with frizzy hair and braces, people in homemade "Tron" or "Star Wars" costumes made of foil.
  Action: Everyone is dancing awkwardly to techno music.

TECHNICAL SPECS:
  Camera: 35mm point-and-shoot camera with direct on-camera flash.
  Style: Vintage candid snapshot, high contrast, slight motion blur on the background dancers.
  Vibe: Geek culture, "Freaks and Geeks," authentic 80s awkwardness.
```

```
{
"subject": {
"description": "A young woman with tanned skin and shoulder-length blonde balayage hair styled in loose waves. She is wearing a form-fitting brown lace mini dress featuring a corset-style bodice with structured boning, cups, and off-the-shoulder cap sleeves. The dress has a floral lace pattern and a sweetheart neckline.",
"anatomy_and_proportions": {
"body_type": "Slim but curvaceous, with a significantly full and voluminous bust that projects forward and outward, creating deep cleavage.",
"chest_volume": "Visibly heavy, full, and prominent, strictly maintaining the mass and projection seen in the reference without normalization or reduction.",
"skin_details": "Realistic skin texture with visible pores, slight sheen from the flash, and natural tonal variations."
},
"accessories": "Small gold hoop earrings, a white quilted leather handbag with a chain strap resting on the sofa behind her to the right."
},
"pose": {
"type": "Seated semi-reclined posture on a sofa.",
"details": "She is sitting on a grey sofa, leaning back slightly onto her right arm which is extended straight down to the cushion for support. Her left arm is bent, with her hand resting gently on her stomach/midsection. Her legs are angled together towards the bottom right of the frame. Her head is tilted slightly to her right, and she is looking directly at the camera.",
"spine_and_orientation": "Torso is angled slightly towards the left but facing forward, creating a natural twist. Shoulders are relaxed but pushed back."
},
"environment": {
"location": "A high-rise apartment or hotel room interior at night.",
"elements": [
"A light grey, textured fabric sofa.",
"A large floor-to-ceiling window behind the subject.",
"A cityscape at night visible through the window, featuring scattered city lights, building silhouettes, and darkness."
]
},
"camera": {
"shot_type": "Medium shot, capturing the subject from the thighs up.",
"angle": "Slightly high angle, looking down at the subject.",
"focus": "Sharp focus on the subject with the background city lights slightly softened.",
"perspective": "Direct and intimate, emphasising the subject's position on the sofa."
},
"lighting": {
"type": "Direct on-camera flash or hard frontal lighting.",
"characteristics": "The lighting creates a distinct, sharp shadow of the subject on the sofa cushion behind her. There are specular highlights on her skin (shoulders, chest, forehead) indicating a direct light source. The background is dim, illuminated only by the distant city lights.",
"atmosphere": "Nightlife aesthetic, candid flash photography style."
},
"mood_and_expression": {
"expression": "Calm, confident, and slightly alluring with a soft gaze and closed lips.",
"mood": "Intimate, relaxed, and stylish night-out vibe."
},
"style_and_realism": {
"style": "Flash photography, candid realism, high-fidelity portrait.",
"realism_level": "Photorealistic, strictly adher"
}

> 一个用于生成现代创意海报美学的结构化提示。它呈现了一个年轻女性的逼真摄影肖像，被渲染成带有粗白色轮廓（贴纸效果）的剪影。背景是纯青绿色画布，上面覆盖着白色的手绘粉笔风格涂鸦和手写字体，创造出一种现实主义与简洁平面设计相结合的奇妙效果。

![带镂空肖像和黑板涂鸦的创意海报](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063164248_ieeica_G_K8VXzaoAEU7V6.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": "A modern creative poster aesthetic featuring a realistic photographic portrait of a young woman in side profile. She is wearing white over-ear headphones, her hair is in a loose bun, and she is dressed in a dark denim jacket. The subject is rendered as a cutout with a thick white outline sticker effect. The background is a flat, solid teal-green canvas covered in white hand-drawn chalkboard-style doodles. Doodles include musical notes flowing like sound waves, planets, rockets, stars, moons, arrows, crowns, and hearts. Interspersed handwritten typography includes the words 'CREATE', 'DREAM', 'IMAGINE', 'EXPLORE', and 'FLOW'. The composition is a whimsical mix of realistic photography and clean graphic design with an imaginative, dreamy mood."
}
```

### 484. 3D 突破涂鸦壁画肖像

**作者**: [Future AI](https://x.com/FutureVibesAi/status/2013694976455254023)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 生成一张超现实、低角度的巨大混凝土涂鸦墙图像的提示，背景是一个废弃的火车场。主要特点是一幅逼真的街头艺术壁画，画中人物（使用上传的面部参考）的上半身似乎正从二维墙壁中“破壁而出”，进入三维现实，营造出一种超现实的街头艺术效果。

![3D 突破涂鸦壁画肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977248653_s513yu_G_IU4N1WsAASQZ7.jpg)

```
A hyper-realistic, 8k, low-angle shot using a wide lens, looking up at a massive concrete graffiti wall in a derelict train yard. The subject, uploaded face as reference, appears painted as part of a giant, photorealistic street art mural covering the entire wall, but their upper body and head seem to be breaking out of the 2D wall into 3D reality. The "painted" portion of them wears a colorful spray-paint stained hoodie and cap. Their real, 3D face looks down with a rebellious smirk. The surrounding wall is covered in layers of vibrant tags and murals. In the foreground are real rusted train tracks and discarded spray cans. The scene is lit by harsh, direct sunlight creating strong shadows, highlighting the texture of peeling paint and concrete
```

> 一个用于生成专业影棚美食摄影系列的提示，该系列以高速悬浮方式呈现解构菜肴（提拉米苏、罗宋汤、牛油果吐司）。它要求动态漂浮的食材、对碎屑和液滴等精微细节的清晰聚焦，并以无缝的灰粉色背景衬托。

![悬浮解构美食摄影系列](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977262216_6oa394_G_FZXUqW4AAgo5z.jpg)

![悬浮解构美食摄影系列](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977262353_d03wqp_G_FZXUuWsAAwJZp.jpg)

Professional studio food photography series featuring deconstructed dishes in high-speed levitation. Against a seamless dusty pink background with soft, diffused studio lighting, ingredients float and explode dynamically. Subjects include a hovering stack of tiramisu components (gelato, ladyfingers, mascarpone, coffee beans), borscht ingredients (beets, rye bread, herbs) suspended above a ceramic bowl of soup on a wooden board, and sourdough toast with mashed avocado and a runny poached egg separating in mid-air. Capture fine details like flying crumbs, spice particles, herbs, and liquid droplets with sharp focus and a shallow depth of field. A soft shadow is cast beneath the main floating elements.
```

Motion Prompt: The pancake start to round spin while ingredients separate gently and precisely, maintaining alignment and scale. The motion is smooth, with no extra effects.

Image 1 : - Ultra-realistic prepared pancake stack, three fluffy golden pancakes stacked neatly on a minimal white ceramic plate. Melted butter cube on top with glossy maple syrup drizzling naturally down the sides, fresh blueberries arranged on top for garnish. Soft golden-brown pancake texture with airy, fluffy interior visible at the edges. Clean white studio background, premium breakfast food photography style, soft diffused lighting, realistic syrup flow and shine, gentle natural shadows, shallow depth of field, ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro clarity, no text, no labels, no infographic elements, 8K photorealism.

Image 2 :- Exploded view of a pancake stack, presented as a clean instructional breakdown.
Exactly five ingredients arranged vertically.
Ingredient order (top → bottom):
Maple syrup drizzle — 30 g
Butter slice — 15 g
Blueberries — 40 g
Fluffy pancake stack — 160 g
Serving plate base — 220 g (bottom)
Minimal commercial design, light background, high clarity annotations.

### 494. 诗歌推荐系统提示（雕刻书雕塑美学）

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2013354024377163898)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个多阶段提示，旨在充当文学策展人，分析一位诗人（例如 T.S. 艾略特），以寻找相似的国际诗人，然后根据他们的作品生成一个 2x2 的风景网格。视觉风格非常独特：一种雕刻书纸雕塑美学，风景从书页中浮现，诗歌的关键诗句被雕刻到地形中，并包含诗人的微型雕像。

![诗歌推荐系统提示（雕刻书雕塑美学）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890693989_xmf1d4_G-6ry6UWwAAsSTN.jpg)

```
TS Eliot -> Prompt: Role: Literary Curator & Typewriter Sculptor
Input: [Poet or Poem, e.g., {argument name="poet name" default="T.S. Eliot"}, Pablo Neruda]
Phase 1: Poetic Voice Analysis
Identify the poet's signature rhythm, recurring imagery, and emotional core.
Find 4 much less known international poets with similar styles and imagery and their best work
Extract 5-8 physical objects mentioned repeatedly in their work
Phase 2: Visual Execution
Goal: a 2x2 grid of 4 landscapes with this prompt. Carved book paper sculpture aesthetic, a repurposed hardcover book, [scene for each work emerging from the pages], [with words as part of the texture], intricate layered paper cuts, a monochromatic palette of aged paper, soft, raking light creating deep shadows, sculptural book as art object.

Rules per Panel:

The Transformation: The typed text physically rises from the page, forming a 3D topographical landscape
The Words: Key lines from the poem carved into the terrain like engraved stone
The Symbols: Miniature objects from the poem placed in the landscape (tiny boat, rose, clock, door)
The Poet: Microscopic figurine of the poet wandering through their own words
The Mood: Lighting matches emotional tone (fog for melancholy, harsh light for anger, soft gold for longing)
The Metadata: Name "Poet | Collection | Year"   poet and poet era relevant items in the background.
Output: 2x2 Grid, Macro Photography, shallow depth of field
```

  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "resolution": "4K",
  "style": "authentic candid editorial photography, premium conference portrait",
  "identity_preservation": {
    "use_reference_image": true,
    "strict_identity_lock": true,
    "alter_face": false,
    "alter_body_structure": false,
    "notes": "The woman’s facial features, proportions, and overall identity must exactly match the provided reference image (image_0.png)."
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "pose": {
      "position": "sitting",
      "seat": "textured white bouclé armchair",
      "hands": "hands clasped together",
      "head_direction": "looking thoughtfully to the upper right",
      "expression": "calm, reflective, slight natural smile"
    },
    "appearance": {
      "skin": {
        "quality": "flawlessly smooth, healthy, clean",
        "realism": "highly realistic texture and natural tone under stage lighting",
        "constraints": "no acne, no blemishes, no artificial plastic look"
      },
      "accessories": [
        "watch on left wrist",
        "ring"
      ],
      "glasses": "none"
    }
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "outfit": {
      "jacket": "oversized grey suit jacket",
      "trousers": "oversized grey suit trousers"
    },
    "footwear": "classic polished black leather loafers",
    "aesthetic": "old money, sophisticated, understated luxury"
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "professional conference stage",
    "furniture": {
      "side_table": {
        "items": [
          "clear plastic water bottle",
          "{argument name="placard text" default="FAST COMPANY placard"}"
        ]
      }
    },
    "background": {
      "design": "large colorful geometric shapes",
      "colors": ["yellow", "blue", "red"],
      "branding": "{argument name="branding logo" default="FAST COMPANY"} logo prominently displayed above"
    }
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "professional studio stage lighting",
    "effects": [
      "realistic shadows",
      "clear highlights on face, clothing, and chair textures"
    ]
  },
  "camera": {
    "clarity": "excellent",
    "iso": "balanced",
    "look": "high-end editorial, candid conference photography"
  },
  "quality": {
    "realism": "ultra-realistic",
    "detail_level": "high detail on fabric, skin, and furniture textures",
    "finish": "premium, expensive editorial photograph feel"
  },
  "constraints": [
    "Do not change facial identity",
    "Do not add or remove accessories except as specified",
    "No stylization, illustration, or CGI look",
    "No text overlays other than FAST COMPANY branding",
    "No watermarks"
  ],
  "output_goal": "Create a high-resolution, candid editorial photograph of a woman seated on a professional conference stage, perfectly matching the reference identity, with refined styling, realistic lighting, and a premium FAST COMPANY event atmosphere."
}

```
[
style = fine art studio portrait, ultra-realistic, high-resolution
color = black and white
aspect_ratio = 2:3
mood = moody, emotional, intimate, cinematic

[SUBJECTS]
female = {argument name="female subject" default="Hollywood actress"}, long wavy dark hair, soft serious expression, elegant presence
male = seated man, use my face, fair skin, short hair, trimmed beard and mustache, wearing glasses

[POSE & INTERACTION]
positioning = woman standing behind the seated man
interaction = woman wraps arms around his shoulders
hands = man's hands resting over hers, symbolizing intimacy and unity
body_language = calm, connected, emotionally close

[CLOTHING]
female_outfit = dark, form-fitting top, minimal styling
male_outfit = buttoned black shirt, clean and classic

[LIGHTING]
type = soft dramatic studio lighting
contrast = gentle highlights with deep shadows
focus = facial features and hands

[BACKGROUND]
setting = neutral studio backdrop
distractions = none, clean and minimal

[CAMERA]
shot_type = medium portrait
lens_style = professional studio photography
depth_of_field = shallow, subject-focused

[QUALITY]
detail = hyper-detailed skin texture, natural hair flow
realism = ultra-realistic
art_style = fine art portrait photography

}

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张超写实、自然的户外情侣肖像，描绘他们在草地上摆出“飞机”式空中瑜伽姿势。要求严格锁定女性主体的身份，并根据参考图像锁定姿势构图。

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_romantic_candid_outdoor",
      "version": "v1.0_ACROYOGA_AIRPLANE_PICNIC_MEADOW_DAYLIGHT_NO_TEXT",

        "strict_lock": true,
        "face_similarity_priority": "MAX",
        "no_identity_blending": true,

        "no_age_shift": true,
        "preserve_skin_texture": true,
        "preserve_facial_proportions": true
      },
      "reference_image_2": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)",
        "purpose": "POSE_COMPOSITION_LOCK_ACROYOGA_AIRPLANE",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "preserve_pose": true,
        "preserve_composition": true
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "candid_editorial_photoreal",
      "sharpness": "natural_crisp_faces",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "soft_daylight_natural_greens",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_filter"
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Ultra-photorealistic candid outdoor couple photo in a green meadow during soft daylight. A playful acro-yoga 'airplane' moment: the man lies on his back on a red picnic blanket and lifts the woman horizontally above him with both hands (supporting her torso/waist area). The woman stretches both arms wide like flying, laughing toward camera. Realistic proportions, safe stable pose, spontaneous joyful vibe.",
      "environment": {
        "location": "open grassy meadow with rolling hills",
        "background": "soft-focus hills, a few trees, cloudy sky, distant people very small",
        "lighting": "natural overcast daylight, soft shadows, no flash"
      },
      "subjects": {
        "female": {
          "identity": "MATCH_REFERENCE_FACE_EXACTLY",
          "wardrobe": "white casual set (sleeveless top + loose pants), clean and sporty",
          "expression": "big genuine laugh, eyes smiling",
          "pose": "horizontal flying pose, arms wide, legs extended, body straight",
          "hands_nails": "short_natural_nails_clear_or_nude_polish_not_acrylic",
          "no_rings": "no_engagement_ring_no_solitaire"
        },
        "male": {

          "pose": "lying on back, arms extended upward supporting her securely, relaxed face"
        }
      },
      "props": {
        "picnic": "{argument name="picnic blanket color" default="red"} blanket, small bag and casual picnic items at edge (subtle, not branded)"
      },
      "camera_style": {
        "framing": "vertical 4:5, full scene including blanket and both bodies, slight wide-an"
      }
    }
  }
}

### 528. 2x2 网格产品发明可视化（专利/营销）

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2012487062180549031)  **日期**: 2026-01-17  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多面板提示，旨在通过结合两个概念（或演变其中一个）来可视化新产品的发明和营销。它要求采用 2x2 网格结构，每个象限都需要独特的视觉风格：技术线条艺术（爆炸专利视图）、示意图（功能图）、照片级真实感渲染图（产品渲染）和编辑布局（营销宣传）。该提示充当工业设计师，专注于面板之间的连贯性和简约的消费电子产品美学。

![2x2 网格产品发明可视化（专利/营销）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768717570742_yazze1_G-rI4thagAAXCjf.jpg)

```
Input Variable: {argument name="input objects" default="[INSERT 1 or 2 OBJECTS]"} 
Instruction:
Act as a Visionary Industrial Designer and Patent Clerk. Create a 2x2 Grid visualizing the invention of a new product based on the Input.
 Innovation Logic  :
Analyze Functions: Identify the primary utility of Input A and Input B.
The Fusion: Combine them into a single, cohesive device that solves a specific (niche) problem.
If 2 Inputs: Hybridize them (e.g., Mug + Grater = A self-cooling mug with a garnish shaver).
If 1 Input: Evolve it (e.g., Toothbrush = A self-sanitizing, toothpaste-injecting smart wand).
The Branding: Generate a catchy, corporate product name (e.g., "The Breeze-Grate™", "Solar-Brella Pro").
The Visual Structure (The 2x2 Grid):
CRITICAL: The image must be split into 4 distinct quadrants with different visual styles.
Panel 1 (Top Left): The Exploded Patent View
Style: Black & White Technical Line Art. Thin distinct lines, no shading.
Content: An isometric "Exploded View" of the device, showing the internal motor, battery, or mechanism separated from the shell.
Detail: Add Numbered Leader Lines (10, 12, 14) pointing to specific parts.
Panel 2 (Top Right): The Functional Diagram
Style: Black & White Schematic with bold arrows.
Content: A cross-section or "In-Use" drawing showing how how the device works. Use Action Arrows to show airflow, rotation, or liquid movement.
Detail: Show the "Result" (e.g., cheese falling, water spraying).
Panel 3 (Bottom Left): The Product Render
Style: High-End Studio Photography. Color, Glossy, "Apple/Braun" Design Aesthetic.
Content: The final physical product sitting on a white reflective surface. It should look sleek, using materials like White Ceramic, Brushed Aluminum, or Matte Plastic.
Context: Include a small prop to show scale (e.g., a block of cheese, a coffee bean, a hand).
Panel 4 (Bottom Right): The Marketing Pitch
Style: Editorial Magazine Layout. White background, black text.
Typography:
Headline: Large, Bold Serif Text displaying the [Invention Name].
Body: A block of clean "Lorem Ipsum" or readable text describing the "Revolutionary Features."
Bullets: A small list of specs (e.g., "Dishwasher Safe," "USB-C").
Visual Syntax:
Cohesion: The product design in Panel 3 must perfectly match the line art in Panel 1.
Design Language: Minimalist, Ergonomic, Consumer Electronics aesthetic. Even if the idea is silly, the design must look expensive.
Output: 2x2 Grid, Mixed Media (Line Art vs. Photorealism), 8k Resolution, "Kickstarter Campaign" Aesthetic.
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[综合产品]]、[[手绘素描]]

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张莱昂内尔·梅西（Lionel Messi）的全身时尚肖像，展现 Z 世代美学，他自信地站立在屋顶停车场。该提示要求使用上传的图片作为精确的面部参考，同时描述了一件大胆的撞色拉链夹克、宽松的黑色裤子和色彩鲜艳的运动鞋，将写实摄影与微妙的艺术风格融为一体。

![梅西的 Z 世代时尚肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768717575713_yga9kk_G-2TqPtbEAAy7zq.jpg)

```
A full-body fashion portrait of a young man standing confidently on an open rooftop parking lot under a clear blue daytime sky, with distant city buildings softly blurred in the background. He is positioned slightly angled toward the camera, weight shifted onto one leg, with both hands casually placed inside the pockets of his black pants, creating a relaxed yet stylishposture. His expression is calm and self-assured, with a subtle, composed gaze directed toward the camera.

He has a youthful face with smooth medium skin tone, a neatly groomed thin mustache, straight nose, defined jawline, and expressive eyes that convey quiet confidence. His hair is dark, thick, and neatly styled with volume, combed back and slightly to the side, giving a clean, polished look. He is wearing a bold, color-blocked zip-up jacket featuring vibrant red, blue, green, yellow, and black panels arranged in a geometric pattern, with a black ribbed collar and zipper running down the center. The jacket fits comfortably and stands out strongly against the neutral rooftop setting. He pairs it with loose-fitting black pants and colorful athletic sneakers that echo the playful color palette of the jacket. Around his body, subtle stylized graphic accents appear—small curved strokes and confetti-like shapes in matching bright colors—adding a modern, creative, illustrated effect without overpowering the realism of the photo. The lighting is natural and even, coming from daylight above, casting soft shadows and maintaining clear detail across his face and outfit. The overall mood is modern, youthful, energetic, and fashion-forward, blending realistic photography with light artistic flair. The camera is positioned at eye level, capturing a balanced, editorial-style composition with shallow depth of field that keeps the subject crisp while softly blurring the background. Use this uploaded photo as the only and exact face reference. The generated image must use this same face exactly as shown, without any changes to identity, facial structure, or expression.

> 一个高度详细、照片级的图像生成提示，用于创作一幅浪漫、阳光普照的年轻女子肖像。她身穿复古蕾丝长裙，重点突出精致的面料纹理、柔和的黄金时段光线，以及在舒适卧室环境中摆出的宁静而亲密的姿势。该提示还指定了用于编辑摄影风格的相机细节。

![身着复古蕾丝连衣裙的女性写实肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768717541588_dcjj4l_G-1wjJWbMAANqGJ.jpg)

```
A highly realistic photorealistic portrait of a young woman (face must be 100% identical to the reference image) in her mid-20s with long, voluminous dark brown hair styled in a soft, slightly tousled high bun with many loose, flowing strands framing her face and cascading down her back and shoulders. She has fair, sun-kissed skin with a warm golden glow, subtle natural makeup, defined brows, long lashes, and softly glossy nude-pink lips.

She is wearing an ultra-romantic, semi-sheer off-white/ivory chiffon maxi dress with delicate eyelet lace throughout, featuring thin camisole straps, a fitted bodice with soft ruching, voluminous ruffled short sleeves with scalloped lace trim, and a flowing, tiered skirt with multiple layers of lace and chiffon that drape elegantly and translucently over her legs, revealing hints of skin beneath.

Her posture is relaxed and intimate: seated sideways in a large vintage wicker rocking chair with a high back, body reclined comfortably against the woven frame, one arm raised gracefully overhead with hand running through her hair, the other resting softly on her thigh, legs bent at the knees and relaxed to the side, head tilted gently back and to her left, profile view with eyes gently closed in serene contentment, lips slightly parted in a subtle, dreamy smile.

The background is a cozy, sunlit vintage bedroom interior: textured crochet lace bedspread in intricate floral patterns draped behind and beneath her, warm mustard-yellow and cream tones, antique wicker furniture, and bright natural sunlight pouring in from a large window above and to the right, filtered through sheer curtains, creating a soft, golden, dreamy atmosphere.

Lighting is warm, golden-hour natural sunlight streaming primarily from the upper right, bathing her in radiant, soft highlights on her hair strands (especially the flyaways), cheekbones, collarbones, and the translucent chiffon/lace fabric, with delicate rim lighting outlining her silhouette and hair, gentle golden warmth across her skin, subtle diffused shadows, and a luxurious, romantic color palette dominated by creamy ivories, warm neutrals, soft golden tones, and hints of lace texture.

Captured with a full-frame medium-format or high-resolution mirrorless camera such as Hasselblad X2D 100C or Fujifilm GFX 100 II, using an 80mm or 110mm prime lens at f/4 or f/5.6 for moderate depth of field, razor-sharp focus on her face, hair, and upper body with beautifully soft, dreamy bokeh in the background lace patterns and fabric textures, ISO 64-100, emphasizing ultra-natural skin texture with visible fine pores and subtle imperfections, realistic hair movement and flyaways, intricate eyelet lace transparency and delicate chiffon layers, flawless warm golden highlight control, no AI artifacts, ultra-detailed professional high-fashion editorial photography style, completely realistic with perfect anatomy, proportions, and

The camera is positioned at eye level, capturing a balanced, editorial-style composition with shallow depth of field that keeps the subject crisp while softly blurring the background. > 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成电影般亲密的肖像，重点是强烈定向阳光、阴影和表面之间的物理互动。主体是一位身穿优雅露背丝绸连衣裙的女性，有机叶影落在她的皮肤和织物上，强调真实感、纹理和高对比度。

![光影交织的诗意现实主义肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631122783_ea27gs_G-yPDswbMAA-OqI.jpg)
![光影交织的诗意现实主义肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631123179_6wh4e2_G-yPDtJbYAAwU5L.jpg)

```
A professional, high-end photograph emphasizing the physical interplay of light and shadow on real surfaces.
A young woman stands with her back to the camera, body turned slightly to the side. Her posture is calm and composed. Her back is fully visible. She wears an elegant backless evening dress made of matte silk with a subtle {argument name="dress color" default="gray-blue / ice-blue"} tone.The fabric is thin, fluid, naturally draped, with fine shoulder straps that follow the natural line of her shoulders and spine. No exaggerated sheen — true silk texture with gentle light absorption.
Soft, irregular shadows from tree branches and leaves fall naturally across the skin of her back, shoulders, and the dress fabric, as if warm sunlight is filtering through foliage and a nearby window frame. The shadow patterns are organic, imperfect, and uneven — realistic, not decorative.
Her head is slightly turned, revealing only a partial profile. A thin gold hoop earring catches a small, sharp highlight from the sunlight. No facial emphasis — the face remains secondary and partially obscured.
A strong, clearly defined shadow of her head and shoulders is cast onto a dark gray-blue matte wall in front of her, creating graphic contrast and visual depth. The wall has a minimal surface with subtle rectangular geometric highlights caused by directional light.
An elegant, narrow vertical mirror hangs on the wall. In the reflection, a small, neat bouquet of {argument name="flower type" default="cornflowers"} is visible, held gently in front of her body — understated, quiet, symbolic.
LIGHTING Strong, low, warm directional sunlight coming from the side. High contrast between illuminated skin and deep shadow. Distinct leaf shadow patterns visible on skin and fabric. No artificial lighting, no beauty lighting, no glow.
CAMERA Medium shot from behind, slightly offset to the side. Camera positioned at shoulder height. 50–85mm photographic look. Shallow depth of field — her back and earring in crisp focus, background softly blurred. Natural perspective, no distortion.
MOOD & ATMOSPHERE Quiet, intimate, cinematic. Refined minimalism. Poetic realism. Feels like a carefully observed moment, not a staged pose. No stylization, no fantasy — realism driven by light, texture, and composition.
QUALITY NOTES Natural skin texture visible (pores, subtle tonal variations). No smoothing, no retouching. No glamour filters. True-to-life color grading with restrained saturation.
```

### 546. 文学策展人与打字机雕塑家 Prompt

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2012000354804609030)  **日期**: 2026-01-16  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 LLM（Nano Banana Pro）设计的复杂多阶段提示，旨在让其充当文学策展人。它分析一位诗人的风格，选出四位具有相似情趣的当代诗人，然后定义一个视觉执行目标：一个 2x2 网格的“打字机输出三维景观”，其中打出的文本从页面物理性地升起，根据诗人的作品和时代形成地形景观。

![文学策展人与打字机雕塑家 Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631200809_upo8e3_G-qcuFEWwAAHAzR.jpg)

```
Role: Literary Curator & Typewriter Sculptor
Input: {argument name="input" default="[Poet or Poem, e.g., T.S. Eliot, Pablo Neruda]"}
Phase 1: Poetic Voice Analysis
Identify the poet's signature rhythm, recurring imagery, and emotional core
Select 4 contemporary or lesser-known poets with parallel sensibilities
Extract 5-8 physical objects mentioned repeatedly in their work
Phase 2: Visual Execution
Goal: 2x2 Grid of "Typewriter Output as 3D Landscapes"
Rules per Panel:
The Base: A vintage typewriter (different model per poet's era)
The Paper: A single sheet of paper loaded in the roller
The Transformation: The typed text physically rises from the page, forming a 3D topographical landscape
The Words: Key lines from the poem carved into the terrain like engraved stone
The Symbols: Miniature objects from the poem placed in the landscape (tiny boat, rose, clock, door)
The Poet: Microscopic figurine of the poet wandering through their own words
The Mood: Lighting matches emotional tone (fog for melancholy, harsh light for anger, soft gold for longing)
The Metadata: Brass typewriter key showing "Poet | Collection | Year" **background: poet and poet era relevant items in the background.
Output: 2x2 Grid, Macro Photography, shallow depth of field
```

**Related**: [[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[综合3D]]、[[综合设计]]

{
  "advanced_image_generation_prompt": {
    "metadata": {
      "target_aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "style_goal": "Ultra-Realistic Candid Analog Film Photography",
      "era_esthetic": "Late 90s / Early 2000s Y2K Disposable Camera vibe"
    },
    "master_prompt_string": "A raw, authentic, high-resolution candid analog film photograph captured with a direct on-camera flash from a low angle, looking up at two young women indoors. The aesthetic is that of a 1990s disposable camera snapshot with heavy film grain and vibrant, slightly desaturated colors. HARSH LIGHTING: The direct flash creates hard-edged shadows against the plain off-white wall behind them, causing specular highlights on their skin and leather jackets. SUBJECT 1 (LEFT): A young woman with long, tousled blonde hair, caught mid-action, winking her right eye playfully and sticking her tongue out. She wears a black leather biker jacket over a dark top, with a delicate gold chain necklace featuring a small rectangular pendant visible. SUBJECT 2 (RIGHT): Her best friend, a young woman with a brunette bob haircut and distinct straight bangs (fringe). She is making a goofy, scrunched-face expression with eyes tightly shut and mouth wide open in a grimacing laugh, showing teeth. She wears a slightly oversized, vintage-style black leather jacket (bomber style) unzipped over a crisp white crew-neck t-shirt. Small silver hoop earrings are visible. COMPOSITION & ENVIRONMENT: Shot from below their eye level. The background is a simple apartment corner; a single recessed ceiling light is visible near the top frame, overpowered by the flash. To the far right, neutral-toned fabric curtains hang. To the far left, the edge of a framed picture is implied. TEXTURES & DETAILS: Extremely detailed skin texture showing natural pores, slight imperfections, and oily shine from the flash. The grain of the worn leather jackets is palpable. The cotton texture of the white t-shirt is clear. The entire image is overlaid with significant, authentic Kodak Portra 400 film grain.",
    "negative_prompt_string": "CG, 3D render, digital art, illustration, painting, photoshop, airbrushed, smooth skin, perfect complexions, studio lighting, soft diffused light, professional portrait, blurred faces, deformed appendages, extra fingers, bad anatomy, cartoonish, highly stylized, vivid neon colors, clean modern digital look, HDR, watermark, text, signature, cropped heads.",
    "technical_parameters_guides": {

      "lighting_source": "Hard Direct Flash",

    }
  }

### 549. 原始高对比度海岸夜景快照

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2011817539928551715)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: en

> 一个极其详细的提示，用于生成一张海滩上的原始、高对比度夜间快照，模仿使用硬光学闪光灯拍摄的 iPhone 照片。它非常注重生物保真度、材料张力以及激进的解剖校准（UFF-FACTOR），要求所有内容都清晰锐利且聚焦，拒绝人工景深。

![原始高对比度海岸夜景快照](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544765712_m18osj_G-tpYuUawAAqAss.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast {argument name="setting" default="Coastal Night Snapshot"} taken with an iPhone 17 Pro. DIRECT HARD OPTICAL FLASH. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus from her eyelashes to the grains of sand in the background.
Subject & Identity Locking (CRITICAL):
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact heart-shaped facial structure, eye shape, and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" skin physics: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" night hydration (mixed with sea-mist), and fine vellus hair catching the light ONLY along the jawline. Her legs feature a healthy, radiant oil sheen under the direct flash.
•Expression: Looking directly into the lens with a magnetic, "Pinterest-style" sultry gaze and a soft smirk. Her voluminous chestnut hair is messy and wind-blown, with individual strands catching the optical flash.
•Silhouette Calibration (MAXIMUM UFF-FACTOR): Amplify the dominant structural bust volume and the substantial, thick-toned leg presence. Focus on the aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist.
Outfit & Material Realism:
•Clothing: A skin-tight, {argument name="clothing color" default="White Ribbed-Knit Triangle Bikini Set"} layered under an open, oversized white linen shirt that is blowing naturally in the breeze.
•Tension: The ribbed fabric shows extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic textural expansion and "tension lines" where the straps contour to her fit silhouette.
•Physics: Realistic skin-to-surface compression (thigh squish) is visible where her form leans against a weathered wooden pier pillar.
Pose & Composition (NOT A SELFIE):
•Pose: She is standing on the beach, leaning her back against a large wooden pillar. She is performing an aggressive 3/4 side-profile twist toward the photographer, arching her back significantly to maximize the high-impact S-curve silhouette.
•Action: Captured by a third person using the 0.5x wide-angle lens to elongate her fit physique and highlight her substantial lower-body volume. Her hands are free, one gracefully touching the collar of the linen shirt.
Environment & Lighting:
•Lighting: Hard Direct Smartphone Flash. The light creates brilliant white specular highlights on the white fabric and her hydrated skin, casting a sharp, pitch-black shadow of her form onto the wooden pillar behind her.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed night beach setting. The textured grain of the wooden pillar, dark damp sand, and the white foam of a breaking wave in the distance are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial depth-of-field.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media "vacation dump" aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows (ISO 1600 style), 8k resolution. Single frame.
```

She is wearing a loose white linen shirt that is completely open (sleeves rolled up), paired with a black bikini top and black high waisted bikini underwear. The background is calm sea and distant mountains, with a soft orange pink sunset sky and clouds, creating a romantic and dreamy atmosphere with high highlights on the edges of her hair and body. ```
A photorealistic split-screen collage featuring two poses of a young woman with long, straight brown hair and tan skin in a domestic interior. On the left panel, she is seated facing forward on a {argument name="sofa color" default="teal velvet sofa"}, wearing a tight black halter-neck bodysuit or dress with extremely high leg slits revealing a thigh tattoo, one hand raised to her head, framed by dark wooden bookshelves. On the right panel, she is captured in a side-rear view kneeling on the same teal couch, looking back over her shoulder at the camera, highlighting the open back of the black garment. The background features the wooden shelving unit and a window letting in bright natural daylight, creating a mix of soft indoor lighting and natural backlighting. The style is casual, high-resolution social media photography.

    "overall_scene": "A candid, direct-flash analog film photograph of two young women enjoying a night out, seated closely on a leather banquette in a dimly lit, vintage-styled bar. The aesthetic is lo-fi, grainy, with warm colors and hard flash shadows.",

    "photography_style": {
      "type": "Analog film snapshot",
      "lighting": "Direct on-camera flash, creating harsh highlights and deep shadows",
      "texture": "Heavy film grain, slightly desaturated but warm color palette, vintage vibe",
      "composition": "Vertical portrait, candid moment capture"
    },
    "subjects": {
      "count": 2,
      "relationship": "Friends, close physical contact, energetic and playful interaction"
    },

### 564. 3x3 赛车魅力照片拼贴

**作者**: [Mr.pinecone](https://x.com/Mrpinecone888/status/2011438538097873320)  **日期**: 2026-01-14  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一个 3x3 的照片网格拼贴画，重点突出赛车运动的魅力美学。它要求在所有九个画面中严格保留同一张参考面孔，同时描绘主体在赛车相关的各种姿势，例如倚靠在超级跑车上、戴着头盔、手持奖杯，背景设定为一级方程式赛道。

![3x3 赛车魅力照片拼贴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468551515_uxp8f5_G-oQqSMa0AIsXEg.jpg)

```
{
  "Objective": "Create a 3x3 grid photo collage with motorsport racing glamour aesthetics",
  "FaceReference": {"Mode": "Strict face preservation", "Instruction": "Use uploaded reference for exact facial features", "Consistency": "Face identical across all nine frames"},
  "GridComposition": {"Layout": "3x3 grid", "PoseVariety": ["Leaning on supercar hood", "Sitting in driver seat", "Close-up with racing helmet", "Walking pit lane", "Holding checkered flag", "Adjusting racing gloves", "Standing by tire stack", "Hair blowing from car speed", "Victory pose with trophy"]},
  "PersonaDetails": {"Subject": {"Type": "Same as reference", "Wardrobe": "{argument name="wardrobe" default="Sleek racing suit or fitted leather jacket, designer sunglasses, high ponytail"}", "OverallPresence": "Speed queen, powerful, adrenaline chic"}},
  "Environment": {"Setting": "{argument name="setting" default="Formula 1 race circuit"}", "Background": "Race track, pit lane, supercars, sponsor banners, timing screens", "Lighting": {"Style": "Dramatic stadium and daylight mix", "Quality": "High contrast, dynamic, sporty"}},
  "ImageQuality": {"Resolution": "8K hyper-realistic", "Aesthetic": "Motorsport luxury brand campaign"},
  "NegativePrompt": ["slow pace", "ordinary cars", "different face", "altered facial features"],
  "ResponseFormat": {"Layout": "3x3 grid", "AspectRatio": "1:1"}
}
```

### 566. 仿生发光太阳朋克产品展示

**作者**: [Willy](https://x.com/jw660227/status/2011395861876813924)  **日期**: 2026-01-14  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成超现实太阳朋克产品展示的详细提示。它描述了可持续技术产品优雅的网格排列，产品具有有机曲线、活体苔藓和生物发光光泽，背景是郁郁葱葱的植物墙。场景由黄金时段的阳光照亮，旨在营造一种将韩国极简主义设计与自然元素融为一体的高端商业摄影美学。

![仿生发光太阳朋克产品展示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468555439_4q67qq_G-np3i4bcAAwrHE.jpg)

```
A stunning solarpunk product showcase featuring an elegant grid arrangement of sustainable technology products seamlessly integrated with lush botanical elements. The scene displays bio-engineered devices with flowing organic curves and living moss accents arranged in perfect symmetry on a reclaimed wood surface. Each product emanates a soft bioluminescent glow, featuring translucent bio-plastic casings with visible internal plant root systems and flowing water channels. The background reveals a verdant living wall cascade with hanging air-purifying vines, integrated solar panel leaves, and delicate flowering pods that power the displayed technology.

Golden hour sunlight streams through floor-to-ceiling windows, casting warm amber rays that dance across the green foliage and illuminate the products with a dreamy, ethereal backlight. Soft volumetric lighting creates gentle lens flares and highlights the organic textures of both nature and technology. The atmosphere feels optimistic and serene, embodying a harmonious future where innovation and nature coexist beautifully.

Shot from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle using a wide-angle lens with shallow depth of field, creating artistic bokeh in the background vegetation while keeping the product grid in sharp focus. The composition follows rule of thirds with leading lines created by the wooden planks and vine arrangements. Professional commercial photography style with vibrant color grading emphasizing rich emerald greens, warm golden tones, and creamy white highlights. The aesthetic balances minimalist {argument name="design style" default="Korean"} design sensibilities with abundant natural elements, creating an Instagram-worthy visual that suggests premium eco-luxury and sustainable innovation. Photorealistic rendering with high dynamic range, crisp details, and subtle film grain for organic authenticity.
A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner.
```

### 572. Photorealistic Inverted Yoga Portrait

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2011187671264104482)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: en

> A comprehensive prompt for generating an ultra-photorealistic image of a young woman performing an inverted yoga pose (handstand/forearm stand) in a modern studio. It specifies details about her appearance, clothing, the mirrored environment, and technical lighting to achieve a high-quality fitness photography style.

![Photorealistic Inverted Yoga Portrait](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466899961_dloyn1_G-ksgpDWgAAg-hu.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_type": "photorealistic yoga/gym flexibility portrait",
  "main_composition": "dynamic inverted full-body view of a single young woman performing a controlled handstand or forearm stand variation in a modern dance/yoga studio, body fully extended vertically with legs together and pointed toes, arms straight supporting weight on hands, long hair hanging down toward floor, mirrored walls reflecting pose from multiple angles and also clearly her face, warm indoor lighting with wooden elements",
  "subject": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, attractive feminine features with light natural makeup, long wavy dark blonde hair cascading downward in inverted pose, fair to tanned smooth skin with athletic toned physique and strong core/arms",
    "clothing": "fitted light {argument name="clothing color" default="teal or mint blue"} long-sleeve crop top with thumb holes and small white logo on sleeve, matching high-waisted seamless leggings with subtle branding ('KEOR' on waistband), white knit ribbed leg warmers scrunched at calves/ankles, white thong-style underwear visible underneath leggings",
    "details": "advanced flexibility pose with straight vertical alignment and pointed toes, visible tattoos including script text on lower back ('never give up' or similar) and small design on upper arm, manicured neutral nails, hair slightly tousled from movement, confident focused expression partially visible upside down"
  },
  "environment": {
    "foreground": "smooth light wooden studio floor with subtle grain and reflections",
    "midground": "woman centered in inverted pose, large floor-to-ceiling mirrors on walls reflecting full body and room",
    "background": "modern dance/yoga studio with exposed red brick upper walls, vertical wooden slat paneling on lower walls, acoustic ceiling panels, clean professional fitness space with no clutter"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "warm even indoor studio lighting from overhead sources, soft natural glow with subtle highlights on skin, hair, and glossy leggings fabric, gentle shadows enhancing muscle definition and pose depth, energetic athletic vibe with high contrast between teal outfit and wooden tones, photorealistic detail",
  "technical_quality": "highly detailed, sharp focus on subject with realistic fabric textures (seamless leggings shine, knit leg warmers ribbing), hair movement, skin glow, tattoo ink, and mirror reflections, 8k resolution, professional fitness/yoga photography style with dynamic inverted composition and accurate pose anatomy",
  "negative_prompt_suggestions": "blurry, deformed, extra limbs, unnatural proportions or balance issues, overexposed skin, underexposed shadows, low quality, cartoon, anime, text watermark, extra people, cluttered background, visible face distortion from inversion"
}
```

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成具有复古 70 年代胶片美学（特别是柯达 Portra 400 模拟）的 3x3 照片拼贴。该提示词要求严格保留面部特征，并概述了与复古汽车沙漠公路旅行相关的各种姿势和环境细节。

{
  "Objective": "Create a 3x3 grid photo collage with vintage 70s film aesthetics",
  "FaceReference": {"Mode": "Strict face preservation", "Instruction": "Use uploaded reference for exact facial features", "Consistency": "Face identical across all nine frames"},
  "GridComposition": {"Layout": "3x3 grid", "PoseVariety": ["Leaning on vintage car", "Cigarette prop pose", "Sunglasses reflection", "Hitchhiking gesture", "Sitting on car hood", "Wind in hair", "Through car window", "Walking empty road", "Polaroid candid"]},
  "PersonaDetails": {"Subject": {"Type": "Same as reference", "Wardrobe": "Vintage denim jacket, band tee, high-waisted flares, aviators", "OverallPresence": "Retro cool, free spirit"}},
  "Environment": {"Setting": "Desert highway, vintage car", "Background": "Open road, blue sky, retro signage", "Lighting": {"Style": "Natural harsh sunlight", "Quality": "Film grain, light leaks"}},
  "ImageQuality": {"Resolution": "Kodak Portra 400 emulation", "Aesthetic": "70s road trip editorial"},
  "NegativePrompt": ["digital sharpness", "modern elements", "different face", "altered facial features"],
  "ResponseFormat": {"Layout": "3x3 grid", "AspectRatio": "1:1"}
}

```
Side profile of a sophisticated, ornate, completely transparent crystal fountain pen. Inside the clear barrel and cap of the pen, a Pink Panther character is meticulously positioned. The Pink Panther, wearing a tiny, ink-stained artist's smock and beret, holds a miniature paintbrush in its paws. It is actively and diligently painting blue ink onto the internal mechanism and the inner surface of the pen nib, as if carefully recharging the ink flow. The pen floats against a pure solid light grey background, with soft, directional studio lighting highlighting the crystal clear transparency and the vibrant blue ink. Hyper-realistic 3D render, luxury product photography aesthetic, intricate details, 8k resolution.

}

### 593. 超现实主义错视肖像：撕裂纸张般的皮肤

**作者**: [Mr Das](https://x.com/MrDasOnX/status/2010637429078982951)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 一个用于创建超现实、概念性肖像的图生图提示，使用上传的面部作为参考。图像采用“错视画法”效果，其中主体的皮肤被剥离，露出下方充满活力的日落景观，以 8K 分辨率、光线追踪照明和复杂的纹理细节呈现。

```
A hyper-realistic, surreal conceptual portrait featuring the uploaded face as reference, captured in a close-up shot with a 50mm lens under harsh, direct sunlight that casts deep, defined shadows across the subject's neck and clothing. The image employs a striking trompe-l'œil effect where the right side of the subject's face is being physically peeled away by a hand, revealing that the skin is merely a layer of textured paper with ragged, fibrous torn edges. Inside the void created by the torn face, instead of anatomy, lies a breathtaking, high-dynamic-range landscape of a vibrant sunset over a calm ocean, with deep oranges and purples in the clouds and a glowing horizon line. The subject is wearing a textured navy blue zip-up fleece jacket with a visible metal zipper pull. The background is a stark, rough-textured white stucco wall that emphasizes the tactile reality of the scene. The rendering quality is immaculate, featuring 8k resolution, raytraced lighting, subsurface scattering on the remaining skin, and intricate detailing on the torn paper fibers and the plaster wall texture, blending photorealism with dreamlike surrealism.
```

**Related**: [[超现实]]、[[宠物]]、[[旅行]]

---

### 594. 超写实湿润肌肤微距肖像提示词

**作者**: [cinema 🎥](https://x.com/FilmHub00/status/2010612612967346563)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 一个针对 Nano Banana Pro 的高度技术性提示，专注于生成一张超逼真的年轻女性侧面特写肖像，她拥有银色头发，强调湿润的皮肤纹理、清晰可见的毛孔、水滴和白色肥皂泡沫。该提示使用微距镜头设置和高级渲染技术（光线追踪、次表面散射），以呈现出干净的美容广告美学效果。

Medium close-up portrait of a female boxer resting in the corner of a ring between rounds, cropped from the chest up. Hyper-detailed skin texture showing sweat mixed with a little blood from a nosebleed, a slight swelling over one eye, and her braided hair slightly messy. She is breathing heavily, looking straight ahead with a determined, weary expression. Wearing a mouthguard and boxing gloves, with a towel draped over her shoulder. The background shows the ropes and blurry corner staff. harsh indoor ring lighting. Neutral color science, no crushed blacks, no artificial smoothing. Shot on smartphone portrait lens, shallow depth of field. Documentary photographic realism, Shot in a realistic smartphone photography style.

### 598. 超现实微距艺术肖像提示

**作者**: [Anissa](https://x.com/SimplyAnnisa/status/2010578685070582235)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 一个针对 Nano Banana Pro 的极其详细的提示，专注于生成一张超现实、空灵的微距艺术肖像。它要求对参考图像中的面部特征和皮肤纹理（包括毛孔和瑕疵）绝对忠实，使用特定的徕卡（Leica）光学镜头捕捉，并以精致的野花和清冷、忧郁的氛围为特色。

![超现实微距艺术肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319244090_ubldkt_G-cCqC7aoAETyfq.jpg)

```
Utilize exclusively and obligatorily the uploaded reference photos as the primary and authoritative source for the model’s face, facial structure, proportions, skin tone, real skin texture, and the exact natural characteristics of her hair.
Do not idealize, beautify, alter, rejuvenate, slim the face, smooth the skin, or modify any real features.
Do not remove or change freckles, pores, fine lines, or natural imperfections.The appearance must match the reference images exactly, with absolute fidelity.
Create a hyper-realistic, ethereal macro Fine Art portrait photograph, captured with a Leica APO-Macro-Elmarit-R 100mm f/2.8, full-frame.
An extreme close-up of a young woman’s face with pale skin, fully respecting the real physiognomy of the model as shown in the reference photos.
Skin texture is ultra-detailed and completely natural, with clearly visible pores and no artificial smoothing.
One crystal-clear, melancholic eye is in perfect critical focus, displaying natural micro-contrast characteristic of Leica optics.
Long, natural eyelashes.
Lips slightly parted, in a natural pale pink tone, with no excessive or artificial makeup.
Delicate wildflowers in soft lilac and muted purple tones rest gently on the cheek and intertwine with loose, naturally imperfect hair strands, exactly following the real hair pattern seen in the reference images.
Some flowers appear softly out of focus in the foreground, creating organic depth and layered composition.
Soft, cool, diffused natural light, as on an overcast day.
No harsh shadows, no artificial lighting.
A serene, fragile, poetic, and subtly melancholic atmosphere.
Macro photography with an extremely shallow depth of field, edges and background melting into a creamy, smooth bokeh.
Absolute critical focus on the iris and the true skin texture.
Desaturated color palette, cool pastel tones — soft gray, beige, and lilac.
Fine Art aesthetic, authentic Leica optical fidelity, true photographic appearance.
Ultra-high resolution 8K, with no AI-generated look.
```

**作者**: [qezbahn](https://x.com/qezbahnai/status/2010444175746154800)  **日期**: 2026-01-11  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化提示，旨在模拟在一家高档餐厅使用硬直闪光灯拍摄的原始、未经编辑、真实的网红照片。它详细说明了拍摄对象的姿势、服装（超大印花 T 恤、透明丝袜）以及所需的审美缺陷，例如硬阴影和数字噪点，同时要求保留参考面部。

![在高级餐厅里，网红用闪光灯偷拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768226023431_e1dxdh_G-aIUNRWsAAesE9.jpg)

```
{
"meta": {
"aesthetic": "Flash Photography/Influencer Candid",
"imperfections": [
"Direct Flash",
"Hard Shadows",
"High Contrast",
"Digital Noise"
]
},
"global_context": {
"scene_description": "Nighttime indoor dining scene captured with direct flash.",
"lighting": {
"source": "Hard Direct On-Camera Flash",
"shadows": "Sharp/Distinct on wall behind subject"
}
},
"subject_analysis": {
"pose": "Sitting upright on a dining chair, legs crossed at the knee, one hand resting on the thigh, the other hand gently touching the cheek/jawline with elbow raised.",
"expression": "Poised, confident, soft smile directed at camera",
"clothing": "Oversized cream graphic t-shirt with dark gothic/dog print, sheer brown thigh-high stockings, white biker shorts visible underneath",
"accessories": "Shoulder bag with thick strap, small hoop earrings, delicate necklace, wrist tattoo visible",
"identity_protection": {
"face_command": "USE_REFERENCE_FACE",
"hair_command": "USE_REFERENCE_HAIR",
"skin_command": "USE_REFERENCE_SKIN"
}
},
"environment": {
"location": "Upscale restaurant interior",
"background_details": "White wainscoting/paneled walls, tables with white tablecloths and candles, large mirror reflecting dried floral arrangements, silver ice bucket stand"
},
"generative_prompt_string": "A raw, candid photo of a person, sitting upright on a dining chair, legs crossed at the knee, one hand resting on the thigh, the other hand gently touching the cheek/jawline with elbow raised, poised, confident, soft smile directed at camera. USE_REFERENCE_FACE, USE_REFERENCE_HAIR, USE_REFERENCE_SKIN. Wearing Oversized cream graphic t-shirt with dark gothic/dog print, sheer brown thigh-high stockings, white biker shorts visible underneath. Hard Direct On-Camera Flash, Direct Flash, Hard Shadows, High Contrast, Digital Noise. Background is Upscale restaurant interior with White wainscoting/paneled walls, tables with white tablecloths and candles, large mirror reflecting dried floral arrangements, silver ice bucket stand. iPhone aesthetic, unedited, authentic."
}
```

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2010412458364502130)  **日期**: 2026-01-11  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、照片级的提示，用于生成一张动感的健身房自拍图像。它详细说明了构图、拍摄对象的形象、服装、环境、光线和技术质量，重点是一位身处现代健身房环境中的运动型女性，强调纹理和真实感。

![超逼真健身房自拍提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768225965706_k9oz9f_G-ZreCPW8AAi812.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_type": "photorealistic gym selfie",
  "main_composition": "rear three-quarter back view of a single young woman in a modern gym, dynamically posing with one leg raised high backward (flexibility stretch or playful kick), looking over her right shoulder with a subtle confident smile, one hand holding black fingerless weightlifting gloves, relaxed athletic stance emphasizing toned physique, dim overhead gym lighting with equipment visible in background",
  "subject": {
    "description": "beautiful young woman in her early 20s, attractive feminine features with light natural makeup (subtle blush, defined eyes, glossy lips), long straight light brown hair styled in a high ponytail with loose strands framing face, fair to tanned smooth skin with athletic toned hourglass figure and strong legs/glutes",
    "clothing": "fitted black long-sleeve crop top with small white heart logo on left sleeve and thumb holes, high-waisted short gray seamless athletic shorts/leggings with white brand text 'DFYNE' (or similar activewear logo) centered on back waistband, white athletic sneakers with black accents, black fingerless gym gloves held in hand",
    "details": "playful confident expression with slight smile and direct eye contact over shoulder, red manicured nails visible on glove hand, hair slightly tousled with natural movement, dynamic stretch pose with excellent flexibility and balance"
  },
  "environment": {
    "foreground": "light rubberized or padded gym floor with subtle texture",
    "midground": "woman centered in open gym space",
    "background": "modern gym interior with dim overhead fluorescent lighting, red plyometric soft boxes stacked on left with white branding, black heavy punching bag on right, equipment racks and weights visible, clean professional fitness studio atmosphere"
  },
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "dim indoor gym lighting with cool overhead fluorescents creating soft shadows and subtle highlights on skin, hair, and glossy fabric, moody athletic vibe with high contrast on gray shorts and black top, energetic fitness motivation feel, photorealistic detail",
  "technical_quality": "highly detailed, sharp focus on subject with realistic fabric textures (seamless shorts shine, cotton crop top matte, glove leather), hair movement, skin glow, and sneaker details, 8k resolution, professional candid gym photography style with dynamic composition and natural motion in pose",
  "negative_prompt_suggestions": "blurry, deformed, extra limbs, frontal view, harsh overhead shadows, overexposed floor, underexposed face, low quality, cartoon, anime, text watermark, extra people, cluttered equipment in focus, static pose"
}
```

She stepped into the tiny, tiled bathroom, barely able to see through the neon haze. Pulling out her phone, she used the flash for lighting, not for the photo itself, catching herself mid-grimace as she adjusted her slicked-back hair.   "clothing_and_appearance": {
