### 608. Nano Banana 图像生成提示词规则 (JSON Schema)

**作者**: [Kaz / AI✖️ローコード](https://x.com/AI_LowCode/status/2010327193424183567)  **日期**: 2026-01-11  **语言**: en

> 一个用于 Nano Banana 图像生成的详细系统提示模板，旨在通过要求所有提示严格遵循特定 JSON 模式来确保团队内部的一致性和质量。它通过定义风格、主体、光照、相机设置和负面提示等字段，确保高质量、细节丰富且一致的图像输出。

```
# Nano Banana Image Generation Prompt Rules

When generating images using Nano Banana, the prompt must ALWAYS strictly follow the JSON format defined below.

## Prompt Schema

```json
{
  "image_type": "Define the specific medium, art style, or format of the source image.",
  "time_period_and_year": "Estimate the specific year or decade based on fashion, technology, image quality, and color grading visible in the photo.",
  "mood_and_vibe": "Describe the emotional atmosphere, energy, and intangible 'feeling' evoked by the image (e.g., the specific psychological impression it gives).",
  "subject": "Describe the main character(s) focusing on demographics, body morphology, distinct physical features, and posture.",
  "clothing": "Describe the outfit in detail, strictly specifying garment names, fabric textures, patterns, colors, and how the clothes fit on the subject.",
  "hair": "Describe the hair color, specific hairstyle name, length, and texture.",
  "face": "Describe facial features, skin texture, makeup details, and the exact facial expression.",
  "accessories": "List all visible accessories, jewelry, glasses, or held items, including their material and design details.",
  "action": "Describe the specific activity, movement, or interaction occurring in the scene.",
  "location": "Describe the environment, visible background elements, architectural style, and spatial context.",
  "lighting": "Analyze the light source, direction, color temperature, hardness/softness of the light, and shadow characteristics.",
  "camera_angle_and_framing": "Describe the vertical and horizontal angle of the camera relative to the subject (e.g., eye-level, low-angle), and the shot composition size.",
  "camera_equipment": "Estimate the likely camera type, lens focal length (e.g., wide-angle vs telephoto), aperture effect (depth of field), and film stock or digital sensor characteristics.",
  "style": "Describe the overall aesthetic, color palette, artistic technique, and visual processing style.",
  "negative_prompt": "List visual defects or unwanted elements to be excluded to ensure high quality."
}
```

## Instructions

1. **Output Format**: The output must be a single valid JSON object.
2. **Completeness**: All fields are required. If a field is not applicable, provide a reasonable default or describe it as "neutral" or "standard".
3. **Detail**: Be descriptive and specific in each field to ensure high-quality image generation.
4. **Language**: The values in the JSON should be in English (as most image generation models are optimized for English prompts), unless otherwise specified.
```

**Related**: [[时装大片]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[科技产品]]

```
A high-end editorial studio photograph of a {argument name="product form" default="bottle"}, made of {argument name="material" default="glass"} with a {argument name="color" default="(COLOR)"} {argument name="detail" default="cap"}. The product is placed on a natural, textured {argument name="base surface" default="stone"} slab, itself resting on a round mirror laid on a {argument name="surface tone" default="beige"} surface. Around the mirror and on the slab are scattered droplets of {argument name="liquid" default="serum"} with realistic reflections. A few sprigs of {argument name="decorative natural elements" default="lavender"} lie gently across the slab and mirror, connecting both surfaces naturally. Strong, warm sunlight filters from the top left, casting soft diagonal leaf shadows to simulate filtered daylight. The aesthetic is {argument name="visual style" default="minimalist"}, with realistic materials and natural textures highlighted by golden hour tones. Style: 3D realism, luxury product photography, shallow depth of field. Format: 1:1, ultra-detailed.

Epic 3D scene: a massive architectural blueprint of [Name] pinned to a drafting table, its ink lines rising off the paper into fully realized construction. Blue lines become steel beams mid-weld, floor plans inflate into furnished rooms, elevation drawings push outward into facades with working windows. Construction phases coexist simultaneously: foundation being poured in one corner while the penthouse is already inhabited in another. Tiny workers, cranes, and scaffolding swarm the rising structure. The flat drawing and the living building merge at impossible angles. Technical annotations float as dimensional signage. Architect's coffee cup sits at the edge, casting shadow across unbuilt sections. Extreme scale contrast, construction dust catching afternoon light, 8K, photorealistic.

![史诗级 3D 建筑蓝图觉醒场景](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143813038_2sravn_G-Ryp2RXkAEjYy8.jpg)
![史诗级 3D 建筑蓝图觉醒场景](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143814740_c8o5ui_G-RyxhhWEAAogWS.jpg)

```
Epic 3D scene: a massive architectural blueprint of [{argument name="building type" default="BUILDING/STRUCTURE"}] pinned to a drafting table, its ink lines rising off the paper into fully realized construction. Blue lines become steel beams mid-weld, floor plans inflate into furnished rooms, elevation drawings push outward into facades with working windows. Construction phases coexist simultaneously: foundation being poured in one corner while the penthouse is already inhabited in another. Tiny workers, cranes, and scaffolding swarm the rising structure. The flat drawing and the living building merge at impossible angles. Technical annotations float as dimensional signage. Architect's coffee cup sits at the edge, casting shadow across unbuilt sections. Extreme scale contrast, construction dust catching afternoon light, 8K, photorealistic.
```

### 618. 可口可乐罐产品摄影和爆炸图信息图

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2009999072665710837)  **日期**: 2026-01-10  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成高质量商业图像的双部分提示。第一部分是关于一个旋转的可口可乐罐及其分离成分的动画的动作提示。第二部分要求提供两张超现实的静态图像：一张是带有冷凝水珠的冰镇可口可乐罐，另一张是详细展示饮料成分的垂直爆炸式信息图。

```
Motion Prompt: The Can starts to round spin while ingredients separate gently and precisely, maintaining alignment and scale. The motion is smooth, with no extra effects.

Image 1 : High-quality professional product photography of a chilled Coca-Cola can with condensation water droplets and a refreshing, icy look. The aluminum can appears crisp and glossy with realistic highlights, subtle reflections, and visible cold texture. Shot in a minimalist commercial beverage advertising style against a pure white background with soft natural shadows. Sharp focus, ultra-clean composition, modern aesthetic.

Image 2 : Create a hyper-realistic vertical exploded infographic illustrating the ingredients of a coca cola soft drink. At the top, clear carbonated water shown as sparkling liquid with fine rising bubbles. Below it, floating white sugar crystals with sharp crystalline texture. Beneath that, a rich amber-brown caramel color layer with glossy, syrup-like depth. Next, a subtle translucent layer representing phosphoric acid with a clean liquid look. Below it, abstract aromatic particles symbolizing natural flavors, light and minimal. Further down, small dark caffeine granules suspended mid-air. At the bottom, a chilled red aluminum cola can standing upright with realistic condensation droplets and metallic reflections. Pure solid white background, soft studio lighting, subtle realistic shadows under each floating layer, ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro photography look. Clean minimalist infographic labels with thin pointer lines for each ingredient. Premium beverage advertising aesthetic, modern, photorealistic.
```

**作者**: [Gagan Singh](https://x.com/GaganSingh8u/status/2009848363471253814)  **日期**: 2026-01-10  **语言**: en

> 一个用于图像到图像生成的结构化提示，要求 AI 在应用风格化的数字水彩插画美学的同时，保留参考图像中 100% 的面部特征、年龄和表情。场景描绘了身穿红色传统服饰的主体，周围环绕着红色芙蓉花，重点在于柔和的颜料扩散和可见的素描线条。

![数字水彩插画，严格锁定品牌识别](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768143891200_dm99dh_G-Rqa2Za4AA0Bw0.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded reference image to **preserve 100% of the facial features, identity, age, skin tone, and expression** of the woman. Do not alter facial structure. Create a **stylized digital watercolor illustration** with soft, realistic facial features and expressive eyes exactly matching the reference image. Black hair is loosely tied back with natural strands falling around the face. She wears a **red traditional dress** with subtle gold detailing and delicate traditional jewelry. Large **red hibiscus flowers and lush green leaves** surround her head and shoulders, organically blending into the background using watercolor washes and ink-like splashes. Composition is slightly tilted for a dreamy, poetic mood. Fine sketch lines visible beneath watercolor textures, soft paint diffusion, hand-painted illustration aesthetic, elegant and artistic, high detail, masterpiece quality.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text overlay, anime, cartoon, overexposed, underexposed, ugly face, bad hands, face altered, identity changed, harsh lighting, plastic skin, photorealistic rendering",
  "parameters": {
    "steps": 50,
    "cfg_scale": 7.5,
    "sampler": "Euler a or DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "strength": 0.55,
    "noise": 0.3,
    "width": 832,
    "height": 1216,
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "usage_instructions": "Upload your image in img2img or reference mode. Keep strength between 0.5–0.6 to maintain **100% face matching** while applying the watercolor illustration style. Increase slightly only if you want minor pose or background variation."
}

Photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young East Asian woman in her early 20s, delicate heart-shaped face, fair porcelain skin with subtle natural glow, large expressive dark brown eyes with light makeup (thin eyeliner and mascara), straight thin eyebrows, small straight nose, full natural pink lips with a bright genuine smile showing teeth, long straight dark brown hair with slight natural sheen, center-parted, falling past shoulders, hair slightly tousled by breeze.

She is turned three-quarters to her back, looking back directly at the camera over her right shoulder with a playful and confident expression. > 一个复杂、结构化的 JSON 提示词，旨在生成一张模仿 2000 年代初期佳能小型数码相机拍摄的原始、亲密快照的图像。它详细指定了相机设置、光线（刺眼的闪光灯）、构图（看着相机屏幕）和主体细节，以实现怀旧、真实的数字现实主义美学。

### 634. 滑雪缆车内的深焦冬日生活照

**作者**: [Key Alves](https://x.com/key_alvesl/status/2008973654592221237)  **日期**: 2026-01-07  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化、结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张锐利、高对比度的滑雪缆车内冬季生活方式照片。关键指令是**深景深 (f/11)**，确保主体、缆车内部和远处的雪山都完美锐利且对焦清晰。它指定了一位化着 e-girl 妆容的白皙女性，并强调了细致的织物物理效果（闪亮尼龙）。

![滑雪缆车内的深焦冬日生活照](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966032552_p9bblv_G-FOwqKXgAEJXly.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "project": "Ski_Gondola_Egirl_Flux_V4.2",
    "target_engine": "Flux.1 [dev] / Nano Banana Pro",
    "version": "4.2.0 (Everything in Focus - f/11)",
    "created_at": "2025-12-18T15:35:00Z"
  },
  "engine_configuration": {
    "model": {
      "base": "flux1-dev.safetensors",
      "quantization": "fp8 / nf4",
      "vae": "ae.safetensors"
    },
    "lora_slots": [
      {
        "name": "Realism_LoRA_v2 (Optional)",
        "strength": 0.5,
        "note": "Enhances porcelain skin tone, nylon textures, and snow reflections."
      }
    ],
    "sampling": {
      "sampler_name": "euler",
      "scheduler": "simple",
      "steps": 28,
      "guidance_scale": 2.5,
      "shift": 1.0
    },
    "dimensions": {
      "width": 1024,
      "height": 1536,
      "aspect_ratio": "2:3",
      "megapixel_class": "1.5MP"
    }
  },
  "prompt_construction": {
    "narrative_layer": {
      "style": "Winter Lifestyle / Travel Photography",
      "instruction": "Capture a sharp, high-contrast shot inside a ski gondola, balancing the interior subject with the bright snowy mountain view outside.",
      "subject_flow": "A pale young woman with black wolf-cut hair wearing a white puffer jacket sitting in a cable car, touching her hair."
    },
    "texture_layer": {
      "skin_physics": "pale porcelain skin, glossy lips, dramatic e-girl eyeliner, smooth finish",
      "fabric_physics": "shiny nylon texture of white puffer jacket, technical matte fabric of black ski pants, reflective lens of ski goggles",
      "environment_physics": "SHARP DETAILS ON BACKGROUND: clear glass window, white snow texture on mountains, dark green pine trees, blue sky"
    },
    "camera_physics": {
      "lens_imperfections": "high contrast, sharp daylight, slight reflection on glass",
      "focus": "DEEP DEPTH OF FIELD (f/11) - NO BLUR. The woman, the gondola interior, and the distant snowy mountains are all sharp.",
      "settings": "Sony A7R V, 35mm Lens, 1/1000s, ISO 100 (Bright Snow Daylight)"
    },
    "color_grading": {
      "white_balance": "Cool Daylight (Blue Sky/White Snow dominance)",
      "shadows": "Deep, defined shadows inside the cabin",
      "highlights": "Bright, crisp highlights on snow and jacket"
    }
  },
  "final_prompt_string": "A candid raw lifestyle photograph shot on Sony A7R V 35mm f/11. Deep depth of field, everything in focus. A young woman (19-25) with pale porcelain skin and shoulder-length black hair with bangs (wolf cut) sitting inside a ski gondola. She wears a shiny white cropped puffer jacket, black ski pants, and black ski goggles on her head. She touches her hair behind her ear and looks at the camera with a calm expression. Dramatic e-girl makeup with winged eyeliner and glossy lips. Bright winter sunlight illuminates her face. Background is sharp and detailed: Through the large glass window, a panoramic view of snowy Alpine mountains, ski tracks, pine trees, and a clear blue sky is"
```

### 635. 健身房情侣互举的 2x2 拼贴画

**作者**: [Keskin](https://x.com/craftian_keskin/status/2008960553713086873)  **日期**: 2026-01-07  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 创建一个复杂的提示，以生成一对情侣在现代健身房里的逼真 2x2 网格拼贴画。这个幽默的创意是男人将女人作为阻力进行四种不同的锻炼（卧推、杠铃弯举、深蹲、硬拉），风格上看起来像是用智能手机拍摄的抓拍照片，并为每个动作添加了文字标签。

![健身房情侣互举的 2x2 拼贴画](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966083359_p96g8a_G-FCwsJXAAAVV-l.jpg)

```
Create a photorealistic 2x2 grid collage (four panels) in a modern indoor gym with mirrors, racks, dumbbells, and fluorescent ceiling lights. Each panel looks like a smartphone photo (slight wide-angle, realistic phone HDR, subtle compression), with film grain, mild noise, and a candid “caught in the moment” feel.
Use the same couple across all panels (fit Asian man in a dark athletic tee, fit attractive sensual russian woman in a white tank top with deep neckline, and black shorts. The man is serious and focused, the woman is smiling/laughing and having fun. The gag: instead of weights, he is lifting the woman as the resistance in each exercise. Keep it athletic, playful, and believable.

Panel layout & actions (2x2):

Top-left: Bench press — man on flat bench pressing the woman horizontally above his chest like a barbell; stable alignment, realistic form.

Top-right: Barbell curls — man standing, elbows tucked, curling the woman held horizontally like a bar; man intense, woman laughing.

Bottom-left: Squats — man squatting with the woman seated securely across his upper back/shoulders like a “human barbell”; she’s playful.

Bottom-right: Deadlift — man hip-hinging, lifting the woman from near shin height to standing like a barbell; strong posture.

Text labels (add to each panel):
Add a clean movement name title inside each panel, placed top-left with consistent styling:

“BENCH PRESS” (top-left panel)

“BARBELL CURLS” (top-right panel)

“SQUAT” (bottom-left panel)

“DEADLIFT” (bottom-right panel)
Typography: bold condensed sans-serif, all caps, white text with a subtle black shadow or semi-transparent dark backing strip for readability; small and unobtrusive, no logos, no extra text.

Grid styling:
Thin white borders between panels, perfectly aligned, consistent exposure and color across all four images.

Aspect ratio: 4:5 (single image containing the 2x2 grid)

Negative prompt:

blurry, low-res, cartoon, CGI look, extra limbs, distorted anatomy, unsafe positions, injury, awkward bending, warped faces, duplicate people, misspelled titles, random extra words, watermark, brand logos, heavy motion blur, extreme fisheye, overexposed highlights, messy clutter, fetishy framing, exaggerated body proportions
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[名片与Logo]]、[[综合设计]]

### 636. 分解汉堡信息图和产品图

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2008910386008125614)  **日期**: 2026-01-07  **语言**: en

> 一个双图像提示，用于生成一张高质量的香辣汉堡产品照片，以及一张美食汉堡的超逼真垂直分解信息图构图。该提示还包含一个针对视频生成的特定运动指令，侧重于对图层进行受控、精确的分离。

```
Motion Prompt: The burger begins a slow, smooth rotation while its layers gently separate one by one, maintaining perfect alignment, spacing, and scale. Each ingredient floats apart with precise, controlled motion. The movement is clean and fluid, with no extra effects or distractions.

Image 1 :-  A high-quality, professional product photograph of a crispy zinger burger with a golden, crunchy fried chicken fillet, fresh lettuce, and soft sesame bun. The burger looks juicy and well-stacked with visible texture and crunch. Minimalist style, shot against a pure solid white background with soft, natural shadows. 8K resolution, sharp focus, clean and modern aesthetic.

Image 2 :- Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of a gourmet burger. At the top, a soft glossy sesame bun crown with visible sesame seeds and light texture. Below it, fresh crisp lettuce leaves floating naturally, followed by ripe tomato slices with juicy pulp and seeds. Beneath that, melted cheese slices stretching slightly over a thick, perfectly grilled beef or crispy chicken patty with visible char or crunch texture and moisture. Under the patty, thinly layered onions and pickles suspended mid-air. At the bottom, a soft bun base aligned perfectly. Pure solid white background, soft studio lighting, subtle realistic shadows beneath each floating layer, ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro photography look. Clean, minimalist infographic text labels with thin pointer lines for each layer. Premium fast-food lifestyle aesthetic, photorealistic.
```

},

},

"background": "Dark urban backdrop with blurred bokeh lights from buildings."
},

"contrast": "Strong separation between the illuminated face and the dark city background",

},

}

### 639. Candid Kitchen Cooking Scene JSON 提示

**作者**: [Özge](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2008677560243429470)  **日期**: 2026-01-06  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的综合性 JSON 提示，旨在生成一张超逼真的、抓拍式的男性生活肖像，描绘他在夜间现代厨房里烹饪玉米片的情景。该提示强制执行严格的身份锁定，指定详细动作（磨碎奶酪），并侧重于逼真的纹理，如手臂毛发、皮肤毛孔和食物本身，力求呈现出一种手持手机拍摄的抓拍效果。

![Candid Kitchen Cooking Scene JSON 提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767966188454_5hcklw_G-BBl7iW0AAICuB.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photorealistic_single_image_with_identity_lock",
      "version": "v1.0_KITCHEN_COOKING_CANDID_ONE_REF",
      "priority": "high"
    },
    "references": {
      "reference_images": {
        "primary_subject": "UPLOAD_MALE_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)"
      },
      "reference_rules": {
        "exactly_one_reference_only": true,
        "preserve_identity_primary": true,
        "identity_lock_strength": 0.995,
        "face_similarity_priority": "MAX",
        "strict_face_match": true,
        "no_identity_drift": true,
        "no_face_morphing": true,
        "no_beautification": true,
        "preserve_skin_texture": true
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_lifestyle",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_analog"
    },
    "hard_constraints": [
      "Single subject only (the referenced male). No extra people.",
      "Face must match the reference exactly.",
      "No text, no logos, or watermarks.",
      "Realistic anatomy: no extra fingers/limbs."
    ],
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Photoreal candid lifestyle photo in a modern home kitchen at night. The same man from the reference is leaning over a stovetop, cooking nachos in a large pan and grating cheese over them. Warm under-cabinet lighting, cozy intimate vibe, natural imperfections and texture.",
      "environment": {
        "location": "modern kitchen",
        "details": [
          "white square tile backsplash",
          "black induction cooktop",
          "under-cabinet light casting warm highlights",
          "countertop with casual items (mortar & pestle, tray, paper towel)"
        ],
        "time": "evening / night indoor"
      },
      "subject": {
        "identity": "EXACT same face as reference",
        "wardrobe": {
          "top": "{argument name=\"top wear\" default=\"shirtless OR sleeveless dark tank top\"} (choose the more realistic based on reference body/skin tone)",
          "bottom": "dark casual pants"
        },
        "pose_action": {
          "action": "grating cheese with both hands over a pan of nachos",
          "body_language": "leaning forward, focused on cooking",
          "expression": "soft concentration, subtle smile optional"
        },
        "details_to_keep_real": [
          "realistic arm hair and skin pores",
          "natural shadows on muscles",
          "accurate hands holding grater and cheese block"
        ]
      },
      "food_prop": {
        "dish": "nachos in a large pan",
        "topping": "freshly grated cheese falling onto chips",
        "realism_notes": "crispy chip texture, cheese strands visible, no plastic look"
      },
      "camera": {
        "style": "candid handheld phone photo look",
        "lens_feel": "28-"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```
A beautiful, sensual blond woman doing Pilates, shown as a 2×2 grid collage on a 4:5 canvas. Each panel is a low-quality smartphone photo, casual and unpolished, as if taken during a workout break.

elegant facial features, and a calm yet confident presence. Her expression is focused and relaxed, not posed for a professional shoot.

Outfit (same in all frames):

Gray tight shorts

White sports bra with a deep neckline
Simple, realistic gym wear, slightly wrinkled, natural fit.

2×2 Grid – Pilates Movements (Smartphone Style)

Standing Roll Down – casual framing, slightly cropped feet, imperfect angle

Pilates Hundred (on mat) – mild motion blur in arms, uneven focus

Side Leg Lift – tilted framing, phone held slightly off-level

Seated Spine Stretch / Mermaid Stretch – relaxed posture, soft blur at edges

Smartphone Photo Look

Front or rear smartphone camera

Low resolution, slight blur
Visible film grain / digital noise
Uneven exposure and white balance
Mild wide-angle distortion
Handheld feel, imperfect framing
No retouching, natural skin texture
Environment
Simple Pilates studio or gym corner
Neutral walls, basic mats
No staged lighting, only ambient indoor light
Ordinary, real workout atmosphere
Optional Negative Prompt

professional studio lighting, DSLR quality, cinematic look, ultra-sharp focus, fashion shoot, CGI, cartoon style

      },

        "strict_identity_lock": true,
        "face_match_strength": "max",
        "no_identity_drift": true
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_lifestyle_editorial",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "none_or_minimal",
      "color_grade": "warm_gallery_luxe_true_to_life"
    },

      "scene_summary": "Recreate the reference photo EXACTLY in a classic museum gallery.\n\nScene & environment (match reference):\n- Deep red patterned wallpapered gallery wall.\n- Large gold-framed landscape painting centered high on the wall.\n- Two smaller gold-framed paintings on the right side of the large painting.\n- Warm wooden floor, museum bench in the background, and a small nude classical statue on a pedestal far right.\n- A large white marble statue group in the foreground-right: a classical female figure leaning forward, one hand cupped to her ear as if listening. The statue stands on a white base.\n\nSubject (single person, match reference):\n- One woman standing in the foreground-left, side profile facing the statue.\n- Pose: she cups her hands around her mouth, leaning in as if whispering into the statue’s ear.\n- Outfit: sleeveless black top; light beige pants/jeans.\n- Accessories: sunglasses resting on top of head; wristwatch and bracelets; crossbody brown leather bag strap across torso with bag visible at hip.\n- Hair: blonde, shoulder-length, straight/softly layered.\n\nLighting & camera (match reference):\n- Warm indoor museum lighting with soft highlights and realistic shadows.\n- Natural smartphone/lifestyle photo realism (not studio), accurate perspective and scale.\n- Keep the same framing: woman on left, large statue on right, paintings aligned behind.\n\nRealism requirements:\n- Natural skin texture, no plastic smoothing.\n- Marble statue texture: matte stone with subtle specular highlights; crisp sculptural detail.\n- Correct anatomy: hands cupped naturally; no extra fingers.\n\nText rules:\n- No readable text, no signage, no watermark, no logo"
    }
  }
}

### 642. 身着黑色乳胶服装的女性的超逼真高级时装影棚摄影

**作者**: [simply](https://x.com/kingofdairyque/status/2008573764838322253)  **日期**: 2026-01-06  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的图像生成提示，专为超现实、高端时尚的影棚摄影而设计。它指定了模特的姿势、自然的身体比例、后梳发型、强调可见皮肤纹理的干净编辑妆容，以及一套大胆的服装，包括黑色亮面乳胶露脐上衣、短裤和及膝长靴。该提示包含专业的影棚布光、相机镜头（50–85mm）和整体美学方面的详细说明，旨在实现自信、未来感的时尚编辑造型，且不含任何 CGI 或人工修饰。

![身着黑色乳胶服装的女性的超逼真高级时装影棚摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767804072583_3g77kk_G9_jMQPbUAA6X_Z.jpg)
![身着黑色乳胶服装的女性的超逼真高级时装影棚摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767804073548_8e3slh_G9_jMb6bcAIihxY.jpg)

```
Ultra-realistic high-fashion studio photography of a young adult woman standing in a full-body pose against a seamless pure white studio background. Her body proportions are natural and anatomically realistic, with subtle asymmetry and believable weight distribution. She stands confidently with hands resting on her hips, elbows slightly pulled back; one leg is gently bent at the knee, creating a natural hip curve and relaxed stance.
Her long straight black hair is smoothly slicked back,falling past the shoulders with a natural sheen. Facial features are well-defined yet realistic: pronounced cheekbones, full lips with a soft glossy finish, and balanced facial proportions. Makeup is clean and editorial—subtle skin correction, visible natural skin texture (pores, micro-imperfections), even tone without a plastic look, and a sharp black eyeliner accentuating the eyes.
She looks directly into the camera with calm, self-assured eye contact and a composed, slightly dominantexpression—confident but not exaggerated.
Outfit: A strapless black glossy latex or PVC crop top, tightly fitted over the torso, realistically interacting with the body, showing natural tension, highlights, and light reflections. Matching high-waisted black glossy latex shorts, very short in length, hugging the hips and upper thighs with realistic material stretch and specular highlights. Thigh-high black glossy latex boots, reaching the upper thighs, form-fitting with smooth reflectivesurfaces and subtle material creases at natural bend points.
Lighting & Camera: Professional studio lighting with soft key light and controlled fill, designed to emphasize realistic specular highlights on the latex while preserving natural body contours and depth. No harsh shadows. Shot with a fashion photography mindset, 50–85mm lens look, shallow but realistic depth of field, high optical sharpness without over-processing.Overall mood: Futuristic, high-fashion, bold and confident editorial aesthetic. Fully human, photorealistic appearance. Clean white background with no distractions, no artificial glow, no CGI look, no exaggerated perfection.
```

### 645. 原始高清打印肖像美学提示

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2008556991950524572)  **日期**: 2026-01-06  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，旨在模拟一张原始、高清的实体打印肖像照片，捕捉纸张和墨水的纹理。它非常注重真实感、特定的光照（刺眼的影棚闪光灯），并包含创意文本叠加，非常适合生成年鉴或复古杂志档案美学。

![原始高清打印肖像美学提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767804090631_kam4gr_G9_T8DWXkAAKLZF.jpg)

```
(3:4). A raw, high-definition photograph of a physical printed portrait taken with an iPhone 17 Pro. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus, capturing the physical textural reality of the paper grain and the ink-on-page in high resolution.

Subject & Identity Locking:

Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" skin physics as captured through high-end printed ink: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" glow muted by paper texture, and fine peach fuzz along the jawline.
Expression: A perfectly aligned, symmetrical head-and-shoulders yearbook-style pose. Neutral but confident expression with a magnetic, "main character" gaze looking directly into the lens.
Silhouette Calibration: Despite the formal school tailoring, amplify the dominant structural bust volume and the aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist. Ensure the fit of the uniform highlights a high-impact, fit physique.
Outfit & Material Realism:

Clothing: A dark navy blue structured blazer with white piping, a crisp white collared shirt, and a dark navy striped silk tie.
Tension: The blazer and shirt show extreme material tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic physical interaction and "tension lines" that highlight her fit, symmetrical upper silhouette and anatomical depth.
The Printed Aesthetic (Hardware Emulation):

Surface Texture: The image features an authentic semi-gloss paper sheen with thin, realistic diagonal lamination glares reflecting off the ink surface across the cheeks and chest.
Ink Physics: Visible ink-absorption softening at the edges (not digital blur), fine paper grain texture, and a gentle warm undertone typical of vintage magazine archives. It looks like a scanned physical object.
Lighting & Composition:

Lighting: Direct frontal harsh studio flash (ID style). Even exposure with bright, sharp eye catchlights and minimal shadows, creating a flat but clean professional portrait look.
Background (SHARP): A flat, textured cool-blue studio backdrop, showing realistic ink-on-paper depth.
Creative "Pinterest" Text Overlay:

Center-aligned below the portrait in an ink-printed bold serif font: "{argument name="main text" default="MOST LIKELY TO..."}"
Below in smaller, elegant italic subtext: "{argument name="subtext" default="“Be the reason you check your phone every 5 minutes.”"}"
The text features slightly imperfect ink bleeding and natural letter-spacing, mimicking an authentic high-end physical printing process.
Quality: Raw scan/photo-of-print aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible paper fiber and digital ISO noise in the shadows, 8k resolution, looks physically touchable.
```

    "head_position": "Turned back over the left shoulder to face the camera.",

}

### 648. 工作室肖像与数字 UI 叠加

**作者**: [Aircash X](https://x.com/AircashX/status/2008512147005866205)  **日期**: 2026-01-06  **语言**: en

> 一种独特的混合构图提示，结合了高度逼真、体积光照的影棚肖像与扁平、简洁的数字图形叠加，模拟了将主体分割的手机浏览器界面，非常适合电子商务或概念艺术。

![工作室肖像与数字 UI 叠加](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767804046786_16da9q_G9-jN_fXUAA3hzp.jpg)

```
Subject Reference: A full-body portrait of [INSERT SUBJECT NAME].
Scene Description: A full-body, centered portrait of the subject [INSERT POSE DESCRIPTION]. The subject has [INSERT EXPRESSION], staring directly at the camera. The immediate background behind the subject is a [INSERT BACKGROUND TYPE, e.g., seamless, pure high-key white studio backdrop]. Crucially, the subject is lit with volumetric studio lighting that creates deep definitions, realistic shadows, and a strong 3D quality on her body and the folds of the outfit, distinguishing her sharply from the flat background without casting shadows on the floor.

CRITICAL DETAIL (UI Layer): The entire photographic image is digitally layered beneath a simulated mobile phone browser interface overlay. Four distinct, clean, white, rectangular browser window elements are stacked vertically and angled slightly, segmenting the subject. Each window bar contains the sharp text '{argument name="link text" default="[INSERT LINK OR TEXT HERE]"}'. The area outside the active white browser windows is a solid, uniform, dark charcoal gray/black matte UI frame, with absolutely no light bleed or color gradients.

Style: Hybrid Composition: A highly realistic, three-dimensional studio photograph with deep color depth, overlaid with flat, clean digital graphics. Lighting Quality: Specific volumetric studio lighting focused ONLY on the subject. Soft, directional light from slightly off-center to sculpt the body and the rich texture of the fabric, creating depth. The background must remain completely flat.

Color Palette: High contrast. {argument name="outfit color" default="[INSERT OUTFIT COLOR]"} outfit against {argument name="background color" default="[INSERT BACKGROUND COLOR]"} backdrop, framed by the dark matte gray UI.

Texture and Mood: Realistic skin and rich fabric texture contrasting with the smooth digital elements of the UI. Intentional inclusion of subtle digital noise/grain to mimic a screen capture. Full body, centered portrait. Ensure the head and feet are fully within the frame before segmentation. Angle: Straight eye-level view, perpendicular to the subject.

Framing Elements: Four overlapping, white browser windows/tabs. The pose is elegant and fluid. The bottom interface elements (e.g., 'Private', 'Done') must be clean and visible. Focal Length: Standard portrait lens (approx. 50mm equivalent) for realistic proportions.

Camera Type: Simulated high-quality smartphone screen capture of a professional photo. Depth of Field: Shallow enough to focus sharply on the subject, allowing the background to be soft. Post Processing: Clean digital segmentation. Contrast adjusted to enhance depth.

Avoid Keywords: Floor shadows, flat lighting, 2D look, inconsistent UI color, bleeding colors, HDR, oversharpened. Location: Simulated E-commerce studio ([INSERT BACKGROUND TYPE]).
```

{
  "prompt_data": {

### 653. 高保真抓拍咖啡馆肖像，焦点锐利

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2008261631927599219)  **日期**: 2026-01-05  **语言**: en

> 一个高度受限的提示，用于生成一张在豪华咖啡馆拍摄的原始、高对比度抓拍照片，明确禁止人工散景，并要求从拍摄对象的皮肤到背景的意式浓缩咖啡机，所有一切都必须完美锐利且对焦清晰。它要求基于参考图像进行身份锁定，并侧重于在强烈定向阳光下的超现实材料物理和解剖细节。

![高保真抓拍咖啡馆肖像，焦点锐利](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767682178779_3j22nl_G97HTwpW0AAiNcd.jpg)

```
(Ratio 4:5). A raw, high-contrast candid photograph taken with an iPhone 17 Pro. The shot is captured by a third person at a medium distance in a luxury high-end café. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything is SHARP and in focus from the subject's skin to the espresso machine in the background. 
Subject & Identity Locking:
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the woman in Image 1 (Selfie).
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity skin physics: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" healthy hydration glow, and fine vellus hair catching the window light ONLY along the jawline.
•Expression: Looking directly at the photographer with a radiant, playful, and confident "Pinterest-style" smile. Her hair is voluminous and perfectly styled in chestnut waves.
•Silhouette Calibration: Amplify the dominant structural bust volume and the substantial, thick-toned leg presence. Focus on the aggressive hourglass structural tapering at the waist.
Outfit & Material Realism:
•Clothing: A skin-tight, {argument name="top color" default="Ivory"} Ribbed-Knit Long-Sleeved Top with a minimalist mock-neck, paired with a fitted dark-grey jersey micro-skirt.
•Tension: The ribbed fabric shows extreme elastic tension and textural expansion, highlighting the symmetrical anatomical depth of her fit silhouette. Realistic indentations are visible where the skirt's waistband meets her midriff.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: She is seated at a round, white marble bistro table. She is leaning forward on her elbows, which are resting on the marble surface, creating a dynamic posture that accentuates her S-curve.
•Matter Physics: Realistic skin-to-surface compression (thigh squish) is visible against the woven rattan chair.
Environment & Lighting:
•Lighting: Hard Directional Sunlight streaming through a large café window. The light creates high-contrast highlights on her skin and the marble table, casting sharp, defined shadows that define her form.
•Background (SHARP): A detailed luxury café interior. On the table, an aesthetic cappuccino with latte art and a half-eaten croissant on a ceramic plate are visible. In the background, wooden shelves with coffee beans, a chrome espresso machine, and other diners are all perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial blur.
Quality: Raw unedited "candid date" social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows, 8k resolution.
```

**作者**: [ΛRMIN | AI](https://x.com/Arminn_Ai/status/2008251441018810640)  **日期**: 2026-01-05  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多层提示，旨在生成一张高对比度、三维的影棚肖像，并叠加模拟的手机浏览器界面。它指定使用体积感影棚照明，使主体在平面背景上清晰突出，并有四个倾斜、重叠的白色浏览器窗口将图像分割，非常适合概念性电商或数字艺术。

![电商工作室肖像与 UI 叠加](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767682069943_afvdcj_G96-CQsWQAAn4_k.jpg)
![电商工作室肖像与 UI 叠加](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767682070043_ic8pmg_G96-Cg3WsAANGwl.jpg)

```
Subject Reference: A full-body portrait of [INSERT SUBJECT NAME].
Scene Description: A full-body, centered portrait of the subject [INSERT POSE DESCRIPTION]. The subject has [INSERT EXPRESSION], staring directly at the camera. The immediate background behind the subject is a [INSERT BACKGROUND TYPE, e.g., seamless, pure high-key white studio backdrop]. Crucially, the subject is lit with volumetric studio lighting that creates deep definitions, realistic shadows, and a strong 3D quality on her body and the folds of the outfit, distinguishing her sharply from the flat background without casting shadows on the floor.

CRITICAL DETAIL (UI Layer): The entire photographic image is digitally layered beneath a simulated mobile phone browser interface overlay. Four distinct, clean, white, rectangular browser window elements are stacked vertically and angled slightly, segmenting the subject. Each window bar contains the sharp text '[INSERT LINK OR TEXT HERE]'. The area outside the active white browser windows is a solid, uniform, dark charcoal gray/black matte UI frame, with absolutely no light bleed or color gradients.

Style: Hybrid Composition: A highly realistic, three-dimensional studio photograph with deep color depth, overlaid with flat, clean digital graphics. Lighting Quality: Specific volumetric studio lighting focused ONLY on the subject. Soft, directional light from slightly off-center to sculpt the body and the rich texture of the fabric, creating depth. The background must remain completely flat.

Color Palette: High contrast. {argument name="outfit color" default="[INSERT OUTFIT COLOR]"} outfit against {argument name="background color" default="[INSERT BACKGROUND COLOR]"} backdrop, framed by the dark matte gray UI.

Texture and Mood: Realistic skin and rich fabric texture contrasting with the smooth digital elements of the UI. Intentional inclusion of subtle digital noise/grain to mimic a screen capture. Full body, centered portrait. Ensure the head and feet are fully within the frame before segmentation. Angle: Straight eye-level view, perpendicular to the subject.

Framing Elements: Four overlapping, white browser windows/tabs. The pose is elegant and fluid. The bottom interface elements (e.g., 'Private', 'Done') must be clean and visible. Focal Length: Standard portrait lens (approx. 50mm equivalent) for realistic proportions.

Camera Type: Simulated high-quality smartphone screen capture of a professional photo. Depth of Field: Shallow enough to focus sharply on the subject, allowing the background to be soft. Post Processing: Clean digital segmentation. Contrast adjusted to enhance depth.

Avoid Keywords: Floor shadows, flat lighting, 2D look, inconsistent UI color, bleeding colors, HDR, oversharpened. Location: Simulated E-commerce studio ({argument name="background type" default="[INSERT BACKGROUND TYPE]"}).
```

### 657. 科学理论可视化生成器

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2008143189048262813)  **日期**: 2026-01-05  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多阶段提示，旨在将抽象的科学理论或公式（如黑洞）可视化为超现实的、不可能的建筑结构。它始于一个二维的符号媒介（例如，黑板上的粉笔字），然后将线条挤压成一个坚实的三维结构，其中有一个微小的科学家正在观察这个创造物。

![科学理论可视化生成器](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767682094478_zeo8ac_G9xfX3gWwAAZm_W.jpg)

```
<instructions> do this for {argument name="scientific concept" default="black holes"}
  Input Variable:   {argument name="theorem or formula" default="[Theorem / Formula]"}
Phase 1: Schematic Decomposition
Analyze the Notation: Identify the primary visual language of the scientist (Chalk on blackboard? Ink on parchment? Pencil on graph paper?).
Identify the "Structure": If this theory were a building, what would it look like?
Logic: Chaos Theory -> Fractal Spire. Thermodynamics -> Engine Block.
Phase 2: The Dimensional Transition
The Base: A flat surface covered in the [Notation Medium] (e.g., a slate blackboard covered in chalk equations).
The Extrusion: The chalk lines physically lift off the surface. They begin as white wireframes, then gain opacity, then gain texture.
The Climax: At the top of the image, the wireframes have fully solidified into a photorealistic, impossible structure representing the theory.
The Observer: A tiny, scale-model figure of the scientist stands on the flat "2D" section, looking up in awe at the massive "3D" structure they have summoned.
Output: High-Angle Isometric, "Architectural Visualization" style, stark contrast between sketchy lines and solid mass.
</instructions>
```

### 660. 奢华黑金韩式品牌形象拼贴

### 661. 牛排沙拉美食摄影和爆炸图提示

**作者**: [David Roberts](https://x.com/recap_david/status/2007987682681782457)  **日期**: 2026-01-05  **语言**: en

> 以下是两个用于食品广告的不同提示。第一个提示生成一张充满活力的牛排沙拉碗的俯视写实图像，光线自然。第二个提示使用相同的食材，创建了一个干净、垂直堆叠的分解视图，适合技术营销或营养教育，强调对称性和最少的注释。

```
Image Prompt 1:

[Overhead, top-down food photography of a vibrant, healthy steak salad bowl on a light beige stone surface. A shallow ceramic bowl filled with finely chopped curly kale as the base. Medium-rare sliced steak arranged neatly across the center, pink interior with seared edges and visible seasoning. On one side, fanned avocado slices with cracked black pepper. Bright red diced bell peppers, crumbled white cheese (feta-style), and finely chopped greens distributed evenly around the bowl. A lemon wedge tucked against the edge of the bowl. A blue-handled fork resting inside the bowl, angled slightly toward the center. Natural soft daylight from above, minimal shadows, clean editorial food styling. Sharp focus, high detail, realistic textures, fresh and appetizing. Modern cookbook / Instagram food photography aesthetic. No hands, no text, no branding, no clutter.]

Image Prompt 2:

[Using the original steak salad image as the sole ingredient reference, create a clean, vertically stacked exploded-view visualization of the same salad.
The ingredients are arranged in a strict bottom-to-top order, evenly spaced along a single centered vertical axis, with symmetry, alignment, and visual balance.
Bottom layer (base of the salad):
Finely chopped curly kale and mixed leafy greens, forming a soft, natural pile that anchors the composition.
Middle layers (core ingredients), stacked upward in this order:
– Diced red bell peppers and chopped greens, evenly distributed
– Crumbled white cheese (feta-style), centered and proportionally scaled
– Medium-rare sliced steak, laid flat and neatly fanned, pink interior visible
– Avocado slices, evenly cut and symmetrically fanned
Top layer (finishing elements):
Lemon wedge and light vinaigrette droplets, placed delicately at the top of the image to signal freshness and completion.
All ingredient layers are parallel, evenly spaced, and centered, with no rotation, tilt, or perspective distortion.
Ingredients appear to float gently while maintaining realistic proportions, textures, and color accuracy.
Add short, minimal annotations with thin leader lines.
Alternate caption placement from left to right as you move up the stack to create visual balance and avoid crowding.
Example annotations:
– Leafy greens: “Fresh base, rich in nutrients”
– Steak: “High-quality protein”
– Avocado: “Healthy fats, creamy balance”
– Red pepper: “Natural sweetness & antioxidants”
– Lemon & vinaigrette: “Light finish enhancing natural flavors”
Background is pure white or very light neutral, matte and distraction-free.
Lighting is soft, even, and shadow-minimized with a clean editorial food-photography feel.
Style is premium food photography combined with a technical exploded diagram, suitable for marketing, nutrition education, or app UI.
No hands, no bowl, no clutter, no branding, no dramatic shadows.]
```

**Related**: [[食品饮料]]、[[品牌广告]]、[[数据可视化]]

### 662. 科学理论可视化：从 2D 到 3D 挤出

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2007946643975307491)  **日期**: 2026-01-04  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多阶段提示，旨在通过从二维符号（黑板上的方程式）过渡到逼真的、不可能的三维建筑结构来可视化抽象的科学理论（如黑洞）。它指定了一个等距高角度视图，并包含一个观察该创造的微小科学家形象。

![科学理论可视化：从 2D 到 3D 挤出](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767606968932_lw6qfd_G9xesymWMAAHgiB.jpg)

```
<instructions> do this for {argument name="scientific concept" default="black holes"}
  Input Variable:   [{argument name="formula type" default="Theorem / Formula"}]
Phase 1: Schematic Decomposition
Analyze the Notation: Identify the primary visual language of the scientist (Chalk on blackboard? Ink on parchment? Pencil on graph paper?).
Identify the "Structure": If this theory were a building, what would it look like?
Logic: Chaos Theory -> Fractal Spire. Thermodynamics -> Engine Block.
Phase 2: The Dimensional Transition
The Base: A flat surface covered in the [Notation Medium] (e.g., a slate blackboard covered in chalk equations).
The Extrusion: The chalk lines physically lift off the surface. They begin as white wireframes, then gain opacity, then gain texture.
The Climax: At the top of the image, the wireframes have fully solidified into a photorealistic, impossible structure representing the theory.
The Observer: A tiny, scale-model figure of the scientist stands on the flat "2D" section, looking up in awe at the massive "3D" structure they have summoned.
Output: High-Angle Isometric, "Architectural Visualization" style, stark contrast between sketchy lines and solid mass.
</instructions>
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[综合3D]]

Use my reference image for face attachment

35mm equivalent focal length
Natural indoor lighting

Realistic skin tones
Documentary / candid aesthetic
Quality Cues
Ultra-realistic
High detail
Natural proportions
No studio lighting
Authentic classroom environment
Negative Prompt;

### 671. 2x2 奢华滑雪网红拼贴画（安娜·德·阿玛斯）

**作者**: [yusra.](https://x.com/chatgptpaglu/status/2007728411284820455)  **日期**: 2026-01-04  **语言**: en

> 一组包含四个相关提示的指令，旨在生成一张 2x2 的照片拼贴画以及三张“奢华滑雪网红”的独立生活方式照片（以安娜·德·阿玛斯 Ana De Armas 为面部参考）。风格模仿 iPhone 16 Pro 拍摄的严酷高海拔冬季阳光，强调滑雪小屋阳台上的锐利阴影和高对比度。

![2x2 奢华滑雪网红拼贴画（安娜·德·阿玛斯）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767607033282_6o6nsh_G9ziVt8XYAAVjRY.jpg)

Style: iPhone 16 Pro photo, harsh bright high-altitude winter sun, sharp shadows, strong contrast, slight lens flare, blown snow highlights. ### 673. 身着巴伐利亚传统服饰（Dirndl）的女性超写实影棚照片

**作者**: [Amanpreet Singh](https://x.com/amanxdesign/status/2007685925984436639)  **日期**: 2026-01-04  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的图像生成提示，旨在创建一张超逼真的、专业的影棚照片，照片中一位女士穿着传统的巴伐利亚少女裙 (dirndl)。该提示详细说明了织物纹理、自然光照和纯色影棚背景，并明确使用负面提示来避免常见的 AI 伪影，以保持真实的人类外观。

![身着巴伐利亚传统服饰（Dirndl）的女性超写实影棚照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767606985790_m5w74d_G9rYmfebYAAPJjP.jpg)
![身着巴伐利亚传统服饰（Dirndl）的女性超写实影棚照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767606986650_wferxb_G9rYmAxaEAAEvHh.png)

```
{
  "prompt": "high-resolution professional studio photo of a natural-looking woman wearing a traditional Bavarian dirndl dress matching the reference image — deep navy bodice with silver embroidery, light grey-blue apron with floral lace trim, and white puff-sleeve blouse. the model should appear authentic, not AI-generated, with natural skin texture, light makeup, and soft blonde hair styled loosely. she should be standing naturally, with gentle daylight-like lighting from one side to create soft realistic shadows and bring out the satin and lace texture of the fabric. background should be plain, softly lit in neutral tone (light beige or pastel grey), smooth and consistent like a studio wall. ensure the focus is sharp on the dirndl fabric details, bow, and lace edges, while keeping a realistic human tone and genuine expression.",
  "negative_prompt": "no artificial skin smoothing, no overexposure, no harsh contrast, no fake reflections, no AI artifacts, no floating objects, no background gradients, no flat or plastic texture, no unrealistic symmetry.",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "style": "hyper-realistic studio photography",
  "quality": "ultra",
  "lighting": "soft daylight studio",
  "image_config": {
    "output_format": "png",
    "resolution": "4k",
    "color_space": "sRGB"
  }
}
```

### 674. Kine-Style 多帧日式夜间祭典拼贴画

**作者**: [Anissa](https://x.com/SimplyAnnisa/status/2007662968780271664)  **日期**: 2026-01-04  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的提示，用于编辑或生成一张模拟日本夜市中主体的高保真多帧拼贴画（2x2 网格）图像。它指定了五种不同的姿势、Kine 风格美学、胶片模拟（Portra 400），以及棱镜镜头光晕、霓虹灯和灯笼造成的明暗对比等复杂的照明细节。

![Kine-Style 多帧日式夜间祭典拼贴画](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767607005898_9pwjfh_G9ym1DkbYAAuz0s.jpg)

```
Edit image :: A stunning, high-fidelity image of five, seamless blend rectangle frames of varying sizes, capturing this subject in a Japanese night festival. The composition is masterfully balanced with a "Kine-style" or contemporary Japanese photography aesthetic, focusing on poetic lighting and negative space.
Frames and Poses:
 * Back-view Silhoutte: Arms raised in a V-sign, framed against a glowing Ferris wheel with golden light leaks.
 * Direct Gaze: Seated on industrial diamond-plate steps, bathed in soft, diffused blue-hour light.
 * Cinematic Profile: Pensive on concrete stairs with dramatic shadows and sharp highlights from a nearby neon sign.
 * Ethereal Lean: Against a white mesh fence, looking upward as warm bokeh from paper lanterns melts into the background.
 * Relaxed Recline: Lying back on wooden stairs, hands behind head, with prismatic lights leak from the upper edge frame.
Styling & Lighting:
She wears a white jersey tee under blue denim overal. The lighting is incredibly rich, featuring complex light play: prismatic lens flares, soft halation around crimson lanterns, and a moody chiaroscuro that highlights textures of concrete and steel.
Technical Aesthetic:
Shot on 35mm film ({argument name="film stock" default="Portra 400"} feel), the color grading is a sophisticated blend of desaturated teals and warm, nostalgic yellows. The images feature a fine, organic film grain, a gentle soft-focus bloom, and a deep, atmospheric "art house" richness. The atmosphere is electric yet intimate, blending the lively festival energy with quiet, soulful introspection.
```

### 675. 新年照相亭条图提示词，带面部一致性锁定（Firefly）

**作者**: [Willy](https://x.com/jw660227/status/2007613529613009177)  **日期**: 2026-01-04  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的、用于 Adobe Firefly 的高度具体的提示词，旨在生成一张超逼真的大头贴打印条图像。该提示词严格要求所有四个相框中的面部表情 100% 一致，并基于上传的参考图像，描绘在豪华酒店宴会厅中庆祝新年时的迷人瞬间。

![新年照相亭条图提示词，带面部一致性锁定（Firefly）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767607068542_btazfe_G9x51pBbMAApARE.jpg)

```
Prompt Studio: Nano Banana Pro Photo-Booth Print Strip, in Firefly

Ultra-photorealistic single-frame photograph.
The person in ALL four frames must be 100% identical to the uploaded reference image. Preserve exact facial features: same face shape, same eyes, same nose structure, same lips, same skin texture. Zero deviation from reference. Do not generate a different person.
A single oversized photo-booth print strip dominates the composition, centered and filling 75-85% of the frame, held naturally by one hand with fingers partially visible for scale. The hand is adorned with delicate gold rings.
The strip contains exactly 4 frames arranged vertically (1 column × 4 rows). Each frame shows the SAME person from the reference image in glamorous New Year celebration moments:
- Frame 1: wearing a tiara, sultry gaze
- Frame 2: holding a sparkler, smiling seductively
- Frame 3: holding a coupe glass of champagne, laughing, dewy makeup
- Frame 4: blowing a kiss, enchanting expression
Background: luxury hotel ballroom, distant and softly blurred with bokeh lights and crystal chandeliers.
White border text at bottom reads exactly: "{argument name="New Year Text" default="Happy New Year 2026"}"
Photography style: Shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm lens, f/1.2, dramatic rim lighting, sharp focus on the print strip, shallow depth of field.
STRICT RULES:
- No other people visible
- No logos, watermarks, or UI elements
- No numbers outside the print strip
- Person appears ONLY inside the printed photos
Face Consistency Lock: The facial structure, eye spacing, nose bridge, jawline, and all identifying features must match the reference with 100% accuracy across all 4 frames. @AdobeFirefly. A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner
```

### 676. 科学发现可视化：动力雕塑实验室笔记本

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2007604137190666542)  **日期**: 2026-01-04  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多阶段提示，旨在生成一个 2x2 的“工作实验室笔记本装置”网格，用于可视化科学发现（例如，相对论）。它要求识别发现的仪器和方法，然后渲染一个蒸汽朋克美学风格的动力雕塑，从一本打开的、沾有咖啡渍的实验笔记本中升起，并配有一个微型科学家小雕像以及代表失败和突破的元素。

![科学发现可视化：动力雕塑实验室笔记本](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767606983137_hmsoic_G9xboDWWIAAqLYU.jpg)

```
<instructions> 
Role:   Science Historian & Kinetic Sculpture Engineer

  Input:   [{argument name="scientific discovery" default="Scientific Discovery, e.g., DNA Structure, Theory of Relativity"}]

  Phase 1: Analysis  
1. Identify the "eureka moment" and the failed attempts before it
2. Select 4 lesser-known scientists/discoveries that used similar methodology
3. Extract the physical apparatus used in the discovery (microscope, prism, blackboard equation)

  Phase 2: Execution  
  Goal:   2x2 Grid of "Working Lab Notebook Contraptions"

  Rules per Panel:  
-   The Base:   An open, coffee-stained lab notebook with handwritten equations/sketches
-   The Machine:   A functional brass and glass apparatus rises FROM the notebook pages (steampunk aesthetic)
-   The Process:   The machine actively demonstrates the discovery (gears turning, liquid flowing, light refracting)
-   The Scientist:   Tiny figurine in period lab coat taking notes with a fountain pen
-   The Failure:   Crossed-out attempts and crumpled paper nearby
-   The Eureka:   A single glowing element (LED) representing the breakthrough moment
-   The Label:   Fountain pen handwriting: "Scientist Name | Discovery | Year | Lab Location"
-   The Props:   Era-accurate items (telegram, slide rule, Bunsen burner, petri dishes)

  Output:   2x2 Grid, Industrial Scientific Photography, dramatic side lighting
</instructions>
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[蒸汽朋克机械]]、[[微缩模型与立体模型]]

### 684. Photorealistic Surreal Fashion Concept Portrait with Identity Lock

**作者**: [Özge](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2007146328736862426)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> An extremely detailed, structured prompt for Nano Banana Pro focused on replicating a specific surreal fashion concept from a reference image. The core concept is an illusion where an open magazine held in front of the face perfectly replaces the subject's face with the printed model's face, including a seamless 'hair extension' column. It mandates strict identity lock and ultra-photoreal editorial style.

![Photorealistic Surreal Fashion Concept Portrait with Identity Lock](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508465813_ew0ftn_G9rQw0SX0AEHqSI.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photorealistic_surreal_fashion_concept_portrait",
      "version": "v3.2_MAGAZINE_FLIP_HAIR_ILLUSION_EDITORIAL_IDENTITY_LOCK",
      "priority": "highest"
    },
    "references": {
      "reference_image_1": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)",
        "purpose": "COMPOSITION_AND_PROP_CONCEPT_LOCK + IDENTITY_LOCK",
        "strict_identity_lock": true,
        "face_match_strength": "max",
        "no_identity_drift": true,
        "preserve_unique_features": true,
        "preserve_skin_tone": true,
        "preserve_skin_texture": true
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_high_fashion_editorial",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "none_or_minimal",
      "color_grade": "clean_editorial_neutral_luxury"
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "ULTRA-PHOTOREAL HIGH-FASHION CONCEPT PORTRAIT — MUST MATCH THE UPLOADED REFERENCE IMAGE 100%.\n\nRecreate the exact same concept, pose, framing, and composition as the reference: a person stands indoors holding an open fashion magazine vertically in front of their face. The alignment is perfect so the printed model’s face in the magazine becomes the person’s face (illusion must be seamless). The printed hair continues upward into the top page as a long, clean, straight vertical hair strip, forming a surreal 'hair extension' column.\n\nIDENTITY REQUIREMENTS:\n- The person must be an exact, perfect match to the uploaded reference (no changes to facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, brows, proportions, ethnicity, age, skin tone).\n- Preserve all unique facial details and natural skin texture (pores, tiny imperfections). No beautification that changes identity.\n\nKEY ILLUSION DETAILS (MATCH REFERENCE):\n- Magazine open and held high with one hand above the head, pages extended vertically.\n- Printed beauty portrait shows pastel/lilac eye makeup and a neutral expression.\n- Hair strip: long vertical section with subtle gradient (darker near scalp, lighter at tips), clean and graphic.\n- Clothing: oversized textured knit sweater in warm autumn tones (rust/orange with subtle pattern), long cozy sleeves.\n- Paper realism: visible thickness, page curl, sharp edges, realistic print texture.\n\nENVIRONMENT (MATCH REFERENCE):\nMinimal indoor background with soft daylight, neutral walls, subtle architectural/window lines. Clean, uncluttered.\n\nLIGHTING & REALISM:\nSoft natural daylight, realistic shadows from magazine onto sweater and background. Knit fabric and paper texture must be crisp. Must look like a real photograph, not CGI. Editorial, clever, art-school fashion concept."
    },
    "hard_constraints": [
      "Single person only (exact identity match to reference).",
      "Exact same"
    ]
  }
```

### 685. Complex Image Generation Test Prompt for Model Coherence

**作者**: [Sr Carlos ²³²U](https://x.com/CJavierSaldana/status/2007122625068183883)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> This is a highly detailed, complex image generation prompt used to test the coherence, accuracy, and photorealism capabilities of models like Nano Banana Pro. It demands the generator accurately render numerous specific elements, precise counts (like 3 missing puzzle pieces, 23 rocks, 5 diagram panels), physics (liquid levels, centrifugal force), specific text/labels (DVORAK keyboard, presidential seal), and complex scene arrangements (people forming letters, Olympic rings, chess checkmate).

![Complex Image Generation Test Prompt for Model Coherence](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508398323_mca2em_G9q6i4HWgAAWvlf.jpg)
![Complex Image Generation Test Prompt for Model Coherence](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508398359_v6mfmc_G9q6i4HXwAAZ8PY.jpg)
![Complex Image Generation Test Prompt for Model Coherence](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508398570_0orbx5_G9q6neaW4AAz0F_.jpg)

```
A large, highly detailed, photorealistic image of a spacious, crowded house party room with dozens of diverse people mingling naturally. In the foreground, a table holds: a nearly finished jigsaw puzzle of a medieval castle with exactly three missing pieces placed next to it (holes clearly visible in the puzzle), exactly 23 randomly arranged rocks scattered nearby, a very wide glass and a very thin tall glass each filled with exactly the same volume of red wine (correct liquid levels accounting for glass shapes), a split before-and-after view of a Lego sunflower (left half showing all individual disassembled pieces, right half fully assembled with matching parts), an accurate standard DVORAK keyboard but with the V and K keys precisely swapped, and a 5-panel instructional diagram on how to make toast (exactly 5 panels, consistent toaster). On a central chess table, a top-down view of a full chessboard in a legal midgame position where a white bishop is directly checking the black king (all pieces positioned validly). In the background: a group of about a dozen people lying on the floor forming the letters 'OPEC' clearly with their bodies, five people standing on the ground each holding one correctly colored and interlocked hula hoop to precisely form the Olympic rings symbol, a man sitting on a woman's shoulders while both expertly spin glowing sock poi in circular motion (poi extended straight by centrifugal force), a detailed Where's Wally-style crowded scene on one wall with Wally hidden, a Secret Service agent mid-backflip off a presidential podium (with accurate presidential seal and text), and a man performing poi spins. Dramatic natural lighting, sharp focus everywhere, no artifacts, perfect anatomy and physics, all text and labels fully legible and accurate, highly coherent composition.
```

**作者**: [Chandan Singh](https://x.com/cbsingh_oo3/status/2007103500141068722)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> A highly structured prompt for generating an ultra-photorealistic sports action scene of a female volleyball athlete captured at the peak of an airborne jump in an indoor arena. It requires strict identity lock from a reference image and specifies detailed camera settings (85mm telephoto, fast shutter speed) and visual details (muscle tension, fabric stretch) for a championship-level feel.

![Ultra-Photoreal Volleyball Action Shot](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508452713_0qtssx_G9qp_uwb0AE25ai.jpg)
![Ultra-Photoreal Volleyball Action Shot](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508453046_31sjc5_G9qp_rBawAEdrpY.jpg)

```
{
  "request_metadata": {
    "tool": "Nano Banana Pro",
    "task_type": "ultra_photoreal_sports_action_scene",
    "quality_preset": "ultra",
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "references": {
    "main_reference_image": {
      "slot": 1,
      "purpose": "MAIN_SUBJECT_IDENTITY_AND_POSE_LOCK",
      "strict_identity_lock": true
    }
  },
  "hard_constraints": [
    "Single female athlete as the main subject.",
    "Indoor professional volleyball arena.",
    "Peak jump moment captured mid-air.",
    "No added text, no logos, no watermarks.",
    "Photorealistic sports photography only."
  ],
  "camera": {
    "camera_style": "professional sports photography",
    "lens": "85mm telephoto",
    "shutter_speed": "1/2000",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "iso": "800",
    "focus": "tack sharp on athlete, background softly blurred"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key_light": "bright indoor stadium lights",
    "fill_light": "even court illumination",
    "rim_light": "subtle edge highlights on arms and legs",
    "shadow_style": "natural high-contrast sports lighting"
  },
  "prompt": {
    "scene_summary": "A high-intensity women's volleyball match captured at the exact peak of an airborne play.",
    "main_subject": {
      "pose": "fully airborne with one arm extended upward toward the ball, opposite arm balanced for control",
      "expression": "focused, confident, competitive",
      "hair": "high ponytail flowing naturally due to motion",
      "outfit": "solid {argument name="jersey color" default="red"} sleeveless volleyball jersey and shorts, white knee pads, white athletic shoes",
      "body_language": "explosive jump, strong core engagement, extended legs"
    },
    "ball_interaction": {
      "object": "professional volleyball",
      "position": "floating above the athlete at the moment before contact",
      "motion": "perfectly frozen mid-air"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "indoor volleyball arena",
      "background": "crowded spectator stands with shallow depth of field",
      "court": "professional volleyball court with clean lines and referee stand visible",
      "atmosphere": "high-energy championship-level match"
    },
    "visual_style": {
      "realism": "ultra photorealistic",
      "detail_level": "visible muscle tension, fabric stretch, subtle sweat highlights",
      "color_grading": "natural broadcast sports tones with crisp contrast"
    },
    "composition": {
      "framing": "vertical action frame",
      "timing": "peak jump apex",
      "motion_effect": "sharp subject, minimal motion blur only in background crowd"
    }
  },
  "negative_prompt": [
    "cartoon",
    "anime",
    "cgi",
    "illustration",
    "plastic skin",
    "over-smoothing",
    "extra limbs",
    "distorted anatomy",
    "text overlays",
    "logos",
    "watermarks",
    "blurred subject"
  ]
}
```

### 687. Ancient Civilizations Innovation Bridge Image Generation Prompt

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2007073642111189343)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> An elaborate image generation prompt designed to visualize how a specific invention or technology, designated as Input A, appeared independently or was transmitted across various ancient civilizations (Egyptian, Chinese, Islamic, Mayan, Greek, etc.). The output is a mythological epic photograph of a miniature, ornate bridge structure connecting 3-5 civilization 'islands' on an aged parchment map.

![Ancient Civilizations Innovation Bridge Image Generation Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508521215_1vqrc2_G9TRWe8WgAAS45k.jpg)

```
Input A is an invention or technology
Analyze: how this innovation appeared independently or was transmitted across ancient civilizations (Egyptian, Chinese, Islamic, Mayan, Greek, etc.).
Goal: Miniature bridge structure connecting 3-5 civilization "islands."
Rules:
* Base: ancient world map (aged parchment) as foundation
* Bridge structure: ornate multi-level walkway with different architectural styles for each section (columns, arches, pagoda elements)
* Each "island" platform: distinct civilization's version of {argument name="invention" default="Input A invention"} (Chinese compass vs Viking sunstone, Mayan zero vs Indian zero, etc.)
* Civilization figurines: tiny scholars/inventors from each culture examining each other's versions
* Include: trade route markers, tiny ships/caravans between islands, scrolls being passed
* Center of bridge: the "universal truth" they all discovered (mathematical formula, physical principle) etched in neutral symbol
* Materials: stone textures, gold leaf accents, cultural pattern details
* Lighting: mystical golden hour with light ray connecting all islands
Output: 1 x image, 16:9 landscape for maximum bridge span visibility, mythological epic photography
```

**Related**: [[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[地图]]、[[综合设计]]

### 690. Infographic Prompt for Sweet and Sour Pork Recipe

**作者**: [𝑳𝒊𝒃𝒆𝒓𝒕𝒆](https://x.com/Liberte176/status/2006963244678746247)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: zh

> A highly detailed, multi-section prompt designed to generate a professional, 8K ultra-HD photographic infographic for a home-style Sweet and Sour Pork (糖醋里脊) recipe. The prompt specifies the overall style, layout (16:9), title area, ingredient list (flat lay style), 6-8 detailed cooking steps with specific visual cues (e.g., meat texture, boiling water, caramel color), a final finished dish display, and comprehensive photography guidelines including lighting, depth of field, and color temperature.

![Infographic Prompt for Sweet and Sour Pork Recipe](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508481113_1ftb4b_G9oqQB8aMAAagJZ.jpg)

```
创建一张【{argument name="菜名" default="糖醋里脊"}】的家常菜烹饪步骤信息图。

【整体风格】
- 风格：8K超高清真实摄影风格，美食杂志级专业质感
- 画质：8K分辨率，锐利细节，专业美食摄影光线
- 背景：真实厨房场景/大理石台面/木质砧板，浅景深虚化
- 配色：自然真实色彩，食材本色，暖色调打光
- 布局：横向16:9

【顶部标题区】
- 菜名大标题（优雅中文字体）
- 副标题：烹饪时间 / 难度等级 / 份量
- 背景可用成品菜的虚化特写

【左侧或顶部 - 食材清单区】
- 标题："食材准备"
- 所有食材真实摆拍，俯视角度整齐排列
- 每种食材标注名称和用量
- 风格：ins风食材flat lay摄影

【主体 - 烹饪步骤区】
- 6-8个步骤，网格或时间轴排列
- 每个步骤包含：
  * 步骤编号（简洁数字标识）
  * 真实烹饪过程特写照片：
    - 切肉：刀工细节、肉的纹理
    - 焯水：沸腾的水、浮沫
    - 炒糖色：焦糖色泽、油光
    - 翻炒：锅中动态、火焰
    - 炖煮：汤汁冒泡、蒸汽升腾
    - 收汁：浓稠酱汁、光泽肉块
  * 简短说明文字（1-2句）
  * 火力/时间标注

【底部 - 成品展示区】
- 8K高清成品照片
- 专业摆盘，精美餐具
- 45度角或俯视角拍摄
- 可见食物质感：酱汁光泽、肉质纤维、热气蒸腾
- 背景：餐桌场景、筷子、小碗配菜点缀

【摄影规范】
- 光线：侧逆光/自然窗光，营造食欲感
- 景深：主体清晰，背景自然虚化
- 质感：可见食材纹理、油脂光泽、汤汁反光
- 蒸汽：热菜步骤可见真实热气
- 色温：暖色调（5500-6000K），增强食欲

【辅助元素】
- 小贴士标注：关键技巧（如"冷水下锅去腥"、"小火慢炖40分钟"）
- 火力图标：🔥 标注每步火力大小
- 计时标注：关键步骤时长
- 所有食材用量、步骤细节、时间火候根据菜品自动生成准确信息
```

### 691. Photorealistic Influencer Selfie Prompt

**作者**: [Iris](https://x.com/xIrissy/status/2006946050951754147)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> A highly detailed, structured prompt designed for generating a photorealistic image of a young woman taking an influencer-style selfie. The prompt specifies subject details (hair, eyes, skin, expression, pose), attire, accessories, makeup style (clean girl aesthetic), environment (vintage wallpaper, warm lighting), and technical specifications for 4K quality and sharp focus.

![Photorealistic Influencer Selfie Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508404899_ooow4l_G9nYAUjaoAAPZt6.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "Young woman with a fit, slender build",
    "hair": "Dark brown to black hair, styled in a sleek, tight ponytail with a middle part",
    "eyes": "Light green or hazel, striking and clear",
    "skin": "Light complexion with a radiant, dewy finish",
    "expression": "Neutral to slight pout, soft and alluring gaze looking directly at the camera",
    "pose": "Selfie angle, one arm extended holding the camera, the other arm raised with hand touching the back of the head/neck area"
  },
  "attire": {
    "clothing": "{argument name="clothing" default="White, tight-fitting spaghetti strap tank top"}",
    "style": "Casual, loungewear, clean aesthetic"
  },
  "accessories": {
    "neck": "Gold chain necklace with a medium-sized heart pendant",
    "ears": "Multiple ear piercings; small gold hoops and pink/purple huggie hoop earrings",
    "wrists": "Stacked bracelets on the left wrist including a gold screw-motif bangle (Cartier style), a diamond tennis bracelet, and delicate gold chains",
    "fingers": "Multiple gold rings stacked on the left hand"
  },
  "makeup": {
    "style": "Natural glam / clean girl aesthetic",
    "details": "Defined eyebrows, highlighter on cheekbones and tip of the nose, glossy nude-pink lips, subtle mascara"
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "Indoor hallway or bedroom",
    "background": "{argument name="background" default="Wallpaper featuring a repeating pattern of vintage bicycles, white door frame, cream-colored walls, glimpse of wooden flooring"}",
    "lighting": "Soft, warm artificial indoor lighting, creating a golden hour glow effect on the skin"
  },
  "technical_specs": {
    "resolution": "4K Ultra HD",
    "quality": "Photorealistic, highly detailed textures, sharp focus",
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level selfie perspective",
    "style": "Influencer selfie, candid, high-end lifestyle photography"
  }
}
```

### 692. Ultra-photorealistic candid lifestyle photo prompt for Gemini Nano Banana Pro

**作者**: [cinema 🎥](https://x.com/FilmHub00/status/2006944840869892331)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> A detailed, structured prompt designed for an image generation model (likely Gemini Nano Banana Pro, based on the context) to create an ultra-photorealistic scene. The prompt specifies metadata, the main subject (a young woman in a bikini), a secondary subject (a dog), the environment (a luxury cabana), lighting conditions, and specific camera technical details to achieve a 2000s digital camera aesthetic.

![Ultra-photorealistic candid lifestyle photo prompt for Gemini Nano Banana Pro](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508400764_trn4rd_G9oZsQ7aMAI2Rg1.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "type": "ultra_photorealistic_scene",
    "style": "candid_lifestyle_photography",
    "quality": "8k, raw photo, highly detailed textures"
  },
  "subject_main": {
    "appearance": "Young woman with a fit, tanned physique and long wavy blonde hair cascading over shoulders.",
    "facial_expression": "Face partially obscured by a bucket hat pulled low, visible nose and neutral/pouty lips, mysterious vibe.",
    "outfit": {
      "headwear": "Beige canvas bucket hat.",
      "swimwear": "{argument name="swimwear type" default="Black two-piece bikini featuring a structured underwire top and high-cut, cheeky bottoms."}",
      "accessories": "Pink ruffled scrunchie on the left wrist."
    },
    "pose_details": {
      "posture": "Kneeling upright on shins on a soft surface, body angled 45 degrees towards the camera.",
      "torso": "Back slightly arched, chest pushed forward, creating a confident posture.",
      "arms_and_hands": "Left arm is bent at the elbow, with the hand actively grasping or adjusting the strap of the bikini bottom at the hip. The right arm is obscured or resting behind.",
      "interaction": "Posing directly behind a dog in the foreground, creating a layered composition."
    }
  },
  "subject_secondary": {
    "type": "Dog (Pitbull/Staffy mix)",
    "appearance": "White coat with large tan patches on the face/ears and back.",
    "accessories": "Thick pink/rose-gold leather collar with a metal tag.",
    "pose": "Lying down in the immediate foreground, facing profile-left, mouth slightly open, relaxed demeanor."
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Outdoor luxury cabana or daybed.",
    "background": "Large, curved cream-colored sunshade canopy with ribbed fabric texture.",
    "props": "Multiple large, plain white square pillows arranged against the back of the cabana.",
    "foreground_surface": "Blue and white geometric/diamond patterned blanket or towel covering the mattress."
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "Bright, harsh natural sunlight (mid-day).",
    "characteristics": "High contrast, hard shadows casting under the hat brim and canopy ribs.",
    "mood": "Summery, warm, relaxed, vintage vacation vibe."
  },
  "camera_technical": {
    "aesthetic": "2000s digital camera aesthetic or 35mm film emulation.",
    "perspective": "Eye-level to slightly low angle, framing the subjects centrally.",
    "focal_length": "{argument name="focal length" default="35mm"} lens for a natural but slightly wide field of view.",
    "film_attributes": "Slight overexposure in highlights, subtle film grain, nostalgic color grading."
  }
}
```

### 693. Nano Banana Prompt: Cozy Storybook Illustration Style

**作者**: [Adam也叫吉米](https://x.com/Adam38363368936/status/2006911116337885255)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> This is a detailed JSON-formatted prompt designed for image generation, specifically to create illustrations in a 'Cozy Storybook Illustration' style, mimicking the look of colored pencils and subtle watercolor washes. It includes two specific prompt variations, one focusing on texture and stroke, and another on mixed media watercolor effects. This prompt is intended for style transfer based on an uploaded image.

![Nano Banana Prompt: Cozy Storybook Illustration Style](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508483760_7ft64i_G9n66mFaMAA1VyF.jpg)
![Nano Banana Prompt: Cozy Storybook Illustration Style](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508483761_ve12nq_G9n67P8aMAIxapE.jpg)

```
{
  "design_system": {
    "metadata": {
      "style_name": "Cozy Storybook Illustration",
      "target_audience": "Children / Family",
      "reference_source": "Uploaded Image",
      "version": "3.0"
    },
    "visual_parameters": {
      "medium": {
        "primary": "Colored Pencil",
        "secondary": "Watercolor Wash (Variation only)",
        "application": "Hand-drawn",
        "texture": {
          "type": "Visible pencil strokes",
          "quality": "Slightly rough outlines",
          "finish": "Non-realistic / No photo texture"
        }
      },
      "line_work": {
        "style": "Clean line art",
        "weight": "Slightly rough/organic",
        "clarity": "High"
      },
      "color_theory": {
        "base_tone": "Warm and friendly",
        "palette_type": "Vibrant Pastel",
        "adjustments": {
          "brightness": "Increased / High-key",
          "saturation": "Enhanced but natural",
          "contrast": "Soft"
        }
      },
      "lighting_and_shading": {
        "shadows": "Minimal",
        "highlights": "Soft",
        "rendering": "Flat yet detailed",
        "gradients": "Subtle watercolor layers (Variation only)"
      }
    },
    "subject_geometry": {
      "anatomy": {
        "proportions": "Semi-cartoon realistic",
        "scale": "Storybook style"
      },
      "facial_features": {
        "eyes": "Dot style",
        "mouth": "Small smile",
        "complexity": "Simple / Minimalist"
      }
    },
    "atmosphere": {
      "mood": [
        "Cozy",
        "Cheerful",
        "Warm",
        "Friendly"
      ],
      "genre_tags": [
        "Children's Book",
        "Lifestyle Sketch",
        "Storybook Illustration"
      ]
    }
  },
  "generation_configs": {
    "negative_prompt_tokens": [
      "realism",
      "photorealistic",
      "photo texture",
      "dark colors",
      "complex shading",
      "3d render"
    ],
    "prompt_variations": [
      {
        "id": "PROMPT_001",
        "variant_name": "Textured Colored Pencil",
        "focus": "Texture and Stroke",
        "full_text": "Illustration style: hand-drawn colored pencil illustration, clean line art with slightly rough pencil outlines, soft pastel coloring with increased brightness, lighter and more vivid color tones, enhanced saturation while staying natural, visible pencil strokes and gentle shading texture, warm and friendly tone, semi-cartoon realistic proportions, simple facial features with dot eyes and small smiles, flat yet detailed coloring, minimal shadows, soft highlights, storybook illustration feel, cozy and cheerful atmosphere, vibrant yet soft color palette, children-book / lifestyle sketch style, high clarity, no realism, no photo texture"
      },
      {
        "id": "PROMPT_002",
        "variant_name": "Mixed Media Watercolor",
        "focus": "Wash and Gradient",
        "full_text": "{argument name="full text 2" default="Illustration style: hand-drawn colored pencil illustration, clean line art with slightly rough pencil outlines, soft pastel coloring with increased brightness, lighter and more vivid color tones, enhanced saturation while staying natural, visible pencil strokes and gentle shading texture, warm and friendly tone, semi-cartoon realistic proportions, simple facial features with dot eyes and small smiles, flat yet detailed coloring, minimal shadows, soft highlights, storybook illustration feel, cozy and cheerful atmosphere, vibrant yet soft color palette, children-book / lifestyle sketch style, high clarity, no realism, no photo texture"}"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```
