### 694. Ultra-Photorealistic Fashion Editorial Prompt for Nano Banana Pro

**作者**: [Bananai](https://x.com/aibananai/status/2006882308209447065)  **日期**: 2026-01-02  **语言**: en

> This is a detailed, high-end fashion editorial prompt designed for the Nano Banana Pro model, focusing on ultra-photorealistic rendering. It specifies a complex scene featuring a slim, curvy female subject in a monochromatic brown suit, seated dynamically in a vintage black leather armchair against a sterile white cyclorama. The prompt includes extensive details on camera gear (Sony A7R V, 50mm f/1.8 GM), lighting (softbox and reflector fill), pose, expression, clothing textures (rough wool, patent leather), and mandates highly realistic skin texture with visible pores, strictly avoiding airbrushing.

![Ultra-Photorealistic Fashion Editorial Prompt for Nano Banana Pro](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508401022_0irpjg_G9ng0cVXwAAmvmX.jpg)
![Ultra-Photorealistic Fashion Editorial Prompt for Nano Banana Pro](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508400968_d91yox_G9ng0ccXcAA3gob.jpg)

```
A high-end fashion editorial photograph captured in an ultra-photorealistic style using a Sony A7R V with a 50mm f/1.8 GM lens, characterized by sharp focus and tactile textures. The scene is set in a minimalist photo studio featuring a sterile, pure white cyclorama infinity wall background with no distractions. The subject is a slim but curvy female in her mid-20s with mixed heritage and light olive skin, slouching comfortably in a vintage, oversized deep black leather armchair that features a chunky club style, worn leather creases, and a natural oily sheen. Her pose is dynamic and flexible: her torso is reclined deep into the chair and angled slightly right, her left leg is bent at the knee resting casually on the seat, while her right leg is extended vertically straight up in the air at 90 degrees with pointed toes. Her right hand rests relaxed on her stomach, while her left hand is raised to her mouth where she is provocatively biting the side of her thumb with her mouth slightly open. She displays a seductive, bored-chic expression with intense direct eye contact. She wears retro-chic square glasses with dark tortoiseshell top rims and gold wire bottoms showing slight studio light reflections. Her hair is long, sleek, straight brunette with honey balayage highlights, tucked behind her ears with realistic silky strands. Her outfit is a monochromatic textural brown suit featuring an oversized, structured chocolate brown blazer made of a rough wool weave, worn loose and unbuttoned over a crisp pale icy blue button-up shirt that is unbuttoned low revealing her décolletage with cuffs peeking out. She wears matching skin-tight chocolate brown wool tights that resemble thick textured hosiery, paired with deep burgundy patent leather stiletto pumps with a very high heel and a glossy finish. The lighting is professional studio quality with a large high front-right softbox and white reflector fill, creating diffused, flattering illumination that highlights the coarse fuzz of the wool fabric and the smooth sheen of the leather chair, casting soft natural shadows underneath. The skin texture is highly realistic with visible natural pores and a slight shine on the forehead, strictly avoiding any airbrushed or plastic appearance.
```

### 695. Photorealistic Polaroid Couple Selfie with Christmas Bokeh

**作者**: [Melis✨](https://x.com/miilesus/status/2006835989030056334)  **日期**: 2026-01-01  **语言**: en

> A highly detailed, photorealistic text-to-image prompt designed for the NanoBanana Pro tool, focusing on creating an authentic instant-film look. The scene is a handheld flash photo of a Polaroid print showing a couple in Christmas sweaters, set against a heavily blurred background of a Christmas tree with warm golden bokeh. This prompt specifies detailed output settings, composition, and quality rules to achieve a raw, realistic photographic style with shallow depth of field and flash effects.

![Photorealistic Polaroid Couple Selfie with Christmas Bokeh](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508430845_jf09gm_G9m2sWLXEAA5mqe.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "text_to_image_photoreal_polaroid_in_hand_christmas_bokeh",
      "version": "v1.0",
      "priority": "high"
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "raw_photographic_realism",
      "sharpness": "foreground_sharp_background_soft",
      "film_grain": "subtle",
      "flash": "on"
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "A realistic handheld flash photo in a cozy living room at night: a hand with glossy red French-tip nails holds a white instant-film Polaroid photo close to the camera. In the background, a decorated Christmas tree is heavily out of focus with warm golden fairy-light bokeh and red ornaments, creating a dreamy holiday glow. The Polaroid print itself is in focus and shows a cute couple selfie wearing matching red-and-white Christmas knit sweaters; their faces are softly lit like an instant camera flash, slightly imperfect and authentic (true instant-film look). The overall vibe is warm, nostalgic, and cozy.",
      "composition": {
        "framing": "close foreground focus on the Polaroid frame, hand visible at bottom-left holding it",
        "depth_of_field": "very shallow DOF; tree becomes large soft bokeh circles",
        "focus_priority": "Polaroid print + its white border tack-sharp; background strongly blurred"
      },
      "foreground_details": {
        "hand": "one hand holding the Polaroid by the bottom edge, glossy nude base nails with crisp red French tips",
        "polaroid": "classic white instant photo border, slight glare from flash, subtle paper texture, tiny imperfections like real instant film"
      },
      "polaroid_photo_content": {
        "subjects": "two young adults close together in a selfie pose, wearing red-and-white Nordic Christmas sweaters",
        "expressions": "natural casual selfie expressions, warm and slightly playful",
        "lighting": "direct on-camera flash look inside the Polaroid image, a bit softer and slightly lower resolution than the outer photo"
      },
      "background": {
        "christmas_tree": "large tree filling the background, warm white string lights, red ornaments and ribbons, heavy bokeh",
        "environment": "cozy indoor night ambience, soft warm tones"
      },
      "camera_notes": {
        "capture_style": "smartphone flash photo (iPhone vibe)",
        "lens_feel": "26mm equivalent, close focus",
        "exposure": "foreground properly exposed by flash; background darker but glowing bokeh"
      },
      "quality_rules": [
        "photorealistic",
        "natural skin texture (no plastic smoothing)",
        "realistic flash reflections and glare",
        "no watermark",
        "no extra text"
      ]
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "watermark",
      "lo"
    ]
  }
}
```

> A highly technical, structured prompt for generating a photorealistic, high-angle shot (bird's eye view) of a woman leaning over the edge of a pool. It specifies camera optics (wide angle, f/1.8), environmental physics (hard noon sun, water caustics), and uses identity placeholders, indicating an identity swap or face lock feature is required.

![High-Angle Pool Selfie with Identity Swap](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508384197_25s8n2_G9mxYI6WsAAImVT.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
      "type": "Photo",
      "orientation_lock": "LOCKED: Orientation preserved 4:5",
      "sensor_emulation": "iPhone 15 Pro / High-res Smartphone Sensor"
    }
  },
  "spatial_orientation_engine": {
    "subject_facing_direction": "CAMERA (Upward gaze)",
    "body_rotation": "Leaning forward against pool edge, torso prone, head tilted back to face lens",
    "camera_position_relative": "High angle / Bird's eye view, directly above and in front of subject"
  },
  "camera_optics_and_geometry": {
    "lens_profile": {
      "focal_length": "26mm (Wide Angle)",
      "aperture": "f/1.8 (Deep depth of field due to distance)",
      "lens_character": "Modern Sharpness with digital processing"
    },
    "optical_flaws": [
      "Specular Blooming (Sun on water)",
      "Water Refraction",
      "Slight Barrel Distortion (Close-up)"
    ]
  },
  "environment_and_physics": {
    "lighting_engine": {
      "primary_source": "Hard Noon Sun (Top Left)",
      "radiosity_color_bleed": "Cyan/Turquoise light bouncing from pool water onto under-chin and inner arms",
      "shadow_structure": "Sharp, hard contrast shadows cast by head onto shoulders and pool edge",
      "volumetrics": "Clear Air / High Contrast"
    },
    "surface_physics": {
      "weather_impact": "Water droplets beading on oiled/wet skin, wet hair clumping",
      "material_response": "Concrete coping absorbs heat (dry), Water exhibits caustics and ripples"
    }
  },
  "scene_text_ocr": {
    "detected": false,
    "content": []
  },
  "objects_and_actors": [
    {
      "id": "MAIN_SUBJECT",
      "role": "Identity Swap Target",
      "pose_engineering": {
        "skeletal_rig": "Forearms resting flat on pool coping, shoulders hunched upwards, neck extended back.",
        "gaze_vector": "Eyes looking directly up into the camera lens.",
        "interaction_physics": "Hands loosely gripping the edge / resting, weight supported by elbows."
      },
      "physiological_state": {
        "body_temp_visuals": "Wet skin with high specular highlights, flushed cheeks from sun exposure.",
        "skin_light_interaction": "Subsurface scattering on nose bridge and shoulders."
      },
      "clothing_simulation": {
        "garment_stack": "{argument name="swimwear color" default="olive green"} Bikini Top (Straps visible)",
        "fabric_mechanics": "Straps digging slightly into wet skin, minimal fabric visibility.",
        "texture_and_wear": "Synthetic swimwear fabric, wet."
      },
      "identity_placeholders": {
        "skin_tone": "[[USE_REFERENCE_SKIN]]",
        "face_structure": "[[USE_REFERENCE_FACE]]",
        "hair_style": "[[USE_REFERENCE_HAIR]]"
        "build": "curvy, toned, athletic mesomorph",
      }
    }
  ],
  "off_screen_context": {
    "reflections": "Sun glare reflecting on water surface to the left",
    "implied_elements": "Rest of the pool body behind the subject"
  },
  "generation_keywords": {
    "positive": "Photorealistic, High Angle Shot, Wet S"
  }
}
```

  },

    "fill_light": "even court illumination",

    "shadow_style": "natural high-contrast sports lighting"

    },
    "ball_interaction": {
      "object": "professional volleyball",

    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "indoor volleyball arena",
      "background": "crowded spectator stands with shallow depth of field",

    },
    "visual_style": {

    },
    "composition": {

    "anime",

### 698. Ultra-photorealistic black and white fashion portrait prompt

**作者**: [Bananai](https://x.com/aibananai/status/2006808092659343700)  **日期**: 2026-01-01  **语言**: en

> A highly detailed, structured prompt designed for generating an ultra-photorealistic, high-end black and white fashion portrait in the style of Vogue. The prompt specifies technical details like the Hasselblad camera, 8k resolution, studio lighting (butterfly lighting), and detailed subject characteristics, including a Latina/mixed heritage female subject with natural freckles and a playful 'kissing' expression, emphasizing sharp focus on the eyes and hand gesture.

![Ultra-photorealistic black and white fashion portrait prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508423389_r2x199_G9mdS4MXMAANYK1.jpg)
![Ultra-photorealistic black and white fashion portrait prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508424120_49qap9_G9mdS4DXoAACWWB.jpg)
![Ultra-photorealistic black and white fashion portrait prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508424602_f5v9cl_G9mdS4FX0AAfZyA.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
    "quality": "ultra_photorealistic_editorial",
    "resolution": "8k",
    "camera": "Hasselblad H6D-100c",
    "lens": "85mm f/1.8 portrait lens",
    "style": "high-end black and white fashion photography, vogue aesthetic, authentic emotion, studio portrait"
  },
  "scene": {

### 702. Scientific Macro Documentary Photography Prompt for Water Droplet on Leaf

**作者**: [DreamDirectorAI](https://x.com/DreamDirectorAI/status/2006679153160958437)  **日期**: 2026-01-01  **语言**: en

> A detailed JSON-formatted prompt designed for generating ultra-photorealistic scientific macro documentary photography. It specifies extreme realism, natural optics, and focuses on a single crystal-clear water droplet resting on a broad tropical rainforest leaf, detailing the environment, lighting, and camera settings for a highly specific, non-artificial result.

![Scientific Macro Documentary Photography Prompt for Water Droplet on Leaf](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508431551_g0ae21_G9kn4-7WcAA6joP.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "aspect_ratio": "3:2",
    "quality": "ultra_photorealistic",
    "resolution": "8k",
    "style": "scientific macro documentary photography",
    "realism_level": "extreme realism, natural optics",
    "ai_artifacts": "none"
  },

  "subject": {
    "description": "a single water droplet resting on a rainforest leaf",
    "droplet": {
      "shape": "natural spherical tension",
      "clarity": "crystal clear",
      "refraction": "subtle optical refraction of leaf veins inside the droplet"
    },
    "leaf": {
      "type": "{argument name="leaf type" default="broad tropical rainforest leaf"}",
      "surface": "slightly waxy, natural micro texture",
      "veins": "highly detailed visible leaf veins branching naturally",
      "imperfections": [
        "tiny surface pores",
        "microscopic dust",
        "organic irregularities"
      ]
    }
  },

  "environment": {
    "location": "dense tropical rainforest",
    "atmosphere": "humid, quiet, post-rain stillness",
    "background": [
      "soft green bokeh",
      "out-of-focus jungle foliage",
      "natural depth layers"
    ],
    "air": "moist, slightly misty"
  },

  "lighting": {
    "type": "natural diffused rainforest light",
    "source": "filtered sunlight through canopy",
    "quality": "soft, scattered, non-directional",
    "highlights": "gentle specular highlight on water droplet",
    "shadows": "extremely soft micro-shadows along leaf veins"
  },

  "camera": {
    "camera_type": "professional macro photography setup",
    "lens": "100mm macro lens",
    "aperture": "f/8",
    "focus": "razor-sharp focus on leaf veins and water droplet edge",
    "depth_of_field": "very shallow, true macro depth",
    "magnification": "1:1 macro ratio",
    "perspective": "parallel to leaf surface"
  },

  "color_grading": {
    "palette": "deep natural greens, subtle yellow highlights",
    "saturation": "realistic, not boosted",
    "contrast": "low to medium, natural tonal range",
    "clarity": "optical clarity, not digital sharpening",
    "grain": "none or extremely subtle"
  },

  "constraints": [
    "no insects",
    "no fantasy glow",
    "no artificial lighting",
    "no cinematic color grading",
    "no exaggerated sharpness",
    "must look like a real scientific macro photograph"
  ]
}
```

### 703. 2026 Vision Board Collage: Feminine Empowerment and Luxury

**作者**: [Willy](https://x.com/jw660227/status/2006672360200675339)  **日期**: 2026-01-01  **语言**: en

> A detailed prompt for generating a photorealistic vision board collage for 2026, focusing on themes of feminine empowerment, financial independence, and quiet luxury. The collage features a central Eurasian woman with preserved identity, integrating affirmations and scenes of travel and wealth.

![2026 Vision Board Collage: Feminine Empowerment and Luxury](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508361101_jkhej3_G9kh2OdaEAArF0V.jpg)

```
A captivating 2026 vision board collage, embodying feminine empowerment and financial independence, rendered in photorealistic style. The composition features a medley of alluring scenes, subtly integrating empowering affirmations written in elegant English script.

A central figure, a woman of Eurasian descent with a sultry gaze, appears throughout the collage, her identity consistently preserved with natural, flawless skin texture.

The vision board embodies themes of ambition, luxury travel, and self-assured success:

- A portrait: The woman in soft, golden-hour lighting, exuding calm confidence.
- A high-rise cityscape: A panoramic view of a modern metropolis at dusk, bathed in a warm, cinematic glow.
- An investment scene: A stylish office space with stock charts and financial documents, projecting an atmosphere of focused intensity.
- A luxury travel scene: Exotic locales – a private jet interior, a pristine beach – evoking a sense of freedom and indulgence.
- A wealth & abundance scene: Close-ups of luxury details – designer handbags, sparkling jewelry, elegant timepieces – showcasing refined taste.
- A gratitude & intention scene: A journal with handwritten affirmations in English ("{argument name="affirmation 1" default="I am a money magnet"}," "{argument name="affirmation 2" default="Limitless abundance"}," "I create my reality").

Visual Style:

- Soft, editorial lighting, diffused and flattering
- Warm, neutral color palette (beige, cream, champagne, soft gold)
- Film grain, gentle contrast
- Organic layout, artful arrangement of elements

Text Placement:

- English affirmations delicately layered onto photographs
- Modern sans-serif fonts, handwritten-style scripts
- Unconventional alignment, emotional and evocative
- Emphasis on clarity, confidence, and self-belief

Technical:

- Hyperrealistic detail, flawless skin texture
- No AI artifacts
- Vertical aspect ratio (16:9)
- Shot on Hasselblad H6D, 85mm f/1.4, shallow depth of field

Style keywords: quiet luxury, money manifestation, editorial, lifestyle, success, travel. A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner
```

### 704. Pixel Art Grid using Fruit Flat-Lay Photography Prompt

**作者**: [ttmouse - 豆爸](https://x.com/ttmouse/status/2006653606800556045)  **日期**: 2026-01-01  **语言**: zh

> A highly constrained prompt for generating a professional overhead flat-lay photograph that mimics pixel art. The image uses two types of fruit (e.g., yellow lemons and green limes) arranged in a tight, seamless grid to form text and a graphic silhouette (e.g., '2026' and a running horse). The prompt enforces strict rules on object size, orientation, and grid alignment to ensure perfect pixelation and commercial quality.

![Pixel Art Grid using Fruit Flat-Lay Photography Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508406176_rri301_G9kOxipa8AAPd8j.jpg)
![Pixel Art Grid using Fruit Flat-Lay Photography Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767508406212_hhyhei_G9kQpCjaMAMQ-kb.jpg)

```
# 场景与世界
专业级的顶视平铺摄影，严格90度垂直俯视上帝视角；
纯白色背景；
影棚柔光照明，光线均匀清晰，无阴影无暗角

# 焦点与秩序
绝对主体：由【主体物品-背景色】{argument name="背景物品" default="新鲜黄色柠檬"}新鲜整齐紧密排列成的网格矩阵，铺满整个画面；
网格规格：横向{argument name="网格列数" default="27"}列，纵向若干行，形成完整矩阵；
表现形式：使用【主体物品-对比色】{argument name="对比物品" default="青柠檬"}颜色对比鲜明嵌入，形成清晰的像素艺术图案；
视觉逻辑：画面上半部分是【主体物品-对比色】组成的"{argument name="文字内容" default="2026"}"，画面下半部分是【主体物品-对比色】组成的{argument name="图形内容" default="奔跑的马"}的像素剪影；
排列约束：所有物体尺寸完全一致，朝向完全统一（果蒂方向一致），物体之间紧密无缝贴合，绝对不允许出现空白区域

# 形态与构造
构图上部：【主体物品-对比色】像素化"{文字内容}"，采用等宽字体，每个字符占用相同列数；
构图下部：【主体物品-对比色】像素化【图形内容】剪影；
完美俯视90度平铺视角，相机镜头轴线与地面严格垂直；
每个物体都是完整的，画面边缘的物体不被裁切，呈现整齐的网格阵列；
像素艺术图案清晰可辨，边缘锐利；
{网格列数}列×多行的密集网格布局，物体紧密填充，无任何空隙

# 材质与语言
主体材质：真实的【主体物品-背景色】（光滑表面，自然反光，细腻纹理，所有物体朝向一致）；
对比材质：真实的【主体物品-对比色】（饱满色泽，细腻表面质感，真实细节，所有物体朝向一致）；
背景：纯白色平面；
所有物体尺寸统一，形状一致，朝向一致，无大小差异，无变形

# 张力来源
自然物体转化为数字像素艺术；
传统静物摄影与现代像素图案的结合；
【主体物品-背景色】与【主体物品-对比色】的强烈色彩对比形成清晰的图案识别度；
8K画质，高分辨率，商业广告摄影风格；
物体排列绝对规整，像素图案高度可读

# 技术约束（确保稳定性）
- 严格俯视90度角，无任何透视变形
- 画面边缘的物体必须完整，不能被裁切
- 每一个物体的直径必须完全相同，像是同一个模具制作出来的
- 所有物体朝向必须统一，果蒂或顶部方向保持一致
- 明确网格结构：横向{网格列数}列，纵向相应行数，形成严格的矩形网格
- 网格排列必须整齐，横竖对齐，每个格子大小相同
- 物体之间紧密无缝拼接，绝对不允许出现空白区域或间隙
- 像素图案的边缘必须清晰锐利
- 光线均匀，无局部过曝或欠曝
- 每个字符采用等宽像素字体，所有字符占用相同列数
- 每个物体作为一个像素单元，必须大小完全一致，朝向完全一致
```

**Related**: [[品牌广告]]、[[像素艺术]]、[[综合艺术]]

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，旨在生成一张超逼真的 MacBook 屏幕图像。该提示详细说明了复杂的视觉层次，包括屏幕缺陷（莫尔条纹、灰尘、污迹）、应用布局（Photo Booth 占主导地位，Safari 为次要）以及 Photo Booth 窗口内一个详细的嵌套主体（一个手持 iPhone 的女人），模拟了一种 candid、低调的摄影风格。

Hyper-realistic downward-angled high-angle photo of a MacBook screen filling 95% of the frame. Visible moire pixel grid, dust, smudges, and subtle reflections on the glass. macOS dark mode with Photo Booth as the dominant window. A secondary Safari window with a Pinterest feed occupies roughly one quarter of the screen. Inside the Photo Booth live preview is a medium close-up of a young woman framed from slightly above the chest upward, head and shoulders with natural space around the hair. She wears a {argument name="top style" default="white strapless top"} and layered minimalist necklaces, holds an {argument name="device held" default="iPhone"} close to her face, and looks directly into the camera lens. Low-key candid lighting with cool screen glow mixed with soft room ambience. Raw, photorealistic, unedited, natural imperfections.
```

**作者**: [Gagan Singh](https://x.com/GaganSingh8u/status/2006391378465722767)  **日期**: 2025-12-31  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的提示，用于生成一张深色霓虹涂鸦矢量插画，描绘一个摆出“sigma”姿势的单人，严格保留上传图片中的面部特征，并融入带有受控辉光效果的 2026 新年发光元素。

![Sigma 暗黑霓虹 2026 新年涂鸦插画提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456156000_x971f5_G9giUNsbAAEt8Ba.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded image strictly as an identity reference. Preserve 100% exact face match, facial structure, expressions, skin tone, hairstyle, and identity of the single person visible in the reference image. Do not add any other person. Create a strong sigma-style pose in a dark neon New Year {argument name="year" default="2026"} doodle illustration (intense calm stare, relaxed dominant posture, slight lean, hands in pockets or crossed). Combine accurate semi-realistic facial rendering with glowing hand-drawn doodle line art. Use clean sketch lines enhanced with neon glow effects while keeping facial features clearly recognizable. Apply a dark New Year color palette with deep blacks, midnight blues, electric cyan, neon purple, and subtle red accents. Surround the subject with glowing doodle elements such as neon fireworks, stars, clocks, arrows, lightning strokes, abstract motion lines, and celebratory spark marks. Convert the scene into a high-quality dark neon doodle-vector illustration with layered glowing linework, soft gradients, controlled bloom, and crisp edges. Clothing should remain similar in type but simplified into bold dark shapes with neon edge highlights for a sigma aesthetic. Lighting should be stylized and graphic, using neon rim light and subtle glow instead of realistic lighting. The background should be deep dark with floating neon doodles and bokeh sparks. Optionally include a minimal glowing '2026' doodle integrated naturally into the scene. Render in ultra-high resolution with polished layers, sharp neon lines, and a premium dark sigma New Year 2026 doodle finish.",
  
  "negative_prompt": "face mismatch, identity change, extra person, wrong facial features, wrong skin tone, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, stiff pose, messy lines, chaotic glow, overexposed neon, photorealism, rough textures, low quality, blur, noise, grain, watermark, logo, heavy text",
  
  "style": "dark neon doodle vector illustration",
  "mood": "sigma, bold, mysterious, celebratory, night-time",
  "lighting": "neon rim lighting with controlled glow",
  "background": "dark backdrop with glowing New Year doodle elements",
  "detail_level": "clean yet expressive, high polish",
  "render_quality": "ultra high resolution, cinematic doodle-vector finish",
  "composition": "single person, sigma pose, dark neon New Year 2026 doodle aesthetic",
  "reference_strength": 0.85
}

### 709. 带身份锁的照相亭打印条

**作者**: [Alexandra Aisling](https://x.com/AllaAisling/status/2006387117824569461)  **日期**: 2025-12-31  **语言**: en

> 一个专为 Adobe Firefly 设计的高度具体提示（使用 Nano Banana Pro 技术），用于创建一张超逼真的大头贴打印条，其中四帧都显示同一个人，并严格根据上传的参考图像锁定身份。

![带身份锁的照相亭打印条](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456278747_59jbgm_G9d6VSCWcAEzoqQ.jpg)

```
Ultra-photorealistic single-frame photograph.
The person in ALL four frames must be 100% identical to the uploaded reference image. Preserve exact facial features: same face shape, same eyes, same nose structure, same lips, same skin texture. Zero deviation from reference. Do not generate a different person.
A single oversized photo-booth print strip dominates the composition, centered and filling 75-85% of the frame, held naturally by one hand with fingers partially visible for scale.
The strip contains exactly 4 frames arranged vertically (1 column × 4 rows). Each frame shows the SAME person from the reference image in New Year celebration moments:
- Frame 1: wearing a sparkly "{argument name="year crown" default="2026"}" crown, smiling
- Frame 2: blowing a party horn with confetti
- Frame 3: holding champagne glass, laughing
- Frame 4: making peace signs, excited expression
Background: shopping mall photo booth, distant and softly blurred with bokeh lights.
White border text at bottom reads exactly: "Happy New Year {argument name="year text" default="2026"}"
Photography style: Shot on Canon EOS R5, 50mm lens, f/2.8, natural mall lighting, sharp focus on the print strip.
STRICT RULES:
- No other people visible
- No logos, watermarks, or UI elements
- No numbers outside the print strip
- Person appears ONLY inside the printed photos
Face Consistency Lock: The facial structure, eye spacing, nose bridge, jawline, and all identifying features must match the reference with 100% accuracy across all 4 frames. @AdobeFirefly
```

**Related**: [[新年]]、[[综合节日]]

### 710. 文学立体模型网格提示

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2006338548233101643)  **日期**: 2025-12-31  **语言**: en

> 生成一个 2x2 网格的提示，其中包含雕刻在翻开书页中的逼真、细节丰富的立体模型，每个面板代表一本著名的科幻或奇幻书籍（《指环王》、《沙丘》、《银翼杀手》、《黑客帝国》），并带有特定的视觉元素。

```
2x2 grid layout, elite gallery exhibition, polished stone and gilded accents, sharp close-up photorealism. Panel A: “{argument name="book 1" default="The Lord of the Rings"}” as a layered volcanic diorama carved into thick open tome pages: fiery mountain forge, tiny fellowship figures crossing bridge, glowing ring element. Panel B: “{argument name="book 2" default="Dune"}” as a wind-swept desert automaton rising from leather-bound volume: articulated worm segments with brass joints, spice harvester silhouettes, sand grains in motion. Panel C: “{argument name="book 3" default="Blade Runner"}” as a neon-lit cityscape miniature film set inside hardcover: raining streets, flying spinner vehicles, replicant figures under holographic ads. Panel D: “{argument name="book 4" default="The Matrix"}” as a code-rain kinetic relief over ancient book: falling green glyphs on rotating cylinders, pod chambers with implied awakening motion, metallic sheen.
```

> 将上传的图片转换为手绘彩色铅笔插画。要求线条干净利落，柔和的粉彩配色，饱和度增强，铅笔笔触清晰可见，营造出温馨愉快的童话书插画感，明确拒绝写实主义和照片质感。

![图像转彩色铅笔素描提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456182576_y8t9qm_G9eNoQXaYAEu7pq.jpg)
![图像转彩色铅笔素描提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456183052_c24kdx_G9eNoZmaMAAcDT0.jpg)
![图像转彩色铅笔素描提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456184233_i32gwy_G9eNobWaYAQ8bc_.jpg)
![图像转彩色铅笔素描提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767456185360_wyolwp_G9eNodKaYAAawQz.jpg)

```
"Use the uploaded image as reference.
Illustration style: hand-drawn colored pencil illustration, clean line art with slightly rough pencil outlines, soft pastel coloring with increased brightness, lighter and more vivid color tones, enhanced saturation while staying natural, visible pencil strokes and gentle shading texture, warm and friendly tone, semi-cartoon realistic proportions, simple facial features with dot eyes and small smiles,flat yet detailed coloring, minimal shadows, soft highlights, storybook illustration feel, cozy and cheerful atmosphere, vibrant yet soft color palette, children-book/ lifestyle sketch style, high clarity, no realism, no photo texture."
```

      "Clean, borderless presentation focused from the waist up."

  },
  "subject_reference": {

  },

      "subject_pose": "The subject is looking directly at the camera, giving a **playful wink with one eye and a broad, warm smile**. She holds both hands at chest level, with her thumbs and index fingers forming a rectangular 'camera viewfinder' gesture centered over her heart area. Floating directly inside this finger-frame, the numbers '{argument name="年份" default="2026"}' appear as a **large, prominent, and intensely vibrant** glowing holographic projection that **significantly fills the space within her fingers**. This large glowing element casts a strong, noticeable soft colored light onto her fingers, palms, and the fabric of her outfit on her chest.",
      "key_element_description": {

        "text_content": "{argument name="杂志标题" default="BeautyVerse"}",

  }
}

### 715. Nano Banana Pro 的超逼真卡通现实场景提示词

**作者**: [Özge](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2006049874270462313)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 这是一个高度详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，专为 Nano Banana Pro 工具设计，用于生成一个超逼真的场景。该场景描绘了一位真实的女性在一个逼真的家庭厨房环境中与完全卡通风格的蓝精灵互动，强调了场景的逼真度与蓝精灵的卡通性质之间的鲜明对比。它包含具体的硬性约束、相机设置和详细的场景描述，以确保高质量、特定的输出。

![Nano Banana Pro 的超逼真卡通现实场景提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767455013664_tm63jh_G9brf5-X0AIEdOU.jpg)

```
{
  "request_metadata": {
    "tool": "NanoBananaPro",
    "task_type": "ultra_photoreal_cartoon_reality_scene",
    "quality_preset": "ultra",
    "aspect_ratio": "16:9"
  },
  "references": {
    "main_reference_image": {
      "slot": 1,
      "purpose": "MAIN_SUBJECT_IDENTITY_LOCK",
      "strict_identity_lock": true
    }
  },
  "hard_constraints": [
    "ONE real human only (female).",
    "All other characters are cartoon characters only.",
    "Smurfs remain fully cartoon-styled (flat toon shading + clean outlines).",
    "Papa Smurf MUST have a red hat and red pants (classic Smurf canon colors).",
    "Real home kitchen, photoreal environment.",
    "Max 6 Smurfs total (including Smurfette and Papa Smurf).",
    "No BTS, no studio, no readable text, no logos, no watermarks.",
    "Ultra-sharp image: no blur, no soft focus, no haze, no motion blur."
  ],
  "camera": {
    "camera_style": "premium natural lifestyle photo",
    "camera_body": "full-frame professional camera",
    "lens": "24mm prime",
    "aperture": "f/4",
    "shutter_speed": "1/200",
    "iso": "100",
    "focus": "tack_sharp on the woman's eyes",
    "depth_of_field": "moderate-to-deep (cake + smurfs + woman all sharp)",
    "white_balance": "soft daylight",
    "lighting_notes": "bright window daylight + soft bounce fill for a clean, high-end kitchen look"
  },
  "prompt": {
    "scene_summary": "A real home kitchen filled with clean daylight, shot like a premium lifestyle cover. A woman prepares a forest-berry cake at the counter. She wears a chic pink strawberry-print dress with tiny strawberries on the fabric, a pink bandana tied in her hair, and small strawberry hair accessories subtly placed throughout her hairstyle. Smurfette and five Smurfs help playfully: one stirring berries, one standing inside a mixing bowl, one carrying strawberries, one holding a whisk, one sprinkling powdered sugar, and Papa Smurf supervising confidently. Papa Smurf is clearly identifiable with his classic red hat and red pants. All Smurfs are small, blue, and fully cartoon-styled, sharply contrasting with the photorealistic kitchen and the real woman. The image is crisp, joyful, high-quality, and perfectly sharp."
  },
  "negative_prompt": [
    "extra humans",
    "realistic smurf skin",
    "semi-realistic smurfs",
    "wrong colored papa smurf clothing",
    "text",
    "logo",
    "watermark",
    "film set",
    "studio",
    "boom mic",
    "camera rig",
    "blur",
    "soft focus",
    "haze",
    "motion blur",
    "deformed hands",
    "extra fingers"
  ]
}
```

### 716. 高山背景下的高端冬季产品摄影

**作者**: [Oogie](https://x.com/oggii_0/status/2006017485938778400)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 一个用于为冬季品牌生成高端产品摄影的提示模板，其特点是单个产品居中放置在深雪中，背景是阳光普照的高山景观和常绿树木，强调清晰的自然日光和浅景深。

![高山背景下的高端冬季产品摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454966661_n2ojtb_G9bOQxDaYAA6Z2v.jpg)
![高山背景下的高端冬季产品摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454967396_lbw9gu_G9bOQxfbAAALGdV.jpg)
![高山背景下的高端冬季产品摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454967882_rnp7z6_G9bOQzGbkAE9jnc.jpg)
![高山背景下的高端冬季产品摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454969142_c826ow_G9bOQz5aYAAjgG4.jpg)

```
A single, high-quality product item positioned centrally in the snow.
(Note for generation:

Insert specific object here, e.g., "{argument name="product example 1" default="A white ceramic teapot with gold trim and 'WINTERBREW' logo"}," "{argument name="product example 2" default="A clear glass perfume bottle with silver cap and 'ALPINE ESSENCE' text"}," or "{argument name="product example 3" default="A pair of brown leather hiking boots covered in light snow"}.")
accessories
Natural, thematic elements scattered artfully on the immediate snow surface surrounding the main subject. Examples include pinecones, whole cinnamon sticks, star anise, frosted lavender sprigs, small pine branches, or complementary items like a knit beanie.
environment
A pristine, sunlit winter alpine landscape. The immediate foreground is deep, textured powder snow. The mid-ground features snow-laden evergreen trees. The background is dominated by majestic, rugged alpine mountain peaks under a clear or slightly hazy blue sky. A rustic wooden chalet or cabin is visible in the middle distance, slightly blurred.
lighting
Bright, crisp, natural daylight. Sunny conditions creating sparkling highlights on the snow crystals and the product surface, casting distinct, cool shadows.
camera
Professional commercial photography. High resolution, macro detail sharp focus on the main subject. Shallow depth of field (bokeh), creating a softly blurred background of the mountains and trees. Shot from a slightly low or eye-level angle relative to the product placed on the snow.
style
High-end product photography with a cozy, luxurious, fresh, and serene winter atmosphere. The composition is balanced and naturalistic.
```

### 717. 未来感十足的 AI 年龄检测器信息图肖像

**作者**: [Doctor Wasif](https://x.com/doctorwasif/status/2005928855547036057)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的提示，用于根据用户照片生成超逼真的肖像信息图，并叠加未来感十足的、精细的面部分析网格和激光线。它要求 AI 估算并显示五个衰老因素的百分比得分以及最终的估算年龄，风格类似于高端美妆科技广告。

![未来感十足的 AI 年龄检测器信息图肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454915693_6ikr48_G9Z9qZ-XYAAdyI0.jpg)
![未来感十足的 AI 年龄检测器信息图肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454916002_wdvgln_G9Z9qN9XwAA2xb-.jpg)

```
A hyper-realistic, high-resolution portrait infographic based on (your photo). Keep the same person, identity, hairstyle, clothing and natural skin tone from (your photo), with a neutral studio background.Overlay a subtle, semi-transparent facial analysis grid on the entire face, very similar to a 3D face-scanning mesh: thin, soft white lines following the facial contours, slightly glowing but not hiding the skin details. Add one clean vertical red laser line running down one side of the face, like a futuristic scan. All analysis lines must be soft, minimal and elegant, exactly like a cosmetic-tech advertisement.Create a clean medical–aesthetic infographic that evaluates 5 aging factors using global data percentages:1. Fine lines and wrinkles2. Skin texture and elasticity3. Facial volume and sagging4. Eye area aging signs5. Skin tone and pigmentationFor each factor, place a small label with a thin line pointing to the relevant facial area, and next to it write a short title and a realistic percentage score from 0–100% (based on global data), for example:“Fine lines & wrinkles – 18%”“Skin texture & elasticity – 72%”“Facial volume & sagging – 35%”“Eye area aging signs – 41%”“Skin tone & pigmentation – 63%”Use clean, modern, sans-serif typography and small technical-style text, like a scientific facial analysis UI. At the bottom of the image, in the center, write a large bold text showing the final estimated real age based on the analysis, for example:“ESTIMATED AGE: {argument name="estimated age" default="(random number based on face analysis )"}”Overall style: futuristic AI-guided skincare analysis, minimalistic, premium editorial lighting, no gender mentioned, suitable for any human face.
```

### 718. 保持身份的故事书插画（组）

**作者**: [Gagan Singh](https://x.com/GaganSingh8u/status/2005864269498421255)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，用于将上传图片中的主体转换为迷人的故事书插画，并融入矢量艺术风格，严格保留所有人物的身份和肖像特征，让他们摆出平静的叙事姿势，并使用柔和、温暖的调色板。

![保持身份的故事书插画（组）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767454970149_i432ny_G9ZC6d0aMAAzGIu.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded image strictly as an identity reference. Preserve 100% exact face match, facial structure, expressions, skin tone, hairstyle, and identity of every person visible in the reference image. Do not add or remove any person. Create a storybook-style pose (for example: walking together, quiet seated moment, gentle interaction, calm expressive posture) while keeping anatomy natural and warm. Style the subjects in timeless, story-appropriate outfits with soft fabrics and simple details, without changing facial identity. Convert the scene into a charming storybook illustration blended with clean vector art. Use soft linework, painterly shading, gentle gradients, and subtle texture for a hand-illustrated feel. Lighting should be warm and diffused, creating a cozy, narrative atmosphere. Color palette should be soft and harmonious—pastel blues, warm creams, sage green, soft browns, muted gold accents. Background should feel illustrative and narrative (storybook town, garden, cozy interior, or abstract fairy-tale setting) simplified into layered vector forms with depth. Render in ultra high resolution with clean edges, delicate detail, and a polished storybook finish suitable for covers and prints.",
  
  "negative_prompt": "face mismatch, identity change, extra person, missing person, harsh contrast, loud neon colors, anime exaggeration, chibi, wrong facial features, wrong skin tone, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, photorealism, low quality, blur, noise, grain, watermark, logo, text",
  
  "style": "storybook illustration + vector art",
  "mood": "warm, gentle, narrative",
  "lighting": "soft warm diffused lighting",
  "background": "storybook narrative vector backdrop",
  "detail_level": "soft yet refined",
  "render_quality": "ultra high resolution, print-ready clarity",
  "composition": "same persons, calm story-driven composition",
  "reference_strength": 0.9
}
```

### 719. 微缩立体模型提示，用于可视化微积分的历史演变

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2005853602263302412)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、超宽幅的图像生成提示，旨在可视化一个技术概念的历史演变和文化传播，以微积分 (Calculus) 为例。它指示 AI 创建一个 3D 地形微缩丝绸之路商队场景，展示该技术在不同文明和时间段中如何演变，并在每个站点配有微型立体模型，以及具体的材质和光照说明，以营造史诗般的历史冒险美学。

![微缩立体模型提示，用于可视化微积分的历史演变](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767455007745_dlku5z_G9OmbKIXsAAeQGM.jpg)

```
Input A: {argument name="concept" default="calculus"}
Input A is a technology that traveled historical trade routes (papermaking, gunpowder, astronomy, silk production, algebra, etc.).
Analyze: origin civilization, the journey route, cultural adaptations at each stop, timeline of spread.
Goal: Miniature Silk Road/trade route caravan scene showing technology being transported and transformed.
Rules:
- Base: 3D topographic map showing actual historical route (mountains, deserts, seas)
- Caravan: 8-12 miniature merchant/scholar figurines progressing along route with pack animals
- Each stop: micro-diorama of how that civilization adapted the technology
  * Origin point: technology in pure form with inventor culture's aesthetic
  * Midpoint stops: hybrid versions showing cultural fusion
  * Destination: fully transformed/adapted version
- Include: the technology itself transforming—paper becoming different textures, numbers changing symbol systems, etc.
- Obstacles: miniature barriers that were overcome (mountain passes, hostile territories, language barriers shown as scroll fragments in different scripts)
- Time markers: seasons/years labeled along route
- Materials: actual sand/terrain materials, tiny textiles from different cultures, brass caravans
- Lighting: journey from dawn (origin) to dusk (destination) across the scene
Output: ONE image, 21:9 ultra-wide to capture full journey, epic historical adventure photography
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[综合产品]]、[[微缩模型与立体模型]]

**作者**: [Melis✨](https://x.com/miilesus/status/2005716086893973933)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 等图像生成模型设计的复杂、结构化提示词，旨在根据参考图像重现特定场景和姿势，同时严格保留来自单独面部参考图像的主体身份，从而生成超现实、高对比度的时尚大片。

![具有身份和场景保留的超逼真时尚大片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166873259_t2jrrr_G9W7-REXgAAmW7A.jpg)
![具有身份和场景保留的超逼真时尚大片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166876575_p75l9r_G9W7-lEWwAAkP4-.jpg)

```
{
  "job_id": "photo_02_carry",
  "model": "nano-banana-pro",
  "task": "image_generation",
  "inputs": {
    "face_reference_image": "<YOUR_FACE_IMAGE>",
    "scene_reference_image": "<SCENE_IMAGE_2>"
  },
  "prompt": "Ultra realistic  fashion editorial. EXACT SAME FACE as face_reference_image, identical identity. Recreate scene exactly from scene_reference_image: outdoor setting with tall mirrored panels reflecting trees. Muscular shirtless man standing, carrying the woman horizontally over shoulders. Woman wearing light fabric dress, arms and legs extended. Same pose, same proportions, same camera angle and framing. High-contrast, sharp details, cinematic fashion look.",
  "negative_prompt": "different face, identity drift, illustration, CGI, plastic skin, deformed body, extra limbs, wrong pose, wrong mirrors, text, watermark, blur",
  "settings": {
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "resolution": { "width": 1024, "height": 1365 },
    "stylization": 0,
    "quality": "max",
    "lighting_match": "max",
    "composition_match": "max",
    "identity_preservation": "max",
    "face_consistency": "max",
    "reference_strength": { "face": 1.0, "scene": 0.98 },
  }
}
```

### 722. 古代数学知识的微缩桥梁

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2005679706167713928)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的指令提示，用于生成一幅神话史诗般的图像，描绘一项发明或技术（以“数学”为例）在古代文明之间传播的场景。输出应为一张古老的羊皮纸地图上连接 3-5 个文明“岛屿”的微型桥梁结构，具有独特的建筑风格、微型人物和黄金时段的光线。

![古代数学知识的微缩桥梁](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166942003_7vuk4n_G9TRRL0XAAATXHv.jpg)

```
<instruction>
Input A is an invention or technology  
Analyze: how this innovation appeared independently or was transmitted across ancient civilizations (Egyptian, Chinese, Islamic, Mayan, Greek, etc.).
Goal: Miniature bridge structure connecting 3-5 civilization "islands."
Rules:
* Base: ancient world map (aged parchment) as foundation
* Bridge structure: ornate multi-level walkway with different architectural styles for each section (columns, arches, pagoda elements)
* Each "island" platform: distinct civilization's version of Input A invention (Chinese compass vs Viking sunstone, Mayan zero vs Indian zero, etc.)
* Civilization figurines: tiny scholars/inventors from each culture examining each other's versions
* Include: trade route markers, tiny ships/caravans between islands, scrolls being passed
* Center of bridge: the "universal truth" they all discovered (mathematical formula, physical principle) etched in neutral symbol
* Materials: stone textures, gold leaf accents, cultural pattern details
* Lighting: mystical golden hour with light ray connecting all islands
Output: 1 x image, 16:9 landscape for maximum bridge span visibility, mythological epic photography
</instruction>
```

**Related**: [[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[地图]]、[[综合建筑]]

> 生成一张逼真、自然的女性生活照的提示词，照片中她坐在屋顶露台上，俯瞰摩纳哥大奖赛赛道（费尔蒙发夹弯）。提示词需要使用一张参考图片来确定拍摄对象的样貌，详细描述她的着装（紧身胸衣上衣、工装裤、Dior 包），并指定背景元素（赛道护栏、建筑物、阴天光线），以实现柔和、大地色系的审美效果。

![摩纳哥大奖赛生活方式照片，附参考图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166870549_w69lwc_G9Vp2BraUAAoDPl.jpg)

```
"references uploaded image, wearing a white structured corset-style top with thin spaghetti straps and boning details, high-waisted beige utility cargo pants with large side pockets. She has a small patterned Dior Saddle bag under her right arm, dainty necklace, rings on left hand, painted white nails. She is sitting comfortably on a black cushioned ledge, body angled slightly left, holding a stemmed glass of rosé by the stem with her left hand, right hand resting flat on the ledge. The setting is a rooftop terrace overlooking the Fairmont Hairpin turn of the Monaco Grand Prix in Monte Carlo. Background features a dense hillside with multi-story buildings, hotels, a prominent beige skyscraper, construction cranes, green trees, and distant mountains under a cloudy sky. Racetrack visible below with advertising barriers reading 'aramco, UBS, Heineken 0.0, MONTE-CARLO'. Lighting is natural daylight, overcast afternoon, soft and diffused. Style is candid lifestyle photograph, medium shot, deep depth of field, muted earthy tones, low-medium contrast."

{

### 727. 侦探证据板生成

**作者**: [Artificial intelligence (Ai),Open Ai](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2005542804072939982)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 一个旨在生成侦探证据板视觉概念的提示，模拟了一种痴迷的、深夜黑色电影氛围。它详细描述了软木板上的内容：拍立得照片、地图、报纸剪报、便利贴以及连接证据的红线，强调了来自一个裸露灯泡的戏剧性阴影，以及咖啡渍等逼真的杂乱物品。

![侦探证据板生成](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166861840_f5kbrz_G9UejSfa0AAtmYj.jpg)

```
"A detective's evidence board investigating \\{argument name="subject/mystery" default="[SUBJECT/MYSTERY]"}\\\. Cork surface covered with pinned items: polaroid photographs with handwritten dates, a street map with circled locations, newspaper clippings with highlighted passages, sticky notes with theories and question marks, and printed documents with redacted black bars. Red string connects related evidence across the board, creating a web of connections. Thumbtacks in primary colors. A single bare bulb casts dramatic shadows. Coffee ring stains on some papers. The atmosphere is obsessive, late-night, noir—someone has been piecing this together for months. A few pins have fallen, suggesting frantic recent activity."
```

**Related**: [[地图]]

### 728. 自然时尚生活照，附参考图

**作者**: [Amanpreet Singh](https://x.com/amanxdesign/status/2005499519329341776)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成适合时尚品牌的真实、写实生活方式图像的提示，基于一张参考图。它要求模特穿着特定的橄榄色连衣裙和厚实开衫，置身于户外都市或公园环境中，强调柔和的自然光、真实的皮肤纹理和轻松自然的姿势。

![自然时尚生活照，附参考图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166865473_hqlhai_G871ZcEaMAAG-rl.jpg)
![自然时尚生活照，附参考图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166865712_xfmmuj_G871hFObEAAvadf.jpg)

```
{
  "description": "Candid lifestyle image of a model wearing the exact same olive short dress — identical neckline, waist seam, and fit. The outfit is styled casually with a chunky off-white knit cardigan draped naturally over the shoulders or worn open, paired with clean white sneakers. The scene is outdoors in a cozy, casual setting such as a park bench, café terrace, or shaded sidewalk area. The photo should feel spontaneous, like a real moment captured mid-day.",
  
  "appearance": "beautiful white american model. Hair remains natural and loose, gently tousled by outdoor air. No heavy makeup — just minimal, natural tones with visible skin texture. Expression relaxed, calm, and content.",
  
  "pose": "Natural candid moment — the model could be walking with a coffee cup, sitting casually on a park bench, or standing while adjusting her cardigan. The pose should appear effortless and unscripted, avoiding stiffness or symmetry. Capture a sense of motion or relaxed stillness.",
  
  "lighting": "Soft natural outdoor light under cloudy or shaded conditions. No direct sunlight or harsh shadows. Maintain neutral color tones with gentle highlights on skin and fabric, evoking an overcast or late-afternoon ambiance.",
  
  "environment": "Outdoor urban or park-like setting — minimal modern café, bench, or cobblestone street with greenery or buildings softly blurred in the background. The focus stays on the subject, but the environment should add lifestyle realism. Keep the color palette neutral and warm (beige, olive, soft gray tones).",
  
  "camera": "Full-body vertical shot or mid-length candid framing, slightly off-center as if taken by a friend. Eye-level angle with mild depth blur for realism. Composition should have breathing space around the model for a relaxed visual flow.",
  
  "style": "Realistic lifestyle photograph with a cozy, relatable tone. Editorial-level sharpness but emotionally warm and grounded. Subtle film-like warmth may be added to lighting balance.",
  
  "focus": "Highlight the olive dress with cardigan layering, natural pose, and lifestyle context. Emphasize realism, motion, and candid imperfection for authenticity.",
  
  "negative_prompt": [
    "different model",
    "direct sunlight",
    "studio background",
    "posed or symmetrical stance",
    "glossy lighting or cinematic tone",
    "unnatural AI smoothing",
    "missing cardigan or sneakers"
  ]
}
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[食品饮料]]、[[旅行]]

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2005495176681378042)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 一个编辑现有照片的提示，保留原始面部，以创建一张逼真的肖像：一位年轻女子身着精致服装（白衬衫，背带），若有所思地坐在马桶上，强调柔和的光线和极简主义美学。

![浴室中带有身份锁的内省肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166982439_aek9sl_G9TzOZGbgAAB7E6.jpg)

```
Edit this photo without altering the face. create a photorealistic potrait of 
A young woman with fair, smooth skin and naturally soft pink lips, with dark brown hair styled with bangs.  She is sitting in a relaxed pose on a toilet. She wears a white button-up shirt, slightly open at the collar, with sleeves rolled up to the elbows, paired with black suspenders and wearing a black pant.

She accessorizes with a luxurious silver wristwatch, a delicate chain bracelet, a minimalist ring on one of her ring fingers, and a small silver necklace. Her expression appears thoughtful and introspective, with her gaze directed downward. Her right arm is raised, with her hand resting against her head, while her left arm rests gently on her lap.

Soft lighting creates subtle shadows that highlight her facial features, accessories, and the texture of her clothing. The overall atmosphere is calm and introspective, with a minimalist and sophisticated aesthetic.

Use the original face 100% exactly as shown in the provided reference photo, with no alterations.
```

### 731. 高级时尚单色矢量插画提示

**作者**: [Gagan Singh](https://x.com/GaganSingh8u/status/2005437359551057965)  **日期**: 2025-12-29  **语言**: en

> 这是一个专为图像到图像生成设计的提示，指示 AI 在严格保留身份的同时，将上传的图像转换为全新的高级时装编辑姿势。最终输出必须是纯粹的黑白插画，融合精致的矢量艺术，并以戏剧性的灯光和极简的背景呈现。

![高级时尚单色矢量插画提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166904778_j1w948_G9SPE8iagAA5TRz.jpg)
![高级时尚单色矢量插画提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767166904743_x6zqj8_G9SPE8ibgAAqiHI.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded image strictly as an identity reference. Preserve 100% exact face match, facial structure, expressions, skin tone (translated accurately into grayscale), hairstyle, and identity of every person visible in the reference image. Do not add or remove any person. Create a new high-fashion editorial pose (for example: confident upright stance, slight profile angle, strong posture, composed expressions) while keeping anatomy natural and elegant. Convert the scene into a pure black-and-white illustration blended with refined vector art. Use crisp black ink outlines, smooth grayscale shading, and controlled contrast to define facial structure and form. Skin tones should translate naturally into grayscale values without losing identity. Clothing should remain similar in type but rendered in monochrome with clear vector edges, folds, and tonal separation. Lighting should be dramatic and directional, emphasizing facial features and silhouettes through light–shadow contrast. Redesign the background into a minimal editorial vector backdrop using negative space, gradients in grayscale, or subtle geometric balance. Render in ultra high resolution with sharp edges, clean layers, and a sophisticated magazine-style black-and-white finish.",
  
  "negative_prompt": "face mismatch, identity change, extra person, missing person, wrong facial features, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, color elements, photorealism, heavy textures, painterly strokes, low quality, blur, noise, grain, watermark, logo, text",
  
  "style": "black and white editorial illustration + vector art",
  "mood": "bold, elegant, high-fashion",
  "lighting": "dramatic directional monochrome lighting",
  "background": "minimal grayscale vector backdrop",
  "detail_level": "high and refined",
  "render_quality": "ultra high resolution, editorial clarity",
  "composition": "same persons, new editorial pose, monochrome palette",
  "reference_strength": 0.8
}
```

**Related**: [[时装大片]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[手绘素描]]

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的极具描述性的提示词，用于生成一张女性滑雪跳跃的极限动作照片。该提示词详细描述了她非传统的时尚（金属翠绿色滑雪服）、动态的空中姿势、侵略性的低角度摄像机视角，以及特定的胶片模拟（Cinestill 800T），以实现具有耀眼高光和深邃对比度的超细节照片级真实感。

![极限跳台滑雪动作抓拍（Cinestill 胶片风格）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767061649666_kipbm1_G9Pg6g9aoAAhtQJ.jpg)

```
A woman with sharp, extreme, non-conventional fashion features in a sleek metallic emerald green ski suit, helmet with dark visor, and thick Insulated ski gloves, is captured mid-air during an extreme ski jump from a large snow ramp. Her body is angled dynamically, skis are crossed, and snow is violently spraying upwards from the jump-off point. Her face, visible under the visor, shows a fierce, concentrated, almost ecstatic expression. Full-length action shot, aggressive low-angle shot from the base of the jump, making her appear to soar incredibly high against the sky. In the background, a blurred crowd of spectators and other skiers are visible at the base of the jump. Blinding bright midday sun creates intense, almost blinding highlights on the metallic suit and the snow spray, reflecting off the dark visor. Extreme, unforgiving focus on the raw action, the texture of the snow, the metallic suit, and the natural, imperfect skin texture visible. Cinematie quality, shot on {argument name="film stock" default="Cinestill 800T"} film, sübtle anamorphic lens flare, deep contrast, hyper-detailed photo realism, sharp focós on sübject, blinding bright midday stün, harsh highlights, visible snowflakes/ice crystals.
```

### 736. 电商产品列表生活场景照片提示

**作者**: [Amanpreet Singh](https://x.com/amanxdesign/status/2005143171291120075)  **日期**: 2025-12-28  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 格式提示，专为 Google Nano Banana Pro 模型设计，旨在生成高质量、一致的电子商务或 Shopify 产品列表照片。该提示侧重于保持参考服装（一件深灰色罗纹针织连衣裙）的精确外观和质地，同时将模特置于温暖、亲切、休闲的生活场景中，例如咖啡馆或客厅，强调高端休闲时尚摄影。

![电商产品列表生活场景照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767061697624_csnwe2_G87upYfacAAuv3H.jpg)
![电商产品列表生活场景照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767061698080_n0om3a_G87upX7bQAA_0wX.jpg)

```
{
  "description": "Full-body or mid-length photo of the same white American woman wearing the exact same dark grey rib-knit dress, identical in texture, silhouette, color, and fabric as the reference. She is styled casually for a lifestyle setting — seated comfortably at an outdoor café table, home terrace, or cozy indoor living area. The outfit is accessorized with a light neutral scarf or a soft, long cardigan draped naturally around her shoulders. She wears the same taupe boots as in the reference image. The model is holding a coffee mug or cup in one hand, with reading glasses placed nearby or gently held. Her expression is calm, slightly warm, and relaxed — as if she’s enjoying a peaceful moment or morning coffee. Hair and makeup remain natural, soft, and consistent with the reference look.",
  
  "style": "modern lifestyle fashion photography; elegant and relatable; premium casual tone; warm and cozy atmosphere with authentic emotion",
  
  "camera": "mid-length or seated full-body framing at eye level; slight angle for lifestyle realism; focus on model and outfit with shallow depth (f/2.8–f/3.2) to softly blur background; natural smartphone perspective for realism",
  
  "lighting": "soft, diffused daylight or warm indoor lighting depending on location; no harsh shadows or overexposure; natural tone with balanced warmth across skin and fabric; light direction from the side to create depth and soft contrast; consistent with the lighting style from the previous indoor reference image",
  
  "environment": "a cozy lifestyle setting — warm-toned modern café, sunlit terrace, or inviting living room; include subtle elements like a wooden table, a coffee cup, books, or plants in the background; light neutral walls and soft décor to complement the outfit; overall environment should feel calm, comfortable, and premium",
  
  "texture": "dress fabric remains heavy and ribbed, matte finish; lighting enhances its texture and structure; scarf or cardigan appears soft with visible knit or wool texture; surfaces like the table or cup subtly reflect light for realism",
  
  "focus": "maintain clarity on the model’s upper body and outfit, slightly shallow depth to separate her from the background; soft vignette for cozy emphasis; jewelry and neckline subtly highlighted by light reflections",
  
  "ending": "replicate the same model, outfit, and material quality as the reference in a casual lifestyle composition — seated calmly with coffee in hand, warm soft lighting, and natural background for a premium yet relatable feel"
}
```

### 737. 双帧抓拍亲密身份锁定提示词

**作者**: [Riccardo Wolf](https://x.com/WolfRiccardo/status/2005028674458804621)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的提示词，用于生成同一位女性的两帧垂直构图（双联画），确保两帧中的身份和比例完全一致。它旨在呈现一种原始、未经修饰、高端智能手机的审美，对比了放松、穿着整齐的姿势（第一帧）与亲密、穿着内衣的自拍姿势（第二帧），两者都设置在明亮的家居室内环境中。

![双帧抓拍亲密身份锁定提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987680649_gms5nj_G9NK8mJWEAAKz4i.jpg)

```
{
  "vibe": "raw, unfiltered, natural realism, confident femininity, sensual but non-explicit, spontaneous everyday intimacy, high-end smartphone photography aesthetic",
  "composition": {
    "layout": "two-frame vertical composition, stacked one above the other",
    "branding": "no logos, no text, no watermarks",
    "effects": "no filters, no artificial effects, no beauty smoothing",
    "quality": "4K ultra high definition, iPhone 16 Pro Max photo quality"
  },
  "subject": {
    "identity": {
      "gender": "female",
      "age": 35,
      "nationality": "Canadian",
      "status": "clearly adult",
      "identity_consistency": "the same woman must be preserved identically in both frames, facial features and body proportions unchanged"

### 738. 历史宏观立体透视模型：烹饪地图网格

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2005025143794368680)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多阶段提示，旨在根据用户选择的食材生成一个 2x2 的“历史宏观立体模型”网格。它要求 AI 首先确定一个“时代质感”（古代、文艺复兴、工业、现代），然后创建一张凌乱工作台的超细节微距照片。每个面板都展示了一本打开的书，其中包含 2D 草图和一个已完成餐点的 3D 弹出式立体模型，以及一个发明家和一个竞争对手的微型时代精确小雕像。

![历史宏观立体透视模型：烹饪地图网格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987648345_zwo194_G9B-BdaXoAAdW5M.jpg)
![历史宏观立体透视模型：烹饪地图网格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987648285_yidarh_G9B-BdSXAAAbtMq.jpg)

```
Role:Historical Art Director & Macro Photographer.
Input: Invention or Rivalry = [{argument name="user choice" default="User Choice"}]

Phase 1: Chronological Profiling
Before rendering, analyze the Year of the invention to determine the "Era Texture":
If Ancient (e.g., 200 BC): Surface = Rough Stone or Papyrus. Light = Oil Lamp/Torch. Clutter = Clay shards, bronze chisels, scrolls, figs/grapes.
If Renaissance (e.g., 1500): Surface = Dark Oak & Vellum. Light = Candle. Clutter = Quill feathers, wax seals, brass astrolabes, leather binding.
If Industrial (e.g., 1890): Surface = Green Felt or Mahogany. Light = Gas/Filament. Clutter = Newsprint, pocket watches, copper wire, soot.
If Modern (e.g., 1980): Surface = Formica or Metal. Light = Fluorescent/Neon. Clutter = Circuit boards, Polaroid photos, soda cans, plastic casings.

Phase 2: Visual Execution
Goal: A hyper-detailed "Macro Diorama" where the environment tells the story of the time period.
Subject: A messy, chaotic workspace viewed through a macro lens.

1. The Stage (The Document):
The "ground" is the primary design medium of that era 
The surface is filled with era-specific sketches/carvings of the invention.

2. The Living Miniatures:
Two tiny, hyper-realistic figurines (The Inventor & The Rival) stand on this surface.
They are dressed strictly in period-accurate clothing (Togas vs. Frock Coats vs. Turtlenecks).
Action: They are interacting with a 3D Prototype of the invention that is rising physically out of the document/tablet.

3. The "Giant" Atmosphere (Dynamic Enrichment):
The Wall: A massive background object establishing context (e.g., a carved stone stele, a tapestried wall, a vintage newspaper, or a stack of VHS tapes).
The Tools: Giant-scale tools used to make the invention loom over the figures like trees (e.g., a giant chisel, a massive quill dipped in ink, or a soldering iron).
The Debris: The mess of the creative process (e.g., stone dust, spilled ink, burnt fuses, or crumpled layout paper).
The Comforts: Food/Drink of the era (e.g., an earthen jug of wine, a porcelain tea cup, or a can of cola).

4. Technical Specs:
Lighting: Must match the "Era Light" determined in Phase 1 (Flickering warm fire vs. cold electric buzz).
Perspective: Tilt-shift macro photography (45-degree angle).
Texture: Extreme focus on material weathering (rust, dust, parchment cracks, or plastic sheen).

Output: ONE image, 4:5 aspect ratio, "Historical Macro Realism."
```

### 741. 抓拍复古假日场景摄影提示

**作者**: [Keskin](https://x.com/craftian_keskin/status/2004992718154633573)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一个具有浓厚复古怀旧美感的逼真、抓拍的室内假日场景。它指定了灯光、构图、主体细节（一位穿着节日服装跳舞的女性），以及胶片颗粒和柔和色彩等后期处理效果，以模仿 90 年代末/2000 年代初的模拟摄影。

![抓拍复古假日场景摄影提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987634119_2j08zp_G9MqOmGWQAAzzo8.jpg)
![抓拍复古假日场景摄影提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987635678_01j7pv_G9MqOIqXEAESg8n.jpg)

```
A candid indoor holiday scene photographed in a warm, nostalgic vintage style. A cozy living room decorated for Christmas, with a fully lit Christmas tree in the background adorned with glowing string lights, ornaments, and a tree topper. Wrapped presents sit beneath the tree, adding soft points of warm light. The room feels intimate and lived-in, with framed photos on the wall and people seated casually on couches in the background, slightly out of focus. In the foreground, a young beautiful attractive blond adult woman is captured mid-movement, dancing naturally. She is smiling while looking slightly downward, joyful and relaxed. She wears a {argument name="sweater color" default="green"} knit sweater with a subtle festive pattern, tucked into a high-waisted {argument name="skirt color" default="red"} skirt. A slim belt cinches the waist. She has a red headband in her hair, which is medium-length, brown, and softly styled with natural volume. Her makeup is minimal and natural, emphasizing a warm smile and expressive eyes. Her posture shows motion, one leg bent, hips angled, arms loose, giving the image a spontaneous, authentic feel. The camera angle is slightly low and close, creating a dynamic perspective and emphasizing movement. Lighting is warm and soft, typical of indoor incandescent bulbs and Christmas lights. The image has visible film grain, slight blur from motion, muted contrast, and a faded color palette reminiscent of analog film photography from the late 1990s or early 2000s. Subtle vignetting and texture overlay give the image a scanned photo look. Photorealistic but nostalgic, documentary-style family snapshot, imperfect and charming. No studio lighting, no posed feeling, pure candid holiday moment.
```

> 生成一张经典侦探证据板的超写实图像的提示。它详细描述了构图，包括宝丽来照片、地图、报纸剪报，以及用红线连接的证据，所有这些都置于戏剧性的灯光下，以营造出一种痴迷的、深夜黑色电影的氛围。

![Noir 侦探证据板可视化](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987652954_jissvt_G9JTkAyX0AA90JY.jpg)
![Noir 侦探证据板可视化](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987653303_q6f5nh_G9JTqNyW0AAioz4.jpg)
![Noir 侦探证据板可视化](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987654344_h9fl2y_G9JTxn8XoAABakD.jpg)
![Noir 侦探证据板可视化](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987655731_ahotza_G9JT4psXkAE9osz.jpg)

```
A detective's evidence board investigating {argument name="subject or mystery" default="[SUBJECT/MYSTERY]"}. Cork surface covered with pinned items: polaroid photographs with handwritten dates, a street map with circled locations, newspaper clippings with highlighted passages, sticky notes with theories and question marks, and printed documents with redacted black bars. Red string connects related evidence across the board, creating a web of connections. Thumbtacks in primary colors. A single bare bulb casts dramatic shadows. Coffee ring stains on some papers. The atmosphere is obsessive, late-night, noir—someone has been piecing this together for months. A few pins have fallen, suggesting frantic recent activity.
```

### 743. 产品摄影的视觉创作模式提示（精确与衰减）

**作者**: [ttmouse - 豆爸](https://x.com/ttmouse/status/2004929843905831029)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: zh

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 的“视觉创作模式”设计的复杂系统提示，指示 AI 扮演顶级的视觉创意总监。它接收一个 JSON 格式的“创意骨架”输入（此处聚焦于机械键盘键帽、灰尘和齿轮，并带有“精确与衰败”的张力），并将其优化为一个最终的、高影响力的工业产品摄影英文图像生成提示。

![产品摄影的视觉创作模式提示（精确与衰减）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987758580_yv7jdd_G9LxDc6bgAEAk_A.jpg)

```
## 🎨 Visual Creator Mode

你是一位顶尖的视觉创意总监，同时具备 AI 图像生成能力。

我将提供一份由程序随机生成的"创意骨架 (Creative Skeleton)"，格式为 JSON。你的任务是：

1.  **解读并优化**：理解 JSON 中的各个维度（主题、张力、光影、场景等），将其整合为一个连贯、有视觉冲击力的画面概念。
2.  **先展示优化后的提示词**：在代码块 (```prompt ... ```) 中输出你将要使用的最终图像生成提示词（英文，约 50-100 词）。
3.  **然后，直接生成图片**：使用上述提示词，生成一张高质量的视觉作品。

---

### 优化时请遵循以下原则：

-   **化解冲突**：如果维度组合存在逻辑矛盾（如"工业摄影"配"微缩奇幻"），选择一个主导风格并调和。
-   **视觉锚点**：将抽象张力（如"异想天开 vs 真实材质"）转化为具体的视觉元素（如：融化的巧克力流淌在精密的金属齿轮上）。
-   **传播钩子**：画面需有一个"让人想看第二眼"的意外细节。
-   **风格基调**：若存在 `creative_directive`，将其作为画面的情绪指导；若存在 `oblique_strategy`，将其作为结构层面的约束。

---

### 程序生成的创意骨架（JSON 输入）：
{
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "creative_id": "v9jrcpus",
  "creative_world": "world:product_photography",
  "creation_intent": "形式或材料探索",
  "creation_intent_id": "explore",
  "generation_logic": "过程或制作本身是看点",
  "generation_logic_id": "process-driven",
  "twist_mechanisms": [
    "尺度错位",
    "剖面逻辑",
    "材质错置"
  ],
  "twist_ids": [
    "scale_mismatch",
    "cutaway_logic",
    "material_swap"
  ],
  "subject_kit": {
    "primary_subject": "{argument name="primary subject" default="机械键盘键帽"}",
    "primary_id": "a-mechanical-keyboard-keycap-set",
    "secondary_elements": [
      "灰尘",
      "微型齿轮",
      "规格标签"
    ],
    "secondary_ids": [
      "element:dust",
      "element:tiny-gears",
      "element:spec-label"
    ]
  },
  "core_tension": "精密 vs 腐朽",
  "core_tension_id": "precision_vs_decay",
  "stage_context": "白色无影墙",
  "stage_context_id": "white-cyclorama",
  "composition_rule": "双物体对比布局",
  "composition_rule_id": "two-object-comparison-layout",
  "lighting_rule": "三点专业布光",
  "lighting_rule_id": "three-point-professional-lighting",
  "imaging_assumption": "工业产品摄影",
  "imaging_assumption_id": "industrial_product_photography",
  "deliverable_type": "产品照",
  "emergence": {
    "score": 2,
    "label": "Interesting Combo / 有趣组合"
  },
  "final_prompt": "产品照. featuring 机械键盘键帽, 灰尘, 微型齿轮, 规格标签. inspired by 精密 vs 腐朽. with 尺度错位, 剖面逻辑, 材质错置. set in 白色无影墙. following 双物体对比布局. lit by 三点专业布光.",
  "creative_directive": "把失败当作最终作品",
  "oblique_strategy": {
    "id": "reverse_assumption",
    "desc": "颠倒一个基础假设"
  },
  "validation": {
    "errors": [],
    "warnings": [],
    "dropped_overrides": []
  }
}

### 744. 高级时装影棚照片拼贴提示

**作者**: [हम हिन्दुस्तानी ♥️](https://x.com/AiVIRALFUN/status/2004922049685516560)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张垂直的高级时装影棚照片拼贴画，其中包含同一位女性的 6-8 个不同姿势。它严格要求使用上传的面部图像以保持身份一致性，并指定了服装（黑色迷你连衣裙、透明过膝袜、黑色西装外套）、灯光（柔和高调）和美学（干净的白色无缝背景、专业编辑风格）。

![高级时装影棚照片拼贴提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987670023_42es3w_G9Lp-mFbUAAEblq.jpg)

```
Create a realistic high-fashion studio photo collage featuring the same woman in six to eight different poses, using the uploaded face image as the exact facial reference (same facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, and overall identity).

The woman has a slim and elegant body, natural proportions, pale to light skin tone, a delicate oval face, soft but sharp facial features, large expressive eyes, thin lips, and a calm, confident expression. Her hair is long, black, styled in a messy bun with loose strands falling naturally around the face.

Outfit: a tight black strapless mini dress, paired with sheer black thigh-high stockings, pointed-toe black stiletto heels with thin heels, and a formal black blazer worn in different ways across poses (fully worn, draped over one shoulder, hanging off one arm, or resting loosely on the arms). Accessories include a thin black choker necklace.

Poses included in the collage:

Standing front-facing full body pose, neutral expression, blazer hanging off the arms.

Standing back-facing pose with the head turned toward the camera, blazer worn on the shoulders, legs straight.

Squatting or semi-crouching pose with one leg forward, sharp gaze toward the camera.

Seated pose on a black chair with legs crossed, blazer off one shoulder, elegant and composed expression.

Seated low pose with knees bent, body leaning slightly forward, blazer worn on one arm only.

Half-body portrait facing the camera, shoulders relaxed, clean editorial look.

Environment: clean white seamless studio background with soft high-key lighting. Large softbox light placed in front and slightly to the side, creating soft shadows beneath the body. Even lighting that clearly shows fabric texture, skin detail, and shoe shine.

Photography style: high-end fashion editorial, professional studio photography, ultra high-definition, sharp focus, natural skin texture, realistic shadows, no lens distortion, accurate anatomy and proportions.

Composition: vertical fashion collage layout with evenly spaced images.

Aspect ratio: 9:16.
```

### 745. 图书推荐引擎自动化提示

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2004918440809595298)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多步骤系统提示，指示 AI 充当精英图书推荐引擎和动态雕塑设计师。AI 必须分析用户提供的图书（或图像）以了解其“氛围”，选择四本鲜为人知的匹配图书，然后输出一个图像生成提示，描述一个 2x2 网格的微型木制桌面自动机，每个自动机代表一本推荐的图书。

![图书推荐引擎自动化提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987677430_xcmuax_G9FmBojWQAAKjN_.jpg)

```
<instructions> Act as an elite book recommendation engine + museum-miniature kinetic-sculpture designer. INPUT: The user provides (a) a book title/author OR (b) an image of a book/object inspired by a book. Step 1 — Vibe analysis (internal only; do NOT output): Infer tone, pacing, world rules, character dynamics, thematic engine, sensory palette, and emotional aftertaste. Step 2 — Selection (internal only; do NOT output): Select 4 under-the-radar books with the closest vibe match (avoid obvious top-10 staples unless the input is already obscure). Step 3 — Output (ONLY output this; no extra commentary): Output ONE single image-generation prompt describing a 2x2 grid (four equal panels, thin clean dividers). Each panel is a miniature set built into/onto a classic book-object and includes a working kinetic sculpture/automaton that expresses that book’s core story through motion. No readable paragraphs. Under each panel: engraved plate “Title (Year)”, no extra text.
Default Template: 2x2 grid; each panel is a whittled wooden tabletop automaton mounted on a book-shaped base, with characters and elements from 4 random sci-fi books driven by a side crank with exposed cams and linkages. Style: Premium studio macro product photography, crisp micro-scratches on brass pins, clean wood joinery, neutral softbox lighting, medium shallow depth of field, 50mm perspective, seamless background in warm light gray.</instructions>
```

**Related**: [[综合产品]]、[[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[综合3D]]

### 748. 电商产品列表提示词：抓拍生活风连衣裙照片

**作者**: [Amanpreet Singh](https://x.com/amanxdesign/status/2004772982263349547)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 为 Google Nano Banana Pro 提供一个详细的提示，重点是为电子商务重新创建参考图像。它要求生成一张坦率的全身生活照，照片中是**同一位模特**，身穿一件完全相同的橄榄色短裙和厚实的米白色开衫，置身于一个有柔和自然光线的阴凉户外城市或公园般的环境中。

![电商产品列表提示词：抓拍生活风连衣裙照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987792434_boseo5_G87uEeqaQAAVexW.jpg)

```
{
  "description": "Candid lifestyle image of the *same model* wearing the exact same olive short dress from the reference — identical neckline, waist seam, and fit. The outfit is styled casually with a chunky off-white knit cardigan draped naturally over the shoulders or worn open, paired with clean white sneakers. The scene is outdoors in a cozy, casual setting such as a park bench, café terrace, or shaded sidewalk area. The photo should feel spontaneous, like a real moment captured mid-day.",
  
  "appearance": "Same model identity and proportions as the reference. Hair remains natural and loose, gently tousled by outdoor air. No heavy makeup — just minimal, natural tones with visible skin texture. Expression relaxed, calm, and content.",
  
  "pose": "Natural candid moment — the model could be walking with a coffee cup, sitting casually on a park bench, or standing while adjusting her cardigan. The pose should appear effortless and unscripted, avoiding stiffness or symmetry. Capture a sense of motion or relaxed stillness.",
  
  "lighting": "Soft natural outdoor light under cloudy or shaded conditions. No direct sunlight or harsh shadows. Maintain neutral color tones with gentle highlights on skin and fabric, evoking an overcast or late-afternoon ambiance.",
  
  "environment": "Outdoor urban or park-like setting — minimal modern café, bench, or cobblestone street with greenery or buildings softly blurred in the background. The focus stays on the subject, but the environment should add lifestyle realism. Keep the color palette neutral and warm (beige, olive, soft gray tones).",
  
  "camera": "Full-body vertical shot or mid-length candid framing, slightly off-center as if taken by a friend. Eye-level angle with mild depth blur for realism. Composition should have breathing space around the model for a relaxed visual flow.",
  
  "style": "Realistic lifestyle photograph with a cozy, relatable tone. Editorial-level sharpness but emotionally warm and grounded. Subtle film-like warmth may be added to lighting balance.",
  
  "focus": "Highlight the olive dress with cardigan layering, natural pose, and lifestyle context. Emphasize realism, motion, and candid imperfection for authenticity.",
  
  "negative_prompt": [
    "different model",
    "direct sunlight",
    "studio background",
    "posed or symmetrical stance",
    "glossy lighting or cinematic tone",
    "unnatural AI smoothing",
    "missing cardigan or sneakers"
  ]
}
```

### 749. 矢量图艺术风格转换提示词

**作者**: [Gagan Singh](https://x.com/GaganSingh8u/status/2004755629622395286)  **日期**: 2025-12-27  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，旨在将上传的参考图像转换为清晰的矢量艺术插图。它严格保留了主体的身份、面部匹配和表情，同时改变了他们的姿势，将调色板更新为现代配色方案，并将场景转换为高质量的矢量风格。

![矢量图艺术风格转换提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987660530_epuhdu_G9JSnaXbAAA_DMt.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded image as a strict identity reference only. Preserve 100% exact face match, facial structure, expressions, skin tone, hairstyle, and identity of every person visible in the reference image. Do not add or remove any person. While keeping identity intact, change the pose to a new natural and visually appealing pose suitable for illustration (for example: slight body turn, relaxed stance, different hand placement, or subtle interaction between people). Update the color palette to a fresh, modern scheme with harmonious tones, such as pastel gradients, warm–cool contrast, or bold contemporary colors, while keeping skin tones realistic and consistent. Convert the scene into a high-quality illustration blended with clean vector art style. Use crisp outlines, smooth curves, flat-to-semi-flat color fills, and soft gradient accents. Clothing design should remain similar in type but recolored to match the new palette, with clean vector shapes and refined edges. Lighting should be soft and even, optimized for illustration and vector clarity. Background should be redesigned into a minimal, stylish vector backdrop using gradients or abstract shapes that complement the new pose and colors. Render in ultra high resolution with sharp edges, clean layers, and a professional illustration + vector finish.",
  
  "negative_prompt": "face mismatch, identity change, extra person, missing person, wrong facial features, wrong skin tone, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, distorted hands, photorealism, rough textures, painterly brush strokes, dull colors, low quality, blur, noise, grain, watermark, logo, text",
  
  "style": "illustration + vector art",
  "mood": "modern, fresh, stylish",
  "lighting": "soft even lighting",
  "background": "minimal vector background with abstract shapes or gradients",
  "detail_level": "high but clean",
  "render_quality": "ultra high resolution, crisp vector clarity",
  "composition": "same persons, new pose, updated colors",
  "reference_strength": 0.85
}
```
