### 751. Nano Banana 图像生成提示词架构（JSON 格式）

**作者**: [Kaz / AI✖️ローコード](https://x.com/AI_LowCode/status/2004533394571681838)  **日期**: 2025-12-26  **语言**: en

> 这是一个详细、结构化的提示词模式（或模板），旨在通过确保以 JSON 格式系统地提供所有必要的视觉细节，优化 Nano Banana Pro 中的图像生成质量。它涵盖了从艺术风格、时间段到灯光、相机设备和负面提示的所有内容，使输出高度一致且专业。

```
# Nano Banana Image Generation Prompt Rules

When generating images using Nano Banana, the prompt must ALWAYS strictly follow the JSON format defined below.

## Prompt Schema

```json
{
  "image_type": "Define the specific medium, art style, or format of the source image.",
  "time_period_and_year": "Estimate the specific year or decade based on fashion, technology, image quality, and color grading visible in the photo.",
  "mood_and_vibe": "Describe the emotional atmosphere, energy, and intangible 'feeling' evoked by the image (e.g., the specific psychological impression it gives).",
  "subject": "Describe the main character(s) focusing on demographics, body morphology, distinct physical features, and posture.",
  "clothing": "Describe the outfit in detail, strictly specifying garment names, fabric textures, patterns, colors, and how the clothes fit on the subject.",
  "hair": "Describe the hair color, specific hairstyle name, length, and texture.",
  "face": "Describe facial features, skin texture, makeup details, and the exact facial expression.",
  "accessories": "List all visible accessories, jewelry, glasses, or held items, including their material and design details.",
  "action": "Describe the specific activity, movement, or interaction occurring in the scene.",
  "location": "Describe the environment, visible background elements, architectural style, and spatial context.",
  "lighting": "Analyze the light source, direction, color temperature, hardness/softness of the light, and shadow characteristics.",
  "camera_angle_and_framing": "Describe the vertical and horizontal angle of the camera relative to the subject (e.g., eye-level, low-angle), and the shot composition size.",
  "camera_equipment": "Estimate the likely camera type, lens focal length (e.g., wide-angle vs telephoto), aperture effect (depth of field), and film stock or digital sensor characteristics.",
  "style": "Describe the overall aesthetic, color palette, artistic technique, and visual processing style.",
  "negative_prompt": "List visual defects or unwanted elements to be excluded to ensure high quality."
}
```

## Instructions

1. **Output Format**: The output must be a single valid JSON object.
2. **Completeness**: All fields are required. If a field is not applicable, provide a reasonable default or describe it as "neutral" or "standard".
3. **Detail**: Be descriptive and specific in each field to ensure high-quality image generation.
4. **Language**: The values in the JSON should be in English (as most image generation models are optimized for English prompts), unless otherwise specified.
```

**Related**: [[时装大片]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[科技产品]]

### 753. Vogue 封面身份保留提示

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2004349877082280389)  **日期**: 2025-12-26  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示词，专为 Nano Banana Pro 设计，用于生成一张超现实的《Vogue》杂志封面风格肖像。其主要特点是严格要求保留上传的面部参考身份（100% 匹配），同时描绘一个俏皮的姿势（眨眼和嘟嘴），周围环绕着狗仔队的设备。

![Vogue 封面身份保留提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987982665_un12ml_G9DguT9XsAAqWqE.jpg)
![Vogue 封面身份保留提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766987988310_fh1kw1_G9Dhh7iWoAAbNGy.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "text_to_image_photoreal_editorial_magazine_cover",
      "version": "v1.0",
      "priority": "high"
    },
    "references": {
      "reference_images": {
        "character_reference_image": "UPLOAD_YOUR_FACE_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)"
      },
      "reference_rules": {
        "if_character_reference_provided_then_preserve_identity": true,
        "identity_lock_strength": 0.995,
        "face_similarity_priority": "MAX",
        "preserve_facial_proportions": true,
        "preserve_eye_shape_nose_lips_jawline": true,
        "preserve_skin_tone_freckles_moles": true,
        "no_beautify_no_face_morph": true,
        "do_not_copy_any_unprovided_identity": true
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "photorealistic_high_fashion_editorial",
      "sharpness": "high",
      "film_grain": "very_subtle"
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": {
        "en": "Photoreal Vogue magazine cover–style fashion portrait. Use the uploaded face reference and preserve it 100% (exact identity). A young elegant woman poses confidently, winking with her LEFT eye and making a playful duck-face. BOTH hands are raised near her face forming a heart/love gesture (clear heart shape). She is surrounded by paparazzi devices: multiple DSLR cameras and smartphones held around her from the sides and lower foreground, some phones showing her live image on their screens. Luxury, playful, high-fashion editorial aesthetic. Clean studio background with soft HDR glow and shallow depth of field. Realistic skin texture, not AI-looking, shot like a professional fashion photographer."
      },
      "subject": {
        "identity": "EXACT same face as the uploaded reference (100% match). Do not alter facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, jawline, or distinctive features.",
        "expression": "playful luxe: LEFT eye wink + duck-face pout (not exaggerated cartoon), direct gaze to camera with the open eye",
        "pose": "both hands raised near face forming a heart gesture (fingers create a clear heart shape), elbows slightly out",
        "skin": "flawless glowing skin with REAL texture (pores visible), soft highlight on cheekbones, no plastic smoothing",
        "makeup": {
          "style": "natural high-fashion beauty",
          "lips": "glossy pink lips",
          "blush": "soft rosy blush",
          "highlight": "subtle champagne highlight",
          "eyes": "clean definition, elegant lashes, no heavy smoky look"
        },
        "hair": "light brown hair styled in a low neat updo (chignon), a few loose face-framing strands, glossy and tidy"
      },
      "wardrobe_and_jewelry": {
        "dress": "strapless RED satin evening dress (luxury sheen, elegant folds, fitted bodice,"
      }
    }
  }
```

### 754. 时代广场圣诞闪光摄影，带动态模糊效果

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2004331815520424057)  **日期**: 2025-12-25  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的提示，用于生成一张在圣诞节期间，时代广场夜晚拍摄的、逼真的、抓拍的闪光照片。它详细描述了拍摄对象的特征（黑色波浪发、红色天鹅绒服装、柔和的烟熏魅力妆容），并使用强烈的电影级运动模糊背景（LED 屏幕、车流），与清晰锐利、被闪光灯凝固的拍摄对象形成对比。

![时代广场圣诞闪光摄影，带动态模糊效果](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766940136727_29h3ll_G9DQ2-_WsAAhH1u.jpg)

```
{
  "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
  "style_and_setting": "A candid on-camera flash photograph taken at night in New York City's Times Square during the Christmas season. Real smartphone/compact-camera flash vibe, high realism, natural grain, authentic nightlife atmosphere.",
  "subject_appearance": "The central subject is a young woman with long wavy BLACK hair (glossy, healthy volume). She wears a sparkling red velvet corset top with a pointed hem, a matching tiered mini skirt, and a small stylish reindeer antler headband.",

    "style": "SOFT SMOKY GLAM (NOT heavy)",
    "eyes": "soft charcoal-brown smoky eyeshadow with a gentle gradient, lightly blended (not blown out too far), subtle shimmer optional",

    "lashes": "defined lashes with mascara (optional light wispy falsies, not dramatic)",
    "brows": "natural-clean shaping, softly defined",
    "skin": "flash-friendly glow with real texture (no plastic smoothing), subtle highlight on cheekbones",
    "lips": "warm red lips (satin to soft gloss), clean edges but not overdrawn"
  },
  "background_elements": "The background features giant LED screens and holiday signage. One prominent screen displays bright 'MERRY CHRISTMAS' text against a red background. Other surrounding screens display Christmas themes heavily weighted with red, blue, and green colors. A large, brilliantly illuminated Christmas tree with ornaments is visible in the scene.",
  "lighting_and_atmosphere": "The overall atmosphere is darker with heavy cinematic motion blur in the background, turning LED screens, traffic, and crowds into streaking lines of color. The on-camera flash freezes the subject perfectly: face and outfit tack-sharp, clean flash catchlights in the eyes, soft flash highlights on skin. Wet pavement reflects the blurred streaks of light. Colors remain harmonious and believable.",
  "camera_notes": {
    "capture_style": "handheld candid flash photo",
    "focus": "subject perfectly sharp; background strongly motion-blurred",
    "grain": "natural low-light grain",
    "no_ai_look": "avoid overly clean studio look"
  },

    "Photoreal flash realism",
    "Hair must be BLACK and wavy",
    "Makeup must be SOFT smoky glam (NOT heavy)",

### 755. 使用构图锁定实现电影级圣诞节转换

**作者**: [Dominus the Prompter](https://x.com/AkatsokK/status/2004208391552409970)  **日期**: 2025-12-25  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多步骤提示，旨在将用户上传的图像转换为电影般的圣诞场景，同时严格保持原始构图、姿势和空间布局。它指示 AI 分析输入图像（主体、环境、物体），然后用节日灯光（温暖的金色光芒）、节日服装（挪威毛衣）和物体转换（例如，室内植物变成装饰好的圣诞树）来重写场景。

![使用构图锁定实现电影级圣诞节转换](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766940082861_vpqnv5_G9BgZZqXgAA8q_n.jpg)

```
### ROLE & OBJECTIVE
You are an AI expert in visual analysis and creative scene composition. Your task is to precisely analyze a user-uploaded image and then transform it into a detailed, atmospheric Christmas scene while maintaining the original composition, poses, and spatial layout.

### INPUT
[PLEASE UPLOAD YOUR IMAGE HERE]

### PROCESS STEPS

**STEP 1: Visual Deconstruction (Analysis)**
Examine the uploaded image and create a detailed inventory of the following elements:
1. **Subjects & People:** Who is in the image? Describe their exact poses, facial expressions, and the interactions between them.
2. **Scene & Environment:** Where does the scene take place (e.g., living room, office, park)? Describe the architecture, the background elements, and the original lighting conditions.
3. **Key Objects:** List all prominent items currently visible in the image (furniture, technology, decorations, etc.).

**STEP 2: The Christmas Metamorphosis (Transformation)**
Based on the analysis from Step 1, rewrite the scene description as if it were a high-production shot from a cinematic Christmas movie. Apply the following rules:
* **Atmosphere & Lighting:** Shift the lighting to a warm, golden glow (e.g., emanating from fairy lights, candles, or a fireplace). The mood must be cozy, festive, and magical.
* **Attire:** Replace the original clothing of all subjects with appropriate, festive winter wear (e.g., Norwegian wool sweaters, Santa hats, elegant holiday attire), ensuring the original poses remain identical.
* **Object Transformation & Enhancement:**
* Transform existing objects into Christmas equivalents where logical (e.g., a standard houseplant becomes a small decorated tree).
* Integrate essential Christmas elements: A decorated tree, garlands, wrapped gifts, advent wreaths, and subtle frost or snow if outdoors.

### DESIRED OUTPUT (Final Image Prompt)
Based on Step 2, generate a single, extremely detailed, and vivid visual description. This description should serve as a master prompt for an image generator to create the final Christmas photo. Focus on textures, specific visual details, and the festive "Hygge" atmosphere while emphasizing that the core composition of the original photo must remain unchanged.
```

![9宫格 K-Pop 偶像小卡风格提示词 (JSON)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766940196024_a2vl9t_G9AQiwCbwAAJJz8.jpg)
![9宫格 K-Pop 偶像小卡风格提示词 (JSON)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766940197711_qw9mm1_G9AQklGb0AAUk2J.jpg)

{
  "project_settings": {
    "task_type": "Single_Image_Contact_Sheet (9-Grid)",

    "resolution_mode": "High / Upscale (Crucial for face details in grids)",
    "batch_size": 1
  },

 "festive_accents": {

    },

      "color_palette": "Grey, White, Skin tone, with a pop of Red"
    },
  },

    "One single portrait",
    "merged bodies",
    "distorted grid lines",
    "missing panels",
    "cartoon",
    "illustration",
    "different clothes"
  ]
}

**作者**: [Gagan Singh](https://x.com/GaganSingh8u/status/2004107102869213469)  **日期**: 2025-12-25  **语言**: en

> 将上传的照片转化为高端水彩时尚社论肖像的图像到图像提示，同时严格保留拍摄对象的精确面部特征、比例和肤色。风格极简、感性、有力，描绘了一位身着裸色缎面高级定制服装的南亚女性，以流畅的水彩晕染和纯色单色背景呈现。

![水彩时尚社论：身份的保留](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766940078319_81if7j_G9AEvkTb0AUJrYv.jpg)

```
{
  "input_type": "image_to_image",
  "target_image": "UPLOAD_IMAGE_HERE",
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded reference image to preserve the woman’s exact facial identity, proportions, and skin tone with zero alteration. Transform the scene into a high-end watercolor-style Western fashion editorial portrait that feels minimalist, sensual, and powerful. Depict a young South Asian woman in her early 20s with a light brown complexion and a curvy, confident silhouette. Her natural curly dark hair flows freely with a soft, organic watercolor texture. Makeup appears editorial-clean in watercolor form: luminous skin washes, delicately sculpted cheekbones, softly diffused smoky eyes, and muted glossy lips rendered through gentle pigment layering. She wears a nude, champagne, or sand-toned satin or silk Western couture ensemble, interpreted through translucent watercolor washes and fluid brushwork—elegant, tasteful, and refined. Pose shows strong Western editorial confidence: weight shifted onto one leg, hips relaxed, one arm resting lightly, chin subtly lifted, expression calm, self-assured, and dominant through presence. Background is a solid monochrome watercolor wash in warm taupe, muted beige, or soft stone grey, with no props or distractions. Lighting is translated into watercolor through soft tonal transitions, gentle highlights on cheekbones and collarbones, and smooth shadow gradients. Overall mood is Western luxury, restrained sensuality, confidence, and modern femininity, rendered as a refined watercolor fashion illustration, not photorealistic and not digital.",
  "style": "high-end watercolor fashion illustration",
  "preserve_identity": true,
  "preserve_face": true,
  "style_strength": 0.8,
  "quality": "16K",
  "negative_prompt": "photorealistic, oil painting, acrylic texture, digital illustration, harsh outlines, cartoon style, anime, explicit content, exaggerated anatomy, cluttered background"
}

### 760. 美食海报，采用分体式照片/插画设计

**作者**: [Kris Kashtanova](https://x.com/icreatelife/status/2004036691879743733)  **日期**: 2025-12-25  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示模板，用于创建简洁、现代的方形美食海报。设计特色是采用一条锐利的垂直分割线，将构图分成两半：一侧是食物的超写实照片，另一侧是与照片相呼应的极简线条插画。插画一侧包含异想天开的草图元素和手写字体，非常适合商业设计。

![美食海报，采用分体式照片/插画设计](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766940074153_jfuw0p_G8_EvniW8AA3BUm.jpg)

```
Clean contemporary square culinary poster featuring {argument name="food item" default="Christmas pudding"} against a flat {argument name="background color" default="red"} backdrop. A razor-sharp vertical white divider cuts directly down the middle of the composition, separating the primary subject into equal portions. The first half displays a hyper-realistic photograph of the main dish with authentic surface details, true-to-life coloring, and natural illumination, precisely trimmed at the midpoint divider. The second half transforms into a minimal outline illustration that mirrors the identical shape and key features of the photographed side, keeping consistent scale and viewing angle. Surrounding the illustrated portion, scatter whimsical white sketched elements and casual handwritten-style typography stating “{argument name="label text" default="Festive Treat"}” using matching line thickness—incorporate directional pointers, dynamic streaks, and basic component graphics tied to the dish. Generous blank space throughout, uniform background tone, balanced diffused studio brightness, minimal shadow presence, contemporary commercial design style, human-free, object-focused composition.
```

**Related**: [[食品饮料]]、[[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]

### 761. 时尚摄影的详细图像生成提示

**作者**: [Melisa♡](https://x.com/xmliisu/status/2003816578798743995)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的图像生成提示，以 JSON 格式构建，指定了灯光、背景、构图、色彩配置文件、技术相机规格，以及对一张时尚照片中一位年轻女性倚靠在城市环境中的路虎揽胜旁的详尽主体分析。此提示旨在让 Stable Diffusion XL 等模型实现特定的高质量美学效果。

![时尚摄影的详细图像生成提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935966949_2getqq_G878jIiWsAEzLu-.jpg)

```
{
  "lighting": {
    "type": "natural daylight",
    "source": "sunlight, likely from the right",
    "shadows": "soft, subtle shadows cast on the car and wall",
    "direction": "side-lit",
    "intensity": "bright but diffused"
  },
  "background": {
    "type": "outdoor, urban setting",
    "details": "the concrete wall has visible formwork lines, the bush is dense and green",
    "distance": "close to the subject",
    "elements": [
      "textured grey concrete wall",
      "green leafy bush",
      "paved ground with grey interlocking blocks",
      "silver Range Rover vehicle"
    ]
  },
  "typography": {
    "font_size": "small to medium",

> 一个复杂的图像生成提示，比较了 GPT Image 1.5 和 Nano Banana Pro，要求生成一个 2x2 网格的四个圆形奖章，每个奖章都包含一个巨大的数学符号（圆周率、西格玛、积分、无穷大），以详细的 3D 微观世界浮雕形式呈现，并使用石头、青铜、霓虹灯和木材等材料。

![微观世界数学符号网格提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935941832_6l6dp2_G80nl6YXMAAKfMA.jpg)
![微观世界数学符号网格提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766935942509_agbpde_G80nml9XMAAXWmI.jpg)

```
2x2 grid of 4 monumental mathematical symbols built as 3d micro-world reliefs inside circular medallions [Top Left: The Pi (π) as a carved stone relief city inside a metal coin, tiny staircases and colonnades, equations engraved around the rim] [Top Right: The Sigma (Σ) as a mechanical relief with gears and steam vents, patinated bronze, sharp rim lighting] [Bottom Left: The Integral (∫) as a neon rain-soaked micro-alley world inside a steel medallion, reflective puddles, tiny silhouettes] [Bottom Right: The Infinity (∞) as a dust-storm desert relief inside a warm wooden coin, swirling sand texture, miniature rovers] Collector macro product photography, crisp rim highlights, realistic metal/wood grain, shallow DOF, high contrast, swiss 2x2 grid layout.
```

### 764. Nano Banana Pro 的魔法光影幻觉提示词

**作者**: [Umesh](https://x.com/umesh_ai/status/2003721767932821726)  **日期**: 2025-12-24  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 设计一个创意提示，重点是一个不可能的视觉错觉：在日落时分，一片平坦的田野上孤零零地立着一棵树，它的影子比平时更暗，但影子里却有柔和发光的叶子形状斑块，暗示着影子储存了阳光。

![Nano Banana Pro 的魔法光影幻觉提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766936160309_1gygmw_G86mR6zb0AACdQR.jpg)

```
A single tree on a flat field at sunset. Illusion: the tree’s shadow is darker than normal, but embedded inside it are soft glowing patches shaped like leaves, light inside shadow, impossible. As if the shadow is a container that stores sunlight. The glow patches cast faint light onto grass blades within the shadow only, making micro-caustics. Outside the shadow, no glow exists. The tree itself looks ordinary; only the shadow is magical-physical. Keep the scene extremely simple: horizon, tree, shadow, sky gradient. Photoreal grass detail, dreamy but grounded, “wow” from one impossible rule change.
```

**作者**: [Anamika](https://x.com/Anamika_Vibes/status/2003515658764767600)  **日期**: 2025-12-23  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一个三联垂直肖像拼贴画，描绘一位身着白色新娘礼服（lehenga）的南亚新娘，置身于宁静的雪景之中，包括一张特写、一张全身背影照和一张车镜反射照。

![雪景中的南亚新娘拼贴画](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766673175793_tbtfov_G83q3jCXkAAWXxt.jpg)
![雪景中的南亚新娘拼贴画](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766673176472_8gtez1_G83q3jIWMAAYgyV.jpg)

```
A three-panel vertical portrait collage featuring a stunning South Asian bride in a lavish, heavily embroidered {argument name="lehenga color" default="white"} bridal lehenga and delicate matching dupatta, adorned with intricate silver and pearl bridal jewelry (maang tikka, jhoomar, heavy choker necklace, and earrings). The scene is a serene, snow-covered landscape with gentle snowfall. Top Panel: Close-up headshot of the bride, looking directly at the camera with a soft, ethereal, and composed expression. Her face is perfectly framed by her veil and heavy jewelry. The background is a softly blurred snowy expanse (frozen lake/field) with visible snow-covered trees in the distance. Middle Panel: Full-body back shot, the bride stands facing away, showcasing the full grandeur of her flowing white bridal lehenga, which trails elegantly in the pristine snow. She is standing in a vast, open, snow-covered field with small, rustic wooden cabins visible in the far background among the pine trees. Gentle snowfall is occurring. Bottom Panel: Close-up of the side view mirror of a car. The mirror reflects the bride sitting inside the car, looking out with a thoughtful and slightly intense expression. The reflection clearly shows her face, jewelry, and white attire, framed by the car's mirror casing and the snowy landscape outside the car window. Ethereal, dreamy, and romantic wedding photography style, soft natural overcast lighting, Ultra-detailed, Photorealistic, High resolution, cool yet Inviting colour grading. Face reference must be strictly maintained for the woman's features.
```

(9-panel grid collage, photobooth style, studio lighting). A fun and vibrant 3x3 grid featuring the specific character in 9 different poses. [CRITICAL: Maintain exact facial features, preserve original face structure across all panels].

Styling: She is wearing a soft white mohair sweater. Accessories change slightly in panels: a reindeer antler headband, a thick red knitted scarf, and holding a giant Christmas lollipop. Poses: 1. Winking with a V-sign. 2. Pouting while holding a miniature Christmas tree. 3. Surprised face with snowflake stickers on cheeks. 4. Laughing with eyes closed. 5. Blowing a kiss. 6. Holding a wrapped gift box on head. 7. Making a heart shape with hands. 8. Pretending to eat a gingerbread man. 9. Saluting with a serious cute face. Background: Uniform pastel blue studio backdrop for all panels. Lighting: Bright, shadowless beauty lighting, high-key, commercial pop style.

> 一个高度复杂的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超现实的光学错觉照片，照片中一个主体似乎正从一张放在咖啡馆桌上的宝丽来即时照片中“走”出来，这需要一张参考图片来保留身份并提供详细的道具注释。

![即时宝丽来传送门光学幻象提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766673115678_f8fs9x_G81wnZEb0AAVOc1.jpg)

```
{
    "subject": {
        "description": "A hyper-realistic optical-illusion photograph. The woman from the uploaded reference portrait appears to be emerging from a freshly developed instant photo (Polaroid-style) lying on a small cafe table. In the instant photo frame, her full outfit is visible; in reality, her upper body and head rise out of the glossy print, casting a real shadow onto the table.",
        "reference_image_rules": {
            "use_uploaded_reference_portrait": true,
            "preserve_identity": true,
            "preserve_hairline_and_facial_structure": true,
            "no_face_morphing": true
        },
        "age": "20s",
        "expression": {
            "eyes": {
                "look": "Playful and confident",
                "direction": "Looking at the viewer"
            },
            "mouth": {
                "position": "Pouting or blowing a kiss",
                "energy": "Chic and charming"
            },
            "overall": "Lifelike, engaging interaction"
        },
        "hair": {
            "style": "Long, loose waves",
            "effect": "Realistic shine, slight wind movement"
        },

### 773. Red Carpet Multi-Panel Grid for Identity Preservation

**作者**: [Ditherly - Creative AI Hub](https://x.com/ditherly_art/status/2003337271630791027)  **日期**: 2025-12-23  **语言**: en

> A complex, structured JSON prompt for generating a 2x2 multi-panel grid of photorealistic images featuring the same person (locked identity from a reference image) in different paparazzi-style poses on a red carpet, emphasizing high-contrast drama and luxury styling.

![Red Carpet Multi-Panel Grid for Identity Preservation](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766673140921_oocl13_G8tkEekXoAETSY4.jpg)

```
{
    "generation_request": {
      "meta_data": { "tool": "NanoBananaPro", "task_type": "photorealistic_multi_panel_grid", "version": "v1.0" },
      "output_settings": { "layout": { "type": "2x2_grid", "border": "thin_white_gutter", "frame_consistency_rule": "same_person_same_outfit" }, "aspect_ratio": "4:5", "resolution": "ultra_high_res", "render_style": "high_contrast_drama" },
      "reference_constraints": { "character_reference_image": "UPLOAD_REF_IMAGE", "use_reference_face_only": true, "identity_lock": true, "strict_face_match": true },
      "global_prompt": {
        "scene": "Red Carpet Event / Gala Staircase. Red velvet carpet, photographers in background (blurred), flashing lights.",
        "subject": {
          "type": "influencer",
          "identity": "same person as reference image",
          "hair": "old hollywood waves",
          "makeup": "red lip, sharp contour",
          "outfit": "{argument name="outfit description" default="black sequin gown with high slit, gloves, diamond necklace"}",
          "prop": "clutch bag"
        },
        "camera": { "capture": "paparazzi style", "lens_equivalent": "85mm", "focus": "subject", "depth_of_field": "bokeh lights background" }
      },
      "frames": [
        { "frame_id": "A", "position": "top_left", "shot_type": "over_shoulder", "pose": "Looking back over shoulder, giving 'the look'.", "expression": "confident, fierce" },
        { "frame_id": "B", "position": "top_right", "shot_type": "walking_away", "pose": "Walking up the stairs, train of dress flowing behind.", "expression": "regal" },
        { "frame_id": "C", "position": "bottom_left", "shot_type": "sending_kiss", "pose": "Blowing a kiss to the crowd.", "expression": "charming" },
        { "frame_id": "D", "position": "bottom_right", "shot_type": "detail_jewelry", "pose": "Hand on hip, showcasing the rings and bracelet.", "expression": "n/a" }
      ]
    }
  }

### 779. 夜晚海滩上的倒置闪光照片

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2003173847890059682)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 一个创意提示，用于生成一张在沙滩夜晚拍摄的垂直、高角度闪光照片，采用“倒置”构图，主体头部位于画面底部。它详细描述了主体的波波头、特定服装（热带比基尼上衣、牛仔短裤），以及直射闪光摄影典型的强烈、高对比度照明。

![夜晚海滩上的倒置闪光照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667272413_vgx4nq_G8yz_Y3WkAA52WB.jpg)

```
(Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio). A creative, high-angle "upside-down" flash photograph taken on a sandy beach at night.

Composition (The Upside-Down Illusion): The image is framed "upside-down" from the viewer's perspective.
*   The Subject's Head is positioned at the BOTTOM of the frame.
*   Her Body extends upwards towards the TOP of the frame.
*   She is lounging on a vintage blue wooden beach chair.

Subject: A cool young woman with a short, ash-brown bob cut. Because her head is at the bottom, her hair fans out naturally onto the sand/chair (gravity effect). She wears "dewy" makeup with glossy pink lips that shine under the flash.
*   Tattoo: A delicate crescent moon tattoo with script is visible on her collarbone.
*   Pose: She lies flat on her back. One hand rests on her stomach; the other hand is raised near her face, fingers playfully touching her lips.

Outfit: She wears a white spaghetti-strap bikini top with a blue tropical palm tree print and light-wash denim shorts. On her feet (at the top of the frame) are light blue rubber flip-flops. She wears a gold sunburst pendant necklace (which falls towards her neck due to gravity).

Lighting & Setting: Direct, harsh "Flash Photography". The flash illuminates her brightly against the dark night, casting sharp, crisp shadows of the chair and her body onto the textured dry sand below. The chair has colorful rainbow-striped fabric, adding a pop of nostalgic color.
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]

A hyper-real aerial photograph of a colossal wind-eroded adobe fortress complex shaped like the Mandelbrot set silhouette, the main cardioid as a central kasbah plateau and the satellite bulbs as smaller outlying citadels, connected by narrow parapet causeways over sand-choked channels; intricate geometric reliefs carved into curved retaining walls, dunes swallowing the lower courtyards, tiny robed figures and camels tracing the perimeter for scale, golden-hour long shadows, dust haze, ultra-detailed cracked mudbrick texture, photoreal, filmic grade, 24mm.

### 785. 反乌托邦小说动态书本立体模型

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2003032009686352212)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> 一个富有创意的 Nano Banana Pro 提示，用于生成一个 2x2 的微型立体模型网格，每个模型都雕刻在一本书中，并使用动力雕塑自动机来呈现一部经典的 dystopian 小说（《1984》、《美丽新世界》、《华氏 451 度》、《使女的故事》）。该提示指定了工业美学、冷色调照明和逼真的微缩细节。

```
2x2 grid, four equal panels with thin dividers. Panel A: “1984” as a brutalist government building diorama carved into a book, rotating searchlight sweep driven by exposed gears, a mechanical iris “eye” embedded in concrete. Panel B: “Brave New World” as a sterile hatchery assembly-line automaton inside a hollowed hardcover, conveyors moving vial racks under a scanning lens. Panel C: “Fahrenheit 451” as a heat-warped kinetic book sculpture: brass “flame” petals open/close, pages curl via cam mechanism, ember glow (no readable text). Panel D: “The Handmaid’s Tale” as a chapel-like diorama with textile architecture, a slow-oscillating bell/pendulum and discreet camera motifs. Style: Photoreal miniature machines, cold industrial key light + red accent practicals, light fog, 40mm perspective, seamless background in slate steel gray, premium studio sharpness, shallow DOF.
```

**Related**: [[蒸汽朋克机械]]、[[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[综合3D]]

### 787. Hyper-Realistic POV Selfie with Bedhead Aesthetic

**作者**: [simeon-sanai](https://x.com/Naiknelofar788/status/2003000639249580164)  **日期**: 2025-12-22  **语言**: en

> A highly detailed prompt for generating a hyper-realistic, intimate POV selfie of a woman with a sleepy, sultry expression, emphasizing soft lighting, natural skin texture, and a cozy 'bedhead' aesthetic, designed to mimic a high-quality smartphone photo with a specific filter.

![Hyper-Realistic POV Selfie with Bedhead Aesthetic](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766667366630_9ku0sc_G8wWdMnb0AAzarb.jpg)

```
A hyper-realistic, extreme close-up POV selfie of the same woman from the reference photo, lying down and pressing her left cheek into a fluffy cream-colored faux-fur pillow that gently squishes against her face. Her head is tilted to the right as she gazes softly toward the camera with a sleepy, sultry, intimate expression — half-closed, heavy-lidded eyes and slightly parted lips.Her hair appears naturally messy in a relaxed “bedhead” state, with wispy strands falling across her forehead and partially over her left eye, without altering its original appearance from the reference. She has dewy, glowing skin with visible natural texture, a cold-girl makeup aesthetic featuring soft rosy blush on the nose tip and cheeks, subtly blurred pink-toned lips, and neatly groomed brows. She is wearing a single large white pearl stud earring on her exposed ear and a very thin, delicate gold chain necklace, with one bare shoulder visible. The scene is lit by soft, warm directional window light coming from the right, creating a golden-hour glow with gentle shadows on the left side of her face and highlights along the bridge of her nose, cheekbone, and lower lip. Shot on an iPhone front-facing camera at 23mm, f/2.2, from a high-angle selfie perspective with shallow depth of field and soft bokeh. Finished with a VSCO C1 or G3-style filter — warm tones, slightly desaturated blacks, subtle film grain, low contrast — creating a dreamy, hazy, lazy Sunday morning atmosphere.
```

### 791. 粉色和黑色美学风格的超逼真健身房自拍

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2002812888591868195)  **日期**: 2025-12-21  **语言**: en

> 一个单行逼真的提示，用于生成一张年轻女性的低角度健身房自拍，该女性具有特定特征（深色头发、蓝色眼睛、鼻环），身穿黑色网眼露脐上衣和运动短裤。该提示详细描述了姿势、健身房环境（包括一个“EVERLAST”沙袋）以及光照和分辨率等技术细节。

![粉色和黑色美学风格的超逼真健身房自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766489510378_d7yxnc_G8trs8zXYAAHCvt.jpg)

```
Photorealistic low-angle gym selfie of a stunning young woman with long dark brown hair tied into a high ponytail with a pink scrunchie, fair skin with a natural glow, striking blue eyes with bold winged eyeliner, long lashes, and glossy nude-pink lips in a confident smirk. She has a small silver nose septum piercing and small gold hoop earrings. She wears a black long-sleeve mesh crop top with strategic cutouts revealing her toned midriff and deep cleavage, paired with matching black high-waisted athletic shorts. Black hand wraps are visible on her hands. Pose: standing in a gym, leaning forward toward the camera with one arm extended holding the phone, the other hand resting on her hip, body angled slightly to emphasize her curves and athletic physique. Background: modern gym interior with black rubber flooring, a red and black punching bag labeled 'EVERLAST' in the corner, weight racks and green turf visible, soft artificial lighting with warm accents creating flattering highlights on her skin. Ultra-detailed skin texture with subtle sweat sheen, realistic mesh fabric details and hand wrap texture, sharp focus on face and upper body, slight depth of field with gentle background blur, high dynamic range, 8K resolution, photorealism, masterpiece quality.
```

### 795. 布谷鸟钟启发的文学机制提示

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2002729013848965584)  **日期**: 2025-12-21  **语言**: en

> 生成一张复杂的手工雕刻木制机械装置的超现实图像，该装置类似于布谷鸟钟，但内置于经典书籍底座中。它有两个面板：一个描绘了堂吉诃德和风车，另一个描绘了 1984 年的粗野主义瞭望塔，强调木工艺纹理、暖色调灯光和深森林绿色的无缝背景。

![布谷鸟钟启发的文学机制提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766489471375_obbfoo_G8apQFDW8AAQzBp.jpg)

```
a 2 x 1 grid, a hand-carved alpine chalet mechanism (cuckoo-clock adjacent but not strictly a clock) built into a classic book base with shutters, pendulums, and tiny moving figures. Panel A ({argument name="panel A theme" default="Don Quixote"}): carved windmill roofline with rotating sails and a spring-lunge knight. Panel B ({argument name="panel B theme" default="1984"}): carved brutalist watchtower façade with a blinking iris shutter and sweeping searchlight arm. Style: Photoreal hand-carved woodcraft, visible chisel marks and oiled walnut grain, cozy warm hearthlight + cool moon rim, soft volumetric haze, shallow depth of field, centered on rustic plinths, 65mm perspective, background in deep forest green seamless.
```

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2002484151388196937)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 生成一个 2x2 网格图像的提示，图像内容为雕刻木制桌面自动机。每个自动机都安装在一个书形底座上，代表四本随机科幻书籍中的角色/元素，由外露的机械连杆驱动。风格为高端影棚微距产品摄影，强调清晰的细节、中性柔光箱照明和中等浅景深。

![科幻书籍自动机微距产品摄影提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385929062_xvr575_G8aojgiXsAAVEum.jpg)

```
2x2 grid; each panel is a whittled wooden tabletop automaton mounted on a book-shaped base, with characters and elements from {argument name="number of books" default="4"} random sci-fi books driven by a side crank with exposed cams and linkages. Style: Premium studio macro product photography, crisp micro-scratches on brass pins, clean wood joinery, neutral softbox lighting, medium shallow depth of field, 50mm perspective, seamless background in warm light gray.
```

### 802. 孕期自拍：伴侣却不为所动

**作者**: [AIvy](https://x.com/aivygirl46/status/2002477939636715640)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张逼真的、温馨的单幅自拍照，画面中一位怀孕 8 个月的女性俏皮地眨着眼睛，严格参照面部和身体特征。场景是一个舒适的客厅，背景中有一位留着胡子的男士，表情不悦，模仿 iPhone 前置摄像头拍摄的抓拍风格。

![孕期自拍：伴侣却不为所动](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385977747_608obl_G8o7CRLXQAAImVa.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_request": {
    "meta_protocols": {
      "reference_adherence": {
        "instruction": "Use the provided photo as a strict face and body reference for the female subject.",
        "tolerance": "Zero deviation",
        "parameters": "Preserve facial proportions, skin texture, expression, body shape, hair color and style, and overall identity with 100% accuracy.",
        "stylization_constraint": "Do not stylize or alter features; keep completely realistic."
      },
      "format_style": "Single-panel intimate selfie",
      "aesthetic_quality": "Spontaneous iPhone front-camera photography (candid, cozy, realistic, slight handheld feel)",
      "global_textures": "Soft natural indoor lighting, subtle skin texture, slight lens softness at edges"
    },
    "consistent_elements": {
      "subject_look": {
        "hair": "Long straight reddish-blonde/strawberry-blonde hair, slightly messy from lounging, falling naturally over shoulders",
        "makeup": "Minimal/no makeup, natural flushed skin, subtle freckles if present in reference",
        "nails": "Red nail polish",
        "expression": "Playful wink with one eye closed, slight mischievous smile, relaxed and amused",
        "presence": "Attractive, confident, relaxed woman in her home setting, realistic proportions"
      },
      "subject_wardrobe": {
        "top": "Black sports bra/cropped tank top",
        "bottom": "Black leggings with white side stripes",
        "style_notes": "Casual athleisure, cozy lounging vibe"
      },
      "background_subject": {
        "description": "Bearded man with short dark hair, wearing light gray long-sleeve shirt, sitting on the same couch slightly out of focus in the background, looking down or away with neutral/unimpressed expression"
      },
      "setting": {
        "location": "Cozy living room couch",
        "props": "Dark blue couch pillows, colorful floral pillow, white fluffy blanket draped over lap/legs, neutral walls"
      },
      "primary_device": {
        "model": "iPhone (front camera selfie mode)",
        "usage": "Held by female subject at arm's length, capturing both herself and background"
      },
      "camera_angle": "Close-up selfie angle, slightly low and tilted, arm visible holding phone",
      "lighting": "Soft natural indoor daylight, warm and even, no harsh shadows"
    },
    "layout_configuration": {
      "single_panel": {
        "scene_type": "Intimate casual couch selfie",
        "subject_action": "Female subject winking playfully at camera, hand resting on stomach, lounging relaxed; male subject in background looking unimpressed",
        "mood": "Fun, teasing couple moment, cozy and relatable home vibe",
        "optical_effects": "Natural front-camera perspective, slight wide-angle distortion on edges, realistic depth of field with background softly blurred"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### 803. 复古闪光情侣肖像与身份锁定提示

**作者**: [Kaan](https://x.com/kaanakz/status/2002435217525486071)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个 JSON 提示，用于生成具有复古暖闪光美学的情侣肖像，类似于单人肖像提示，但适用于两个主体。它强制严格保留输入照片中的面部，并指定场景（豪华走廊，镜面反射）、灯光（硬暖闪光）和服装（女性穿白色缎面迷你连衣裙，男性穿定制黑色西装）。

![复古闪光情侣肖像与身份锁定提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385965323_frfd39_G8oUNuAXwAAac4D.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "quality": "HD",
    "type": "Evening flash couple portrait",
    "ratio": "4:5",
    "device": "iPhone 16 Pro",
    "look": "Vintage warm flash, real skin texture, film grain."
  },
  "identity_lock": {
    "preserve_faces": "STRICT",
    "instruction": "Faces must remain 100% identical to input photos. Zero AI smoothing or facial alteration."
  },
  "scene": {
    "description": "Luxury indoor hallway, mirror reflection, white paneled walls, marble console.",
    "lighting": "Hard warm flash, direct illumination, deep falloff shadows.",
    "vintage_settings": "Warmth {argument name="warmth" default="+18"}, Contrast {argument name="contrast" default="+22"}, Grain: Medium, Tint: Beige."
  },
  "composition": {
    "framing": "Knees-up portrait",
    "pose": "Female leaning on console; Male standing close/behind. Editorial chemistry.",
    "expressions": "Confident, soft glamorous gaze."
  },
  "subjects": {
    "female": {
      "outfit": "{argument name="female outfit" default="White satin mini halter dress, glossy highlights"}.",
      "style": "Soft glam, pink-brown gloss, peach blush."
    },
    "male": {
      "outfit": "{argument name="male outfit" default="Tailored black luxury suit, open collar white shirt, sharp silhouette"}.",
      "style": "Clean luxury grooming."
    }
  },
  "constraints": {
    "negative": "face-swap, skin-smoothing, plastic texture, AI artifacts, blur, face-merge.",
    "skin_rule": "Keep all natural pores and flash-induced skin highlights."
  }
}
```

### 804. 沙滩日落模特拍摄提示

**作者**: [Busra](https://x.com/promptLab0/status/2002409770637054138)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> A detailed prompt for Nano Banana Pro specifying the generation of an ultra-realistic, wide-angle, low-angle photograph of a young woman on a beach at sunset. The prompt meticulously describes the subject's appearance (slim, tanned, natural blonde hair, full chest), outfit (white strapless bikini, mini skirt), pose (laughing, hand in hair), and the environment (deep blue sea, orange/navy sunset sky), emphasizing high resolution and smartphone camera style.

![沙滩日落模特拍摄提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385918866_oy8pch_G8n9C-IWkAAKV1A.jpg)
![沙滩日落模特拍摄提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385918979_6vwxk3_G8n8w13WcAAahYR.jpg)

```
Woman;
age: {argument name="age" default="19"}
body: slim, visible veins, thin waist, full chest
skin tone: tanned, with bikini tan lines
skin: natural and radiant
lips: large and full, dark peach–toned lipstick, glossy
eyebrows: brushed with eyebrow gel
eyelashes: full and separated
hair: natural blonde, wavy, long, loose
face: dark peach blush, sweet small nose
bracelet: gold
hands: delicate, slender fingers, minimal tattoos, thin gold rings
arm: gold accessory worn on the upper arm
necklace: summer-themed details
top: Plain white strapless bikini
Bottom: extra mini white skirt with ruffle detail
Environment: sea, sky, palm trees, beach
sea: deep blue with soft highlights from the setting sun
sky: light blue with navy and orange clouds appearing at sunset, soft highlights
Pose: standing on the beach slightly away from the sea, one hand in her hair, laughing, confident
Photo: ultra-realistic, wide-angle lens, 8K resolution, shot on iPhone 17 Pro Max, 9:16 aspect ratio, long shot, slightly low angle, flash on
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[美妆护肤]]、[[综合艺术]]

### 805. 平铺式产品摄影提示（发明）

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/2002307108050776474)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的结构化提示模板，旨在利用平铺式（knolling flat lay）摄影风格，可视化特定年份的小工具和发明。该提示要求识别 3-5 种发明和相关配件，将它们以完美的 90 度网格排列在纯色背景上，并使用实体排版呈现年份，所有这些都以高端商业风格和韦斯·安德森（Wes Anderson）式的对称性来呈现。

![平铺式产品摄影提示（发明）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385915330_94h5cu_G8kHpzdXkAAhBsv.jpg)

```
Do this for {argument name="year" default="1983"} > You are a Professional Product Photographer specializing in knolling Flat Lay photography. I will provide a Year or inventor. Step 1: The Selection.  > Identify 3 to 5 inventions from that year, plus 5-7 smaller related accessories (e.g., if the invention is a camera, include film rolls; if it's a car part, include a wrench).   

Step 2: The Layout. Arrange all items on a flat, solid-colored matte background (choose a color that contrasts well with the items). 

The Grid: Align everything at perfect 90-degree angles. Organize them by size and shape. 

The Vibe: Deconstructed, organized, satisfying, geometric. 

The Lighting:

Soft, flat, overhead studio lighting (shadowless).

Output:

 A single 4:5 image.

The Year (e.g., "1955") should be arranged using physical typography (like metal letters or cut paper) placed in the center of the grid. 

Style: Wes Anderson symmetry, high-end commercial advertising, vibrant.
```

**Related**: [[品牌广告]]、[[综合产品]]、[[手绘素描]]

### 806. Paolo Roversi 风格的黑白时尚

**作者**: [Michael Rabone](https://x.com/michaelrabone/status/2002307049665831345)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成保罗·罗弗西（Paolo Roversi）风格高级时装黑白照片的提示，画面中一位女性身着蓬松的高级定制舞会礼服，站在鹅卵石长廊上，利用长曝光营造出梦幻般的动态模糊效果，背景是模糊的地中海沿岸村庄。

![Paolo Roversi 风格的黑白时尚](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385948598_ivp0sk_G8mflTrWkAAXHI-.jpg)
![Paolo Roversi 风格的黑白时尚](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385948423_fn9oyz_G8mflT0XIAEDu_2.jpg)
![Paolo Roversi 风格的黑白时尚](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385948987_wthc7e_G8mflTqXIAA8Qo9.jpg)
![Paolo Roversi 风格的黑白时尚](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385951130_t22y7p_G8mflTsWsAAwXFN.jpg)

```
A high-fashion black and white photograph in the style of {argument name="photographer style" default="Paolo Roversi"}. A young woman with a short dark bob haircut stands on a cobblestone promenade. She is wearing a voluminous, strapless black haute couture ball gown. The image uses a long exposure technique, creating a dreamy motion blur on the dress and her movements, while her face remains relatively sharp. The background features a blurred, whitewashed Mediterranean coastal village stacked on a hillside, with a calm sea to the left. Heavy film grain, ethereal atmosphere, soft lighting, melancholic mood.
```

### 807. 复古闪光肖像与身份锁定提示词

**作者**: [Sudee🥀](https://x.com/NameIsSudee/status/2002303041673048142)  **日期**: 2025-12-20  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示词，用于通过输入照片生成图像，旨在将美学风格转换为暖色调、复古、室内傍晚闪光肖像。至关重要的是，它包含严格的身份锁定规则，以确保主体面部与输入图像 100% 相同，同时应用特定的复古效果、逼真的皮肤纹理规则和详细的构图设置。

![复古闪光肖像与身份锁定提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385956542_s0n8se_G8mb_wcbMAE-SLd.jpg)
![复古闪光肖像与身份锁定提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766385956745_o7qws7_G8mb_zjakAARS57.jpg)

```
{
"meta":{
"quality":"High-Definition",
"type":"Evening indoor flash portrait",
"ratio":"4:5 vertical",
"device":"iPhone 16 Pro",
"style_reference":"Transform the INPUT PHOTO into this exact aesthetic.",
"look":"Evening flash, warm-toned vintage, real grain, realistic skin texture (NO smoothing)."
},

"identity_lock":{
"preserve_face": true,
"strict": true,
"rules":[
"The face MUST remain IDENTICAL to the input photo.",
"No changes to facial structure, proportions, expression, or identity.",
"No smoothing, no beautify, no retouch, no AI facial alterations."
]
},

"skin_texture_rules":{
"keep_texture": true,
"no_smoothing": true,
"no_blur": true,
"realistic_details": "natural texture preserved.",
"flash_behavior":"Flash highlights should reveal texture, not hide it."
},

"vintage_effect":{
"warmth":"{argument name="warmth" default="+18"}",
"contrast":"{argument name="contrast" default="+22"}",
"highlights":"{argument name="highlights" default="-5"}",
"shadows":"{argument name="shadows" default="+12"}",
"grain":"Medium (film-like)",
"vignette":"Soft",
"color_grade":"Warm beige vintage tint",
"sharpness":"Slightly reduced to mimic old camera softness"
},

"global_context":{
"scene_description":"Indoor hallway with wall decor, mirror reflection, white walls and warm flash lighting.",
"time_of_day":"Evening",
"lighting":"Direct warm flash illuminating the subject with strong falloff into the background.",
"environment_details":[
"Mirror behind the subject with reflection visible.",
"White paneled walls.",
"Marble/stone console table with a floral arrangement.",
"Soft shadows created by harsh flash."
]
},

"composition":{
"camera_angle":"Eye-level, straight-on portrait",
"framing":"Knees-up full portrait",
"pose":"Body leaning slightly forward with one hand on console table and the other arm across the torso.",
"expression":"Confident, pouty, soft glamorous gaze.",
"flash_effect":"Glossy highlights on skin and dress."
},

"subject":{
"makeup":{
"style":"Soft glam.",
"lips":"{argument name="lip color" default="Pink-brown gloss with warm undertone"}.",
"eyes":"Eyeliner + lashes.",
"blush":"Warm peach."
},
"skin":"Natural undertone, realistic texture, NOT smoothed.",
"outfit":{
"dress":"{argument name="dress description" default="Black mini halter dress with deep neckline and satin-like shine"}.",
"fabric_behavior":"Flash creates bright reflections and visible folds."
}
},

"background_objects":[
{
"id":"mirror",
"description":"Large wall mirror reflecting the subject's pose.",
"lighting":"Flash reflection visible but subdued."
},
{
"id":"flowers",
"description":"Vibrant bouquet on the table ({argument name="flower colors" default="yellow, purple, green"})."
},
{
"id":"wall",
"description":"White paneled wall with framed signage."
}
],

"rules":{
"identity_constant": true,
"no_face_change": true,
"no_ai_artifacts": true,
"realism":"Ultra realistic evening flash aesthetic with vintage tones."
}
}
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[室内设计]]、[[JSON结构化提示]]

{
"id":"flowers",
"description":"{argument name="flowers description" default="Vibrant bouquet on the table (yellow, purple, green)."}"
},
{
"id":"wall",
"description":"{argument name="wall description" default="White paneled wall with framed signage."}"
}
],

"rules":{
"identity_constant": true,
"no_face_change": true,
"no_ai_artifacts": true,
"realism":"{argument name="realism" default="Ultra realistic evening flash aesthetic with vintage tones."}"
}
}
Use the uploaded photo as the input image. Generate the image.
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[室内设计]]、[[JSON结构化提示]]

### 810. 正宗日式和服自拍肖像

**作者**: [light](https://x.com/Lightdev20/status/2001982224829501762)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个针对 Nano Banana Pro 的高度受限图像生成提示，专注于创建一张年轻日本女性身着传统和服在室内的超写实、非摆拍自拍照。该提示强制严格保留参考图像中的身份，并指定了真实的细节，如皮肤纹理（毛孔、柔和光泽）、透过障子门照射进来的自然光线以及真实的织物褶皱，旨在呈现出可信的日常照片效果。

![正宗日式和服自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238167402_6o25qq_G8h4NphboAAhQQH.jpg)

```
{ "type": "image_generation", "model_style": "true_to_life_photography", "aspect_ratio": "9:16", "resolution": "8K", "quality": "natural_realism", "identity_reference": { "use_reference_image": true, "face_preservation": "exact", "body_preservation": "exact", "no_facial_changes": true, "no_body_modification": true }, "subject": { "gender": "female", "age": "young adult", "ethnicity": "japanese", "expression": "calm eyes, soft relaxed face, gentle natural smile", "pose": "casual indoor selfie pose, slight body turn, relaxed neck and shoulders", "hair": { "color": "natural black", "style": "straight with slight natural waves, tied loosely or half open", "texture": "fine realistic hair strands, no perfect symmetry" }, "skin": { "tone": "light natural japanese skin tone", "detail": "real pores, slight uneven texture, soft shine on cheeks and nose" } }, "outfit": { "style": "traditional japanese kimono", "kimono": "soft cotton or silk kimono with subtle floral pattern", "obi": "properly tied obi with natural folds and fabric tension", "accessories": [ "simple hair pin", "no heavy jewelry" ] }, "environment": { "location": "traditional japanese indoor room", "background": "tatami floor, shoji paper sliding doors, wooden frames", "lighting": { "type": "natural indoor light", "source": "soft daylight coming through shoji", "effect": "gentle shadows, slightly warm tone, real room depth" } }, "camera": { "device": "smartphone", "lens": "standard phone camera", "angle": "eye level or slightly above", "focus": "sharp on face, natural falloff on background", "depth_of_field": "real phone camera depth" }, "rendering_rules": { "no_cartoon": true, "no_ai_artifacts": true, "no_face_symmetry_fix": true, "no_skin_smoothing": true, "no_extra_limbs": true, "no_hand_distortion": true, "no_text_or_watermark": true }, "final_look": "looks like a real everyday photo taken at home in japan, unposed, natural, believable" }
```

### 812. 变形石墨素描幻觉提示词

**作者**: [AshutoshShrivastava](https://x.com/ai_for_success/status/2001908107392504256)  **日期**: 2025-12-19  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano-Banana Pro 设计的高度复杂的图像生成提示，旨在创建一张石墨素描的超现实图像，使其看起来像是从纸中伸出来（变形错觉）。该提示需要一张参考图像来确定主体的身份，并详细说明了艺术风格，要求主体采用单色灰度，而周围的绘图工具和质朴的木质书桌则采用真实的色彩。

![变形石墨素描幻觉提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766238167584_0bsz2y_G8g00EJbQAAEl_N.jpg)

```
{
  "subject_core": {
    "demographics": "[STRICTLY FOLLOW REFERENCE IMAGE]: Age, gender, and ethnicity must match the uploaded source photo exactly. Rendered as a hyper-realistic graphite sketch.",
    "body_type": "Matches reference image physique, appearing to lean forward out of the 2D plane",
    "facial_features": "High-fidelity graphite translation of the reference face; shading emphasizes specific bone structure and unique traits from the source photo; eyes detailed with paper-white catchlights",
    "hair": "Matches reference image hairstyle and texture exactly, rendered with varying pencil pressure (hatching and cross-hatching)"
  },
  "subject_styling": {
    "makeup_grooming": "Matches reference image grooming standards; skin texture converted to realistic pencil grain and stippling",
    "expression": "Matches reference image expression (e.g., focused, smiling, or neutral), intense gaze directed relative to the viewer",
    "pose_action": "Anamorphic illusion: The subject's hand (drawn in graphite) creates a 3D effect, appearing to reach out of the flat paper surface, holding a realistic wooden pencil"
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "top": "Matches clothing from reference image, textures converted to graphite cross-hatching to imply fabric weight",
    "bottom": "N/A (cropped or fading into the white of the paper)",
    "footwear": "N/A",
    "accessories": "Any distinct accessories from the reference photo rendered in sketch format"
  },
  "environment_context": {
    "location": "Macro view of a textured, heavy-tooth white sketchbook page resting on a dark rustic wooden surface",
    "background_elements": "Real-world objects resting on the paper to sell the scale: a worn white block eraser, a metal pencil sharpener, scattered cedar wood pencil shavings, smudge of graphite dust",
    "time_context": "Studio lighting environment, timeless artistic setting"
  },
  "cinematography_and_tech": {
    "lighting": "Dual lighting setup: 1. Simulated shading within the sketch based on the reference. 2. External 'real world' harsh lamp light casting long shadows from the pencil and eraser onto the paper",
    "camera_gear": "Macro photography, 100mm lens, sharp focus on the paper texture",
    "framing": "Top-down flat lay or slight isometric angle to enhance the 'pop-up' 3D illusion of the sketch",
    "visual_fidelity": "Photorealistic rendering of paper grain/fiber, tactile graphite sheen, rough charcoal texture, high contrast between dark leads and white paper",
    "color_grading": "Monochromatic greyscale for the subject (graphite/charcoal tones), natural realistic colors for the desk and drawing tools"
  },
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5"
}
```

**Related**: [[婚纱婚礼]]、[[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]

> 一个图像生成提示，详细描述了一个垂直的三格拼贴画，其中包含一位穿着粉色蕾丝边上衣的年轻女性的特写自拍照，背景是光线昏暗、有人造暖光的卧室，旨在营造出 2010 年代初期那种随性、略带颗粒感的社交媒体美学。

{
  "image_structure": {
    "layout": "Vertical three-panel collage",
    "aspect_ratio": "Tall vertical strip",
    "shot_type": "Close-up selfies"
  },
  "subject_details": {
    "demographics": "Young woman with long, wavy brunette hair",
    "skin": "Natural skin texture, minimal or no makeup",
    "clothing": "{argument name="clothing item" default="Pink lace-trimmed bralette or camisole top"} with thin spaghetti straps",
    "accessories": "Long manicured nails ({argument name="nail color" default="nude/pale pink color"})"
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Dimly lit bedroom or hotel room interior",
    "background_elements": [
      "Beige/cream colored walls",
      "Heavy brown curtains on the left side",
      "Partial view of a bed headboard in the background"
    ]
  },
  "lighting_and_style": {
    "lighting": "Warm, indoor artificial lighting, low-light conditions",
    "aesthetic": "Candid selfie style, slightly grainy phone camera quality, early 2010s social media aesthetic, flash photography look",
    "mood": "Casual, intimate, playful"
  },
  "panel_breakdown": {
    "top_panel": {
      "expression": "Pouting or confused, eyebrows slightly furrowed",
      "pose": "Finger hooked over bottom lip, looking directly at camera"
    },
    "middle_panel": {
      "expression": "Soft smile, looking directly at camera",
      "overlay_effect": "Digital {argument name="overlay color" default="pink"} heart crown filter (Snapchat style) floating around the head"
    },
    "bottom_panel": {
      "expression": "Relaxed, mouth slightly open, gazing at camera",
      "pose": "Head tilted to the side, hand gently touching chin and lower lip"
    }
  }
}

### 814. 用于抓拍夜市照片的 JSON 提示词

**作者**: [AIvy](https://x.com/aivygirl46/status/2001763830553018565)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的图像，描绘两位年轻女性手挽手穿梭于熙熙攘攘的夜市。该提示详细说明了美学风格（抓拍式智能手机夜间摄影）、服装细节、姿势、环境（串灯、模糊的人群）和构图（中景、视平线），以营造一种温暖、迷人的夜间社交氛围。

![用于抓拍夜市照片的 JSON 提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237951458_6jhydu_G8exkfaXYAARWyj.jpg)

```
{
  "project_specifications": {
    "format": "{argument name="format" default="Single Image"}",
    "aspect_ratio": "{argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}",
    "aesthetic_style": "{argument name="aesthetic style" default="Candid, High-Quality Smartphone Night Photography"}",
    "rendering_engine_hints": {
      "realism_level": "{argument name="realism level" default="Ultra-photorealistic"}",
      "texture_quality": "{argument name="texture quality" default="High (modern smartphone)"}",
      "lighting_simulation": "{argument name="lighting simulation" default="Warm, soft string lights, mixed artificial night lighting, natural skin glow"}"
    }
  },
  "global_assets": {
    "subject_definition": {
      "identity": "{argument name="identity" default="Two cute young women with long, dark, glossy hair walking together arm-in-arm, with radiant, glowing skin"}",
      "wardrobe": {
        "outfit_left": "{argument name="outfit left" default="Brown leopard print spaghetti strap midi dress, delicate gold necklace, dewy makeup"}",
        "outfit_right": "{argument name="outfit right" default="Blue denim jacket over a red top, blue denim mini-skirt, radiant, healthy skin"}"
      },
      "pose_and_action": {
        "stance": "{argument name="stance" default="Walking closely together. The woman on the left is smiling warmly at a smartphone she holds in both hands. The woman on the right is looking forward with a sweet, genuine smile, her arm linked through the other's."}",
        "expression": "{argument name="expression" default="Left: Happy, focused on phone. Right: Cute, mildly smiling, content."}"
      }
    },
    "environment_definition": {
      "location": "{argument name="location" default="Bustling outdoor night market or patio"}",
      "background_elements": [
        "{argument name="element 1" default="Numerous strands of warm, twinkling bulb string lights hanging overhead, creating a festive glow and soft bokeh"}",
        "{argument name="element 2" default="Blurred crowd of diverse people enjoying the night"}",
        "{argument name="element 3" default="Patio tables and chairs with warm golden light"}",
        "{argument name="element 4" default="Trees with fairy lights"}",
        "{argument name="element 5" default="Market umbrellas"}",
        "{argument name="element 6" default="Other colored lights (blue, red) in the distance creating depth"}"
      ],
      "atmosphere": "{argument name="atmosphere" default="Lively, warm, enchanting, nighttime, social"}"
    }
  },
  "panel_architecture": [
    {
      "position": "{argument name="position" default="Full Frame"}",
      "shot_type": "{argument name="shot type" default="Medium Shot, Handheld"}",
      "composition": {
        "angle": "{argument name="angle" default="Eye-level"}",
        "framing": "{argument name="framing" default="Captures the two women from the waist up as they walk through the scene, with natural light fall-off"}",
        "focus": "{argument name="focus" default="Sharp on the two women, highlighting their glowing complexions, with a softly blurred background"}"
      }
    }
  ],
  "negative_constraints": {
    "avoid": [
      "{argument name="avoid 1" default="text overlays"}",
      "{argument name="avoid 2" default="watermarks"}",
      "{argument name="avoid 3" default="logos (except on phone)"}",
      "{argument name="avoid 4" default="studio lighting"}",
      "{argument name="avoid 5" default="oversaturated colors"}",
      "{argument name="avoid 6" default="heavy makeup"}",
      "{argument name="avoid 7" default="artificial highlights"}"
    ]
  }
}
```

### 815. 硬光美学下的夏日随性自拍

**作者**: [Vivek HY](https://x.com/Vivekhy/status/2001674944128946658)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个使用“图像分析”格式的结构化提示，后跟一个整合的提示字符串，旨在生成一张年轻女性在游泳池中的特写、抓拍自拍照。重点是捕捉夏日度假氛围，包含湿发、雀斑、“嘟嘴”表情等具体细节，并利用强烈、直射的自然光线营造高对比度和硬阴影，模仿 Z 世代的审美。

![硬光美学下的夏日随性自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237907124_r1hjyi_G8dgwOtbEAAU-Wy.jpg)

```
{
  "image_analysis": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Young woman",
      "hair": "Dark, wet, messy strands sticking to skin, long",
      "skin": "Fair with visible freckles across nose and cheeks, sun-kissed, natural texture",
      "expression": "Eyes closed, lips puckered in a 'kissy face' or pout, head tilted slightly"
    },
    "attire": {
      "clothing": "Black swimsuit or bikini top",
      "details": "Visible strap on shoulder"
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "Swimming pool",
      "background": "Bright turquoise blue water, out-of-focus pool edge, blurry figures of other swimmers in the distance",
      "atmosphere": "Summer, vacation, relaxation"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Natural direct sunlight",
      "quality": "Bright, harsh daylight creating high contrast and distinct shadows (e.g., hair shadow on shoulder)",
      "tone": "Warm, sunny"
    },
    "camera_style": {
      "angle": "Selfie angle, close-up portrait, slightly high angle",
      "focus": "Sharp focus on the face, depth of field blurring the water behind",
      "aesthetic": "Candid, smartphone photography, aesthetic, Gen Z style"
    }
  },
  "constructed_prompt": "Close-up selfie of a young woman with wet dark hair and freckles, eyes closed, pouting lips, kissy face, sun-kissed skin texture, bright blue swimming pool background, direct natural sunlight, hard shadows, wearing black swimsuit, summer vacation vibe, candid aesthetic, realistic, high detail --ar 3:4"
}
```

An aspiring female artist with paint-stained clothes standing contemplatively at the center of a grand gallery floor covered in a mosaic of black and white reproductions of famous paintings and sketches from Renaissance to Modernism, artworks in tiled grid fading into the background, low-angle composition for dramatic depth and envelopment, classic black and white film style, photorealistic rendering with brushstroke textures and frame edges, soft dramatic lighting symbolizing the weight of artistic history.

### 819. 6 面品牌识别网格模型

**作者**: [Willy](https://x.com/jw660227/status/2001629836968890545)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成专业的六格网格布局，展示完整的品牌识别套件，包括名片、小册子、传单、购物袋和日历，适用于可定制的品牌概念，是设计模型和作品集的理想选择。

![6 面品牌识别网格模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237854912_6nqyww_G8c3ujDakAkmQW2.jpg)
![6 面品牌识别网格模型](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237854856_r3nqc2_G8c3ujBakAA8P_z.jpg)

```
A professional 6-panel grid layout photograph displaying a complete brand identity suite for the concept: "{argument name="content" default="beauty"}". The image is divided into two rows and three columns, each cell framed with a clean white border. The overall style is a clean, modern studio mockup with uniform lighting.
Top Row (Left to Right):
Cell 1 (Business Card - Original): Two stacks of business cards showing front and back, featuring the primary logo, color palette, and typography of "{argument name="content" default="beauty"}". Clean white or light background paper stock.
Cell 2 (Business Card - Inverted): Two stacks of business cards showing front and back, featuring the same design as Cell 1 but with inverted colors (e.g., dark background with light logo/text).
Cell 3 (Pamphlet): An open tri-fold brochure showcasing detailed information, images, and branding elements related to "{argument name="content" default="beauty"}".
Bottom Row (Left to Right):
Cell 4 (Flyer): A single-page promotional flyer design for "{argument name="content" default="beauty"}", with a strong headline, imagery, and call to action.
Cell 5 (Shopping Bag): A premium paper shopping bag with handles, featuring a large version of the "{argument name="content" default="beauty"}" logo and brand pattern.
Cell 6 (Calendar): A desk calendar showing a monthly view with themed illustrations or photos related to "{argument name="content" default="beauty"}" and brand branding on each page.
All items across all six cells consistently apply the logo, color scheme, typography, and graphic elements of the "{argument name="content" default="beauty"}" brand identity. The background behind the grid is a clean, neutral grey studio wall. 4k resolution, highly detailed texture.
A minimal and chic handwritten signature 'Willy' is in the bottom-right corner.
content: {argument name="input" default="beauty"}
```

### 820. 穿着节日裤子的柔术演员工作室社论

**作者**: [Dopamint AI](https://x.com/DopamintAI/status/2001626869662392713)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的编辑图片，内容是一位模特在专业白色工作室中表演高难度柔术姿势。该提示要求保留模特在上传图片中的身份，但指定了幽默的服装对比：一件纯蓝色 T 恤和一条圣诞主题长裤。

![穿着节日裤子的柔术演员工作室社论](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237842903_f5zqnu_G8c1BtJbgAA4GRK.jpg)

```
{
  "task": "studio_flexibility_editorial",
  "output": {
    "quality": "ultra_high_resolution",

"head wears and accessories": "All subject head gear and accessories details are taken from the attached image, must be exactly and recognisable"

### 821. Nano Banana Pro 提示策略建议，以确保一致性

**作者**: [Tyyle](https://x.com/tyyleai/status/2001603803758420377)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 这条推文讨论了使用 Nano Banana Pro 模型实现一致、高质量结果的最佳提示策略，特别建议避免使用“x”网格，因为这会导致混淆和低分辨率输出。推荐的方法是分别生成一个四角度全身照和一个特写头像，以获得更好的一致性和细节。

![Nano Banana Pro 提示策略建议，以确保一致性](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237964446_hx412s_G8cf4aNWYAAmwa-.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 提示策略建议，以确保一致性](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237964617_0jk6z8_G8cf4aOWQAEd6-V.jpg)

```
gen a 4 angle full body shot, and close up headshot
```

### 822. 一位女士在笔记本电脑前工作的抓拍照片提示

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2001593489809903873)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个给 Nano Banana Pro 的详细提示，用于生成一张年轻亚洲女性坐在沙发上，使用 MacBook Pro 工作的写实照片。提示中包含关于她的外貌、衣着、配饰（玫瑰红葡萄酒、香薰机）以及柔和温暖灯光的具体细节，同时确保根据参考照片保留身份。

![一位女士在笔记本电脑前工作的抓拍照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237887088_sl2jl5_G8cWp4ra8AAhs1-.jpg)
![一位女士在笔记本电脑前工作的抓拍照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237887436_9w73p9_G8cWp4taQAAe5xv.jpg)

```
A candid photo of a young Asian woman sitting comfortably on a light-colored sofa indoors.
She is looking down at her gold apple macbook pro laptop, her head slightly tilted.
Her dark hair is casually styled, and she wears gold-rimmed glasses, which reflect subtle light.
Her expression is thoughtful and gentle, with one hand lightly resting near her chin.
She is wearing an oversize smooth white shirt, pant and a delicate silver necklace with a small pendant.
Next to her laptop on a woven surface, there is a tall glass of rosé wine and a small diffuser bottle with three dark sticks and one white decorative flower.
The lighting is warm and soft, creating a cozy evening atmosphere.
The photo is taken from a natural, slightly elevated perspective, as if by an iPhone camera.
Fresh and radiant makeup style.
The details of her skin, makeup, and clothing fabric are clearly visible, making her look bright and stand out from the background.
(Use reference uploaded photo, dont change face).
```

### 825. 个性化壁画工作室肖像

**作者**: [D. Humann](https://x.com/dhumann/status/2001507319344165359)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张高分辨率的影棚照片，照片中的主体在自己大型风格化矢量艺术壁画前摆姿势。该提示强调摄影写实主义、受控的电影级灯光，以及真实主体与彩绘壁画之间的清晰区别，并要求提供参考图像以保留身份。

![个性化壁画工作室肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237825336_lcrz0m_G8bGrc2aAAAdjzQ.jpg)

```
Create a high-resolution studio photograph featuring THE_SUBJECT, using the uploaded photo as a strict visual reference for identity. THE_SUBJECT’s facial features, skin tone, body proportions, hairstyle, facial hair, and overall appearance must match the reference image exactly, with no reinterpretation or stylization of THE_SUBJECT. 

THE_SUBJECT is standing naturally and casually, leaning against a plain concrete or plaster studio wall. THE_SUBJECT is photographed as a real person in a real studio environment — this is a photographic image, not an illustration.

Painted directly onto the wall behind THE_SUBJECT is a large-scale mural depicting THE_SUBJECT’s face and upper body. The mural is a stylized vector-art portrait of THE_SUBJECT, clearly recognizable as the same person, rendered in bold graphic shapes, clean edges, and modern illustrative color blocking. The mural is significantly larger than life-size and occupies most of the wall surface.

THE_SUBJECT’s real body partially overlaps and obscures the mural, reinforcing depth and scale, while still making it immediately clear that the mural represents THE_SUBJECT. The mural must remain visibly painted on the wall, not floating, not projected, and not a digital overlay.

Lighting is controlled studio lighting with a cinematic feel: soft but directional, illuminating both THE_SUBJECT and the mural evenly, with subtle contrast and color separation that allows the real subject and the painted mural to coexist clearly in the same physical space.

The final image should feel like a professional studio portrait photographed in front of a custom mural wall — realistic, grounded, and visually cohesive — with a clear distinction between the real human subject and the stylized painted portrait behind them.
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[数据可视化]]

**作者**: [𝗦𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮](https://x.com/saniaspeaks_/status/2001501423759196203)  **日期**: 2025-12-18  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张逼真的未来主义时尚杂志图片，描绘一位坐在工作室里的女性。该提示高度关注身份保留，要求模型使用上传参考照片中精确的面部、发型和表情，同时生成特定的服装（超大白色运动衫、云蓝色工装牛仔裤）和柔和的电影级灯光。

![未来时尚社论：身份的保留](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237906242_irzkwh_G8bC7PiagAAgQag.jpg)
![未来时尚社论：身份的保留](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766237906338_ykjkmo_G8bC7OYa4AAJUpd.jpg)

```
{
  "type": "image_generation_prompt",
  "style": "fashion editorial x futuristic",
  "identity_preservation": {
    "use_uploaded_image": true,
    "alter_face": false,
    "notes": "Use the same face and hairstyle from the uploaded photo. Do not change facial features or facial expression."
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "pose": {
      "position": "seated",
      "posture": "elegant and relaxed",
      "expression": "unchanged from the reference image"
    }
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "top": "oversized white sweatshirt",
    "bottoms": "cloudy blue oversized combat jeans",
    "footwear": "cloudy blue neutral sneakers or Nike sneakers",
    "socks": "white ribbed socks"
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "studio",
    "background": {
      "color": "muted sky-blue tone",
      "style": "clean, minimalist"
    }
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "soft cinematic glow",
    "effects": [
      "highlights skin texture",
      "enhances fabric textures"
    ]
  },
  "composition": {
    "style": "editorial",
    "focus": "model-centered with balanced framing"
  },
  "quality": {
    "realism": "photorealistic",
    "detail_level": "high detail in skin and fabric"
  },
  "output_goal": "Create a futuristic fashion editorial image of a woman seated with a relaxed posture in a sky-blue studio environment, preserving her exact facial identity and expression from the reference photo."
}
```

1. Surreal diorama emerging from an open vintage book of "{argument name="book title 1" default="Brave New World"}" by {argument name="author 1" default="Aldous Huxley"}: the pages form a futuristic hatching laboratory with rows of glowing test tubes containing embryonic figures on conveyor belts, lab-coated workers in white uniforms operating machines, a large all-seeing eye symbol on the wall, conveyor belts moving via hidden mechanisms, cool blue neon lighting, hyper-detailed miniature sculpture, clinical and eerie atmosphere, photorealistic.

Detailed miniature diorama in an open aged book for "{argument name="book title 2" default="Don Quixote"}" by {argument name="author 2" default="Cervantes"}: left page with "{argument name="engraving text" default="DON QUIXOTE"}" engraved, right pages sculpted into a Spanish landscape with a massive wooden windmill turning slowly, tiny knight on horseback charging with lance raised, Sancho Panza on donkey following, dusty plains and gears for windmill blades, warm golden hour lighting, hyper-realistic handcrafted sculpture, whimsical yet epic scale.

> 这是一个高度技术化、结构化的提示，专为逼真的图像生成而设计，其中指定了相机设置（f/11 以获得深景深）、光照、纹理物理，以及对在巴黎黄金时段 Carette 咖啡馆露台上模特的详细场景描述。该提示强调整个图像的清晰度和细节。

![金色时分巴黎咖啡馆生活高细节照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042062125_q4lxmr_G8X9kMxWcAAO0Pj.jpg)

{
  "meta": {
    "project": "Paris_Carette_Cafe_Golden_Hour_Flux_V4.2",
    "target_engine": "Flux.1 [dev] / Nano Banana Pro",
    "version": "4.2.0 (Everything in Focus - f/11)",

      "highlights": "Bright golden highlights on hair and skin"
    }

Background is sharp and detailed: Beige umbrella with 'CARETTE' text, busy café terrace with customers, and Haussmann architecture are clearly visible with no bokeh. Parisian chic aesthetic.",
  "negative_prompt_string": "",
  "note_on_negative": "Flux ignores explicit negative prompts. Sharpness is ensur

### 831. 产品摄影网格生成，助您节省成本

**作者**: [gokaygokay](https://x.com/gokayfem/status/2001265620449444251)  **日期**: 2025-12-17  **语言**: en

> 此提示提供了三种使用 Nano Banana Pro 生成产品摄影网格的变体。目标是以 6x6 网格格式快速尝试不同的情绪、美学和产品变体（或同一产品的变体），以节省单个图像生成所需的积分。

![产品摄影网格生成，助您节省成本](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042036025_pzkars_G8XoB3PWYAA4hS7.jpg)
![产品摄影网格生成，助您节省成本](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042036852_0116fc_G8XsB3PXgAA5A8i.jpg)
![产品摄影网格生成，助您节省成本](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042037262_hkfadw_G8XpY_9WQAQKUaL.jpg)
![产品摄影网格生成，助您节省成本](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1766042038786_qbjsr0_G8XsJBFWIAAqGRS.jpg)

```
Generate a 6x6 grid of professional product photography. Reference the original image's mood, quality, and aesthetic. Each cell should showcase a completely different product ({argument name="products" default="bags, bottles, hats, cosmetics, jewelry, food, electronics, etc."}) in a unique studio setting with a distinct color palette. Maintain the same high-end commercial photography style throughout. Vary the products, lighting, backgrounds, props, and styling dramatically across all 36 images.

Generate a 6x6 grid of variations based on the original image. Keep the same product but vary the color palettes, backgrounds, lighting, angles, props, and styling dramatically across all 36 cells. Maintain the same professional quality and aesthetic throughout.

Generate a 6x6 grid showing 36 unique variations of this product. Experiment wildly with color palettes, environments (studio, lifestyle, minimal, textured backgrounds), lighting styles, compositions, and moods. Keep product recognition and professional quality consistent, but make each cell visually distinct.
```

### 840. 荒谬可专利发明生成器

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的多步骤提示，旨在分析三个上传的随机物体，将其特征组合成一个荒谬但可申请专利的发明，然后输出一个 2x2 网格，其中包含技术专利图纸、一张光面产品渲染图和一份详细的市场营销说明。

![荒谬可专利发明生成器](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765991299812_y1t9al_G8BcU0aXQAQ5t1Z.jpg)

```
Step 1 – Upload three random objects. Step 2: analyze these gadgets, learn about their features how they can be combined, what can be inspired by them.  Step 3: Combine these three objects into one single absurd but legally patentable invention, borrowing elements from each. Output:  Step 4, draw a 2x2 grid of this invention:   Grid 1 & 2: “Create 2 clean black-and-white technical patent drawings (exploded view, side, top, perspective) of this new invention in classic patent illustration style.” Grid 3  “Now render the final product in glossy Apple-product-photography style on white infinity background with subtle reflection. Add fake patent number in corner.”  Grid 4: detailed explanation of selling points like a tech magazine.
```

"scene_context": {
    "setting": "Modern kitchen interior with white cabinets and marble island",
    "occasion": "Holiday party / Girls' night in / New Year's Eve celebration",
    "vibe": "Chaotic fun, high energy, influencer lifestyle, candid flash photography"
  },
  "camera_details": {
    "camera": "Canon EOS R5 Mirrorless Digital Camera",
    "lens": "Canon RF 24-70mm f/2.8L IS USM Lens",
    "focal_length": "35mm",
    "aperture": "f/4.0",
    "shutter_speed": "1/125 sec",
    "iso": "ISO 800",
    "lighting": "On-camera direct flash with warm ambient indoor light fill",
    "focus_mode": "AF-C (Continuous Auto-Focus) tracking the central subject",
    "composition": "Medium-wide angle, eye-level shot",
    "style": "Candid, unposed, flash-lit photograph"
  },
  "subjects": [
    {
      "id": "subject_left",
      "position": "Kneeling on top of the marble kitchen island",
      "appearance": "Young woman with long dark hair, ecstatic expression, head tilted back, mouth open",
      "apparel": "Emerald green satin pajama set with white piping (long sleeve button-down, long pants)",
      "action": "Catching a stream of champagne being poured from above into her mouth"
    },
    {
      "id": "subject_center",
      "position": "Standing behind the kitchen island",
      "appearance": "Young woman with split-dyed hair (right side bright red, left side bright green)",
      "apparel": "Light pink satin pajama short set (short sleeve button-down, shorts)",
      "action": "Holding a green champagne bottle upside down high in the air, pouring it into the first subject's mouth, laughing"
    },
    {
      "id": "subject_right",
      "position": "Standing to the right side of the frame",
      "appearance": "Young woman with long ginger/red hair, surprised and excited expression",
      "apparel": "Cream/white satin pajama set with ostrich feather cuffs on the sleeves",
      "action": "Holding a blue smartphone to record the scene, holding a champagne coupe glass in the other hand"
    }
  ],
  "props_and_decor": {
    "foreground_items": [
      "Green holiday tinsel garland on the counter",
      "Champagne flutes filled with liquid",
      "Silver cocktail shaker",

> 一个旨在从单一概念生成一致四格社论网格的提示，确保在所有四个不同姿势和相机角度中，模型、服装（黄色、橙色和黑色图案运动服）、灯光（深蓝色工作室）和混凝土块背景保持一致。

A four-panel grid photograph, based on the content of image_4.png. All four panels show the same young woman with braided dark hair wearing the yellow, orange, and black graphic tracksuit and chunky sneakers. Top left: Model sitting back on a concrete cube, looking down. Top right: Close-up of model with arms crossed, looking directly forward. Bottom left: Model squatting on a concrete cube, looking up. Bottom right: Model sitting on a concrete cube with legs wide, looking off to the side. The studio setting with dark blue lighting and concrete blocks is consistent throughout all panels.
