### 844. 博物馆级动物肖像，融入奢侈品牌图案

**作者**: [ttmouse - 豆爸](https://x.com/ttmouse/status/2000114041730289851)  **日期**: 2025-12-14  **语言**: zh

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成一张博物馆品质、超精细的动物肖像（例如，狗、鱼，鸟），背景为纯白色或纯黑色。其核心特点是将某个奢侈品牌的标志性图案（如路易威登的 Monogram）以清晰可辨的方式融入动物的自然斑纹（斑点、条纹、鳞片）中，同时保持优雅、高端的商业美学。

![博物馆级动物肖像，融入奢侈品牌图案](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765991354825_xeahk4_G8HUjarasAAc7Yo.jpg)

```
MUSEUM-QUALITY ultra-detailed {argument name="动物名称" default="[动物名称]"} portrait, pure {argument name="背景颜色" default="white/black"} background, professional studio photography, 8K resolution. This must be BREATHTAKINGLY BEAUTIFUL and ELEGANT.

PERFECT POSE - FULL BODY VISIBLE (CRITICAL):
- The {argument name="动物名称" default="[动物名称]"} is captured in graceful side profile view, facing left
- {argument name="姿态描述" default="[姿态描述: Standing pose for dogs/cats | Swimming pose for fish | Sitting pose for birds | Flying pose for butterflies]"}
- The COMPLETE animal is visible from head to tail/fins/wings to all legs/paws/feet
- Elegant posture - {argument name="优雅姿态" default="[back straight for mammals | body curved for fish | wings spread for birds]"}, displaying perfect {argument name="品种/物种" default="[breed/species]"} proportions
- Head held with dignity and grace
- The animal appears poised, noble, and regal like a fine art subject
- Overall silhouette shows complete graceful body lines in their most beautiful form

COMPOSITION (CRITICAL):
- FULL BODY of the animal is visible within the frame
- The animal occupies the central 60-70% of the image
- Generous {argument name="背景颜色" default="background color"} negative space around all sides (top, bottom, left, right)
- Animal is centered with balanced spacing
- Clean, minimalist, gallery-worthy composition
- High-end luxury brand campaign aesthetic

BASE COLOR/TEXTURE:
{argument name="根据动物选择基础描述" default="[根据动物选择基础描述]"}
For spotted animals (Dalmatian, Leopard, Koi fish): 
  - Pristine {argument name="基础颜色" default="white/golden/orange"} base with natural {argument name="纹理" default="texture: fur/scales/feathers"}
  - The base color is luminous and clean
  
For solid color animals (Black cat, White dove, Golden retriever):
  - {argument name="基础颜色" default="[Base color]"} coat/fur/feathers with silky sheen
  - Natural highlights defining body structure

BRAND PATTERN INTEGRATION - {argument name="品牌名称" default="[品牌名称]"} (CLEAR AND RECOGNIZABLE):

PRIMARY (55-60% - Natural animal patterns):
- Natural {argument name="自然图案" default="spots/stripes/scales/feathers"} in organic distribution
- Maintains the authentic look of the {argument name="动物物种" default="[animal species]"}
- Irregular, asymmetric patterns true to nature

SECONDARY (40-45% - CLEAR Brand Elements):
The {argument name="自然图案元素" default="natural pattern elements"} are strategically arranged and shaped to clearly form recognizable {argument name="品牌名称" default="[品牌名称]"} motifs:

Brand: {argument name="品牌" default="[Louis Vuitton]"}
Core visual elements: {argument name="核心视觉元素" default="[LV monogram letters, quatrefoil four-petal flowers, geometric diamonds]"}

On the MAIN BODY (most visible area - torso/back/side):
- Multiple clear "{argument name="核心 Logo" default="[核心Logo]"}" formed by connected {argument name="图案连接" default="spots/stripes/markings"} - making them easily readable and recognizable
- Several {argument name="品牌标志性图案" default="[品牌标志性图案]"} clearly visible - {argument name="例如" default="[例如: quatrefoil flower shapes formed by 4 rounded spots in clover pattern]"}
- {argument name="装饰性几何图案" default="[装饰性几何图案]"} between the main logos

On the HEAD and NECK area:
- 1-2 smaller {argument name="Logo" default="[Logo]"} formations  
- {argument name="标志性图案" default="[标志性图案]"} near the {argument name="面部特征" default="ear/eye/facial features"}

On the LEGS/TAIL/WINGS/FINS:
- {argument name="几何图案或重复纹样" default="[几何图案或重复纹样]"} suggesting the brand's signature pattern

Pattern execution requirements:
- The {argument name="品牌核心元素" default="[品牌核心元素]"} should be CLEARLY RECOGNIZABLE at first glance - not abstract hints
- {argument name="Pattern elements" default="[Pattern elements]"} are arranged in organized repeating pattern like {argument name="品牌" default="[品牌]"} signature print/canvas
```

**Related**: [[品牌广告]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[名片与Logo]]

### 849. 荒谬产品融合概念的两阶段提示

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/1999416184270115180)  **日期**: 2025-12-12  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的两阶段提示，旨在将日常物品融合为新颖、荒诞但又看似合理的发明。第一阶段分析三个参考物品的功能、材料和文化基因。第二阶段生成一个 3x3 的照片级真实 3D 概念网格，采用迪特·拉姆斯/戴森风格，并配有极简主义标签。

![荒谬产品融合概念的两阶段提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765990938676_lditd8_G7477OFWIAAcFlu.jpg)

```
PHASE 1 PROMPT: Analyze these [{argument name="object 1" default="OBJECT 1"}], [{argument name="object 2" default="OBJECT 2"}], [{argument name="object 3" default="OBJECT 3"}] images. Extract: 1) Primary function, 2) Material DNA (metal/plastic ratio, texture), 3) Ergonomic signature (grip angle, weight distribution), 4) Mechanical principle, 5) Cultural association. Output as structured JSON.

PHASE 2 PROMPT: Create a 3x3 grid of photorealistic product renderings on a pristine white background. Each cell must be a hyper-realistic 3D concept that fuses elements from the previous analysis. For each invention, add minimalist navy blue text in Helvetica Neue: [Invention Name], [Core Mechanism], [Use Case]. Style: Dieter Rams meets Dyson - clean, technical, premium. Include subtle shadows and a 1px gold border on each cell. Make inventions absurd yet plausible (e.g., "Acoustic Peeler: uses sound waves to strip vegetables").
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[综合产品]]、[[综合3D]]

### 851. 复古 CRT 电视墙上的女友肖像

**作者**: [七表哥](https://x.com/seven_cuz/status/1999352111587639654)  **日期**: 2025-12-12  **语言**: zh

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 生成提示：一张宽幅照片，画面中是一堵由大量复古 CRT 电视机混乱堆叠而成的墙。每台屏幕都显示一个上传主题（女友/女神）的肖像，并以独特的艺术风格呈现（例如，写实、漫画、故障艺术、热成像）。

![复古 CRT 电视墙上的女友肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765990966706_r71lwr_G78gJHlaEAAu-9e.jpg)

```
A wide, detailed photograph of a massive, irregularly stacked wall of vintage CRT televisions. The TVs are arranged in a chaotic, layered pile, with different sizes and quantities overlapping and creating depth. Each screen displays a portrait of the young woman from my upload image, rendered in a unique artistic style. There are screens with realistic color portraits, black and white photos, sepia tones, vibrant comic book art, neon line drawings, glitch art with static and distortion, thermal imaging, and rainbow scanline effects. The framing of her face varies, with close-ups, off-center compositions, and partial crops across the different screens. The dark, textured concrete wall and the glowing screens are lit by studio lighting.
```

### 852. 2000 年代初期数码相机闪光灯肖像提示词

**作者**: [Harboris](https://x.com/Harboris_27/status/1999313725980098624)  **日期**: 2025-12-12  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细图像生成提示，旨在重现一张坦率、怀旧的年轻男子肖像，该肖像显示在一台紧凑型佳能数码相机的屏幕上，强调刺眼的直射闪光灯照明、柔和的色彩和真实的屏幕光晕，让人联想到 2000 年代初期的数码摄影。

![2000 年代初期数码相机闪光灯肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765990991603_tdjoe8_G779O2jagAQLkpF.jpg)

```
Use the facial features of the attached photo. A close-up shot of a young man displayed on the screen of a compact Canon digital camera. The camera body surrounds the image with its buttons, dials, and textured surface visible, including the FUNC/SET wheel, DISP button, and the “IMAGE STABILIZER” label along the side.

The photo on the screen shows the young man indoors at night, illuminated by a bright built-in flash that creates sharp highlights on his face and hair. He has short, slightly messy dark hair with loose strands framing part of his forehead, and a soft, slightly open-lip expression.

The flash accentuates his features against a dim, cluttered kitchen background with appliances, shelves, and metallic surfaces softly blurred. The mood is candid, raw, nostalgic, and reminiscent of early 2000s digital camera snapshots. Colors are slightly muted with cool undertones, strong flash contrast, and natural grain from the display. No text, no logos inside the photo preview itself.

Scale ratio: 4:5 vertical
Camera: compact digital camera simulation
Lens: equivalent to 28–35mm
Aperture: f/2.8
ISO: 400
Shutter speed: 1/60 with flash
White balance: auto flash
Lighting: harsh direct flash on subject, ambient low light in the background
Color grading: nostalgic digital camera tones, high contrast flash, subtle display grain, authentic screen glow.
```

### 853. 图像转换为极简矢量海报

**作者**: [Yapper](https://x.com/yapper_so/status/1999243028868005944)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的复杂、结构化提示，旨在将现有图像转换为简洁、极简主义的矢量风格海报。它要求进行几何简化，使用受限的调色板（3–6 种颜色，无渐变），采用平面照明，并保留基本特征，同时去除所有照片级真实感细节和纹理。此提示需要输入图像进行转换。

![图像转换为极简矢量海报](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967671182_e5chfe_G76855lW4AIyWq7.jpg)
![图像转换为极简矢量海报](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967671276_9tw8p0_G76855lWwAAsVft.jpg)

{ "task": "Transform the provided image into a minimal vector-style poster.", "style": { "overall_look": "Flat-design, geometric simplification, minimalist vector art", "color_palette": { "type": "restricted", "description": "Use a reduced palette of 3–6 harmonious colors with clean tonal separation and no gradients.", "constraints": [ "No photorealistic rendering", "No texture or noise", "Avoid excessive detail" ] }, "shapes": { "treatment": "Reduce all forms to essential geometric contours and solid shapes.", "linework": "Use clean, even-weight line art or optionally no outlines depending on poster coherence.", "abstraction_level": "High, but not so high that the subject becomes unrecognizable." }, "lighting": { "handling": "Remove realistic lighting. Replace shadows and highlights with simplified, flat blocks of color or omit them entirely.", "allowed_effects": ["Hard-edge shadow shapes", "Subtle tonal areas"], "forbidden_effects": ["Soft shadows", "Complex reflections", "Photographic highlights"] } }, "subject_preservation": { "identity": "Maintain recognizable identity through silhouette, proportions, key facial landmarks, and essential features.", "proportions": "Keep accurate relative scale of body, head, and major elements.", "essential_details": [ "Define only the most important features needed for recognition.", "Remove fine texture, hair strands, pores, and small clothing details." ] }, "composition": { "framing": "Match the original crop unless specified otherwise.", "background": { "treatment": "Simplify into 1–2 large flat color fields or abstract geometric forms.", "forbidden_details": ["Real textures", "Complex scenery", "Photographic depth of field"] }, "hierarchy": "Subject should remain the focal point, with background serving as supportive minimal structure." }, "color_and_balance": { "poster_aesthetic": "High clarity, bold contrast, and legible silhouette.", "white_balance": "Neutral; avoid warm or cool photographic shifts.", "edge_integrity": "All edges must be crisp, clean, and consistently stylized." }, "output_requirements": { "format": "Flat, poster-like vector appearance (though raster output is acceptable).", "resolution": "Match original image resolution unless otherwise instructed.", "consistency": "No added text, logos, watermarks, or elements not present in the original." }, "prohibited_changes": [ "Do not alter identity.", "Do not add new objects or remove essential ones.", "No stylization that contradicts minimal vector aesthetics (e.g., painterly strokes, gradients, 3D shading)." ], "goal_summary": "Create a clean, minimalist vector-style interpretation of the original image, preserving silhouette, proportions, and essential identity while removing all non-essential details and realistic lighting cues." }
```

{
  "type": "image_generation_prompt",
  "style": "photorealistic, modern country aesthetic, elegant",
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "identity_preservation": {
      "use_uploaded_image": true,
      "fidelity": "maximum",
      "notes": "Capture and apply all facial features, facial structure, eye color, and skin tone from the reference image with maximum fidelity. Fuse user identity with the modern country character aesthetic."
    },
    "pose": {
      "framing": "mid-thigh up (medium-full shot)",
      "stance": "standing with a slight tilt to the side",
      "hand_position": "one hand touching the brim of the hat",
      "expression": "friendly, soft smile",
      "gaze": "looking directly at the camera"
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "top": "fitted, {argument name="top color" default="wine-colored (burgundy)"} long-sleeved shirt",
      "bottoms": "high-waisted, skin-tight khaki or beige jeans",
      "accessories": [
        "{argument name="hat color" default="white or light beige"} cowboy hat",
        "brown leather belt with large ornate silver buckle",
        "discreet gold necklace"
      ],
      "hair_style_override": "long, light blonde with darker highlights, wavy (as per aesthetic description, blended with user identity)"
    }
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "outdoor garden or park",
    "background": "blurred green foliage with a few red flowers and a light-colored (yellow or orange) structure in the distance",
    "lighting": {
      "type": "natural bright sunlight",
      "direction": "from above or side",
      "quality": "sunny day, vibrant, highlighting clothing and skin"
    }
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens": "prime portrait lens (85mm f/1.8 or 50mm f/1.4)",
    "aperture": "f/2.0 to f/2.8",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow (soft bokeh background)",
    "shutter_speed": "fast (1/500s to 1/1000s)",
    "iso": "100-200",
    "sensor": "full-frame"
  },
  "rendering": {
    "quality": "high definition",
    "realism": "ultra-realistic",
    "focus": "sharp focus on subject, blurred background"
  },
  "mood": {
    "atmosphere": "confident, warm, sunny",
    "emotion": "approachable and elegant"
  },
  "output_goal": "Create a seamless fusion of the user's facial identity with a modern country cowgirl aesthetic, ensuring accurate lighting and photorealistic camera effects."
}

### 859. 社论：夜间城市人像摄影中的身份保留

**作者**: [gemini_prompts](https://x.com/YeKyaHoRhaHaiBe/status/1999004269706658148)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张都市夜景中年轻女性的编辑级写实肖像，重点在于严格保留参考照片中的面部特征。它指定了复杂的灯光（暖色闪光灯、冷色阴影、轮廓光）、详细的服装（带文字的条纹针织毛衣），以及模拟胶片颗粒效果，以呈现高对比度、精致的画面。

![社论：夜间城市人像摄影中的身份保留](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967722895_4ij8rp_G73jxYbbAAAKCs8.jpg)

```
"Young woman (make the face 100% identical to the photo I provided), fair skin, with a messy, loosely tied dark-brown hair bun a few strands falling naturally around the face for a soft, effortless look.
Pose (Updated):
She is seated, waist-up framing.
Body slightly turned to the left; posture relaxed and natural.
Right hand resting casually on her lap or lightly touching the side of the chair.
Left hand holding the strap of the shoulder bag, which rests against her torso.
Head facing the camera; eyes looking softly into the lens.
Expression calm, slightly aloof, with a subtle closed-mouth smile - editorial, understated mood.
Clothing & Accessories:
Thick horizontal striped knit sweater ({argument name="sweater color 1" default="pink"}, {argument name="sweater color 2" default="mustard yellow"}, {argument name="sweater color 3" default="purple"}, {argument name="sweater color 4" default="white"}), slightly oversized with distressed collar and hem edges.
Large chest typography: "{argument name="typography text" default="DEADLY DOLL"}"
Black leather belt with simple buckle.
Dark leather shoulder bag (strap visible). Chunky silver rings on right hand; smaller rings on left hand.
Minimal natural makeup (matte skin, soft lip sheen).
Background & Atmosphere:
Nighttime urban street scene viewed behind her: blurred vehicle lights, traffic signals, neon accents.
Motion blur + bokeh, giving a lively city feel while she remains isolated by light.
Warm highlights on her face, cooler-toned shadows around her seat.
Lighting:
Main warm flash (around 3200K) slightly above eye level. Soft fill light from the right to keep sweater texture clear.
Subtle rim/backlight to separate her messy bun and shoulders from the dark background.
Fine 35mm film grain for analog realism.
Composition:
Portrait orientation, medium close-up (waist-up).
Face placed slightly left of center (rule of thirds).
Shallow depth of field (f/2.2-f/3.5): sharp on face and sweater, background softly blurred. Camera angle: eye-level or slightly high for a refined editorial feel.
Technical Notes:
35mm or 50mm prime (f/1.8-f/2.8).
Shutter: 1/125-1/200.
ISO 400-1600 for film grain or ISO 100 for flash-sharp clarity.
Output: 4K/6000x4000 px, 300 dpi.
Keep natural skin texture, sweater knit details, and metallic ring reflections.
Color & Post-Processing:
Warm midtones, teal-leaning shadows, medium-high contrast. Slightly boosted sweater saturation; natural skin tones.
Soft vignette around edges to keep focus on face.
Fine analog-style grain applied evenly.
Negative Prompt:
avoid cartoon, anime, extra limbs, distorted hands, unnatural skin smoothing, HDR look, blown highlights, watermark, low resolution, oversaturation, excessive lens flare."
```

> 一个复杂的图像生成提示，用于创建复古报纸布局效果：一个逼真的 3D 主体抠图（来自输入图像）物理性地撕裂老旧的棕褐色新闻纸背景。布局包括两栏模拟文章，分析主体的面部和服装。

![角色分析报纸撕裂效果](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967645196_8bk4om_G73g_EaaMAQ579U.jpg)
![角色分析报纸撕裂效果](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967644975_sd473e_G73g_EYaMAAP0hy.jpg)

```
(Masterpiece), (best quality), professional vintage newspaper layout. The BACKGROUND is aged sepia newsprint texture with worn edges.
TOP HEADER: A distinct, clean rectangular banner area ready for text "{argument name="header text" default="BeautyVerse News"}".
LEFT SIDE (THE SUBJECT): A striking, CLEAN, PHOTOREALISTIC, HIGH-RESOLUTION 3D cutout of the woman from the input image, physically popping out from the flat paper surface. She has vibrant natural colors and sharp focus, completely UNTOUCHED by the sepia vintage texture or grunge, looking like a glossy, new photo placed on top of old paper. It casts realistic deep shadows onto the aged paper below to show thickness.
The woman is tearing through the vintage newspaper background with her hands, stepping out of the page.

RIGHT SIDE (THE COLUMNS): Printed directly onto the aged paper background. The layout is strictly divided into TWO SEPARATE VERTICAL COLUMNS of black printed text.
COLUMN 1 (Inner Left): Simulated article analyzing the face. Format: BULLET POINTS list structure.
COLUMN 2 (Outer Right): Simulated article analyzing the outfit. Format: BULLET POINTS list structure.
DETAILS: Sharp black printed serif font, typewriter style, formal journalism aesthetic. Clean and organized layout (no messy handwriting). --ar 3:4
```

### 863. AI 足球运动员进球庆祝动作生成

**作者**: [K](https://x.com/ChillaiKalan__/status/1998937331752169818)  **日期**: 2025-12-11  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多步骤提示，指示 AI 首先分析拍摄对象的面部特征以推断国籍，然后自动选择一个匹配的世界知名足球俱乐部，接着将拍摄对象渲染成身穿该俱乐部主场球衣、正在进行高能量进球庆祝的形象。最终图像必须是超现实的体育照片，通过长焦镜头在富有戏剧性的体育场灯光下拍摄。

![AI 足球运动员进球庆祝动作生成](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967728404_yhteyl_G72m5pKbIAAicwb.jpg)
![AI 足球运动员进球庆祝动作生成](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765967728493_8wiph4_G72m5oUbUAA2K-4.jpg)

```
Analyze the input face features, skin tone, hair type, and bone structure to infer a plausible region or nationality, then automatically select a world-renowned professional football club matching that identity and outfit the subject in the club’s current official home kit with crest and sponsor visible. Autonomously choose one goal celebration that feels natural and high-energy: knee slide roaring, kissing the badge with emotion, airplane-run shouting at the sky, or fist-pump with a teammate hugging from behind. Render the final scene as a hyper-realistic sports photo shot on a long telephoto lens with compressed perspective, dramatic stadium night lighting, strong rim light, sweat on the subject, visible grass stains, razor-sharp facial focus, and a heavily blurred crowd in the background capturing the subject as a pro footballer celebrating a goal.
```

**Related**: [[运动休闲]]、[[综合时尚]]、[[建筑摄影]]

### 864. 图像编辑：背景和物体替换

> 一个两步提示公式，用于编辑现有图像，通过替换背景、更改主体服装和手持物品，同时保留原始姿势。第二个示例展示了一个结合了超现实圣诞主题的单次提示。

![图像编辑：背景和物体替换](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509733348_343wt9_G70alk7X0AEssNf.jpg)
![图像编辑：背景和物体替换](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509732810_7y627c_G70ahO5WUAAdJ__.jpg)
![图像编辑：背景和物体替换](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509733386_laievu_G70ahPLXEAAIeNY.jpg)

```
Replace the background with [{argument name="holiday theme background" default="Holiday theme background"}]. Change the person's outfit to [{argument name="outfit" default="Outfit"}]. The person is holding a [{argument name="object" default="Object"}]. Don't change the person's pose

Show me this photo as if a professional photographer captured it with proper lightly, color grading, depth of field. Also replace the background with {argument name="new background" default="jurassic dinosaur christmas time"}. The man is holding a {argument name="new object" default="dinosaur"}. Don't change the man's pose
```

### 866. 手持石榴的女性戏剧性空灵肖像（珀耳塞福涅美学）

**作者**: [Sharon Riley](https://x.com/Just_sharon7/status/1998794119318323200)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 3.0 设计的结构化 JSON 提示词，旨在创作一幅戏剧性、空灵且时尚前卫的肖像。图像中，一位身着深红色蕾丝连衣裙的女性手持石榴，妆容对比强烈且富有图形感，置身于柔和浪漫的蕾丝背景中，唤起人们对珀耳塞福涅（Persephone）等现代神话人物的联想。

![手持石榴的女性戏剧性空灵肖像（珀耳塞福涅美学）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509735603_z76kfy_G70kpmKaoAAh5Yc.jpg)
![手持石榴的女性戏剧性空灵肖像（珀耳塞福涅美学）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509735946_4mstzu_G70kpmNbsAAk7-M.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "A dramatic and ethereal portrait of a woman in a {argument name="dress color" default="deep red"} lace dress, holding two halves of a vibrant, ripe pomegranate. The woman has striking, highly contrasted makeup: bold red graphic blush extending from the temples and cheekbones, sharp red lipstick, and defined dark eyebrows. She has {argument name="eye color" default="bright blue"} eyes and dark hair pulled back into a sleek, low ponytail. The dress features a plunging V-neckline and voluminous, flared, sheer lace sleeves. She is accessorized with delicate gold jewelry, including small hoop earrings and a thin necklace. The background is soft and romantic, consisting of layers of sheer, textured, {argument name="background color" default="off-white or cream"} lace or tulle curtains, creating a soft-focus, dreamlike atmosphere. The lighting is rich, creating deep shadows and highlighting the textures of the lace and the sheen of the makeup and pomegranates. The overall aesthetic is evocative of a modern interpretation of a classical or mythological figure, possibly Persephone, with a focus on deep, passionate reds and ethereal whites. High-quality, professional photography, editorial style, dramatic lighting, detailed texture.",
  "style": [
    "Editorial Portraiture",
    "Dark Romance",
    "Ethereal",
    "Baroque-inspired",
    "Fashion Photography"
  ],
  "camera_settings": {
    "lens": "{argument name="lens" default="85mm or 50mm"} (shallow depth of field)",
    "aperture": "{argument name="aperture" default="f/1.8 - f/2.8"} (for strong bokeh in the background)",
    "lighting": "Contrasty, dramatic key light, soft fill light",
    "color_grading": "Rich, saturated reds and deep shadows"
  },
  "key_elements": [
    "Woman in deep red lace dress",
    "Holding halved pomegranates (ruby red seeds visible)",
    "Dramatic red graphic blush and lipstick",
    "Blue eyes, dark hair",
    "Plunging neckline",
    "Sheer lace background/curtains",
    "Gold jewelry"
  ],
  "mood": "Passionate, dramatic, mysterious, seductive, intense"
}
```

**作者**: [Gadgetify](https://x.com/Gdgtify/status/1998766220527521891)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> 一个创意提示，用于生成一张超广角鱼眼现实照片，内容是一个微小、宜居的小行星，上面覆盖着一个密集的东京式城市。极端的曲率导致城市完全环绕在头顶上方，倒置的摩天大楼布满了天空。

```
A ultra-wide-angle photograph from the surface of a tiny, habitable planetoid, only about 500 meters in diameter, covered in a dense Tokyo-like city. The curvature is so extreme that buildings on the "horizon" are visibly perpendicular to the viewer, and the city loops entirely overhead, filling the sky with inverted skyscrapers. The sun is visible as a star behind the overhead city. The ultimate fish-eye reality.
```

### 868. OOTD 杂志时尚拼贴提示词 (JSON/YAML)

**作者**: [Miu (みう) /Japanese beauty from Okinawa🌺](https://x.com/AI8263353539674/status/1998733358604615813)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: ja

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的高度结构化的 YAML/JSON 提示，旨在创建专业的“今日穿搭”（OOTD）杂志风格时尚拼贴画。它详细说明了布局比例、如何保留输入图像中的面部特征和服装细节、产品网格排列、排版和美学风格。

![OOTD 杂志时尚拼贴提示词 (JSON/YAML)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509814466_vc6zwh_G7ztZR2aoAABXkm.jpg)

```
{
  "target": "NanoBanana",
  "role_task": "Create a professional OOTD magazine-style fashion collage",
  "layout": {
    "left": {
      "width_ratio": 0.60,
      "preserve": {
        "face": true,
        "hairstyle": true,
        "outfit": true
      },
      "photo_style": "clean, bright, magazine-quality",
      "pose": "cute, amusing, slightly quirky, realistic atmosphere"
    },
    "right": {
      "width_ratio": 0.40,
      "background": "white",
      "product_grid": {
        "quantity": "[quantity]",
        "arrangement": "vertical",
        "final_module": "underwear_estimated_from_image",
        "module_fields": [
          "product_image_cutout_white_bg",
          "product_name",
          "price_yen"
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "example_products": [
    {"id":1, "name":"{argument name="Product 1 Name" default="[Product 1]"}", "price":"¥{argument name="Product 1 Price" default="[price]"}", "image":"[path_or_url_or_placeholder]"},
    {"id":2, "name":"{argument name="Product 2 Name" default="[Product 2]"}", "price":"¥{argument name="Product 2 Price" default="[price]"}", "image":"[path_or_url_or_placeholder]"},
    {"id":3, "name":"{argument name="Product 3 Name" default="[Product 3]"}", "price":"¥{argument name="Product 3 Price" default="[price]"}", "image":"[path_or_url_or_placeholder]"},
    {"id":4, "name":"{argument name="Product 4 Name" default="[Product 4]"}", "price":"¥{argument name="Product 4 Price" default="[price]"}", "image":"[path_or_url_or_placeholder]"},
    {"id":5, "name":"{argument name="Product 5 Name" default="[Product 5]"}", "price":"¥{argument name="Product 5 Price" default="[price]"}", "image":"[path_or_url_or_placeholder]"},
    {"id":6, "name":"{argument name="Product 6 Name" default="[Product 6] (final underwear)"}", "price":"¥{argument name="Product 6 Price" default="[price]"}", "image":"[path_or_url_or_placeholder]"}
  ],
  "typography": {
    "font_family": "modern_sans_serif",
    "product_name_weight": "medium",
    "price_weight": "bold"
  },
  "style": {
    "aesthetic": "bright, fresh, professional, Instagram fashion-blogger",
    "layout": "clean with generous white space",
    "color_palette": ["natural_tones", "white", "soft_gray"],
    "photo_quality": "professional_ecommerce_photography"
  },
  "output_requirements": {
    "file_format": "PNG or JPG at editorial resolution",
    "left_image_handling": "preserve original pixels for face/hair/outfit (no warp)",
    "right_images_handling": "clip to white background, consistent lighting and scale",
    "notes": "final module must reflect underwear inferred from uploaded image"
  }
}
```

### 869. Nano Banana Pro Master JSON 模板

**作者**: [Louis Gleeson](https://x.com/aigleeson/status/1998678041007194320)  **日期**: 2025-12-10  **语言**: en

> Nano Banana Pro 完整、高度结构化的 JSON 模板，旨在通过对场景、相机、灯光、色彩分级、文本元素、参考图像、角色、接地和风格限制进行详细控制，确保完美的图像生成。

![Nano Banana Pro Master JSON 模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509721407_mkqhyp_G7y7FdraMAAwAra.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_mode": "{argument name="generation mode" default="thinking|standard"}",

  "output_specifications": {
    "resolution": "{argument name="resolution" default="1K|2K|4K"}",
    "aspect_ratio": "{argument name="aspect ratio" default="16:9|1:1|9:16|custom"}",
    "quality_priority": "{argument name="quality priority" default="speed|balanced|quality"}"
  },

  "scene_description": {
    "primary_subject": "[{argument name="primary subject" default="main focus of image"}]",
    "environment": "[{argument name="environment" default="setting and background"}]",
    "atmosphere": "[{argument name="atmosphere" default="mood and feeling"}]",
    "style": "[{argument name="visual style" default="visual aesthetic"}]",
    "time_of_day": "[{argument name="time of day" default="if relevant"}]"
  },

  "camera_controls": {
    "angle": "[{argument name="camera angle" default="camera perspective"}]",
    "focal_length": "[{argument name="focal length" default="lens type - wide/standard/telephoto"}]",
    "depth_of_field": "[{argument name="depth of field" default="shallow/deep, what's in focus"}]",
    "composition": "[{argument name="composition" default="rule of thirds/centered/golden ratio/etc"}]"
  },

  "lighting_setup": {
    "primary_light": {
      "type": "[{argument name="light type" default="natural/studio/dramatic/soft"}]",
      "direction": "[{argument name="light direction" default="where light comes from"}]",
      "intensity": "[{argument name="light intensity" default="bright/moderate/moody"}]"
    },
    "shadows": "[{argument name="shadows" default="deep/subtle/minimal"}]",
    "color_temperature": "[{argument name="color temperature" default="warm/cool/neutral"}]",
    "special_effects": "[{argument name="special effects" default="rim light/backlighting/etc if needed"}]"
  },

  "color_grading": {
    "overall_tone": "[{argument name="overall tone" default="vibrant/muted/monochrome/etc"}]",
    "color_palette": ["{argument name="primary color" default="primary color"}", "{argument name="secondary color" default="secondary color"}", "{argument name="accent color" default="accent color"}"],
    "mood": "[{argument name="mood" default="emotional impact of colors"}]"
  },

  "text_elements": [
    {
      "text_content": "[{argument name="text content" default="exact text to render"}]",
      "position": "[{argument name="text position" default="location in image"}]",
      "font_style": "[{argument name="font style" default="typography description"}]",
      "size": "[{argument name="text size" default="relative size"}]",
      "color": "[{argument name="text color" default="text color"}]",
      "effects": "[{argument name="text effects" default="glow/shadow/3D/etc"}]",
      "language": "[{argument name="language" default="if not English"}]"
    }
  ],

  "reference_images": [
    {
      "image_id": 1,
      "purpose": "{argument name="reference purpose" default="style reference|composition reference|color reference|character reference"}",
      "extract_elements": ["{argument name="elements to copy" default="specific elements to copy"}"],
      "apply_to": "[{argument name="apply to" default="where to use these elements"}]",
      "transfer_intensity": "[{argument name="transfer intensity" default="0-100%"}]"
    }
  ],

  "characters": [
    {
      "character_id": 1,
      "detailed_description": "[{argument name="character description" default="ethnicity, age, gender, facial features, hair, expression"}]",
      "clothing": "[{argument name="clothing" default="detailed outfit description"}]",
      "pose": "[{argument name="pose" default="body position and gesture"}]",
      "position_in_scene": "[{argument name="position in scene" default="spatial placement"}]",
      "consistency_reference": "[{argument name="consistency reference" default="image_id if maintaining across multiple generations"}]"
    }
  ],

  "grounding": {
    "enabled": {argument name="grounding enabled" default="true|false"},
    "search_queries": ["{argument name="search queries" default="facts to verify"}"],
    "data_requirements": ["{argument name="data requirements" default="specific information needed"}"],
    "accuracy_priority": "{argument name="accuracy priority" default="high|medium"}"
  },

  "style_constraints": {
    "artistic_style": "[{argument name="artistic style" default="photorealistic/illustration/3D render/watercolor/etc"}]",
    "inspiration": "[{argument name="inspiration" default="specific artists or movements if relevant"}]",
    "must_avoid": ["{argument name="elements to avoid" default="elements to exclude"}"]
  },

  "technical_requirements": {
    "intended_use": "[{argument name="intended use" default="social media/print/web/presentation"}]",
    "safe_zones": "[{argument name="safe zones" default="areas to keep clear fo"}]"
  }
}
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[水彩]]、[[手绘素描]]

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的商业时尚摄影作品。画面中，一位身材苗条、金发蓬松的女模特身穿白色紧身衣和破洞低腰牛仔短裤，置身于简约的灰色影棚背景中，柔和的定向灯光营造出高端的时尚杂志质感。

![超逼真的商业时尚大片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509704246_2zvfsm_G7yHRO3WwAA4LK9.jpg)
![超逼真的商业时尚大片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765509704430_yku0eu_G7yGjGTXwAAhot4.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_description": {
    "subject": "A young adult female model, appearing to be in her early to mid-20s, with a slender and athletic build.",
    "face": "Slightly parted lips, direct gaze forward, with a subtle, confident expression. Impeccable skin texture with no visible pores or blemishes, radiating a healthy glow. Almond-shaped, light blue eyes with a slight upward tilt at the outer corners.",
    "hair": "Long, voluminous blonde hair, with a rich honey-blonde hue. The hair is styled in loose, flowing waves with a slightly tousled, wind-swept appearance, with strands gently falling across her face and shoulders.",
    "clothing": "A fitted, sleeveless white bodysuit with a scoop neckline. The fabric is smooth and appears to have a slight sheen. Below, she wears low-waisted, distressed denim shorts with frayed edges and visible stitching. The shorts are tight-fitting around the hips and thighs, showcasing a slightly worn-in appearance with a hint of a vintage look. The button fly is fully fastened, and the waistband sits low on her hips.",
    "accessories": "Simple, thin gold hoop earrings. Her fingernails appear to be unpolished or naturally colored.",
    "environment": "A clean, seamless studio background with a medium grey, slightly cool-toned color. The floor is a lighter grey, with a subtle gradient creating a soft shadow behind the model. The environment is minimalist and uncluttered, focusing all attention on the subject.",
    "lighting": "Soft, directional studio lighting from the front-right, creating gentle highlights on her skin and hair. Subtle specular highlights are visible on her arms, legs, and the curve of her décolletage. Shadows are soft and elongated, adding depth and dimension without being harsh.",
    "atmosphere": "Sophisticated, confident, and effortlessly stylish. The mood is clean, modern, and aspirational, typical of high-end fashion editorial photography."
  },
  "style": {
    "art_style": "Ultra-realistic commercial fashion photography, with a strong emphasis on editorial quality.",
    "color_grade": "A cool, desaturated palette with a slight emphasis on neutral greys and blues. Skin tones are natural and slightly warm, contrasted against the cooler background. Subtle color accents from the shorts' stitching and the shoelaces are present.",
    "texture_quality": "Extremely sharp focus on the subject, with exceptional micro-contrast and detail rendition. Skin texture is smooth but not artificial. Fabric textures of the bodysuit and denim shorts are rendered with high fidelity. Minimal to no visible digital noise or grain, implying a high-quality capture and post-processing."
  },
  "camera_settings": {
    "camera": "Implied Medium Format or high-end Full Frame sensor for exceptional detail and dynamic range.",
    "lens": "A prime portrait lens, likely in the 85mm to 135mm range, to provide flattering compression and subject isolation.",
    "aperture": "f/2.8 "
  }
}
```

### 871. 等距 3D 迷你房间与 Q 版角色

**作者**: [Alejo](https://x.com/ecommartinez/status/1998426679748985182)  **日期**: 2025-12-09  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的模板提示，用于生成一个等距 3D 微缩房间（一个真正的立方体剖面），其中包含一个 Q 版风格的小雕像角色。它要求用户描述房间、角色的外观（基于上传的照片）、动作、表情、灯光和技术相机细节，以确保生成逼真的、干净的构图。

![等距 3D 迷你房间与 Q 版角色](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440098843_rlyh7g_G7vWdLoaQAA16cy.jpg)
![等距 3D 迷你房间与 Q 版角色](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440099301_0csy0e_G7vWd_HbcAABi7W.jpg)
![等距 3D 迷你房间与 Q 版角色](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440099458_zwat8j_G7vWdlcbEAA4h5Y.jpg)
![等距 3D 迷你房间与 Q 版角色](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440100188_zt15f0_G7vWeX7aQAAe1s0.jpg)

```
An isometric 3D cube-shaped miniature room (shallow cutaway true cube; everything strictly contained within the cube). The room is [{argument name="room description" default="ROOM DESCRIPTION: Describe the theme, furniture, specific clutter, wall decorations, and key items in detail"}].
Character: a chibi/figurine-style — [{argument name="character description" default="INSERT DESCRIPTION OF THE PERSON FROM YOUR UPLOADED PHOTO HERE"}]. The character is [{argument name="action" default="ACTION: e.g., sitting on a chair typing, standing and cooking, playing guitar"}], with a [{argument name="expression" default="EXPRESSION: e.g., focused, happy, smiling"}] expression. Figure material looks like matte PVC, with big head / small body proportions. Lighting: [{argument name="atmosphere name" default="ATMOSPHERE NAME"}]: [{argument name="light sources" default="LIGHT SOURCES: e.g., neon blue glow, warm sunlight, golden lamp light"}]; realistic reflections and colored shadows. Camera: slightly elevated isometric three-quarter view, front cube edge centered; no elements protruding outside the cube. Photoreal materials with fine detail; neutral backdrop. Ultra-detailed, clean composition; no watermark.
```

### 872. Ada Wong 超逼真 Cosplay 自拍

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/1998332337449296148)  **日期**: 2025-12-09  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成一张逼真的、全身的、垂直的女性自拍，她正在扮演《生化危机 4 重制版》中的艾达·王。提示详细描述了她的特定服装（白色超短迷你裙、黑色皮革露背上衣）、配饰、姿势（一只眼睛上方的 V 字手势）以及背景（大胆的纯红色墙壁），以实现现代角色扮演自拍的美感。

![Ada Wong 超逼真 Cosplay 自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440092761_lj6ty9_G7uAqmeWEAEBhbJ.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": "Full-body vertical selfie of a woman with short straight dark hair cosplaying Ada Wong (RE4 Remake style), standing against a bold solid red wall. Wearing a sleek white micro-miniskirt with high side slits, tight black shiny leather halter top visible underneath, simple black choker, large slouchy taupe suede shoulder bag on right shoulder. Holding light smartphone in left hand, right hand making V-sign over one eye partially covering face, confident playful pose, bright even studio lighting, sharp focus on fabric textures and phone reflection, modern cosplay selfie aesthetic, photorealistic, 8k",
  "style": [
    "Photo-realistic",
    "Digital Photography",
    "Selfie aesthetic"
  ],
  "composition": [
    "Full-body vertical",

  "negative_prompt": [

    "blurry",

    "extra limbs",

**作者**: [gemini_prompts](https://x.com/YeKyaHoRhaHaiBe/status/1998252812220952628)  **日期**: 2025-12-09  **语言**: en

> 以下是四组为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细图像生成提示，侧重于不同的肖像风格：金色时段的艺术美学、细致的墨水素描、带有涂鸦的漫画素描风格，以及被鲜花环绕的高度精细的数字绘画。所有提示都强调与上传的参考照片中的面部特征相匹配。

![Nano Banana Pro 的四个素描和肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440012171_u51p3q_G7s4TPDbsAA8Jao.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 的四个素描和肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440012390_tti0f8_G7s4TPXaoAAh2Ff.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 的四个素描和肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440012810_xg6ubh_G7s4TO_bMAAMhaT.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 的四个素描和肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765440014940_zfh168_G7s4TQRacAAAalp.jpg)

```
Prompt 1:
"Ultra-realistic 8K mid-shot portrait. Use the exact face from the uploaded photo.
Warm, romantic "golden-hour muse" aesthetic - Vogue Fine Arts x Italian painting studio.
Hair: soft loose waves, natural volume, middle/side part, warm golden glow on strands.
Makeup: dewy luminous skin, golden highlighter, peach eyeshadow, long fluffy lashes, rosy watercolor blush, glossy peach-rose lips.
Outfit: cream/soft beige off-shoulder knit or white draped top (not black, not oversized). Exposed collarbone. Thin gold necklace, tiny pearl earrings, subtle gold rings.
Background: one HUGE colorful oil painting of her face, filling the entire background.
Soft warm brushstrokes, golden/peach/blush tones, creamy texture, flowing hair strokes, Renaissance-meets-modern glow. Rich, emotional, romantic.
Pose: mid-shot, slightly off-center. Exposed shoulder toward camera. Hands gently touching arm/table. Head slightly down, eyes softly lifted. Dreamy, warm, romantic expression.
Studio: warm artist's workspace - wooden desk, jars with brushes, oil paints, smeared warm pigments, golden sunlight from the side, dust in the light, reflections on wet oil paint.
Lighting: golden-hour soft warmth, gentle shadows, glowing skin + glowing painting.
Camera: Canon EOS R5, 50mm f/1.2, f/1.2, ISO 160. Luminous skin, creamy tones, painterly softness.
Exclude: no charcoal, no dark mood, no black clothing, entirely new warm aesthetic."

Prompt 2:
"Convert the Uploaded image into a Highly detailed sketch-style illustration  in a powerful yet peaceful pose.
Uploaded image with a beautiful dress well-defined same pose a exuding devotion and inner strength. The same dress with soft shading and artistic texture. The entire artwork is created with a fine ink-sketch effect, with loose scribble lines around the figure, giving it an artistic, hand-drawn look. Minimalist white textured background."

Bold hand-drawn doodles-arrows, sparks, scribbled words like "FOCUS!" and "CREATE!"-float around her.
Soft warm shading on her face, loose wavy hair, silver earrings catching the light. Casual earthy-toned outfit, relaxed posture, expressive eyes looking upward as if forming an idea.
Clean, modern comic-sketch style"

Prompt 4:
"A highly detailed digital painting portrait of a young woman(face exactly same as the reference image) with curly hair and an original, natural-looking face. The face structure and features must match 100% with the uploaded reference photo. She is smiling joyously with her eyes gently closed, wearing a bright red top. She is surrounded by an abundance of vibrant, meticulously detailed flowers in shades of pink, red, and cream. Soft white line-art butterflies flutter gracefully around her. The background is a rich
```

### 876. 特朗普、蒙娜丽莎和洞穴艺术猎人同框的超现实图书馆场景

**作者**: [Lukáš Eršil](https://x.com/lukasersil/status/1998141014838522305)  **日期**: 2025-12-08  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的一个复杂的多元素提示，用于生成一个超现实的场景：在一座现代大学图书馆内，唐纳德·特朗普、蒙娜丽莎（从画框中走出）和一位史前猎人（以旧石器时代洞穴艺术风格呈现）同时出现。

![特朗普、蒙娜丽莎和洞穴艺术猎人同框的超现实图书馆场景](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765438632033_uq2nzd_G7rSh1RXcAAw-uP.jpg)

```
"A photo of an everyday scene inside a modern university library. At a study table sits {argument name="person 1" default="Donald Trump"} working on a laptop, fully photorealistic and integrated naturally into the environment. Next to him is the {argument name="person 2" default="Mona Lisa"} portrayed in her original Renaissance painted style, appearing as if the painting’s figure had stepped out of its frame. Standing beside them is a prehistoric hunter depicted not as a realistic human, but in the authentic aesthetic of Paleolithic cave art: made of rough ochre and charcoal pigment strokes, simplified and flattened body shapes, uneven texture, and stone-like shading. The hunter appears as a three-dimensional embodiment of a cave painting, as though an ancient mural had materialized into the room."
```

### 881. Nano Banana Pro 的 9 宫格编辑照片网格提示

**作者**: [Pawan | AI Tech Girl](https://x.com/AITechGirl/status/1997752643138298206)  **日期**: 2025-12-07  **语言**: en

> 这是一个详细的多镜头提示，旨在“Nano Banana Pro”风格下，在干净、柔和的米色影棚环境中生成 3x3 的编辑照片网格。它详细说明了九个不同肖像镜头的角色外观、灯光、构图、相机设置（镜头、光圈、景深）和整体氛围，重点在于亲密、内省和以角色为主导的编辑极简主义。

![Nano Banana Pro 的 9 宫格编辑照片网格提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421886891_qpc6ze_G7lw2p6aIAAwTxV.jpg)

```
Editorial 3x3 photo grid in a clean soft beige studio. 
Character (matches reference 100%) wearing lightweight dark navy shirt, ivory trousers, barefoot for raw simplicity. 
Lighting: large diffused key light directly front-right, silver reflector left, subtle rim from top. 
Shots to include: 1. extreme close-up of lips + cheekbone with blurred hand partially covering (85mm, f/1.8, razor-thin DOF); 
2. tight crop on eyes looking into lens with reflection of light strip visible (85mm, f/2.0); 
3. black & white close portrait resting chin on fist, face filling frame (50mm, f/2.2); 
4. over-shoulder shot, blurred foreground fabric curtain framing half face (85mm, f/2.0); 
5. very close frontal with hands overlapping face, light streak across eyes (50mm, f/2.5); 
6. tight angled portrait showing hair falling into eyes, soft-focus background (85mm, f/2.2); 
7. crop of hands touching jawline, eyes cropped out (50mm, f/3.2, detail-focused); 
8. half-body seated sideways on low cube, head turned sharply away, blurred foreground (35mm, f/ 4.5); 
9. intense close-up of profile with single tear-like water droplet, cinematic light slice across (85mm, f/ 1.9). 
Angles: mostly tight headshots with slight high/low tilts, maintaining variation. Capture RAW, professional muted grade, smooth tonal contrast, subtle cinematic grain. Mood: intimate, introspective, character-led editorial minimalism with delicate use of fabric as prop.
```

### 884. 怀旧的 2000 年代初期数码相机人像提示

**作者**: [Oogie](https://x.com/oggii_0/status/1997610443251360053)  **日期**: 2025-12-07  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的图像生成提示，旨在模拟一张使用 2000 年代初期佳能小型数码相机拍摄的、真实、未经修饰且充满怀旧感的肖像。该提示详细说明了构图、光线（刺眼的直射闪光）、背景细节、色彩分级和相机设置，以实现真实的复古数码快照美学。

![怀旧的 2000 年代初期数码相机人像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421867244_69ecqt_G7jtPcQawAAQami.jpg)

```
Use facial feature of attached photo. A close-up shot of a young woman displayed on the screen of a compact Canon digital camera. The camera body surrounds the image with its buttons, dials, and textured surface visible, including the FUNC/SET wheel, DISP button, and the “IMAGE STABILIZER” label along the side. The photo on the screen shows the woman indoors at night, illuminated by a bright built-in flash that creates sharp highlights on her face and hair. She has long dark hair falling across part of her face in loose strands, with a soft, slightly open-lip expression. The flash accentuates her features against a dim, cluttered kitchen background with appliances, shelves, and metallic surfaces softly blurred. The mood is candid, raw, nostalgic, and reminiscent of early 2000s digital camera snapshots. Colors are slightly muted with cool undertones, strong flash contrast, and natural grain from the display. No text, no logos inside the photo preview itself.

Scale ratio: 4:5 vertical

Camera: compact digital camera simulation
Lens: equivalent to 28–35mm
Aperture: f/2.8
ISO: 400
Shutter speed: 1/60 with flash
White balance: auto flash
Lighting: harsh direct flash on subject, ambient low light in the background
Color grading: nostalgic digital-camera tones, high contrast flash, subtle display grain, authentic screen glow.
```

**Related**: [[综合艺术]]、[[室内设计]]、[[奇幻世界]]

### 885. 黄金时段豪华跑车人像提示，带面部锁定

**作者**: [Javeriya Editor](https://x.com/JadoonKhan281/status/1997515084722229719)  **日期**: 2025-12-07  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Google Gemini Nano Banana Pro 设计的极其详细的提示，专注于在黄金时段的豪华跑车内生成一张超逼真的 8K RAW 照片。该提示严格要求将女性和男性的面部、头发和衣服锁定到提供的参考图像。它指定了胶片模拟（Portra 400）、浅景深（f/1.4）、微观细节（皮肤毛孔、灰尘颗粒）和光线（柔和漫射的阳光），以实现高对比度、抓拍式且时尚的美学效果。

![黄金时段豪华跑车人像提示，带面部锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765421956363_yce03x_G7iZYgya4AAbc-M.jpg)

```
Edit the image, ensuring the face, hair, and clothes for BOTH the woman and the man are kept 100% identical to their respective uploaded images. These elements are locked and must not be changed or edited in any way. **Subjects** * **The Woman**: As described below, with face, hair, and clothes from her uploaded image. * **The Man**: He is the driver. His face, hair, and clothes should be kept 100% identical to a reference image. He has a relaxed and calm demeanor that complements the woman's style. **Realism & Photographic Details** * **Photography Style**: Ultra-realistic, photorealistic, 8K, RAW photo. * **Camera & Lens**: Shot on a 35mm film camera with a 50mm f/1.4 lens. Introduce subtle lens distortion and very slight chromatic aberration on the edges of high-contrast areas. * **Film & Grain**: Emulate the look of Portra 400 film with fine, natural film grain. Add halation, a soft red glow around highlights. * **Focus & Sharpeness**: Use a shallow depth of field (f/1.4) to create a soft, blurry background (bokeh). The focus should be critically sharp on the woman's eyes, with a natural fall-off. The man will be slightly less in focus. The overall image should not be artificially sharpened. * **Texture & Micro-details**: Render hyper-realistic skin texture on the woman, including visible pores, fine lines, and nearly invisible vellus hair (peach fuzz). Fabric textures on the car interior should be highly detailed. Capture subtle imperfections like dust motes in the air, fingerprints on the car window, and minor reflections on the glossy lips. **Lighting & Mood** * **Source & Quality**: Natural, soft-diffused sunlight from the "golden hour" (late afternoon) streaming through the car's side window (passenger side). * **Effect**: The light should cast soft shadows and create a warm, gentle glow primarily on the right side of the woman's face. The man, in the driver's seat, will be more in shadow, creating depth and dimension in the scene. Create specular highlights on the woman's cheekbones and glossy lips. * **Contrast**: The car's interior should be in shadow, creating a high-contrast scene that makes the subjects pop. **Pose & Composition** * **Scene**: A candid, stylish moment inside a **luxury sports car, open roof type** featuring two people. * **Woman's Pose**: She is in the passenger seat, leaning forward slightly, resting her chin on one hand in a candid, thoughtful, or slightly bored manner. * **Man's Pose**: He is in the driver's seat, relaxed, with one hand resting on the steering wheel. He is looking forward, focused on the road, or taking a quick, natural glance toward the woman. * **Angle**: Shot from a slightly low angle from the passenger side. * **Framing**: The woman is the primary subject in the foreground. Include her knees/legs to enhance the candid, casual feel. The man is partially framed, visible from the chest up. **Woman's Details** * **Expression**: A neutral, calm, confide
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[超现实]]

**作者**: [Heather Cooper](https://x.com/HBCoop_/status/1996975430490866014)  **日期**: 2025-12-05  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张专业修图师在暗黑学院风格工作站的照片。主要特点是一个漂浮在空中、用于编辑控制的专业级平视显示器（HUD），修图师正在用手操作它。该提示指定了场景、灯光（低调、屏幕发光）和技术风格（16:9 宽高比、商业摄影）。

![专业修图师 HUD 提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1765089391576_khjgf3_G7aukgHWQAAAE-u.jpg)

```
{
 "promptDetails": {
 "description": "A professional photo editor at their workstation, interacting with a floating, 'in-air' professional grade Heads-Up Display for editing controls.",
 "styleTags": [
 "Desk Setup Aesthetic",
 "Dark Academia (Modern)",
 "High Resolution Detail",
 "Productivity"
 ]
 },
 "scene": {
 "background": {
 "setting": "A dedicated, professional editing suite/desk setup",
 "details": "An ultra-wide, color-calibrated monitor (showing a sample photo), a mechanical keyboard, a large, comfortable chair, dark wooden desk surface, and soft ambient lighting."
 },
 "subject": {
 "description": "The person defined by `[UPLOADED IMAGE]`, wearing business-casual attire, eyes focused on the screen/overlay.",
 "pose": "Sitting in front of the monitor, one hand extended in front of the screen, subtly manipulating the floating UI with their fingers.",
 "focus": "The subject and the floating UI/tools are sharply defined."
 }
 },
 "overlayObject": {
 "type": "In-Air Professional Editing Control Panel",
 "relationshipToEnvironment": "A complex control panel floating between the subject's hand and the monitor, with sliders and dials.",
 "transform": "The panel is slightly curved to feel ergonomic, 3D graphic design.",
 "surfaceInteraction": "Transparent black background with bright, glowing orange and white vector controls (like 'Exposure', 'Contrast', 'Highlights').",
 "components": {
 "control": "Exposure Slider: +0.7",
 "toolActive": "Healing Brush",
 "position": "Floating just above the keyboard area."
 }
 },
 "technicalStyle": {
 "aspectRatio": "16:9 (Landscape)",
 "photographyStyle": "Commercial/Setup, Low-Key",
 "camera": {
 "shotType": "Medium Shot/Wide Shot (to capture the setup)",
 "angle": "Slightly side-on, capturing the subject's profile and the monitor's glow.",
 "depthOfField": "Deep, to show off the entire desk setup as a product shot."
 },
 "lighting": {
 "type": "Screen Glow and Desk Lamp",
 "description": "Cool-white light from the monitor acting as the main fill, with a warm, subtle desk lamp providing accent lighting."
 },
 "color": {
 "palette": "Deep grays, blacks, dark woods, and the saturated colors of the digital tools."
 }
 }
}
```

{
  "task_configuration": {
    "task_type": "screen_simulation_photorealism",
    "target_model": "SDXL_1.0_Refiner",
    "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
    "resolution": {
      "width": 1152,
      "height": 1536
    }
  },
  "visual_hierarchy": {
    "layer_1_physical_macro": {
      "camera_angle": "Downward-angled, high-angle",
      "framing": "MacBook screen filling 95% of frame",
      "surface_imperfections": [
        "subtle pixel-grid texture (moire)",
        "tiny dust particles on glass",
        "faint ambient light reflection on glossy screen",
        "fingerprint smudges"
      ],
      "foreground_anchor": "Thin strip of physical keyboard visible at lower edge"
    },
    "layer_2_digital_interface": {
      "theme": "Dark Mode (macOS)",
      "window_layout": {
        "left_panel": "Spotify 'Liked Songs' playlist (dimmed)",
        "right_panel": "Photo Booth live-preview window (dominant focus)"
      }
    },
    "layer_3_nested_subject_content": {
      "context": "Inside the Photo Booth window",
      "environment": "Dim bedroom, off-white wall, rumpled bedding",
      "lighting_simulation": "Cool screen glow mixed with warm skin tones, deep nocturnal shadows",
      "subjects": {
        "shared_attributes": [
          "Oversized black hoodies",
          "Hoods pushed back (faces fully visible)",
          "Reclining pose",
          "Looking at screen"
        ],
        "subject_a_guy": {
          "identity_target": "{argument name="guy reference image" default="2nd image attached"}",
          "action": "Holding phone in right hand with clear reflective case",
          "position": "Right/Center"
        },
        "subject_b_girl": {
          "identity_target": "{argument name="girl reference image" default="1st image attached"}",
          "action": "Resting closely beside Subject A",
          "position": "Left/Center"
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "prompt_assembly": {
    "positive_prompt": "Hyper-realistic downward shot of a MacBook screen. The screen surface has visible dust, pixel grid, and reflection. The screen displays a Photo Booth window showing a couple in a dark room. [Subject Descriptions]. They are wearing black hoodies. The lighting is low-key, candid, nocturnal, blue-ish screen glow. High fidelity, raw photo, unedited.",
    "negative_prompt": "vector art, screenshot, flat digital image, clean glass, perfect screen, daylight, bright studio lights, cartoon, 3d render, painting, watermark"
  },
  "identity_preservation_settings": {
    "strictness_level": "CRITICAL",
    "methodology": {
      "face_restoration": false,
      "note": "Disable generic face restorers (CodeFormer) to avoid 'plastic' look. Use IP-Adapter.",
      "control_net_stack_multiline_placeholder": "[ControlNet configuration continues here]"
    }
  }
}

Generate a photorealistic image shot with an {argument name="device" default="iPhone 17"} on a {argument name="day of week" default="Wednesday"} morning in {argument name="month and year" default="March 2025"} in Plaza de la Constitución, {argument name="city" default="Málaga"}. The atmosphere is bright but cool, with soft spring light illuminating the square. On a café terrace, locals are drinking coffee. The image should feel candid, unstaged, and captured with the crisp morning realism of an iPhone photo.

### 896. 自然 Instagram 风格的汽车自拍提示

**作者**: [Yanhua 彦华](https://x.com/yanhua1010/status/1995802645542649993)  **日期**: 2025-12-02  **语言**: zh

> 一个英文的 Nano Banana Pro 提示词，用于生成一张年轻女性在豪车中自拍的自然 Instagram 风格照片，包含详细的姿势、服装、灯光和构图说明。

![自然 Instagram 风格的汽车自拍提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909265721_6eyr9m_G7KCs8fbEAA0CWK.jpg)

```
自然Instagram风格自拍，{argument name="人物描述" default="年轻女性"}，{argument name="发型与发色" default="长而浓密的黑色波浪卷发"}，
坐在{argument name="车辆类型" default="豪华车辆"}的{argument name="座椅颜色" default="米色皮革座椅"}上。

她穿着{argument name="上衣" default="白色长袖扣子衬衫"}，在胸部下方打结形成露脐上衣效果，
搭配{argument name="下装" default="浅色水洗牛仔短裤"}。可见小巧的肚脐银色穿孔。

一只手臂举起放在头后，呈现放松的姿态，另一只手自然地放在
腿部或大腿上。身体微微转向镜头方向，舒适地向后靠在座椅上。

眼神直视镜头，自信而性感的表情，自然柔和的妆容，光泽感的
双唇。

从平视或略微俯视的角度拍摄，就像用自拍杆或手机前置摄像头
拍摄一样。中景近景构图，从腰部到头部，主体填充画面大部分区域。

明亮的自然日光透过车窗涌入，背景中可见郁郁葱葱的绿树。柔和
均匀的光线优美地照亮面部和身体。

温暖的米色皮革内饰营造出舒适奢华的氛围。坦率的生活摄影美学，
带有真实的社交媒体自拍氛围。

色彩：明亮、通透、略带暖色调。面部和上半身清晰对焦。
```

**作者**: [Mehrad Bayat](https://x.com/mehbayat/status/1995751427684102239)  **日期**: 2025-12-02  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细 JSON 提示模板，用于生成超理想化的抖音风格女孩夜间肖像，包括构图、环境、灯光、相机设置和负面约束。

![JSON 风格的 Nano Banana Pro 提示词，用于生成逼真面孔](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909180287_r3oc7o_G7JVSHyXUAATq4h.jpg)

```
{
"intent": "Generate a hyper-idealized, Douyin-style night portrait of the same girl attached in reference image using direct flash photography, creating a sharp, high-contrast glow.",
"frame": {
"aspect_ratio": "16:9",
"composition": "Extreme close-up selfie framing focused tightly on eyes and lips, forehead slightly cropped, centered gaze.",
"style_mode": "Flash photography, digital influencer aesthetic, soft-focus realism"
},
"subject": {
"identity": "the same girl attached in reference image with soft youthful features and understated elegance.",
"skin": " with smooth luminous finish reflecting the flash, creating a glassy glow with minimal texture.",
"hair": " loose, naturally wavy catching specular highlights from the flash.",
"wardrobe": "Minimal visibility of a simple, understated top suited for a city night."
},
"environment": {
"location": "Nighttime {argument name="city type" default="indian city"}.",
"weather": "Clear, calm night sky.",
"background": "Dark urban backdrop with blurred bokeh lights from buildings."
},
"lighting": {
"type": "Direct frontal phone flash or high-intensity screen light",
"quality": "Hard, flat lighting eliminating deep shadows and creating a smooth two-dimensional glow",
"contrast": "Strong separation between the illuminated face and the dark city background",
"catchlight": "Small flash reflection in the center of pupils"
},
"camera": {
"sensor_format": "Smartphone main camera simulation",
"lens": "24mm wide-angle lens exaggerating eye size and softening facial proportions",
"aperture_depth_of_field": "f/1.8–f/2.2, sharp on eyes and lips, instant blur on background and edges of hair",
"focus": "Critical focus on iris texture and lashes"
},
"negative": {
"content": "No wet hair, no snow, no rain, no masculine features, no visible pores, no contour-heavy makeup, no sunglasses, no hands in frame.",
"style": "No dramatic shadows, no vintage tones, no painterly effects, no warm film look."
}
}
```

### 898. Nano Banana Pro 的专业头像照片提示

**作者**: [lucas](https://x.com/lucas_flatwhite/status/1994776765349364059)  **日期**: 2025-11-29  **语言**: ko

> 一个详细的韩语提示模板，用于使用 Nano Banana Pro 从输入图像生成专业高质量的个人资料照片，并可控制构图、服装、背景颜色、光线、镜头和情绪。

![Nano Banana Pro 的专业头像照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909196159_r2hp0o_G67ej0KbkAAWzN0.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 的专业头像照片提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909198332_lb4go4_G67ej0JaQAAm4tR.jpg)

```
고화질의 전문적인 프로필 사진으로, 입력 이미지 속 인물의 정확한 얼굴 구조, 신원, 주요 특징을 유지합니다. 피사체는 가슴 위로 프레임 되며, 충분한 헤드룸을 확보합니다. 인물은 카메라를 정면으로 바라봅니다. 고급스러운 스마트 캐주얼 블레이저를 은은한 차콜 그레이 색상으로 입혀 전문적인 포토 스튜디오 촬영 스타일로 연출합니다. 배경은 단색 "{argument name="배경 색상" default="#562226"}"의 뉴트럴 스튜디오 색상입니다. 하이 앵글에서 촬영하며, 밝고 통풍이 잘 되는 부드러운 확산광의 스튜디오 조명을 사용하여 얼굴을 은은하게 비추고 눈에 미묘한 캐치라이트를 만들어 명료함을 전달합니다. 85mm f/1.8 렌즈로 촬영하며, 얕은 피사계 심도, 눈에 절묘하게 초점이 맞춰지고, 아름답고 부드러운 보케를 구현합니다. 블레이저의 직물 질감, 머리카락 한 올 한 올, 자연스럽고 사실적인 피부 질감에 선명한 디테일을 포착합니다. 분위기는 자신감, 전문성, 접근 용이성을 발산합니다. 깨끗하고 밝은 시네마틱 색 보정에 미묘한 따뜻함과 균형 잡힌 톤을 더하여, 세련되고 현대적인 느낌을 보장합니다.
```

### 901. 未来主义面部年龄检测器信息图肖像

**作者**: [Saman | AI](https://x.com/Samann_ai/status/1992901987805835279)  **日期**: 2025-11-24  **语言**: en

> 一个长篇、详细的提示，用于创建一张超写实肖像信息图，该信息图通过叠加层和标注百分比分析面部衰老因素，风格类似于高端美妆科技广告。

![未来主义面部年龄检测器信息图肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764209283961_v9vxxb_G6g1yJ9WIAAaRg0.jpg)
![未来主义面部年龄检测器信息图肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764209286585_u12ys0_G6WdE9OWYAASxko.jpg)

```
A hyper-realistic, high-resolution portrait infographic based on ({argument name="reference_photo" default="your photo"}). Keep the same person, identity, hairstyle, clothing and natural skin tone from ({argument name="reference_photo_short" default="your photo"}), with a neutral studio background.Overlay a subtle, semi-transparent facial analysis grid on the entire face, very similar to a 3D face-scanning mesh: thin, soft white lines following the facial contours, slightly glowing but not hiding the skin details. Add one clean vertical red laser line running down one side of the face, like a futuristic scan. All analysis lines must be soft, minimal and elegant, exactly like a cosmetic-tech advertisement.Create a clean medical–aesthetic infographic that evaluates 5 aging factors using global data percentages:1. Fine lines and wrinkles2. Skin texture and elasticity3. Facial volume and sagging4. Eye area aging signs5. Skin tone and pigmentationFor each factor, place a small label with a thin line pointing to the relevant facial area, and next to it write a short title and a realistic percentage score from 0–100% (based on global data), for example:“Fine lines & wrinkles – 18%”“Skin texture & elasticity – 72%”“Facial volume & sagging – 35%”“Eye area aging signs – 41%”“Skin tone & pigmentation – 63%”Use clean, modern, sans-serif typography and small technical-style text, like a scientific facial analysis UI. At the bottom of the image, in the center, write a large bold text showing the final estimated real age based on the analysis, for example:“ESTIMATED AGE: (random number based on face analysis ) ”Overall style: futuristic AI-guided skincare analysis, minimalistic, premium editorial lighting, no gender mentioned, suitable for any human face.
```

### 902. 高对比度、边缘光照的黑白概念侧面肖像

**作者**: [Alejo](https://x.com/ecommartinez/status/1992563816568369426)  **日期**: 2025-11-23  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成强大、极简、高对比度黑白侧面肖像的长篇英文提示，肖像从黑暗中浮现，具有长焦镜头效果、超逼真的 8K 电影渲染和强烈的轮廓光，并以用户照片作为参考。

![高对比度、边缘光照的黑白概念侧面肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1764909150771_t76oy1_G6cCOxSbwAAGcLP.jpg)

```
A powerful, high-contrast black-and-white side-profile portrait of a person (attached photo), with distinctly human yet timeless features — emerging from complete darkness. The composition is minimalist and sculptural, where form, light, and shadow define the subject rather than color or texture.
The subject’s profile is clean and strong, contemplative expression, as if caught between thought and transcendence.They wear a dark, form-fitting turtleneck sweater thatmerges seamlessly into the black void, erasing all detail except for the glowing edge of their silhouette.

A single, narrow rim light bright, sharp, and directional carves out the shape of the head, neck, and shoulder, tracing the contours with precision. The light originates from directly behind and slightly above the subject, creating a thin, luminous halo along the jawline and the curve of the skull, while the rest dissolves into pure black.

...

The background is absolute darkness,a void without texture or depth, emphasizing the luminous boundary between shadow and light. There are no midtones, only the purest black and the a deliberate contrast that brightest whites heightens drama and abstraction.

Mood & Aesthetic: Minimalist, conceptual, and deeply introspective. The image evokes solitude, contemplation, and timeless elegance. It feels cinematic yet intimate through light. an exploration of identity

Technical details:

Shot with a telephoto lens for compressedperspective.

Aperture wide open (f/1.8-2.8) to the glowing contour with shallow depth of field.

Optical realism: rendered with ultra-realistic 8K cinematic quality, incorporating true lens physics, depth of field, and subtle film grain, front face good lightning.(use my picture for reference)

Inspirado por @ShreyaYadav___
```
